E: "The Crates Are the Keys"

C:
天才俱乐部的黑塔不满足于寻常世界的万物法则，她将目光投向了银河中未解的存在，并期待那些遥远的神秘能够满足自己的好奇心。为此，黑塔主导建立了博物馆式星际舰船，并将它发射至行星轨道，开始了「将一切怪异封印在星空之中」的研究工作。远近闻名的黑塔空间站就此诞生。

时至如今，空间站已经拥有了数不胜数的奇物「藏品」，是一座名副其实的星空博物馆。大量的随舰研究人员也都定居于此，他们不断地从银河各处收集遗器和奇物，记录它们的形致与功能，建立起系统的观测与研究方法…最终从谜题中找出更加费解的谜题。这也正是黑塔的最初的目的。

数量众多的「藏品」常常招来嫉妒的目光，各种势力在暗中摩拳擦掌。凭借着黑塔的实力，空间站很少陷入真正的危机，收藏和研究工作仍在有条不紊地进行之中。
E:
Not content with the laws of the common world, Herta of the Genius Society set her sights on the unexplained existences of the cosmos, expecting those distant mysteries to satisfy her curiosity. To this end, Herta led the establishment of a museum-like starship and launched it into orbit, starting the research to "seal all strange existences among the stars." That was how the famous Herta Space Station was born.

Nowadays, the space station possesses innumerable Curios and is a veritable space museum. A great number of researchers also live on the station. They continuously collect relics and Curios all over the cosmos, record their appearances and functions, establish systematic methods to observe and study them... ultimately finding even more confounding enigmas from their studies. That in fact, was Herta's initial goal.

This large "collection" often attracts jealous eyes. Various forces watch from the shadows. Due to Herta's power, the space station had rarely experienced a real crisis, and the collection and investigation work continues to operate in an orderly manner.

C: 「万界之癌」在诸界蔓延之时，名为「裂界」的侵蚀现象也在悄然滋生。博识学会认为两者之间存在因果关系，即「裂界」由「星核」催生，将接触到的事物与空间转变为特殊的裂界造物。造物普遍以侵蚀的形式存在，它似乎保有原型的记忆与习惯，但外在表现上则大相径庭，往往表达出强烈的排他性。研究裂界的学者警告称：被裂界侵蚀的物件与其原型应当视为毫无关联的两种存在，对其抱有的一切幻想皆会引致严重的后果。\n\n除侵蚀以外，「裂界」还会记录被裂界接触事物的以太信息，与裂界本身保存的数据混合，产出一种经过嫁接的裂界造物。在每个被万界之癌侵蚀的世界里，无数遗器、裂界怪物、甚至被神秘分隔的异空间诞生在各个角落，人们仍在研究这一举动背后的目的。
E: As the Cancer of All Worlds spreads along the worlds, the corrosive phenomenon of Fragmentum is also quietly expanding. The Intelligentsia Guild believes there is a direct, causative relationship between the two phenomena. They believe that the Fragmentum is caused by the Stellaron, and converts the entities and spaces it touches into special Fragmentum creations. These creations usually exist as a type of spatial corrosion. They seem to preserve the memories and habits of the original physical entity, but manifest significantly different outward behaviors and are often very hostile towards other beings. The scholars researching Fragmentum warn that we should consider any being corroded by Fragmentum to be a completely unrelated existence to its original form. Harboring any kind of delusions towards it could cause grave consequences.\n\nApart from corrosion, the Fragmentum also records the Aether information of the entities and spaces touched by the Fragmentum. Such data is combined with the information inherent in the Fragmentum and develop into a type of hybrid Fragmentum creation. Countless Relics, Fragmentum monsters, and even mysteriously isolated paranormal spaces would spring up in every corner of the worlds corroded by the Cancer of All Worlds. We are still investigating the intent behind such activities.

E: Lord Ravager (Character)

E: Device IX — Nihility

E: Disseminating Illegal Information

E: Apologies, you are currently ineligible

E: Nitrous Burst

E: "Ring ring!"

C: 向你心中真正的大人物致敬！
E: Hats off to the truly great people in your heart!

C: 结识街角的「小动物」毕丝塔
E: Meet the "small animal" Beastar on the street corner

C: 找到损坏的喷钞机并尝试修复它
E: Find and attempt to repair the broken Cash-Spewer

C: 探索并发现修建中的观景台
E: Explore and discover the observation deck under construction

C: 察觉某人关于门的记忆
E: Perceive someone's memory about doors

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 艾丝妲称空间站的局势已得到控制，赞叹星穹列车的乘员个个身手不凡。姬子提议由她去安抚科员们，以遏止弥漫在空间站内的恐慌。
E: Asta mentioned the situation in the space station was under control, and praised the capabilities of Astral Express members. Himeko suggested that she calm the other researchers to stop the panic from spreading.

C: 姬子称赞你们的「开拓」表现，瓦尔特称需要尽快决定下一站目的地。若你对雅利洛星球之事仍有疑惑，不妨与姬子和瓦尔特聊聊。
E: Himeko commended your Trailblazing efforts, while Welt reminded you that the next destination had yet to be decided. If you still had lingering questions about Jarilo, both were open to a final chat.

C: 银狼向列车组发来讯息，称星核猎手<color=#f29e38ff>萨姆</color>已经抵达匹诺康尼。银狼将一段代码传输给列车组，藉此可以去往你所经历的深层梦境。
E: Silver Wolf sent a message to the Express Crew, claiming that the so-called Stellaron Hunter <color=#f29e38ff>Sam</color> had already arrived at Penacony. Silver Wolf transmitted a set of codes to the Crew which allowed you to access the Deep Dreamscape you experienced before.

C: 黄泉转身向流萤遇袭处走去，为其哀悼。「愿死亡结束你漫长的梦，引领你归还清醒的世界。」
E: Acheron turned around and walked toward the place where Firefly was attacked, mourning the lost. "May death be the end of your boundless dream... guiding you back to the waking world."

C: 星期日与真理医生密谈，以星核知识来交换砂金的计划。真理医生称，「基石」匣中装的是「托帕石」，而「砂金石」正装在礼金袋中。
E: Sunday and Dr. Ratio had a secret agreement to exchange information about the Stellaron for Aventurine's plan. Dr. Ratio claimed that the Cornerstone box contained the topaz stone, and the aventurine stone was in a gift bag.

C: 自称为「蕉授」的校长发表讲话，本学期所有课程和考试都将取消，学生只需参与校庆便可获取学分。台下的学生们欢呼雀跃。
E: The dean, who introduced himself as Profnana, gave a speech announcing that all courses and exams for the semester would be canceled, with students only needing to attend the school anniversary to earn credits. Students in the audience celebrated in cheer.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「迷迷」</color>出现在你身边，梦中与先前的声音正是由它发出，欧洛尼斯让迷迷与你同行。你得知只要收集记忆，迷迷就能复现过去。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Mem</color> showed up beside you. The dreams and voices you heard came from it. Oronyx had sent Mem to stay with you. You learned that if you collected memories, Mem could show you events from the past.

C: 宣泄过后，去开个庆功宴吧。
E: After letting it all out, it was time to have a celebration feast!

C: 彦卿以意志对抗熔炬的蛊惑，素裳坚守至力竭，终于等来了众人。景元现身点破彦卿心魔，彦卿终于醒悟，向岁阳「熔炬」宣战。
E: Yanqing resisted Apyra's lure with his will, while Sushang stood firm until her strength gave out. Help eventually arrived. Jing Yuan appeared and confronted the shadows in Yanqing's heart, awakening him. Yanqing then declared war against the heliobus Apyra.

C: 银狼决定直接骇入监控系统，黑塔的收藏一定独立于系统之外。一番操作之后，监控屏幕转化为银狼的样式。
E: Silver Wolf decided to hack into the monitoring system directly, as Herta's collection must be listed independent of the system. After a series of operations, the monitor turned into Silver Wolf's style.

C: 三月七称，待会儿要乘坐电梯前往主控舱段。你表示自己对空间站的构造不熟，三月七从你的着装怀疑你并非科员。
E: March 7th mentioned you'd soon be taking the elevator to the master control zone. You admitted you weren't familiar with the structure of the space station. March 7th glanced at your outfit and questioned whether you were a researcher.

C: 你们在永冬铭碑旁遇到虎克和佩拉，并为她们拍照。佩拉称赞你的拍照技术，虎克则请求将这张照片送给她作为礼物。
E: At the Everwinter Monument, you bumped into Hook and Pela. You offered to take their picture. Pela praised your photography skills, while Hook eagerly asked for a copy to keep as a gift.

C: 离开房间的门被锁住。真理医生认为开门的提示可能在那座显眼的<color=#f29e38ff>沙盘</color>里，与砂金返回调查。
E: The door to exit the room was locked. Dr. Ratio thought that the hint to opening the door could be in that eye-catching <color=#f29e38ff>sandpit</color>, and went back to investigate with Aventurine.

C: 砂金将宝石赠予路人，向其打听「死亡」。醉醺醺的波奇讲起「苏乐达的恶魔」，将「死亡」描述为脖子很大的海马。
E: Aventurine gave the gem to a passer-by and asked him about "Death." The drunken Bocchi talked about "the Devil of SoulGlad," and described death as a seahorse with a wide neck.

C: 你醒来后从三月七处得知星核已封印，四大家族邀请列车组登上「晖长石号」商讨后续。
E: After waking up, you learned from March 7th that the Stellaron had already been sealed. The four lineages invited the Crew to board the Radiant Feldspar to discuss future movements.

C: 你在炸弹集合地点再次遇到流萤，她已率先抵达炸弹旁。
E: You once again encountered Firefly at the location of the bomb. She had already reached the bomb.

C: 乱破出色地完成破除阵法的任务，为巡海游侠的到来创造条件。「叆叇馆主」率领战斗猿们前来清算「苦茶大师」，与乱破开战。
E: Rappa brilliantly completed the mission of breaking through the matrix, paving the way for the Galaxy Rangers' arrival. Umbra Headmistress, leading her Combat Apes, came to settle scores with Master Kucha, triggering a battle with Rappa.

C: 战斗结束后，「苦茶大师」命令乱破离开。以私藏武器的一声枪响，「苦茶大师」了结与「叆叇馆主」之间的恩怨。
E: After the battle, Master Kucha ordered Rappa to leave. With a gunshot from a concealed weapon, Master Kucha settled the old score with the Umbra Headmistress.

C: 白厄拜托你与丹恒、缇宝去劝回不愿前往圣城的诺杜斯祭司。在此前的交流中，白厄向当地人隐瞒了你们「天外之人」的身份。
E: Phainon requested that you, Dan Heng, and Tribbie convince the priest Noldus to come to the holy city. You noticed Phainon had been careful to hide your identities as "outsiders" when talking to locals.

C: 你仰头眺望，看到高悬于空中的「天谴之锋」。
E: You glanced up and spotted the Blade of Fury hanging in the air.

C: 你看到星核猎手萨姆、卡芙卡与刃在商讨撤退信号，刃提议使用一句旧时的暗号——「观隅反三，君命无二，凭城借一。」
E: You saw Stellaron Hunters Sam, Kafka, and Blade talking about retreat signals. Blade recommended an old code — "Three of a kind, two pair, ace."

C: 阿格莱雅用金线探测第三处异象，揪出消灭了异象中所藏怪物的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯。阿格莱雅让贼灵转告赛飞儿，劝其履行半神的职责。
E: Aglaea used her golden thread to investigate the third anomaly, exposing the lurking "Spirithief" Bartholos. Aglaea then had the Spirithief to deliver a message to Cipher, urging her to fulfill her duties as demigod.

C: 你与遐蝶向商人询问情况，得知缇安所看中的是一块火山玻璃。遐蝶当即决定将其买下，打算将其缝装到羊毛毡里，作为给缇安的礼物。
E: You and Castorice asked the merchant about the item, learning that what Trianne wanted was a piece of volcanic glass. Without hesitation, Castorice bought it, intending to stitch the piece into felted wool as a gift for Trianne.

C: 母亲说，要寻找能团结众人的「船长」。缇宝找到一个拿纺锤的娃娃，觉得在找到船长之前，可以由名为「缇宝」的伙伴领航。
E: Tribbie's mother spoke of finding a "captain," one that could unite them all. Tribbie picked up a spindle-holding doll and appointed her, "Tribbie," to guide the crew until the captain showed up.

C: 你与阿格莱雅质问遐蝶，为何与那刻夏达成合作。遐蝶看到了一段漫长而沉重的过去，事关重大，她希望让你知晓整个过程。
E: You and Aglaea asked Castorice why she struck a deal with Anaxa. Castorice explained that she was shown a past both long and heavy. As the matter was of great consequence, she asked you to hear the entire story, from beginning to end.

C: 来古士统计表决结果，「继续逐火之旅」与「暂停逐火之旅」的票数相等。半神议会中仍有一位未投票的公民，是那刻夏。
E: Lygus counted the votes, and revealed that those supporting and ending the Flame-Chase Journey were equal in number. There was only one citizen who had yet to cast their vote in the Demigod Council: Anaxa.

C: 根据法典，渎神者必遭审判。阿格莱雅判处凯妮斯与来古士玩忽职守，放任亵渎。而在公民大会的「一致欢呼」下，那刻夏被判处死刑。
E: As per Okhema's Codex, blasphemers had to be judged. Aglaea decreed that Caenis and Lygus stood accused of neglecting their duties and abusing the law, leading to the egregious act of blasphemy. As for the blasphemer himself, Anaxa was sentenced to death amidst a storm of cries of accord from the citizens' assembly.

C: 赛飞儿将打赌赢来的财宝交给阿格莱雅，想要买下店里最昂贵的衣装。阿格莱雅却只将一双金靴交给赛飞儿，称其受到「诡计」的祝福。
E: In the past, Cipher gave Aglaea all the treasure she had won in a bet, and wanted to buy the most expensive outfit in her store. However, Aglaea only gave Cipher a pair of golden boots, saying they had been blessed by "Trickery."

C: 哈托努斯称圣城濒临毁灭，唯有「再创世」能拯救家园；缇宁已在涡心等待，刻法勒的火种很安全。为掩护你们，哈托努斯与怪物死战。
E: Chartonus said the holy city was on the brink of destruction, and only Era Nova could save it. Trinnon was already waiting at the Vortex, and the Coreflame of Kephale was safe and sound. To cover your escape, Chartonus stayed behind to battle the monster.

C: 你与昔涟遇到断锋爵。断锋爵称，城中总有些闲言泼语，好在<color=#f29e38ff>神礼官</color>已对凯撒许诺了命运。至于这位大人的行踪，凯撒则下令严格保密。
E: You and Cyrene encountered Dux Fragoris. He remarked that gossip was always stirring in the city, though the <color=#f29e38ff>Theoros</color> had already promised the Imperator her fate. As for the whereabouts of that noble figure, the Imperator had ordered strict secrecy.

C: 行将离去之前，奇怪的感觉越来越强烈。你尝试以问题检验「三月七」的真实性，对方却称愿意坦诚相待。
E: As you prepared to leave, that unease only grew. You posed a question to verify "March 7th's" identity, while she said she was ready to be honest with you.

C: 我并非「救世主」，而是与凡人同在的「无名客」。火种将熄，神的时代已经结束。我将金血赐还于你们。与我一同，成为英雄吧！
E: I am not the Deliverer, but a Nameless who walks among mortals. The Coreflames are fading, the age of gods has ended. I return the golden blood to you. Become heroes with me!

C: 战斗结束后，伦纳德查阅奇物的出入记录，发现「朋克洛德精神」并未离开空间站。最后一条信息显示，它被送进了黑塔的办公室。
E: After the battle, Leonard reviewed the Curio access logs and found that "Punklorde mentality" had never left the space station. The latest log indicated it had been delivered to Herta's Office.

C: 银狼曾尝试在黑塔的照片上涂鸦，却未能攻破螺丝咕姆的加密。以太卡带的数据就在下个房间，你感觉到银狼总是恰好出现在追踪路上。
E: Silver Wolf had once tried to scrawl graffiti over a photo of Herta, only to be stopped by Screwllum's encryption. The Aether Cartridge data was just in the next room, and it felt like Silver Wolf always showed up exactly where you were navigating to.

C: 情况不妙，姬子请你和丹恒前去支援三月七。银枝携维利特自愿加入你们，前往察看情况。
E: Things were looking grim. Himeko asked you and Dan Heng to back up March 7th. Argenti and Velite stepped forward, offering to join the investigation.

C: 从收集到的结果来看，支持与反对的声音总体持平，最后还是要由布洛妮娅自己做决定。你与三月七返回克里珀堡汇报情况。
E: After reviewing the collected opinions, you found that support and opposition were evenly balanced, leaving the final decision to Bronya. You and March 7th returned to Qlipoth Fort to report your findings.

C: 你们在此遇到史瓦罗。史瓦罗称托帕就在前方，她已做好将贝洛伯格并入公司的准备。尽管几率很低，但史瓦罗希望你们能避免冲突。
E: You met Svarog nearby. Svarog explained that Topaz was already ahead, prepared to bring Belobog fully under the IPC's control. Although the chances of avoiding conflict were slim, Svarog still hoped you could find a peaceful solution.

C: 镜流夸赞彦卿剑术高强，又点破他不知藏锋的缺陷。彦卿坦白自己是景元之徒，并称想摘得「剑首」之名，
E: Jingliu praised Yanqing's exceptional swordplay, while pointing out his flaw of not concealing his true strength. Yanqing admitted he was Jing Yuan's apprentice, and that he aspired to earn the title of Sword Champion.

C: 镜流为白露除去眼前的敌人。
E: Jingliu eliminated the enemies in front of Bailu.

C: 你与丹恒来到幽囚狱的入口处，接引使者已在此等候。若你们已经准备好，狱门便会打开。
E: You and Dan Heng reached the entrance of The Shackling Prison, where the Messenger was already. Once you were ready, the gates would open.

C: 丹恒察觉到不对劲，似乎有什么东西在靠近。你们与看不见的入侵者进入遭遇战。
E: Dan Heng sensed something was approaching. You were ambushed by the invisible intruder and forced into battle.

E: "And just where were you planning to use these?" The first mate gives you an earful when you resurface.

C: 战略投资部的员工之间有一则传言：「托帕总监在自己的生态舰上养了一万只萌宠。」这个说法虽然夸张，但也不是无中生有。受邀来到其中一间生态室时，你被这里的生物数量震惊了——光是次元扑满就有几十只。\n「这些扑满斗性十足，要试试捉住它们吗？」托帕饶有兴趣地问道。
E: There's a rumor among the employees of the Strategic Investment Department: "Director Topaz is raising ten thousand cute pets on her own ecological ship." Though exaggerated, it's not entirely baseless. When invited to one of the ecological chambers, you were stunned by the sheer number of creatures — there were dozens of Warp Trotters alone.\n"These Trotters are full of fighting spirit. Would you like to try catching them?" Director Topaz asks with a playful interest.

C: 星期日最近正在创作一首新的钢琴曲，打算用谐乐传递美好的情绪——就像妹妹常做的那样。不过，他决定走出过去音乐创作的舒适区，便来向你请教……
E: Sunday's working on a new piano piece, hoping to convey happy emotions through harmonies — just like his sister often does. But he's ready to step out of his comfort zone, so he turns to you for some advice...

C: 据说在继任将军前，飞霄曾趁着放假到街市上摆摊，成功把卷尾棒卖给了没尾巴的狐人。或许她也可以将天赋带到这里。
E: They say before her days as General, Feixiao could sell tail clips to tailless foxians from her stall during holidays. Maybe she'll work some of that sales magic here too.

C: ……「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯！我不知道阮•梅为什么对祂这么感兴趣，也许是因为祂搞出的寰宇蝗灾动静太大。可这家伙又胆小，又愚钝，身为星神什么见识都没有：祂的头脑里除了繁殖外空空荡荡，就连祂的子嗣亦是如此。在塔伊兹育罗斯尚未陨落的年代，也曾有人试图培育虫群，让它们产生「繁育」以外的思维，但看起来失败得很彻底：那些虫子连给自己穿只鞋都做不到。但必须承认，祂在「繁育」这条路上走到了极致，光是发个抖就能让全宇宙的虫子开始疯狂的，没有尽头的自我复制——至于吗？祂陨落至今，宇宙中仍有数之不尽的虫群四处为害，它们实在令人生厌……
E: ...Tayzzyronth the Propagation! I don't know why Ruan Mei is so interested in THEM. Perhaps because THEY made such a ruckus with the Swarm Disaster THEY created. However, that creature is timid, slow-witted, and has no insight as an Aeon — THEIR mind is void of anything except reproduction, and even THEIR descendants are the same. In the days before the fall of Tayzzyronth, some had also attempted to breed the Swarm and make it think beyond mere propagation, but it seemed to have been a complete failure. They couldn't even put a shoe on themselves. Though, you have to hand it to Tayzzyronth. THEY went so far down the road of Propagation that just a little shiver could make the Swarm throughout the entire universe start a frantic, endless self-replication — seriously, why the overreaction? Since THEIR fall, there are still an endless number of the Swarm rampaging throughout the universe, and they are really annoying...

C: 当「秩序」太一被希佩吸收时，天外合唱班失去了信仰，那曾经庄严井然的和声也随之哑然，令群星沉默无言。仅有少数几张由爱好者录制的唱片至今仍流传于世，将它放入特制的唱机中，你将听见来自宇宙彼端的歌唱，饱含秩序的美好。最后一台秩序唱机在帝皇战争中损坏，唱片上厚厚的积灰似在抗议那无声的时光。
E: The Beyond the Sky Choir lost their faith when Ena the Order was absorbed by Xipe. The once-solemn chords fell silent and the stars turned mute. Only a few records, made by the Choir's devoted audiences remain in this world today. When these records are placed within specific phonographs, you will hear songs from the end of the universe, sounds that contain the beauty of Order. The last Phonograph of Order was destroyed in the Emperor's War, and now the thick layer of dust on the records are protests to that soundless era.

C: 天才俱乐部#56以利亚萨拉斯曾经有个美好的愿望：俱乐部里的天才们能够欢聚一堂，其乐融融地交流生活、爱情与梦想。为此，他发明了「俱乐部券」，并设计了一整套系统，保证即使在他死后，每位入会的新人都能得到这张能够即时传送到某个宴会位面的入场券。事实是，#56以后的每位会员都确实使用过「俱乐部券」，可时间从来没有重合过哪怕一次。\n（该奇物已发生数据膨胀）
E: Genius Society #56, Elias Salas, once had a beautiful dream. He wished the geniuses of the Society could come together and happily converse about their lives, loves, and dreams. For that purpose, he invented "Society Tickets" and designed an entire system that ensured every new Society member would receive this ticket even after his death. This ticket would instantly teleport the user to a specific dimension decked with festivities. The truth is that every new member after #56 had indeed used their Society Ticket, but not a single one of them had used it at the same time as someone else.\n(This Curio already underwent data expansion)

C:
世人皆沉溺于知识，用它垒起高墙，以它筑造藩篱，将自己关进可笑的囚笼。他们把智慧、金钱与权力共同放上价值的天平，尝试以人类的标准去度量宇宙的真理，像一场滑稽的闹剧。

你做出能讲故事的铅笔，几支凑到一起，就能上演出英雄打败末日兽的好戏。你铸造会跳舞的打扫机器，可它们的舞步刚扬起，地上就又落满了灰尘。

他们愤怒，说这是最劣等的发明，知识应当带来繁荣和未来。但你知道，知识不过是稚子手里的污泥，无论孩子们把它捏造成丑陋或美丽的样貌，只要能带来笑容，所有的努力都会得到回报。
E:
People are far too obsessed with the allure of knowledge, using it to erect towering walls and fences, locking themselves away in such absurd prisons. They place wisdom, wealth, and power onto scales of value, attempting to measure the universe's truth with humanity's standards, like a comical farce.

You craft pencils that weave tales, capable of telling a grand tale of heroes defeating doomsday beasts with just a few of them. You forge cleaning machines that can dance, but just when their graceful waltz takes off, the floor is strewn with dust yet again.

They are angry, spouting that this is the worst invention, and that knowledge should usher in prosperity and the future. But you know that knowledge is nothing more than clay in the hands of children — no matter how grotesque or pretty they knead it, as long as it puts a smile on people's faces, all effortful endeavors will reap their just rewards.

C:
记忆，多么脆弱的结构！只需轻轻撩拨，便会轰然倒塌。

试想一下，将两段矛盾的人生塞进同一幅躯壳，令高高在上的星系总督，成为忍辱负重的叛军首领，在镇压的命令下达之际，是会痛下杀手还是网开一面？又或者，为孑然一身的匪徒添加些许家人的回忆，金盆洗手的恶棍踏上寻亲之旅，却发现他们早已被自己的炸弹埋进了废墟。何等的扭曲！何等的愉悦！

你偷走谁的过去，将它赠予他人。你打乱谁的回忆，又令他踏入歧途。回忆是虚假的艺术，但任何的排列组合，都将把现实搅得天翻地覆。
E:
Memory, such a fragile structure! Just a gentle stir and it all comes collapsing in on itself.

Imagine for a second that you transferred two contrasting lives into the same body, that you made the high and mighty Star System Governor into a humiliated rebel chief. When the order came to execute, would they thoughtlessly bloody their blade or have mercy? Or, perhaps, you gave a gangster who had lived a solitary life some memories of family. This person would abandon their evil ways to go in search of their kin, only to find that the family members had long since been buried under rubble with this gangster's very own bombs. What a twist! What exquisite joy!

Whose past do you steal and whom do you give it to? Whose memory do you disturb and how will you send them down the wrong path? Memory is an art of falsehoods, but any permutation and combination can turn reality entirely on its own head.

C:
黄金战争死伤殆尽，出自谁的手笔？
黑潮奔涌城邦凋敝，又好像一场棋局？
你别怨我尖酸刻薄，冷漠无情，
只因世间的史诗传奇，对我如同戏剧。
你看塔兰顿声称公平正义，可逆道乱常之事横行，
你再看艾格勒贵为天空之父，却将信徒禁锢在大地，
要我说连那黄金裔的逐火之旅，到头来也是闹剧。
这翁法罗斯既然已经烂成稀泥，不如任由它去，
反正你我只是草民，能失去的也只有一条烂命，
还是趁着死前，好好找点乐趣，
你问我活着难道就没信仰？
告诉你，我信翻飞之币。
E:
Who wrote, "The Chrysos War left carnage and devastation in its wake"?
As the black tide surges and the city-states crumble, does it all unfold like a strategic game of chess?
Do not accuse me of being bitter or heartless,
For the epic tales of the world are mere dramas to me.
Look at Talanton, who claims fairness and justice, yet chaos and rebellion reign supreme.
And see Aquila, the Father of the Skies, yet they confine their followers to the earth below.
I'd venture to say that even the Flame-Chase Journey of the Chrysos Heir is just a farce.
Since Amphoreus has crumbled into mud, why not just let it be?
We're mere mortals, with nothing more to lose than our pathetic lives.
Might as well seize the day and have some fun before we're gone.
You ask if I've lost all faith in life?
Let me tell you, I put my faith in the Coin of Whimsy.

C:
我更愿将安提帕鲁斯称为剧作家，而非将军，
他将整场战争都谱写成自己的戏剧。
塔兰顿的子民，与吉奥里亚的士兵合于一处，
他们负责演绎丑角。
支援的拉冬人，他们在结束前都无法抵达，
无奈担负歌队的氛围演出。
至于他的军团，由王所赐予的长矛指向的目的地，
只需一声口令，三幕剧便能开始演出。
厮杀声是最宏伟的乐曲，在演员的面庞上勾勒恐惧和愤怒，
战车与战车碰撞，阵列与阵列如狮子相互啃咬，
而他享受地品味这一切，迈出离开军帐的第一步。
E:
I would rather call Antiparus a playwright than a general,
For he turned the entire war into his own drama.
The people of Talanton, united with the soldiers of Georios,
Were cast as the villains.
The supporting Ladonians, arriving too late for the climax,
Reluctantly took on the role of chorus.
His legion, guided by the spear bestowed by the king,
Dedicated themselves to a meticulously crafted three-act play at his command.
The sounds of battle became a grand symphony, etching fear and anger onto the actors' faces.
Chariots collided, ranks clashed, like lions locked in a ferocious duel.
All the while, he savored the spectacle, taking his first step out of the military tent.

C: 女孩从小就学会了隐藏自己的思绪。每天，她和其他孩子们走过同样的石路，进行同样的游戏，交流同样的喜好。但她从未被琐碎且平淡的生活淹没——每有独处的缝隙，她总会坐在灰褐色的石凳上仰望，想象不被头顶的圆盘所截断的、完整的天空。 女孩看到劳作的人们挥汗如雨，生存的重压碾碎了他们对生活的热情。注视着一双双疲劳但质朴的眼眸，她陷入困惑的泥沼：人生莫非注定如此？正如广阔的天空被巨大的钢铁圆盘切割，或许她向往的自由也注定有所残缺。 她奋力从泥沼中挣脱出来，默默在落满尘灰的石路上写下自己将要贯彻一生的理想。 「让世界变得美好」
E: She learned to hide her thoughts from an early age. Every day, she'd walk the same paths with the other kids, play the same games, and gossip about the same hobbies. But she never felt taken over by the trivial and bland nature of life — she'd sit on a gray stone bench every time she was alone, looking up at the sky and imagining a perfect and complete sky unobstructed by that flat disc. She could see the laborers dripping with sweat as they toil, the pressure of survival crushing their passion for life. Seeing the tired but earnest look in their eyes, she slipped into a quagmire of confusion: Is life really destined to be like this? Just as the vastness of the sky was dissected by that monstrous steel disc, perhaps the freedom she yearned for was also destined to be incomplete. She struggled to break free from this quagmire, silently recording the ideals that she'd come to implement in her life on that dusty stone road. "Make the world a better place."

C: 喂～喂～听得清吗？家人们晚上好！欢迎来到小桂子的直播间～ 感谢「大呲花_49886」的醒目留言！「小桂子怎么又半个月不开播，是不是摆了？」这怎么可能嘛！小桂子最近线下的事情有点点多，确实好久没开播了，对不起啦～最近线下遇到的事情还蛮有趣的，有机会再讲给你们听。 今天嘛，就和直播间标题说的那样——「曲艺之夜！小桂子献唱仙舟曲艺！」 总之呢，最近感觉杂技这玩意儿可能还是更适合线下，所以小桂子打算试试搞一些曲艺直播，今天这次就当做试水了～各位要是喜欢的话，记得点点关注、点点转发，打赏礼物可以参与直播间抽奖哦！ 感谢「奶粉粉粉」的醒目留言！粉粉，好久不见啦～「没关系，小桂子直播什么我都爱看。」粉粉太捧场了！奖励你今天不看完直播不许走！么么～ 咳咳…等我调一下声音设置…一二三四五上山打老虎…好嘞，那么接下来就要开嗓了！这次的数来宝，可是小桂子自己写的唱词哦～ …… 许久未回这金人巷，此地方，百废俱兴变了样。 有的玩意儿变了样，也有的美景一如往常。 街坊四邻都硬朗，父老乡亲是满面的红光。 今日难得这快板儿响，请列位宾朋赏个光。 欢呼喝彩多捧场，扔几个巡镝让我开个张。 今儿不讲，神君荡寇扫洪荒，也不讲，帝弓神矢断穹桑。 讲一讲，这金人巷里好姑娘，小桂子我何处来又何处往。 ……
E: Hello~ Hello~ Can you hear me? Good evening fam! And welcome to Little Gui's stream~ Thank you BigFlowa_49886 for the super chat! "Little Gui, you haven't streamed for more than half a month again. Are you not taking this seriously anymore?" No way! I just have a lot going on IRL these days and yeah, I haven't streamed for quite a bit. I'm sowwy~ The stuff I ran into IRL is actually pretty fun. But that's a topic for another day. As for today, just like what I wrote in the title of the stream, it's "Music night! Little Gui singing Xianzhou folk songs!" Anyways, I feel stuff like acrobatics is better for offline stuff, so I'm gonna try streaming some folk music. Just testing the waters today~ If you like the stream, remember to LIKE, SUBSCRIBE, and SHARE! If you wanna send a gift or a super chat, you'll get to take part in the prize-draw for this stream! Thank you MilkyPowderdurdar for the super chat! "I love to watch everything you stream, Little Gui." Powderdurdar, you are the best! Don't you leave the stream until I'm done tonight! Mwah~! *cough*... Lemme adjust the audio... One two three one two three pray on a tree... Alright! Now for some vocal exercises! I wrote all the lyrics for the doggerel tonight! ... Long time no see, Aurum Alley glee. Changed so neat, what a feat! Streets got fame, beauty is the same. My neighbors be healthy, my friends be wealthy. Here I am, my kuaiban clang, please check out my new song slam. Gimme a cheer, and the coast gets clear. Toss me strales, and life never fails. No time for gods and monsters, no talk of Reignbow Arbiters. Only story here is the Little Gui, coming and going which way. ...

C: 「苏醒，不过是你迈出的第一步。 「『毁灭』的烙印仍影响着你，你必须更快熟悉这副新的身躯，才能使力量为你所用。」 日复一日，她遵照那位科学家的指导，以舞蹈配合那奇特的糕点，她以肉眼可见的速度开始痊愈。与日俱增的，还有她的疑惑。 她在不安中等待着仙舟的消息，许久之后，阮•梅向她确认了星核灾变的噩耗—— 那被称为「幻胧」的令使以她的样貌混入仙舟，掀起灾祸，荼毒众生。 「所幸，星穹列车和仙舟合作，已击败幻胧，并未造成严重后果。」 她怔怔地听着「自己」的故事，感觉荒诞而虚幻。 「如此说来，她不仅夺走了我的性命，还夺走了我的一段人生，小女子本不应该以如此面貌回到罗浮，与虹车相遇……」 「幻胧对你的『毁灭』从未停止。你虽在肉体上暂时战胜了『毁灭』的力量，但她对你意志的折磨才刚刚开始。」 那冰冷的声音中，似乎藏着一丝不易察觉的感叹。 「小女子不明白，为何是我？」 「只是命运掷下的骰子，偶然落在了你的身上。」 「…所以小女子的命运，也因此与他们联系在了一起。」 「我只是受人所托，将你救下。回到罗浮之后的事，都在于你。」 「但无论如何，小女子已是这些大人物棋局中的一子了吧？」 「无可否认。」 她沉默了许久，盘算着，思量着。 「生意讲究你来我往，小女子既与往日不同，可还有选择的机会？」 阮•梅看着少女，摇了摇头。 「我不知道。那是你的『选择』，也只有『你』才能选择。」
E: "Awakening is only the first step. The scars of Destruction still affect you, and you must learn to familiarize yourself with this new body swiftly to harness its power." Day after day, she follows the scientist's instructions, pairing her dance with the strange pastries. She begins to heal at a pace visible to the naked eye. Yet, with each passing day, her doubt grows stronger. She waits anxiously for news from the Xianzhou. After what feels like an eternity, Ruan Mei delivers the grim confirmation about the Stellaron calamity — The Emanator known as Phantylia had infiltrated the Xianzhou with her guise, unleashing calamity and poisoning the living. "Fortunately, the Astral Express and the Xianzhou joined forces and defeated Phantylia before any serious repercussions." She listens to "her" story in a daze, feeling as if it were absurd and unreal. "So she not only took my life but also a part of my time... I should never return to the Luofu with this face and encounter the Chromatic Echelon..." "Phantylia's 'Destruction' of you has never ceased. Although you have temporarily overcome the power of Destruction in your body, her torment of your will has only just begun." There is a subtle sigh hidden within that icy voice. "I don't understand — why me?" "It's simply a roll of fate's dice, and it landed on you." "...So now my fate is entwined with theirs." "I was entrusted only to save you. What happens after you return to the Luofu is entirely up to you." "But in any case, I'm already a pawn in the game of these powerful players, aren't I?" "Undeniably so." She remains silent for a long time, lost in thought. "Business is a two-way traffic, but since I am no longer the same as before, do I still have a choice?" Ruan Mei meets the young girl's gaze and shakes her head. "I don't know. That is your 'choice,' and only 'you' can make it."

C: 星核猎手成员，身着机械装甲「萨姆」战斗。忠于任务，性格坚强。\n作为战胜虫群的兵器而诞生，其生长速度异于常人，但生命非常短暂。\n为了找寻「生」的机会而加入星核猎手，找寻违抗命运的方式。
E: A member of the Stellaron Hunters, clad in a set of mechanized armor known as "SAM." Her character is marked by unwavering loyalty and steely resolve.\nEngineered as a weapon against the Swarm, she experiences accelerated growth, but a tragically shortened lifespan.\nShe joined the Stellaron Hunters in a quest for a chance at "life," seeking to defy her fated demise.

C: 高举雷枪的神明陷入疯狂，在那以「纷争」为名的战役，男人同伙伴给予那疯神最后的解脱。 在那争夺「理性」火种的辩论场，男人与昔日恩师对峙，见证残酷的处刑。 登上「天空」的战场，男人踏上彩虹桥，以烈阳之光穿透阴霾，照亮凶险的前路。 「救世主，带领吾等前进吧。」 听到织者欣慰的话，他心中更多的是苦涩。但在众人面前，他不愿表露担忧。 身受万死的王储踏上归乡的路，将悬锋族人交托于他。 「放心，我会替你照顾。」 分裂千身的先知磨损殆尽，他接过启程前立下的誓言。 「缇宝老师，我会去见证…那星月满天的明日。」 学者为真理奔赴死亡，圣女拥抱孤独的命运。 「下一世，真理定会解明，死生…将有序流转。」 织者安眠于黄金的浴池，捷足的侠盗带着遗憾停下脚步，永驻天空的医师再也无法回到大地。 「以身为薪柴，我会…成为照亮新世界的烈火。」 男人无法流泪，只能凭着心中的剧痛，将回忆刻入脑海。 他背起万众的心愿，朝着朝阳升起的山巅蹒跚前行。 他相信，终有一日，曙光会穿透翁法罗斯的长夜。 「但倘若黎明从一开始就不存在……」 曾经，他千百次问过自己这个问题。 如今，向着那炽热酷烈的终点，男人刻下「白厄」的最后一笔—— 「那就让怒火燃尽此身，化作明日的烈阳！」 ->->->->->->->->->->->->-> >>>调用记录 【第597次运算】 …… 请求：「成为回应世界期许，背负众人心愿的人。」 响应：「一个孑然一身的人。」 进度：0.096% …… 【第8128次运算】 …… 请求：「哪怕只有最粗糙的凡铁，也请用它保卫家园！」 响应：「一道无足轻重的伤疤。」 进度：1.34% …… 【第16256次运算】 …… 请求：「黄金裔已悉数就位，逐火的征途正式启程。」 响应：「一个永无止境的轮回。」 进度：2.89% …… 【第496000次运算】 …… 请求：「开启再创世，去迎接翁法罗斯崭新的黎明。」 响应：「一▇▇▇▇徒劳的▇▇▇▇▇▇▇。」 进度：32.47% …… 【第33550337次运算】 …… 请求：「▇▇▇▇铭记▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇背负▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇新世界▇▇▇▇」 响应：「▇▇▇▇燃▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇尽▇▇▇▇▇▇」 进度：99.81% …… >>>警告：进度无法更新
E: The god who wielded the Lightning Spear fell into madness. In the battle named Strife, the man and his comrade gave the mad god the final release. In the debate where the Coreflame of Reason was contested, the man faced down his old mentor and witnessed a brutal execution. On the battlefield of the Sky, he crossed the rainbow bridge, piercing the gloom with the burning light of the sun, lighting the perilous road ahead. "Deliverer, lead us forward." Hearing those words of relief from the weaver, he felt only a bitter ache, a worry he refused to show in front of the crowd. The crown prince of Kremnos, scarred by a thousand deaths, entrusted his people to him. "Don't worry. I'll look after them for you." The seer, her body split into countless pieces, faded away, and he took up the oath she had sworn before her journey. "Miss Tribbie, I will live to see that morrow filled with the radiance of stars..." The scholar raced toward death in search of truth. The Holy Maiden embraced her lonely fate. "In the next life, truth will be revealed, and life and death will find their rightful place." The weaver found eternal rest in a golden bath. The fleet-footed rogue stopped in regret. The healer who once roamed the skies would never again return to the earth. "With my body as kindling, I will become the blaze that lights the new world." The man could not shed tears, but used these searing pains to carve such memories into his mind. Bearing the hopes of all people, he staggered toward the mountain peak where the morning sun rises. He believed that, one day, the dawn would break through the endless night of Amphoreus. "But should dawn have never existed..." He had asked himself that question thousands of times. Now, heading toward the blazing, merciless end, he carved the final mark of "Phainon"— "Then let my fury consume me and turn myself into tomorrow's burning sun!" ->->->->->->->->->->->->-> >>> Call Log [597th Computation] ... C: 流星划过夜空，生命的长河荡起涟漪，闪烁十三种光彩。\n哀丽秘榭的女儿，哺育「真我」的黄金裔，栽下记忆的种子，让往昔的花朵在明日绽放——\n「然后，一起写下不同以往的诗篇吧♪」
E: A meteor streaks across the night sky, sending ripples through the river of life, gleaming in thirteen hues.\nDaughter of Aedes Elysiae, Chrysos Heir who nourishes "Ego," sow the Seed of Memory, so that flowers of the past may bloom in tomorrow.\n"Now, let's write a different kind of poem together ♪"

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C:
开拓之旅的第一晚，你睡得不似列车上那样安心。
这倒不是因为你对列车单间有什么深厚感情，而是你总能在半梦半醒中听到军靴踢踏的声音。
现在，你知道了噪声从何而来——这无疑是面前高贵的少女和她率领的部队干的好事。
来者似乎不善，问问他们究竟想要做什么。
E:
On the first night of the trailblazing expedition, you don't sleep as soundly and at ease as you did on the Express.
It's not because you have some kind of close bond with the Express but because you keep hearing the sound of troops moving around as you sleep.
And now, you know exactly where the noise is coming from — it's undoubtedly the doing of the noble-looking girl and her troops in front of you.
They don't seem to be friendly. Go and ask them what they want.

C: 深入矿区的路途中，你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的矿民伸出援手。\n前进途中，你们听到从矿道深处传来的争吵之声，或许是当地的矿民遇上了麻烦…\n小心应战，保证矿民们的安全！
E: On the way deeper into the mines, you can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.\nYou hear people arguing from deeper inside the mines. Maybe the local miners have run into trouble...\nBe careful and guarantee the safety of the miners!

C: 根据娜塔莎的说法，在已经废弃的「铆钉镇」或许还有剩余的医疗物资，而你们和希儿的任务就是把那些物资抢救回来，榨干它们的最后一点价值…呃，不对，是让它们在诊所里发光发热。\n你们抵达了矿镇入口。乍看此处虽是一片死寂，但实际上已有裂界怪物在此盘踞许久，可以说是险象环生。\n在贸然深入之前，还是先行瞭望、规划路线为好。
E: According to Natasha, there may still be remaining medical supplies in the abandoned Rivet Town. The mission for you and Seele is to retrieve the supplies and deplete them of their final value... Erm, to let them shine and be useful in the clinic.\nYou arrive at the entrance of the mining town. Although this place looks to be completely desolate, in reality, Fragmentum monsters have been dwelling here for quite some time. This is a dangerous place.\nIt'd be best to make observations and plan out your route before making your way in.

C: 史瓦罗承认了你作为「变量」的价值。你被纳入这位人形兵器的冰冷逻辑当中，并且使他的计算得出截然不同的结果。\n现在，他决定将这个星球的真相传达给你。\n至于如何运用这宝贵的信息，将由你们自行判断。
E: Svarog recognizes your value as a variant. You've been incorporated into the ice-cold logic of the humanoid weapon, changing the outcome of his calculations entirely.\nNow, it has decided to pass on the truth of the planet to you.\nIt is completely up to you to decide how this precious information is used.

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ上旅行至此，你已经充分学会如何以理服人了。大守护者最忠实的戍卫官此刻也终于同你站在一条战线上…只可惜他无法同你一道前进，共同见证贝洛伯格的结局。\n但杰帕德在此处把守着阻隔裂界的大门——只要你一声令下，他和他的亲信铁卫便会迅速结成战阵，为你们开辟前路。
E: Thanks to your time on Jarilo-VI, you have mastered the art of persuasion. The Supreme Guardian's most loyal Captain is now on your side... It's a pity that he cannot go with you and witness what awaits Belobog.\nGepard is guarding the gate to the Fragmentum. He and his best guards will form up and clear the way for you once you are ready.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n你在下层的最后一个任务就是将胜利的消息传达给克拉拉和史瓦罗。\n想必，在重新建设下层区的漫长过程中，这一人一机将会扮演极为重要的角色。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nYour final task in the Underworld is to let Clara and Svarog know about your victory.\nThese two would likely play important roles in the long journey ahead to rebuild the Underworld.

C: 丹鼎司中一处市集，云骑军驻扎在此暂作休整。与此同时，符玄与斥候一同前去探查敌情。\n眼下你们能做的只有暂时等待…或是，向云骑们打探此前的战况。
E: The Cloud Knights are stationed temporarily in a market in the Alchemy Commission. You learn that Fu Xuan had left with the scouts to assess the enemy.\nAll you can do for now is wait... or talk with the Knights to find out about the fighting so far.

C: 仪式结束，景元邀请你们前往神策府一叙。在那里，他代表罗浮送出对列车团的赠礼——一枚结盟玉兆。凭此信物，云骑将不畏遥远，赶赴盟友的身边。而此次仙舟的开拓之行，终于抵达了尾声。
E: Jing Yuan invites you to have a chat at the Seat of Divine Foresight when the ceremony ends. Once there, he presents Luofu's gift to the Express Crew — a jade abacus of allying oath. With this token in hand, the Cloud Knights swear to come to the aid of their allies, no matter the distance they must cross. Your current trailblazing journey on the Xianzhou has finally come to an end.

C: 触摸画框，你被一股莫之能御的力量吸引，来到了「画中世界」…不，其实还是梦境的一部分，一条长长的走廊。\n酒店门童米沙正在这里等你，他似乎有话要说。
E: As you touch the frame, you are pulled in by an irresistible force, coming to a "World Within the Painting"... No, this is actually just another area of the Dreamscape, a very long corridor.\nThe hotel bellboy Misha is awaiting you here. It seems he wishes to speak with you.

C: 猎犬家系的治安官为你们解了围，你这才了解到自己救下的少女是鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」。\n为了报答你的恩情，她决定担任你的一日导游，不妨跟着她一起深入了解这座美梦吧。
E: The Bloodhound Family Security Officer explains that the young girl you just rescued was Firefly, an artist of the Iris Family.\nTo thank you saving her, she has decided to be your tour guide for the day. Why not follow her and take a deep-dive into this beautiful dream?

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n你们在「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」吃了个闭门羹，但机灵的桑博立刻想到了替代方案。只是在谜底揭开之前，他委托你收集一些材料…从一台街机里。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nYou're turned away at the door of Peppy Pepeshi's Salon, but the quick-witted Sampo immediately thinks of a back-up plan. However, before this mystery can be unveiled, he entrusted you to collect some materials... from an arcade machine.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n跨越了倒下的猎犬家系成员，你们决定继续前进。不虚此行，对吧？
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nAfter stepping over the collapsed Bloodhound Family member, you decide to continue onwards. You wouldn't want your trip to be a waste, right?

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n她究竟是谁？眼下的你恐怕没心思考虑这个——因为那个女孩对你施加幻术，把你送进了一个莫名其妙地方。还是先离开这里再说吧。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nJust who is she? Unfortunately, you don't have time to think about this right now — that girl has cast an illusion on you and sent you to a mysterious location. It would be best to find a way to escape from this place before anything.

C: 你拜托博学的拉帝奥教授帮你前往沉思室找一座弹珠机模型，他也确实找到了。真为他感到开心！
E: You ask the knowledgeable Dr. Ratio to help you look for a pinball machine model in the Meditation Room, and he manages to find it. So happy for him!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C:
……

商人：「会计！你我都是主人的忠仆，理应秉着忠诚相勉！你为何对我下此毒手！」
会计：「因为主人用泥土造化了你，用烈火造化了我。我比你高贵！」

会计：「你们不曾为旧主效命，而不清楚他的威能。他能夺走我们自由，便也能赐予我们自由！你们怎敢与我刀兵相向？」
艺人：「因为主人用烈火造化了你，用辉光造化了我，我比你高贵！」
侍卫：「因为主人用烈火造化了你，用鲜血造化了我，我比你高贵！」
参谋：「主人终将归来！祂至忠诚、至卑微，却至尊贵的仆人，便是那不曾争抢、虔诚信仰者。」
新至的主人：「而我——我将成为诸位新的家人，并将你们从死去的幻影中解放！」

……
E:
...

Merchant: "Accountant! We are both loyal servants to our master. We should use our loyalty to encourage each other! How could you scheme against me!"
Accountant: "Because the master crafted you from clay, and me from fire. I am more noble than you!"

Accountant: "You have never served the old master and will never understand his true power. Our freedom is his to give and take as he pleases! How dare you cross arms with me?"
Artist: "Because the master crafted you with fire, and me from radiance. I am more noble than you!"
Retainer: "Because the master crafted you from fire and me with blood, I am more noble than you!"
Advisor: "The master will return! The servant who serves THEM with the most loyalty, the most humility, and yet the most noble — he would be that devoted believer who never robbed or fought what was not his."
New Master: "As for me... I shall forge new bonds of Kinship and liberate you from the clutches of death."

...

C: 抱着九分怀疑和一分缥缈的侥幸，流萤登上了「晖长石号」。\n她来这里是为了寻找传闻中的「慈玉典押」，听说那是一家能实现任何人心愿的典当行。\n星核猎手得知了「慈玉典押」的位置，并准备和它的老板娘谈谈。
E: Mostly harboring suspicion but with a sliver of hope, Firefly boards the Radiant Feldspar. \nShe's here to find the rumored Bonajade Exchange, which is said to be a pawn shop that can grant anybody's wishes.\nThe Stellaron Hunter learns the location of the Bonajade Exchange, and gets ready to talk with the madame who owns it.

C: 你来到了一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉…这里看起来像是筑梦边境，但如果你没记错，筑梦边境应该没有开设动物园的业务。\n看看这猴子是怎么回事吧，万一折纸大学教课的真是猴子呢？
E: You find yourself on... An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernana Monkeys! Bana bana... Bana bana... This place resembles Dream's Edge, but as far as you remember, there are no zoos in that area.\nCheck out that bizarre monkey. What if it's actually monkeys teaching at Paperfold University?

C: 你终于找到了线索——一群把猴子当祖宗供起来的小可爱。这年头，什么东西都能当祖宗，这次是猴子，下次是香蕉，搞不好有一天你也会成为他们的祖宗。\n想办法进他们的地盘看看。想不到办法？你腰上别的可不是玩具。
E: You have finally discovered some clues: A bunch of lil' fudgeheads worshiping monkeys as their ancestors. Now, anything can be an ancestor... monkeys, bananas, heck, even you might end up in their family tree someday.\nFigure out a way to infiltrate their turf. Struggling? Don't sweat, the pistols in your pockets aren't no playthings.

C: 可怖！于梦境营销课上，种种歪理•邪说层出不穷，此番邪祟若是继续误忍子弟，后果不堪设想！球棒•忍者，快用你的忍术阻止它吧！\n对猴子用钟表把戏试试吧…你不禁好奇，钟表把戏到底能用在多少地方，下次对着垃圾桶试试？
E: Alarming! In the Dream Marketing class, deceptive and malevolent rhetoric is rampant. If this fiendling continues its misguidance of the students, it could cause serious consequences! Baseball Bat Ninja! Use your ninjutsu to stop it!\nTry using your Clockwork on the monkey... You can't help but wonder just how many uses Clockwork has. Maybe try it on a trashcan next time?

C: 大岚神在上，邪忍的诡计已全然暴露于忍者们的面前，此番荒诞猴戏必有幕后黑手推波助澜，邪祟•总长甚是可疑，无论如何，先去拷打一番！\n你把这群假老师都打翻了，现在轮到校长了…校规？你看智库里收录了吗？
E: By the Great Lan above! The Evil Ninja's schemes have been exposed! This monkey farce must have been orchestrated by an elusive mastermind, and the Fiendling Chief seems highly suspicious. Let's interrogate first and ask questions later!\nYou have taken down all the fake teachers, and now it's the dean's turn... School regulations, you say? Oh, they weren't included in the data bank, right?

C: 可怖！于梦境营销课上，种种歪理•邪说层出不穷，此番邪祟若是继续误忍子弟，后果不堪设想！球棒•忍者，快用你的忍术阻止它吧！\n这群「蕉师」果然有问题，这下动手没顾虑了吧…还是说你一直没什么顾虑？
E: Alarming! In the Dream Marketing class, deceptive and malevolent rhetoric is rampant. If this fiendling continues its misguidance, it could have caused serious consequences! Baseball Bat Ninja! Use your ninjutsu to stop it!\nTurns out something is definitely wrong with those BananAdvisors, so don't hesitate to get physical... Or maybe you never had reservations in the first place?

C: 于此同时，另外两位成熟人士，也正在进行一场心平气和的交谈——他们对一切过去都万分了解，除了一场「万分热闹」的意外。
E: At the same time, two other mature adults are having a calm discussion... They understand everything that has unfolded, except a single "extremely bustling" anomaly.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
E: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
E: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n根据迷迷所说{NICKNAME}早在车厢坠落中途就已死去，而如今只是一簇行走的记忆。多亏了翁法罗斯当地独特的生死规律，{NICKNAME}尚有一线生机，而找到塞纳托斯变成了不得不优先完成的要务。\n眼下，{NICKNAME}要去找最接近死亡之人确认自身状况。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nAccording to Mem, {NICKNAME} had died halfway through the Express's descent, and now is just a walking memory. Thanks to the unique life-death laws of Amphoreus, {NICKNAME} still has a slim chance of survival, and finding Thanatos has become the priority task.\nNow, {NICKNAME} must find the one closest to death to confirm their condition.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n元老们已经知晓你的到来，跟随传令兵前去会面吧。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThey await your arrival. Follow the Messenger to meet them.

C: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
E: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 探索中，我们无意间瞥见了天空之民的往昔，带着肃杀氛围，似乎难以用和平来形容。一位奇兽在我们面前现身，它与那位英雄塞涅俄丝关系匪浅，我们决定跟上它的振翅，一同前行。
E: During our exploration, we caught glimpses of the Skyfolk's past, filled with a solemn atmosphere that could hardly be described as peaceful. Then, a mythical beast appeared before us, one deeply connected to the hero Seliose. We decided to follow its fluttering wings and continue forward together.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 哀丽秘榭深处存在着一处「迷境」，{NICKNAME}跟随着二人一同前往，在那里见到了许多…形似迷迷的「妖精」住民？
E: Deep in the Aedes Elysiae lies a "Maze." {NICKNAME} follows the two there and encounters many... fairy-like residents that resemble Mem?

C:
你还记得她吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
遐蝶，所有的叹息都从她的指尖涌出；所有的慰语都因她的手被阻隔；所有的死亡都为她拥入怀中；所有的恸哭都被她吞咽在掌心。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为她磔碎多少对翼，熄灭多少鲜花，把蝴蝶扑入死灰？
芬芳的月色流成冥河，如何被你酿成金色的毒酒，为你徒劳救世的欢宴设奠？
倒是你，披着羊皮的救世主，最该成祭神的牺牲！
丑陋的野兽，伪善的眼睑盖不住喷薄的毒火，那矛似的犄角生来更为弑杀友亲。
就将尸骨当作美餐饱腹，鲜甜会说服你：「我毕竟对屠刀一无所知」。
E:
Do you still remember her, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Castorice, with every sigh flowing from her fingertips and her hands blocking all words of comfort, she held each death close to her heart and swallowed every cry of grief in her palms.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets, how many pairs of wings have you shattered for her? How many blossoms have you snuffed out? How many butterflies have you cast into the ashes?
The moonlight's fragrance once streamed like the River of Souls. How did you turn it into golden poison and make it libations for your banquet of futile deliverance?
And yet it is you, so-called Deliverer in sheep's clothing, who ought to be the sacrifice upon the altar to the gods!
Ugly beast — your seemingly pious gaze cannot hide the seething venom beneath. And that spear-like horn of yours was born to slay your kin.
So feast upon bones and call it grace. The sweetness will surely convince you: "I never truly knew anything about the blade of slaughter."

C: 优秀的电影，当然不止需要一位像我这样杰出的导演，也需要一位足够优秀的演员。
E: Of course, a masterpiece doesn't come from a genius director like me alone... It also needs a brilliant actor to light up the screen.

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n访问控制节点，上传封装密钥。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nAccess the control node and upload the encapsulated encryption key.

C: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
E: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

C: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
E: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

C: 你从空间站的医疗舱醒来，正巧撞见医疗科员乔安为另一名科员诊疗。这位患者自述有短期失忆现象，更重要的是，她的名字…叫做「希拉」。\n嗅到了古怪、秘密与阴谋的气息，你答应前往希拉指定的房间替她展开调查。
E: You wake up in the space station's Medical Department, just as a medical researcher, Joanne, is treating another researcher. The patient claims that she is suffering from short-term memory loss. More importantly, her name is... "Sheila."\nSensing oddity, secrecy, and conspiracy, you agree to go to the room Sheila tells you about and start an investigation.

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 模拟宇宙再次更新之际，空间站热闹不断——这一次，几位天才俱乐部大人物居然同时来到了空间站？！你收到了黑塔的短信，她称阮•梅已抵达空间站，现在是该去见她的时候了……
E: As the Simulated Universe receives another update, the space station remains bustling with activity. This time, several prominent figures from the Genius Society have all arrived at the space station! You receive a message from Herta, who informs you that Ruan Mei has also arrived at the space station. It's time to go meet her...

C: 阮•梅，培育生命的大师，让你去回收在空间站乱跑的「小生命」…她为了让你不透露此事，甚至喂你吃下「反吐真剂」。\n她究竟在想些什么？
E: Ruan Mei, the master nurturer of life, asks you to recover the "little lifeforms" that are running amok on the space station. She even goes so far as to feed you an "Anti-Truth Serum" to ensure you don't reveal this matter.\nWhat could she be thinking?

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n不能跟公司的喽啰硬碰硬。杰帕德有妙招。启动「潜爆机兵」吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nCan't go head to head with the IPC's peons. Gepard has a plan. Time to activate the Automaton Stealth Bomb.

C: 你已经成为这地下世界令万千矿车工瞩目的超级新星——在贝洛伯格矿业史上，还从来没有哪位能像你一样迅速熟练掌握调度矿车的技巧…尽管你只是个助教。\n矿车是什么？它从哪里来？要到哪里去？这是使所有矿车工为之困扰的终极三问，而你距离揭晓谜底仅一步之遥。\n最终测试对应的奖励已赫然出现在你的眼前。看看奖励究竟是什么吧。
E: You have become a superstar in the Underworld and have caught the attention of thousands of miners. Throughout Belobog's history, no one else has mastered the art of directing mine carts as quickly as you... even though you were only an assistant.\nWhat is a mine cart? Where does it come from? Where is it going? These are the holy trinity of questions that haunt all mine cart operators, and you are only one step away from uncovering the answer.\nThe rewards for the final test are almost within your grasp. Let's see what that reward is.

C: 技术部职员茉莉正在对着同事大动肝火——热心的你上前询问，这才知道现正有一批危险的次品机器人横行禁区，极有可能对人造成伤害。\n你回收了全部的「核心模组」，把它们交给茉莉处置吧。
E: Molly from the Technology Division is angry with her colleagues. You learn from her that a group of dangerous malfunctioning robots is wandering around in the restricted zone, which are prone to harming people.\nYou have retrieved all the "Core Modules." Bring them back to Molly.

C: 来到机械屋，你发现希露瓦恐怕不能如愿以偿了——坐镇克里珀堡的新任大守护者布洛妮娅正召唤她返回军队，为铁卫建设贡献力量。\n希露瓦拗不过你与杰帕德二人，悻悻地独自前去与大守护者交涉，而她那爱操心的弟弟显然有些担心她的状况。\n不妨跟着杰帕德一同前往克里珀堡，看看两人交涉得如何了吧。
E: Once at the workshop, you realized Serval probably won't have her wish granted — The new Supreme Guardian Bronya at Qlipoth Fort is asking Serval to return to the army and contribute to the development of the Guards.\nServal could not outspeak Gepard and you in this argument and went unhappily to negotiate with the Supreme Guardian, and her concerned brother is evidently worried about her.\nWhy don't you head to Qlipoth Fort with Gepard and see how the negotiation is going.

C: 展品盗窃案圆满——呃，姑且算是圆满——地解决了。\n佩拉告诉你，博物馆前台的艾丽斯小姐正在找你。\n回去找艾丽斯小姐聊聊，看看她给你准备了什么惊喜吧。
E: The theft cases were solved without a— Uhhh, more or less solved without a hitch.\nPela told you that Miss Eris is looking for you in the museum reception.\nGo back and speak with Miss Eris to see what surprises she has in store for you.

C: 在那位云骑的帮助下，你顺利抄写完了《千手慈怀药王救世品》。现在将抄写好的经文交给绿芙蓉，一定就可以顺利打入药王秘传内部了吧…但愿如此。
E: Thanks to that Cloud Knight, you finished transcribing the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation without a hitch. Once you give the transcribed scripture to Green Hibiscus, you'd be sure to infiltrate the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... such is the hope.

C: 告别了那个狮子大开口的小混混，你们终于可以找到隐书了。\n顺便告诉你一个小秘密：名侦探三月七其实很喜欢刚才的经历，因为小说里的名侦探也总要遇到这种胡搅蛮缠、不讲道理、狮子大开口的证人。这让她感觉自己更像是个名侦探了。
E: After leaving the daylight-robbing thug, you can finally meet Yinshu.\nA little secret for you: Genius Detective March 7th loved the experience, because even genius detectives need to encounter unreasonable, daylight-robbing, uncultured witnesses like that. It made her feel even more like a genius detective.

C: 随将军提审那名叫「刃」的囚犯时我便有预感，幽囚狱绝对无法困住此人。他瞧着所有人的眼神都冷如死灰，像是站在坟墓间看死人。那是久历生死的杀手才会有的眼神…如今他脱狱逃亡，不知又有何图谋。\n关于刃的追查记录，断在了流云渡。将军诸务繁忙，身为侍从，我得为他分忧才是。
E: When the general called the prisoner, Blade, to court, I knew. The Shackling Prison would never be able to trap someone like him. He looks at everyone as if they were all as dead as those in a cemetery. It was a look that only assassins who have been macerating in death can give... His prison break was for a certain goal. What can it be?\nThe hunt for Blade stopped at Cloudford. The general is busy with official matters, as his retainer, I should take part of this responsibility for him.

C: 就如同你所担心的，小聪从未认真了解过静斋其人，甚至做不到投其所好。只好拜托你去打听一下。\n当然了，你发现了静斋的拒绝多少有些不太自然，也许仔细问问会有什么新线索。\n难道那位叫作孤屿的诗人，不令人在意吗？
E: As you feared, Cong never got to know Jingzhai serious and didn't even know what she really liked. You have no choice but to go ask around.\nOf course, you found Jingzhai's refusal to be a little suspicious. Maybe you'll find some new clues if you ask carefully.\nDoesn't that poet, Guyu, stir concern in anyone?

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 挨个听听大善人们的诉求吧。放个生还能让他们放生出食物链来，可真是一群人才。
E: Listen to the requests of the Benevolent Ones one by one. Who knew they could manage to create a food chain just from releasing living creatures? What a group of geniuses.

C: 你常看到类似的新闻，为了找回走失者，寻找的人也迷了路。很遗憾，今天你注定要成为这样一个故事的主角。渐渐的，你连藿藿都不知去向。在一面奇怪的铜镜前打量了片刻功夫，你居然被拉进了一处幻境中。此处三步一墙，五步一门，直教人原地打转，不知何去何从。\n按你看过的某些仙舟话本故事所说，等你离开此处，世间已过去百余年之久——你可不想在一个迷宫里度过余生，快些找到出口吧！
E: You often see similar news stories about a person getting lost while trying to find another missing person. Unfortunately, today's the day you are destined to be the protagonist of such a story. Gradually, you manage to lose track of even Huohuo. After sizing up a strange bronze mirror for a moment, you are somehow pulled into a realm of illusion. There's walls and doors everywhere, sending you round in circles and disorienting you.\nAccording to some of the Xianzhou folk tales you've heard, the outside world will have passed hundreds of years by the time you leave here — you don't want to spend the rest of your life lost in a maze, so find the exit pronto!

C: 此刻陈放在黑天鹅面前的，毫无疑问，是一个垃圾桶。一个贝洛伯格款式的垃圾桶。你本该对这一幕感到惊讶，但你没有。你早就见怪不怪了。这份见怪不怪的淡定，使你感到自己有些沧桑。
E: What stands before Black Swan in this moment is undoubtedly a trashcan. A Belobogian-style trashcan. This sight is supposed to shock you, but it does not. You have seen many strange things on your journeys. This sense of being unfazed by the bizarre makes you feel like you have really gained some life experience.

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 黑天鹅解开了这个不算谜题的谜题…而游戏，却显然还未结束。黑天鹅再次依照花火的指引，赶往下一个案发现场。你似乎察觉到了又一股短暂的情绪波动——黑天鹅有些玩腻了。
E: Black Swan has solved the puzzle that isn't a puzzle... Clearly, the game is still not over. Once again, Black Swan follows Sparkle's instructions and rushes to the next crime scene. You feel as if you sense another brief burst of emotion... Black Swan is getting a little tired of these games.

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n了解孤云与无名的剑士共同的回忆。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nLearn about the memories shared between Guyun and the Nameless Swordsmaster.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 在飞霄的提议下，众人放弃大张旗鼓的搜猎，转而揣度猎物的所思所求。而迴星港这个狼踪初现之地，会成为继续追索步离人的猎场。
E: Following Feixiao's advice, everybody abandons the large-scale hunt and begins to speculate about their prey's motives and agenda instead. As for Stargazer Navalia, the site where the wolves were first spotted, it shall become the hunting ground for the continued pursuit of the borisin.

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 船票与身份证件都已准备妥当，去赴与庞德之约吧。
E: With the ship ticket and identification documents all prepared, go and meet with Pound as promised.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 见证查德威克生命中最后的时光。\n扶起查德威克，陪伴他离开这场心灵迷局。
E: Witness the final moments of Chadwick's life.\nAssist Chadwick in standing up and guide him out of his spiritual labyrinth.

C: 你聘请了天环族的罗莎为新任大副，替你打理飞艇。新上任的第一天，你想听听她对飞艇事务的看法。
E: You have hired Rosa, a Halovian, as the new first mate to manage your airship. On her first day reporting to duty, you want to hear her thoughts on airship affairs.

C: 忙碌如大堂经理也需要一些时间调整状态，缓和心情。\n等你准备好了就继续工作吧，客人不知道什么时候就会找上门来。
E: Even a busy lobby manager needs occasional breaks to relax and unwind.\nReturn to your work when you feel ready, as guests may arrive at any moment.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 今天预言家不上班，不上班，不上班。
E: The prophet isn't working today. They're not working, not working.

C: 你找到了所有的天外之音，可其中似乎并没有那位眷属的身影。
E: You have found all of the celestial echoes, but the Titankin was nowhere to be seen in them.

C: 解救成功！回去告诉那只着急的呜呜伯一声，让它别再担心啦。
E: Rescue complete! Go back and tell the anxious Wubbaboo that it can rest easy.

C: 法政科的创始人古恩有事找你，他想让你来教导一名特殊的学生，授课的内容令你咂舌……
E: Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, comes to you. He wants you to teach a special student, and you're going to teach her some unique lessons...

C: 鬼鬼祟祟的尤利安强行征用了你的人力，去「地火」的集会场所看看到底发生了什么吧。
E: The sneaky Julian makes you join him. Go to the "Wildfire" gathering place to see what happened.

C: 莉拉已经写好了回信，把它带给在禁区里焦急等待的吉尔伯特吧——「家人」是世界上最美好的东西，你说呢？
E: Lila has finished the letter. Bring it back to Gilbert in the restricted zone, who is waiting eagerly. Family is the most beautiful thing in the world, right?

C: 民间科学家雷金正在找人帮忙。\n他在努力寻找投递论文的门路，还指望你能帮上些忙。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nHe is looking to submit his thesis and wants your help.

C: 前往上层区的公告板处，看看「正当权益会社」是否有新的委托吧。
E: Go to the noticeboard in the Overworld and see whether the Rightful Rights Society has any new commissions.

C: 完成「拟造花萼（赤） • 同谐之蕾」获取奖励
E: Complete Calyx (Crimson): Bud of Harmony and claim the rewards.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 你设身处地为帕姆着想，再三挑选过后，你为帕姆买到了最适合帕姆喝的饮料（你认为）。不知道帕姆喝下去会有什么反应呢，帕姆会吧咂嘴吗？莫名地，你开始期待着帕姆的反应……
E: After placing yourself in Pom-Pom's shoes and giving the choices a lot of thought, you have bought the perfect drink (in your opinion) for Pom-Pom. What would Pom-Pom's reaction be when they drink it? Would Pom-pom smack their lips? You find yourself eagerly anticipating Pom-Pom's response...

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 你的钱袋和那女孩一起不见了，一定有人知道她现在在哪。
E: Your money pouch has disappeared with the young girl. Someone must know where she is.

C: 能想到的解决办法都试过了，但没有奏效…再去和饲养员先生聊聊吧。
E: You tried everything you can think of, but nothing worked... Go chat with the caretaker again.

C: 三个吵闹的小鬼头，竟然是在争论刻法勒的庇护究竟是不是真的。面对希瑞雅想再去一次黎明云崖的恳求，你得认真思考一下。
E: Three noisy little troublemakers are actually arguing about whether Kephale's protection is real. Faced with Serena's plea to visit Dawncloud again, you need to ponder carefully.

C: 你已经知道了，这名叫斐第斯的士兵，就是帮助过希瑞雅的守卫叔叔。面对他已经牺牲的事实，你要如何满足孩子们的心愿呢？
E: You now know that the soldier named Phedes was the guard who once helped Serena. Now that he has sacrificed himself, how will you fulfill the children's wish?

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 艾丝妲为造物们添置了一批睡眠用品，小家伙们也需要休息，试着将它们转移到舒适的窝里吧。\n不用想就知道，这种在价格标签上被列为「宠物用品」的玩意儿肯定是艾丝妲自掏腰包的成果。
E: Asta has bought a stack of sleeping supplies for the creations. The little ones need to rest too, so try moving them to a comfortable cot.\nYou knew without asking that all these things listed as "pet supplies" had to be paid for out of Asta's own pocket.

C: 许多区划的囚犯从未喝过苏乐达。哈努兄弟决定用苏乐达支援这些囚犯，将它们变成伙伴。
E: Inmates from many areas have never tasted SoulGlad. Brother Hanu decides to use SoulGlad to assist these inmates, turning them into companions.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n该重新开始营业了。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nTime to get back in business.

C: 和司令商量接下来的安排。
E: Discuss what to do next with Mr. Bigwig.

C: 调饮师的工作暂时告一段落，该去和司令汇合了！
E: Call it a day as a drinksmith. It's time to meet Mr. Bigwig!

C: 该走了，向迷宫说声再见吧。
E: It's time to go. Say goodbye to the maze!

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 在「钟表把戏」的影响下，米莫萨改变了想法。她动身前往流梦礁，寻找关于钟表小子的秘密…\n她与「钟表匠」似乎藏着什么故事，去找她问清楚吧。
E: Under the influence of clockwork, Mimosa changed her mind. She headed to Dreamflux Reef to search for a secret regarding Clockie...\nIt seems that she and the Watchmaker are hiding something. Go and get some answers from her.

C: 选择上次没有去过的关卡，见证旅途的另一种可能。
E: Select a stage you didn't experience last time and witness another possibility.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 学派战争，鲁珀特二世的遗产，还有什么…咕啵算法？救命，你的脑子要长出来了。
E: The Scholars' Strife, legacy of Rubert II, and what was it... solid waves theory? Hell, you're getting too smart.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「欧洛尼斯奇迹」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Oronyx's Miracle. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 空间站的科员布凯辛有急事找你，似乎是什么研究遇到瓶颈了来找你求助。\n无名客还有搞科研的兼职吗？你有点摸不着头脑。但你发现这一切背后似乎和黑塔有关，事情倒是合理了起来……
E: The space station researcher, Grumpy, has something urgent for you. Apparently, she ran into a research bottleneck and needs your aid.\nCan a Nameless also moonlight as a researcher? You're a bit at a loss, but you discovered all this has something to do with the Herta, and now things seem like they make more sense...

C: 你为托帕调制了名为「放松」的配方，想必可以给她死气沉沉的上班生活带来别样的精彩吧。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者按照配方为托帕再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You've crafted a recipe called "Relaxation" for Topaz, which will surely bring some excitement to her dull work life.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Topaz according to the recipe.

C: 你调制了名为「人格」的配方，黑塔人偶喝下后，展现出了令人意外的一面。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为黑塔再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You mixed a recipe called "Persona," and after the Herta puppet drank it, she showed an unexpected side.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Herta.

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 成为超•极•大地兽的未来正在璨璨生辉！…当然了，这不妨碍你们继续打打闹闹，四处搞怪。去看看驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大有什么事要找你吧。
E: The future of becoming the Super Dromas shines bright! ...Of course, that doesn't stop you two from goofing around and causing mischief everywhere. Go see what Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas needs from you.

C: 与奇物交互揭开监控室的秘密
E: Interact with the Curio to unravel the secret in the Monitoring Room

C: 回到观景车厢
E: Return to the Parlor Car

C: 抓住并质问桑博
E: Capture and interrogate Sampo

C: 在歌德大饭店休息
E: Have some rest at the Goethe Grand Hotel

C: 出去散散心
E: Go outside and take a walk

C: 前往操作栈桥控制终端
E: Go and operate the gear bridge terminal

C: 回去找娜塔莎
E: Return to Natasha

C: 击败来历不明的敌人
E: Defeat enemies of unknown origins

C: 离开这里，继续前往大堂
E: Leave this place and continue towards the Lobby

C: 寻找砂金
E: Find Aventurine

C: 与黑天鹅交谈
E: Speak with Black Swan

C: 与橡木兵人交谈
E: Talk to the Oak Family Soldier

C: 观看尾声•其二
E: Watch the epilogue (II)

C: 对严苛评委使用「钟表把戏」
E: Use Clockwork on the strict judge

C: 寻找巨大迷钟内心缺失的零件
E: Find the parts missing in Big Ticker's heart

C: 与同伴交谈，整理信息
E: Speak with your companions and sort the information you have

C: 参加航线会议
E: Join the navigation meeting

C: 与知更鸟交谈
E: Speak with Robin

C: 进入入梦池，准备入梦
E: Enter the Dreampool and prepare to dive into the dream

C: 忍符已成！三度参见苦茶大师！
E: Ninja talisman perfected! Meet Master Kucha for a third time!

C: 回到折纸大学
E: Return to Paperfold University

C: 整理心情，好好休息吧
E: Calm your mood and rest up

C: 利用「预言算碑」打开大门
E: Use the Prophecy Tablet to open the door

C: 返回生命花园，将情况告诉缇宝她们
E: Return to the Garden of Life and tell Tribbie and the rest the situation

C: 前往高温浴池，寻找族人
E: Head to the hot bath and look for the Kremnoans

C: 离开友爱之馆，前往启蒙王座
E: Leave the Library of Philia and head to the Luminary Throne

C: 迈向战场
E: Head to the battlefield

C: 抵抗死国的诱惑，离开冥界
E: Resist the land of the dead's temptation and leave the nether realm

C: 前往「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Dragonbone City" Styxia and continue your adventure

C: 拯救哀丽秘榭
E: Save Aedes Elysiae

C: 寻找失散的同伴
E: Find your lost friends

C: 找出葛瑞迪的真身
E: Find Grady's true body

C: 与长夜月交谈
E: Speak with Evernight

C: 与「海瑟音」对话
E: Talk with Hysilens

C: 追踪「神话之外」的信号
E: Track the signal of Exomyth

C: 寻回胆小的科员亚伯拉罕
E: Find and bring back the timid researcher Abraham

C: 安慰遭受语言暴力的拉明娜
E: Comfort Lamina who has been verbally abused

C: 和防卫科员对话，进入封锁区域
E: Speak with the Security Department member and enter the locked area

C: 收集空间站的全部忆泡
E: Collect all the Memory Bubbles on the space station

C: 与苦恼的工作人员交谈
E: Talk to the Distressed Worker

C: 与姬子、丹恒交谈
E: Talk to Himeko and Dan Heng

C: 将盔甲交给史考特
E: Give the armor to Scott

C: 将匿名包裹转赠他人
E: Gift the anonymous packages

C: 继续跟随托比
E: Keep following Toby

C: 跟随「小飞」，寻找「大奔」的下落
E: Follow Little Fay to find Big Ben's whereabouts

C: 收集艺术品零件
E: Collect art pieces

C: 将买到的琼实鸟串递给陶德
E: Give the berrypheasant skewer you bought to Todd

C: 与檀檀对话，继续测算交通流量
E: Talk with Tantan and keep measuring traffic

C: 前往约定的地点，与白露见面
E: Go to the location at which you promised to meet Bailu

C: 离开太卜司
E: Leave the Divination Commission

C: 前往太卜司，见证小聪的告白
E: Go to the Divination Commission and bear witness to Cong's confession

C: 与桂乃芬一起前往绥园
E: Go to Fyxestroll Garden with Guinaifen

C: 前往幽囚狱入口
E: Go to The Shackling Prison's entrance

C: 调查奇异响动的源头
E: Investigate the source of the strange noise

C: 戳破姬莲创造出的虚假幻象
E: Dispel the false illusions crafted by Jillian

C: 阻止刺客袭击蒂索克二世
E: Stop the assassins from harming Tizocic II

C: 视察尾翼，选择涂装，为飞艇取名并验收
E: Inspect the empennage, select the paint, name the airship, and confirm all are of an acceptable quality

C: 继续大堂经理的工作
E: Continue fulfilling your duties as the lobby manager

C: 把豪华物资交给外邦人
E: Give the outlanders some luxurious supplies

C: 向古恩报告本日教学成果
E: Report the result of today's lessons to Gunn

C: 寻找发出奇怪声音的门
E: Find the door making weird noises

C: 去花店听听塔米拉会和他人聊些什么
E: Listen in on Tamila's conversation with other people at the florist's

C: 将你的发现告诉给塞琳
E: Report what you found to Celine

C: 阅读「演化神秘学信徒」的相关短信
E: Read messages regarding the "Disciples of Evoccultism"

C: 将推演结果带去送给委托人
E: Take the extrapolation result to the client

C: 与祭司门塔对话
E: Speak with Priest Monnta

C: 与开心萤对话，继续「寻宝」
E: Speak with Joyworm about continuing the "treasure hunt"

C: 向杰帕德请教
E: Inquire from Gepard

C: 前往行医市集，寻找扑满的线索
E: Look for clues related to Trotters at the Healer's Market

C: 净化污染区
E: Cleanse the contaminated zone

C: 修理遭到破坏的机巧鸟栖木
E: Fix the broken cycrane roost

C: 与费曼进行激辩，弄清事情的真相。
E: Debate with Feinman and uncover the truth.

C: 返回黄金的时刻看看吧，埃韦正在老地方等着你。
E: Return to the Golden Hour. IV awaits at the usual spot.

C: 拦住疯跑的大地兽
E: Stop the rampaging dromas

C: 修复藏品
E: Restore exhibits

C: 将藏品放置于指定位置
E: Place the exhibit at the specified spot

C: 进入西衍先生的故事中完成「试炼」
E: Enter Mr. Xiyan's story to complete your "trial"

C: 根据藏宝图，找到「天火熔金」
E: Find the Ignis Aureliae according to the treasure map

C: 拍摄「白露与机巧鸟」照片
E: Take a picture of Bailu and the cycranes

C: 用潜爆机兵驱散员工
E: Use the Automaton Stealth Bomb to disperse the workers

C: 接受岁阳的挑战
E: Accept the heliobus' challenge

C: 将庆典需要的材料交给杰伊
E: Provide Jay with the necessary materials for the carnival

C: 将庆典需要的材料交给杰伊
E: Provide Jay with the necessary materials for the carnival

C: 搜集丢失的物资
E: Search for the missing supplies

C: 帮助情绪失控的迷钟
E: Assist the out-of-control Ticker.

C: 帮助情绪失控的迷钟
E: Assist the out-of-control Ticker.

C: 找到所有散落于错乱空间中的线索
E: Find all the scattered clues within the chaotic space

C: 前往「惊梦酒吧」
E: Head to the Dreamjolt Hostelry

C: 寻找折纸小鸟
E: Find the Origami Bird

C: 与藿藿交谈
E: Talk to Huohuo

C: 与卢卡一起返回休息室
E: Return to the lounge with Luka

C: 向丹恒和三月七讲述乐队的遭遇
E: Tell Dan Heng and March 7th about what happened to the band

C: 阻止财富学院代表
E: Stop the Fortune Academy representative

C: 将三月七的枕头放在床上
E: Place March 7th's pillow on the bed

C: 给三月七拍摄证件照
E: Take an ID photo for March 7th

C: 和三月七讨论照片
E: Discuss the photo with March 7th

C: 前往古玩店「岁月遗珍」
E: Head to the Treasure of Ages antique store

C: 购买第一只小海豹
E: Purchase your first baby seal

C: 和泡泡接受采访
E: Host an interview with Bubbles

C: 与赛事主持人对话
E: Talk to the competition organizer

C: 陪驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大准备实习吧
E: Help Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas prepare for the internship

C: <color=#f29e38ff>坚韧训练</color>的效率提高#1%
