E: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Tenacity Training</color> efficiency by #1%

C: 安排至少2次灵敏训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点灵敏
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Dexterity Training: All actions today additionally increases Dexterity by #1

C: 安排至少1次游历：本日所有行动额外提高#1点灵敏
E: Plan at least 1 Excursion: All actions today additionally increase Dexterity by #1

C: 安排至少2次灵敏训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点灵敏
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Dexterity Training: All actions today additionally increases Dexterity by #1

C: 先读战略
E: Pre-Reviewed Strategy

C: 通过第一次试剑
E: Pass the First Sword Trial

C: 第二次试剑
E: Second Sword Trial

C: 距离最终试剑
E: Time to Final Sword Trial

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 三月七在绥园遭遇岁阳附身，藿藿及时出现解围。
E: March 7th was possessed at the Fyxestroll Garden by a heliobus. Huohuo came to the rescue just in time.

C: 虽然围绕着「星核」的谜团众多，连黑塔都没法完全解析——但至少我们拥有将它的影响抵消的手段。
E: Stellarons are clouded in mystery — even Herta isn't able to fully understand them... but at least we know how to neutralize their influences.

C: 对了，事情结束后，你会回列车和大家一起旅行的，对吧？
E: And... you'll come back and travel with us once this is all over, right?

C: …仙舟联盟的六艘巨舰之一，仙舟「罗浮」。我们知道。
E: ...The Xianzhou Luofu? It belongs to the Hexafleet of the Xianzhou Alliance. We've heard of it.

C: 强大的仙舟联盟，怎么会被一颗星核攻破呢……
E: How could the mighty Xianzhou Alliance be breached by a Stellaron...

C: 伸手！
E: Hands out!

C: 他很少和人讲起自己的故事呢，你问他的时候，他只会说自己是做动画的。
E: He doesn't talk much about his past. If you ask him, he'll just tell you about how he worked in animation...

C: 各位乘客！跃迁航线会议正式开始！
E: Passengers! The warp navigation meeting has officially begun!

C: 我依稀记得这样一个世界，那里的人们每时每刻都面临着远超常识认知的威胁。但凭借智慧和勇气，人类一次又一次地从危机中拯救了自己的家园。
E: I remember a distant world where the people were faced with unimaginable danger every single day. But they saved their planet time after time with wisdom and courage.

C: 我原本也希望能和你们共同前往，但姬子坚持要给各位独处的时间。
E: Hehe... I, too, wished to go with you. But Himeko insisted on letting you and your friends rise to the challenge.

C: 为防止空间异常现象出现反复，列车将尽快离开当前站点，驶入平稳间域。
E: To avoid encountering the anomalies again, the Express will dispatch shortly and head to a more stable area.

C: 我要走啦。
E: I'm heading out.

C: 这…是…哪里？
E: Where... am I?

C: 结果撞上这么大的事，正义的列车组可不会袖手旁观！
E: We just so happened to arrive during this... invasion. Of course, as a — ahem — crew of heroes, we're happy to lend a hand.

C: 嗯，这样多多少少可以拖延敌人一会儿。
E: Yes. To stall the enemy, more or less.

C: 推下摇杆，阿尔弗瑞德…抱歉抱歉，我认错人了。
E: Push the stick down, Alfred... Sorry, sorry, I got the wrong person.

C: 先说摇杆的方向，「上」是频谱仪，「下」是滤波器，「左」是参考电平，「右」是衰耗器。
E: But first let's talk about the controls. "Up" is the spectrometer, "Down" is the filter, "Left" is the reference level, and "Right" is the attenuator.

C: 当务之急是保住空间站，先专注于眼前的工作吧。
E: The top priority is to preserve the space station and concentrate on the work at hand.

C: 保护奇物权益！拯救非人生物！
E: Protect rare item rights! Save non-human life!

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着{NICKNAME}：「<unbreak>84</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at {NICKNAME}: "<unbreak>84</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着桂乃芬：「<unbreak>13</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Guinaifen: "<unbreak>13</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着Archer：「8分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Archer: "8 points!" it announces.

C: {M#他}{F#她}是破局之人——当然，我也可能弄错。
E: {M#He's}{F#She's} the one who can help us turn the tides... Of course, I may be wrong.

C: 介绍我就好好介绍，提什么俱乐部？我那么多非凡成就，哪个不比#83好听？
E: At least give me a proper introduction! Genius Society number <unbreak>83</unbreak>... Of all my outstanding achievements, that's what you want to mention?

C: 人类，女性，年轻，貌美，可爱。
E: Human, female, young, beautiful, attractive.

C: 能媲美螺丝咕姆——那在宇宙里也是数一数二了！真厉害啊，我不行，在计算机领域不算很出色。
E: Being on the same level as Screwllum — who's probably the best in the universe — is nothing short of spectacular. It's beyond my abilities, computers are not my forte.

C: 湛蓝星的资料当然要多少有多少，但我还是想自己研究一下。虽然听着和工作内容差不多，但这真的是兴趣，没有任何指标——而且，我自费的嘛。
E: Of course, there's already a lot of published research on The Blue, but I want to study it myself. It might sound a lot like work, but it's really just a hobby — there are no deadlines or quotas to meet, and I don't get paid.

C: 如果指的是对你乘上星穹列车的看法…你想多了。
E: If you're referring to what I think about you joining the Astral Express... You're overthinking it.

C: 你的身体被星核猎手动过手脚，也许是留下了什么后遗症。
E: Your body has been tampered with by the Stellaron Hunters. Perhaps that left behind some aftereffects.

C: 小三月最开始也这么说过。
E: March said something like that at first, too.

C: （应该是列车旅程中的纪念品…吧？应该是这样的吧。）
E: (This looks like a souvenir from the journeys... right? Probably.)

C: 只有像她那样的人才配得上星穹列车——我是这么想的——姬子一定有个非常重要的梦想，构成了她整个人生的愿景。
E: Only someone like her is worthy of the Astral Express. I think Himeko's vision of her whole life revolves around... a very important dream.

C: 我管它叫：「元宇宙」！
E: I call it the "Metaverse"!

C: 他们是人类的救星。早在寒潮到来之前，筑城者们顶着世人的不解和讥笑，坚持在此地建造城池，历史证明他们的选择是正确的。
E: The saviors of humanity. Long before the arrival of the Eternal Freeze, the Architects braved the doubts and derision of the people, never wavering from their construction of its defenses. History has proven that their decision was the correct one.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 佩～拉～姐～姐～
E: Yes~ Miss~ Pela~

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 那听你的？先去机械屋找希露瓦吧。
E: Hmm, makes sense... Guess we better head over to Serval's workshop then?

C: 那能用钥匙打开吗？
E: Can it really be opened with a key?

C: 你说得对！这句话中提到了两个地点……
E: You are right! There are two locations mentioned in this sentence...

C: 「群山的隘口」、「大守护者运筹之地」，我猜这指的是那座被裂界侵蚀的边堡要塞？
E: "The mountain pass," "the place of operation of The Supreme Guardian," I'm guessing it's referring to the fortress that was eroded by the Fragmentum?

C: 没事，等你准备好再说，我就在这里等你。
E: It's okay. I'll wait for you here when you're ready.

C: 啊！这位巴拉金先辈，年轻的时候还真是…古怪呢。
E: Ah! This Balakin was really... eccentric when he was young.

C: 然后，你又一次听到了女人的声音……
E: All of a sudden, you hear it again... a female voice in your ear...

C: 「拍照」…啊，克拉拉想起来了——我还小的时候，史瓦罗先生也给克拉拉「拍照」过……
E: "Photo..." Oh! I remember. When I was little, Mr. Svarog took a photo for me...

C: 嘿嘿，鼹鼠党的下个目标已经定啦…打倒铁皮怪物，解救被吃掉的倒霉蛋们！
E: And it just so happens to be The Moles' next target, hehe... We'll defeat the iron monster and save the people in its tummy!

C: 没什么，就是诧异…
E: No, it's just surprising...

C: 歌德先生，麻烦再加一碟曲奇——
E: Mr. Goethe, one plate of cookies, please...

C: 问问瓦尔特先生。
E: Mr. Yang.

C: 可可利亚，你……
E: Cocolia, you...

C: 知道吗老弟？你手上的「琴匣」，还有我的宝贝吉他…它们的原型其实都来自于这台「超电磁流射演奏器」。
E: You know something, Gepard? That guitar case in your hand, and my guitar... They're both from the same prototype — the "super electromagnetic flux player."

C: 你怎么看希露瓦这件事？
E: What do you think about this whole matter with Serval?

C: 未完成的信
E: Unfinished letter

C: 旅店内部非常暖和，有家的温馨。
E: The interior of the hostel is nice and cozy.

C: 你伸出手，轻轻碰触——甚至不知道自己碰到了哪里，两只信封的受力平衡瞬间被打破。做好事的感觉竟然如此美妙。
E: You reach your hand out and gently touch them. You aren't sure where your hand skimmed, but the balance of the two envelopes is instantly broken. It's incredible how good it feels to do something good.

C: 这是一座电话亭，你觉得它很新奇，因为你出生在一个远程通讯设备可以手持的时代。
E: This is a phone booth. You find it novel because you were born in the mobile era.

C: 你不禁将自己看作是地鼠王国的一员，人类无意在你的领地上留下了各式的野餐垃圾。你们为这些难以理解的科技献出了生命，但人类似乎从未注意到你们。
E: You can't help but see yourself as a member of the gopher kingdom. The humans are haphazardly leaving all kinds of picnic trash in your territory. You give your lives to these incomprehensible technical products, but humans never seem to notice you.

C: 这是一只红色的邮筒，似乎最近刚刚被邮差清理过。它挺立在街边的模样是那么孤独。
E: It's a red mailbox. Seems like the mailman just finished with it. It stands on the street all alone.

C: 你强迫自己移开目光，一切都消失了，你觉得自己好像做了一场幻梦。
E: You force yourself to stop staring and everything disappears. It feels like a fantasy dream.

C: 「哪里有困难，哪里需要帮助，哪里就有『地火』」。
E: Wherever there is hardship and a cry for help, there is Wildfire.

C: 跑不远的，那家伙！就在周围找找看吧。
E: That guy can't have gotten too far! Let's search nearby.

C: 好嘞，谢谢你们…呃，叫醒我！我还是回去再接着睡吧！
E: Okay! Thank you for, um... getting me on my feet! If I get back soon enough, I'll have time for a nap...

C: 哦～希儿姑娘开始认可咱的实力啦？
E: Ohh~ Is Seele starting to appreciate our strength? Hmm?

C: 一五一十！…是什么意思？
E: Yep! All the ins and outs, hehe! ...What does that mean?

C: 哼，这不过是演练而已！正式开始以后，我们可不会让着你们了哟！
E: S—So what, it's just a practice! Wait until we're playing for real — you'll see!

C: 把你们弄到这儿…真的是迫不得已。留在地上太危险了，咱们都是铁卫悬赏捉拿的要犯；地下纵有千般不好，至少铁卫绝对不会追下来，是个安全的去处……
E: I had no choice but to take you guys down here. It was too dangerous for us on the surface — we're wanted criminals!? Sure, the Underworld has its drawbacks, but at least the Guards would never follow us. We're safe here...

C: …第三方势力「机器人」出现啦！我就说嘛，要真是人和人斗，这故事就没意思了。
E: New challengers enter! About time, human-only conflicts are so boring.

C: 要是能得到她的帮助，寻找星核也会方便不少吧。
E: If we can get her to help us, we'll bag a Stellaron in no time!

C: 再说一次，我收到的只有大守护者的指示，审判罪行是裁判团的职责。
E: Let me repeat — all I received were the supreme guardian's instructions. It is for the adjudication panel to pass judgment on the accused.

C: 「下层区」会有星核的线索吗？
E: Will we find any Stellaron clues in the Underworld?

C: 是吗…怪不得你身上散发着主人翁的气质。
E: Haha, oh yeah? Well look at you swaggering in like the protagonist in your own story.

C: 出发吧，争取在傍晚之前赶回来。早点把那些病号安顿好，我就能早点从他们的鬼哭神嚎里解脱出来。
E: Let's go, if we leave now we can still make it back before sundown. When it comes to helping injured people groaning in pain, the sooner the better.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们上去看看。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's go take a look.

C: …她为什么没来。
E: Why isn't she here?

C: 这个时刻迟早会来…我只是没想到会来得这么快。
E: I knew this moment would come sooner or later... I just didn't expect it would be so soon.

C: 经历了这么多事，是不是累坏了？快吃点东西，然后好好休息一晚吧。
E: It must have been exhausting. Please, have some food and get a good night's rest.

C: 娜塔莎的直觉可是很敏锐的。
E: Natasha has excellent intuition.

C: 稍微再等一下。
E: Wait a minute.

C: 你有那么多拳手还不够？
E: Don't you have enough boxers already?

C: 算是吧，史考特老板找了我们这帮拳手来试盔甲，我刚好最合适。
E: More or less. Scott got a whole bunch of boxers to try out the armor and I was the best fit.

C: 一个人去很危险的…
E: It's dangerous to go alone...

C: 我身为家里的大姐，必须照顾好妹妹…有必要的话，我就一个人回铆钉镇的裁缝铺里找找。
E: As the eldest sister in the family, I have to take good care of my younger sister... If necessary, I will go back to the tailor's shop in Rivet Town by myself to find some.

C: 我看到那家伙拖着条伤腿，一瘸一拐地走了，多半是去找盔甲去了。他最好能找个大点儿的，不然就别回来了。
E: I saw the guy limping away with a broken leg. He probably went looking for new armor, as he should. And he'd better find one, or else he shouldn't even bother coming back.

C: 没问题！我这就给您安排加赛。
E: No problem! A match for you right away.

C: 而此刻坐镇天梯之巅的，竟然是与{NICKNAME}打过照面的老面孔——
E: And right now sitting at the top of the ladder, is actually an old friend of {NICKNAME}—

C: 毕竟…我不用再一个人应对这些问题了——对吧，老弟？
E: After all... I'm not doing this on my own, right?

C: 垃圾箱静静矗立，传来隐隐恶意。
E: The dumpster stands silently, yet a hint of sinister comes through.

C: 地髓矿石被切削得方方正正——又或者它天生就长得如此端庄大方。
E: The Geomarrow ore was cut into a cuboid, or maybe it was formed into this elegant shape naturally.

C: 看来有人在这只垃圾箱里筑了个简陋的小窝。
E: Looks like someone used this dumpster as their humble living quarters.

C: 当然不会。
E: Certainly not.

C: 你打开了铁桶，一股柴薪燃烧特有的焦味携卷金属冷冽的涩味扑面而来，使你一时窒息。向深不见底的桶底望去，只见无垠的黑暗中，点点未燃尽的薪火在其间闪烁流动——它们还不想早早熄灭。
E: You open the tin lid and a waft of burnt wood mixed with cold steel invades your olfactory senses. Looking into the depth of the trashcan, you can see flickers of embers still hanging on, struggling to extend their own lifespan.

C: 以下为您展开详细报道。
E: Let's take a closer look at the details.

C: 目前，海尔雷分队正在进一步持续开展相关工程，试图与亚空间场中的居民取得联系。星际和平播报将对此事进行持续报道。
E: As of now, the squad has been carrying out further work in an attempt to contact the galaxy's residents. We will bring you more updates on this developing story as they become available.

C: 流光忆庭完成对已逝世界「月卫之盾」的忆质碎片回收工作，世界回忆有望重现。
E: The Garden of Recollection has gathered memoria fragments from the lost world of Moonshield — the precious memories of this world will not be forgotten.

C: 同时，公司发言人就近日反物质军团入侵仙舟一事向「罗浮」表达关切，并向死难者家属致以慰问。
E: The IPC also expressed their heartfelt concern for the Luofu regarding the recent invasion by the Antimatter Legion and sent their condolences to the victims.

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 那要不咱们先对个供词？
E: Shouldn't we plan out what we want to say?

C: …好吧。
E: ...Okay.

C: 关于刃…
E: About Blade...

C: 古怪倒也谈不上，只是总觉得哪里不大对劲。
E: I don't know about "strange," but my gut tells me something is off.

C: 既然云骑军抓住了星核猎手的成员，以此为线索追捕卡芙卡就行了。何必要请我们「引出」卡芙卡？
E: Since the Cloud Knights have already captured a Stellaron Hunter, why not use him to get to Kafka? Why rely on us?

C: 只怕这次要受的挫折，大过他的洋洋意气呵……
E: My fear is that this might prove too big a setback, bigger than his exuberance...

C: 据说这位大人当年可是仙舟云骑军飞行士中的佼佼者呢～脾气火辣，技术一流，爱笑爱闹。
E: They say that many years ago, Madam Yukong was an ace pilot in the Cloud Knights. She was a "work hard, play harder" type, known for her hot temper and incredible skill.

C: 所谓外冷内热…
E: Some people are not what they seem.

C: 好耶，刚刚坐的星槎就挺有意思。这个长乐天估计好玩的东西也不少～
E: Yeah! That starskiff was pretty cool, there must be loads of interesting things in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 这位{F#小姐}{M#小哥}，请问有什么能帮你的吗？
E: Can I help you with anything?

C: 我来这儿也不是瞎玩呀，是奉了她的命令，在此等候要来的贵客。时间多宝贵呀，这叫「摸鱼工作两不误」。
E: Anyway, I didn't come here just to play — she ordered me to wait here for our guests. Time is precious! I'm simply multitasking.

C: 哈，你知道罗浮仙舟上有多少人想挂个号看本小姐的专家门诊，却求之不得嘛！
E: Ha, do you have any idea how many people on the Luofu are waiting for an appointment with me? You should count this as a blessing!

C: 请说。
E: Please do...

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 超距通信技术还不太成熟，也可能星核的存在干扰了信号传输吧。
E: Long-range communication technology is still improving. Perhaps the presence of the Stellaron is affecting signal transmission.

C: 听说在仙舟民俗中「鱼」象征着丰足。你依稀记得游鱼交洄的形状也出现在停云小姐持有的扇子上。
E: It is said that in the culture of the Xianzhou, "fish" represents affluence. You vaguely recall that you have seen the pattern of fish swimming around each other on the fan of Miss Tingyun.

C: 嘶，您要是，咳咳，能在敝店买个什么，也许能帮助我加快回忆？
E: Ahem, if only business were better, perhaps my memory would start to improve... don't you think?

C: 不买！
E: Not gonna happen!

C: 小小茶馆早关张。
E: Little teahouse closes up all-eager.

C: 只是一点小小的暗示，让他们<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>说话而已呀。{NICKNAME}，这你最了解不过了。
E: Just a little persuasion to get them to <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me</color>. But you know all about that already, don't you {NICKNAME}?

C: 联觉信标都翻译不出来…
E: Even my Synesthesia Beacon can't make sense of what she said.

C: 啊，这个我知道，家用寻物仪的广告。
E: Ah, I know what this is! It's an advertisement for a Home-Use Object Finder.

C: 想必是大获全胜！
E: I think she won total victory!

C: 不去不去！本姑娘晕大场面！
E: Well try this on for size — nope! I can't stand anymore of this fighting, so there!

C: 「药王秘传」，谁知道敌人竟是「药王秘传」……
E: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... who would have thought our enemies would turn out to be the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 我在《云骑武经》中看过相关的记载：接触寿瘟祸祖之人，瞬间堕入魔阴…但没想到，「药王秘传」竟然真的存在，真的就在我们身边。
E: There are records of such a phenomenon in the Cloud Knights Martial Doctrine. Those who come into contact with the Plagues Author become mara-struck instantly... I never thought the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were real, or so close to us.

C: 那你还是退回本阵好了。
E: Then you'd better return to the home front.

C: 数目寥寥，多为受蛊惑的丹士和医者。他们虽然能驱使异兽战斗，或是以丹药自壮身躯…但说到底并不是云骑军的对手。也正因此，这些人才会想出散布妖雾的法子。
E: Only a handful of converted alchemists and healers. They can drive fantastic creatures into battle and strengthen their bodies with medicinal pellets... but they are no match for the Cloud Knights. That's why they decided to spread this demonic vapor.

C: 该赴约了，请容我先行告退，希望你们能同这些戏子…玩得开心。
E: Haha... My apologies for leaving so soon, but I have an appointment to keep. I'm sure my friends here will be happy to entertain you...

C: 你们在这附近转转吧，可别乱跑，一会儿会有云骑来送你们回去。有缘再见啦！
E: You guys can hang around here, but don't run off too far — there'll be Cloud Knights coming to escort you back soon. Bye for now!

C: 那些异邦人竟然胜了「药王秘传」，这岂不显得我们毫无作为？
E: Those Travelers defeated the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... Won't that make us seem... incompetent?

C: {NICKNAME}与你对视一眼，互相沉默了起来。
E: {NICKNAME} looks at you, as you both become silent.

C: 对持明而言，这牺牲恐怕是不得不为之的……
E: For the Vidyadhara, it must have been a necessary sacrifice.

C: 那是什么！是龙吗？
E: Is that a dragon!?

C: 少主大人，咱们真的要抛下鳞渊境吗？
E: Young master, must we really forsake Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 这壁画倒是挺有意思的…似乎完全不受时间侵蚀。
E: This mural is pretty interesting... Looks like time hasn't had any effect on it.

C: 仙舟联盟…你们就从来没想过会成为军团的目标吗？难道你们以为联盟势大，负创神就不敢对你们出手吗？
E: The Xianzhou Alliance... Did it never cross your mind that you would become a target of the Legion? You thought the Alliance too powerful for The Blemished One to strike?

C: 丹恒，我的后背，就拜托你了。
E: Dan Heng, guard my back. I'm counting on you.

C: 一段时间后，你们为了探听景元的状况来到神策府……
E: Some time later, you arrive at the Seat of Divine Foresight to check on Jing Yuan...

C: 太卜特地请我们来此，不是为了哀叹的吧？
E: Master Diviner, have you summoned us here just to sigh and complain?

C: 呸呸呸！好事当然是咱们自己的功劳，本姑娘才不会把它算在那伙人头上哩。
E: Bah, no way! Everything good has come our way due to our hard work. I'm not letting them take any of the credit.

C: 既然有客人来，吾就先行退去了。
E: You have guests. I shall take my leave.

C: 接渡使的印鉴、一个小盒子、一把…刀？一张弓，还有这个被包得严严实实的东西…这是什么呀？
E: An Amicassador's seal, a small box... a knife? A bow, and something wrapped up tight... I wonder what this is.

C: 停云姐姐，真希望你能喝到这杯茶……
E: I can't wait for Miss Tingyun to try this tea!

C: 我…我带来了一个纸鸢。希望你们别嘲笑这份心意微薄，虽然它不能和停云送出的那些贵重礼物相提并论，但这份回礼，有它自己的意义。
E: I... I've brought a paper kite. I know it may seem simple compared to the precious items that Tingyun gifted others in the past... but it has a deeper meaning.

C: 时辰已到，该是举行「慰灵奠仪」的时候了。诸位，我们在星槎海的坤舆台见。
E: It is time for the soul-soothing ceremony. Please make your way to Earthrise Agora in Starskiff Haven.

C: 我想符卿之前已和大家谈及此事。但我认为你们所做的一切，罗浮远远无法回报。故此，我代表罗浮云骑军，送给诸位一枚象征「结盟之谊」的玉兆。
E: I am sure Lady Fu has given voice to this already, but the Luofu is greatly indebted to you. Therefore, on behalf of the Luofu Cloud Knights, I hereby present you with a jade abacus — a symbol of our allied friendship.

C: 这不就是长乐天金人巷里老饕聚集的饭馆么？怎么，你打算请我去大吃一顿吗？
E: Isn't that the place on Aurum Alley over in Exalting Sanctum? All the foodies go there. What about it? Planning on treating me to a feast?

C: 这一路匆匆忙忙、兜兜转转的。有些朋友才刚认识，就要告别了，想想还有些舍不得呢。
E: We've been so busy running around in circles, we haven't gotten the chance to say goodbye to friends we've just met — I feel like parting is still such sweet sorrow.

C: 嗯？这就想跑了？
E: Huh? Trying to flee?

C: 也不许找其他小朋友麻烦。
E: And don't bully any other kids, either.

C: 带上帕姆玩偶。
E: Take your Pom-Pom toy.

C: 相信匹诺康尼一定不会让你们失望。
E: I trust Penacony won't let you all down.

C: 是梦里的孩子…
E: It's the child from the dream...

C: 不无可能。家族向其他派系发出邀约，本就是件不同寻常的事。你的发现也印证了或许有第三者参与其中…我收回前言，这场「盛会」不简单哪。
E: It's possible. The fact that The Family sent out invites to the other factions is already unusual. And your discovery confirms that there could be a third party involved... I take back what I said: This "event" is becoming more interesting with each passing second.

C: 眼下就先专注于列车长的请求，一边收集情报，一边享受「美好的假期」吧——匹诺康尼毕竟是闻名宇宙的度假胜地，很多人可能一辈子都来不了哦。
E: Right now, let's just focus on the conductor's request: We'll collect intel while enjoying this "wonderful vacation." Penacony is, after all, a famed resort of the cosmos. Not many get a chance to even visit in their lifetime.

C: 我不能自作主张。
E: I cannot make this decision on my own.

C: 丹恒……
E: Dan Heng...

C: 匹诺康尼大博物馆、初醒图书馆、折纸大学…这些地方都有可能存放着我们想要探寻的过去。
E: Penacony's Grand Museum, the Primal Waking Library, the Paperfold academy... The pasts that we chase may be stored in these places.

C: 打算先去哪？
E: Where are you thinking of going?

C: 意外地没什么感觉…
E: The fall didn't hurt at all!

C: 我只是稍微调整了一下你的精神状态，让你感觉舒服些。
E: I've merely changed your state of mind for you to feel more at ease.

C: 大家回去休息吧，准备好了就进入梦境。
E: Head back to your rooms, get some rest, and prepare to enter the dreamscape.

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: 这一刻还是来了…
E: I almost expected something like this...

C: 正好，我也有点累了。我们在酒水吧坐会儿吧。
E: I'm a bit tired too. Let's sit down at the snack bar for a while.

C: 见到我是不是很意外？这都是多亏了你——雅利洛-VI现在可是门户大开啊！
E: You're surprised to see me? You know, it's thanks to you that I can be here — you helped Jarilo-VI open up to the outside!

C: 取来了。她说光有这些不成，还给你多捎了个「碎梦」，叫你看着办。
E: Here's the items you asked for. Miss Thunderbolt said these alone wouldn't be enough. She wanted you to have these Broken Dreams — she said do with them as you see fit.

C: 表达？不，应该是揭露……
E: ...Trying to say? I'm not saying anything, I just want to reveal the truth...

C: 算了，我不必如此苛责你。
E: Never mind. I have no reason to be so harsh on you.

C: 「她」是谁？
E: Who is she?

C: 听好了，小孔雀，你也是收到过「酒馆」邀请的人。想邀假面愚者入伙？可以，动动脑子，{RUBY_B#阿哈}乐子神{RUBY_E#}想要的究竟是什么。
E: Listen, little peacock. You've been invited by the Tavern before too. If you want the Masked Fools to get onboard, you need to figure out what it is {RUBY_B#Aha}The Laughter{RUBY_E#} wants.

C: 我的天啊，你变得好有礼貌。
E: Wow, you've become so well-mannered.

C: 是一种奇怪的现象。罹患这种病症的人，物理结构会陷入不可逆的慢性解离。这意味着你正在慢慢消失，而这种「消失」在旁人眼中甚至难以察觉——
E: It's a strange condition. Those suffering from it will experience an irreversible chronic dissociation of their physical structure. This means they will slowly fade away, and the process is barely noticeable to others...

C: …然后越来越慢、越来越慢，直到自己和整个世界的轮廓都变得模糊不清。你分不清现实和梦境，因为它们变得同样破碎。
E: ...And then even slower than that, until the lines between your body and the entire world become blurry. You won't be able to tell reality from dreams because they have all been shattered.

C: 不行。上头有规矩，任何非筑梦师团队成员都禁止进入。
E: Not a chance. Our boss made it clear that only the Dreamweavers are allowed here.

C: 我真傻…早知如此，怎会落得现在这般下场？
E: I was so foolish back then... If I had known better, I wouldn't have ended up in such a miserable position.

C: 连加两个月班，连一口苏乐达都喝不上，整天对着这片该死的梦境犯难，还要思考自己会不会被「优化」……
E: I've been working overtime for two months straight, without enjoying a single sip of SoulGlad. I spend every day staring at this godforsaken Dreamscape with anxiety, and I also have to worry about the possibility of being replaced...

C: 这个约会场合很棒吧？
E: This is a great spot for a date, huh?

C: 我有点怕镜头的，别笑话我哦。来…你拿着吧。
E: I can be a little bit camera-shy — just don't laugh at me. Here, you hold the camera.

C: 另一枚碎片…是被它拿走了吗？
E: Was the other puzzle piece... taken away by it?

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 你为什么躲在这里？
E: Why are you hiding here?

C: 它和一路上遇到的那些好像…这些怪物就是家族在隐瞒的秘密？
E: This Monster—— all these creatures——are they the secret The Family is hiding?

C: 摘除封印。
E: Remove the seal.

C: 门…打不开…这里是死路……
E: The door... It won't open... It's a dead end...

C: …妈妈——雨！下雨了！
E: Mommy...! The rain — it's raining!

C: 「旅途永远坦然……」
E: "Let your journey be forever peaceful... "

C: 好啊…那就对了，全都对了。看吧，死人不会说话，但活人会——
E: Fine... That's great. It's all great. You see, the dead can't talk — but the living can...

C: 中央黄金车站人流如织。形如弹珠的「球笼」安稳地锁住每一颗灵魂，再将它们送往梦境各地。
E: The Central Golden Station teems with a flowing crowd. Like bouncing marbles, the Spheroids securely captures every soul and transports them to dreamscapes afar.

C: 「永火官邸」的阿弗利特。
E: Ifrit of Ever-Flame Mansion.

C: 所以你一定也清楚，黄泉小姐，窥视黑洞不是明智之举，作为一名潜在的危险分子，你对我们的了解已经到了令人不适的地步——
E: So you must surely know, Miss Acheron, that peering into a black hole is not a wise move. As a potential threat, your knowledge of us has reached uncomfortable depths...

C: 哦，我记得你…维里塔斯•拉帝奥，你的「庞奇虚粒子钟」令人印象深刻。
E: Oh, I remember you... Veritas Ratio. Your "Punch Virtual Particle Clock" is impressive.

C: 我已有所耳闻，您与砂金先生的相处并不愉快。我也知道您是一位真正的学者，对知识的追求大过其他一切。
E: I've heard you haven't enjoyed Mr. Aventurine's company. I also understand that you're an avid learner who sees the pursuit of knowledge above all.

C: 你们不都把他的「基石」扣下了？拔光了毛的孔雀可飞不起来。
E: Haven't you confiscated his Cornerstone? You can't expect a featherless bird to take flight.

C: 所以，这次会面不是审讯，但也根本不是什么谈判……
E: This meeting isn't an interrogation, or a negotiation...

C: 只要本人同意，我立即执行。
E: If that is your wish, I will do so without a moment's hesitation.

C: 很抱歉给您带来困扰。我们走吧，{NICKNAME}、小三月，再想想其他办法。
E: We're really sorry for troubling you. {NICKNAME}, March, let's think of another way.

C: 让我看看，现在几点了……
E: Let me see what time it is now...

C: ——一定要让我跪下来求你们吗？
E: — Do I really have to get down on my knees and grovel?

C: 知道，怎么不知道？你们可是大名鼎鼎的星穹列车，「钟表匠」的贵客。
E: Of course I do! You folks are from the legendary Astral Express, and honorable guests of the Watchmaker.

C: 没什么，别在意。在匹诺康尼，所有人都喜欢家族。
E: It's nothing. On Penacony, everyone loves The Family.

C: 呵，验验货罢了。
E: Heh, testing out if you're a good product.

C: …就只有这些？
E: Is that all?

C: 为了让「纯美之歌」继续在银河中传唱，还请您多多支持我的演出。
E: Would you be willing to support my performance, and keep the Song of Beauty alive in the cosmos?

C: 哦！呵呵，你说得对…不过在那之前，我想先见见…苏乐达的恶魔……
E: Oh! Hah, maybe I really should quit... but not before meeting... the Devil of SoulGlad...

C: 有可能。这东西随处可见，有人随手拿进来一瓶也不稀奇。
E: That's possible. You see SoulGlad everywhere these days, so it wouldn't be a surprise if someone brought a bottle here.

C: 梦里还能有人爆金币？
E: So, enemies drop gold coins even in a dream?

C: 美好未来…这滋味真是久违了。
E: Bright Future... a taste that's been a long time coming.

C: 用这杯「长眠不醒」向你致意，迷失的羔羊——
E: Here's to you, lost sheep, with this glass of "The Big Sleep"...

C: ——敬往日的幽灵。
E: ...To the ghosts of the past.

C: 我也被这姑娘骗了，当真是年纪大咯。不过在盛会之星，偷渡不是多么稀罕的事，也不难查。事发后猎犬们立即采取了行动，从梦境和现实两头开始追踪。
E: She managed to fool me at first — my age must be getting the best of me. But here, on the Planet of Festivities, stowaways are a common sight. You're bound to run into one sooner or later. After the incident, the Hounds wasted no time searching for that girl in both the Dreamscape and reality.

C: <size=-2>放心…他没发现我们翻阅了那些文件。</size>
E: <size=-2>Rest assured... He hasn't figured out that we went through those documents.</size>

C: 是因为母神在保佑我吗？既然如此，此刻她也一定注视着我吧。我定然能获得成功。
E: Is it because Gaiathra blesses me? If that's the case, she must also be looking upon me right now. My success is inevitable.

C: 那只是块破布，你再也穿不上了。
E: Come on. It's a rag. It's not like you can ever wear it.

C: 可是先生，为什么你不喜欢？
E: But Mister, why don't you like it?

C: …这里怎么一个游客都没有，那翅膀头在搞什么？
E: ...Why are there no guests here? What's that feather-head doing?

C: 爸爸，妈妈——等等我呀——
E: Papa, Mama, wait for me...

C: 一场<color=#dbc291ff>真正盛大的死亡</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A truly grand death</color>.

C: 你…要启程了么？
E: You're... leaving?

C: 恐怕家族并不会为你开门。
E: I'm afraid The Family will not open the doors for you.

C: 哼，所有人都这样……
E: Everybody's like that, down to the last player.

C: …同时也借助这道「隔绝死亡」的壁垒，将不为人知的秘密埋葬于深海中。在没有痛苦和伤亡的美梦里，那些秘密也会永远不见天日。除非……
E: That barrier they built "keeps death out," but it also keeps the secrets that are lost in that watery abyss from floating to the surface. In a beautiful dream, free of suffering, who would want to go fishing for those secrets. No one. Unless...

C: 无论现实或梦境，仰望天空是人类的本能。自「黄金的时刻」落成的那天起，它就一直在那里，守望每一个声色犬马的夜晚。
E: Be it reality or dream, staring at the sky is instinctual for humanity. Since the day that the Golden Hour was completed, it's always been there, watching over every single night of decadence.

C: 巡海游侠不也是吗？
E: Aren't the Galaxy Rangers also esteemed guests?

C: 如何看待加拉赫…
E: What are your thoughts on Gallagher?

C: 「眠眠」这个名字究竟是…
E: That name, Sleepie...

C: 在流梦礁诞生时，它的主人还没过世。但那人说着「总得有这么一天」，硬是给自己立了块无字碑。
E: When Dreamflux Reef was created, its owner was still alive. However, he insisted on erecting a monument for himself, saying that "it will happen someday."

C: 就算梦主是清白的，家族的腐败也已根深蒂固。米哈伊尔犯过一次的错误，我不会再犯第二次。祝他好运吧……
E: Even if the Dreammaster is innocent, The Family's corruption runs deep. I won't make the same mistake Mikhail did. Let's wish him the best of luck...

C: 哼，不如说，果然是这样。
E: Hmph, just as I suspected.

C: 「把家当全都卖掉」…为什么要做到这份上？
E: Selling everything you had? Why would you go to such lengths?

C: 我们要怎么进入贵宾室？
E: How do we get into the VIP lounge?

C: 原来如此。不过当时您的伙伴说，您行程有变，没办法入住了。
E: I see, but your companions said you wouldn't be coming due to a change of plans.

C: 能接受我们的个人专访吗？就一会！
E: Would you be open to a brief exclusive interview with us? It'll be quick!

C: 原来是无名客一行！那最后的对决定会精彩无比！时间珍贵，四位朋友，和我来吧！
E: So it's a bunch of Nameless guests! This final face-off is bound to be spectacular! Time is precious. My four friends, come with me!

C: 那就这么分组，大家抓紧时间吧。
E: We'll split into the assigned groups then. Let's not waste time.

C: 然而，现在的哈努兄弟手无寸铁，根本无法对抗恶棍军团。为此哈努兄弟准备寻求「拼图绅士」的帮助，快去找它聊聊吧！
E: Alas, Hanu presently is ill-equipped to fend off the Malevolent Mischief Makers, which is why he is preparing to seek out the Puzzle Gentleman's aid. Go forth and speak to him!

C: 你还信不过你挚友吗！
E: You don't trust your dear friend!?

C: 嘎呜…如果你是龙…也好……
E: Grawwrr... You truly are a beast, more than I can ever be...

C: 其实，我们已经见过「钟表匠」了……
E: Actually, we've already met the Watchmaker...

C: 你们把杨叔和知更鸟小姐怎么了？！
E: What have you done with Mr. Yang and Miss Robin!?

C: 什么人会展示自己的内心啊…
E: Who in their right mind would expose their inner-self like this?

C: 做出选择。
E: Make the decision.

C: 这是米哈伊尔写在航海日志里的话。爷爷说，虽然出海要面临许多危险，但每当他站在午后的甲板上，望向海面上的粼粼波光时，他总会想起家门口这座喷泉。
E: Yeah, I saw these sentences in Grandpa's logbook. He used to say that despite the perils of the sea, whenever he stood on the deck in the afternoon, overlooking the sparkling waves, he would think of this fountain in front of his house.

C: 事关星核、匹诺康尼、乃至整个银河的未来。公平起见，就让我们在那里一见真章。
E: Since the future of the Stellaron, Penacony, and even the entire Cosmos is at stake, let's draw a conclusion there, in all fairness.

C: 是的，米沙！然后我们就循着声音的方向去了，对不对？
E: Exactly, Misha! And then we followed that whistle, didn't we?

C: 我想要活下去，但我不害怕死亡。死亡的反面是永生，那从来…不是我的所求。
E: While I want to live, I'm never afraid of death. The opposite of death is eternal life, and that's... that's something I'll never desire.

C: 在这里的只有你么，孩子？
E: Are you the only one here, my child?

C: 失去心中的公义，我们便会重蹈「同谐」的覆辙。
E: If we lose justice in our hearts, we'll make the same mistake as the Harmony did.

C: 「击打白键，太阳升起，击打黑键，月亮升起。」
E: "Strike the white keys, and the sun rose. Strike the black keys, and the moon rose."

C: 「诸位是远道而来的客人，我终究不希望刀兵相见。所以在一切变得无法挽回前，我安排了三出剧目。」
E: "I genuinely wish to avoid a violent clash with my esteemed guests from afar. Therefore, I've arranged three acts before the situation becomes irreparable."

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕2系统时 同一地点
E: 2 system hours until Charmony Festival - Same Location

C: 总感觉…眼前好像有另一个世界似的……
E: I'm feeling like... there's another world in front of my eyes...

C: 好奇心的气息非常浓郁啊…这种记忆会令人欲罢不能呢。
E: There's a rich scent of curiosity here... Such memories can be irresistibly captivating.

C: 嗯，没什么……
E: Hmm, never mind...

C: 看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是海洋星球露莎卡星了帕！
E: Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: Lushaka, the ocean planet!

C: …是的。
E: ...Yes.

C: 在迄今为止的美梦中，你已经和许多人、许多事建立了牢不可破的联系。
E: So far, you have forged unbreakable bonds with numerous individuals and entities in the sweet dream.

C: 我很高兴。答案并不重要，重要的是你已作出决定。
E: I'm glad. The answer itself doesn't matter. What matters is that you've made a decision.
...Huh?

C: 你是个高尚的人…别被过去束缚！
E: You have a noble soul... Don't be shackled by the past!

C: 尖锐的啸叫过后，浓稠而汹猛的忆质冲入你的胸膛，翻腾肆虐。你的意识如同旋涡中的絮纸，破溃、消溶，漫散于滚滚浊流。
E: After a piercing screech, a thick and ferocious surge of memoria crashes into your chest, churning and ravaging. Your consciousness becomes like scraps of paper caught in a whirlpool, breaking apart, dissolving, and dispersing within the turbulent muddy current.

C: 怎么突然聊起这个了？被拖入美梦的时候，我只感觉有一只冰凉的触角伸进了我的记忆深处。但那里好像有什么别的东西，所以它马上就离开了。
E: Why the sudden interest in that? Well, I was dragged into the sweet dream. I felt a cold tentacle diving into my memories, but something else was there, so the tentacle suddenly disappeared.

C: 不用谢，「萨缪尔女士」——哈哈，我喜欢这个假名。
E: No problem. Miss Samuel. Haha, I love this fake name.

C: 我无意打断…请您继续。
E: Please go ahead... I'm all ears.

C: 也不难理解，今日的匹诺康尼就和曾经的边陲监狱一样，外有民众与银河势力虎视眈眈，内有「秩序」的阴影暗流涌动。
E: It's not hard to imagine. Penacony today is pretty much like the frontier prison it once was, with external forces casting greedy eyes and the undercurrent of Order lurking within.

C: 那这就是最后一次见面了？如果这是场告别，似乎还缺了点什么。
E: So, this is our final meeting, then? If this is a farewell, then it seems to be missing something.

C: 这最后一份特饮，我特地多调了些。往事如烟，希望它能让你们记得匹诺康尼的滋味。
E: I've mixed more of this last special drink for you. The past shouldn't be forgotten, so I hope it brings back the flavors of Penacony.

C: 无论是星穹列车还是匹诺康尼，未来都还有很长的路要走呢，打起精神来。
E: Whether it's the Astral Express or Penacony, there's still a long journey ahead. So, let's lift our spirits, guys.

C: 在阿斯德纳，我们也需要盟友。公司可以「帮助」匹诺康尼融资——就从买进<unbreak>30%</unbreak>的股权开始。有了我们的资金流入，匹诺康尼的稳定和重建也不过是一夜工程。
E: After all, we also need allies here in Asdana. The IPC can assist Penacony with financing — starting by acquiring <unbreak>30%</unbreak> equity shares. With our financial support, stabilizing and rebuilding Penacony will be a piece of cake.

C: 现在告诉我吧，那个「解决方案」是什么？看看你我在想的是不是同一件事。
E: Alright, tell me your solution. Let's see if we're thinking the same thing.

C: （流言是真是假，我只能自己去一探究竟了。）
E: (I'll find out for myself if the rumors are true or not.)

C: 就是字面意思。我能感受到你强烈的求生欲，它炽烈得像一团火焰；但与之相对的，你拿不出任何与它等价的押物。
E: I mean it literally. I sense your burning desire to live, but unfortunately, you don't have anything of equal value to offer.

C: 他一直藏在匹诺康尼，「太阳的时刻」。他换了个身份，还混进折纸大学当了个教授。
E: He's been hiding at the Moment of Sol in Penacony, using a fake identity. And he even posed as a professor at Paperfold academy.

C: 丹恒打虚卒……
E: Dan Heng and Voidranger jive...

C: 小题大做了吧。
E: Stop making a big fuss.

C: 快点下来，别人都在看着呢！
E: Come down already. Everyone's staring at you!

C: 噢…我明白了。你说的是砂金那家伙的「基石」吧？真不好意思，跟他比起来，我的能力可能没那么「视觉系」。
E: Oh... I understand now. You're referring to Aventurine's Cornerstone right? Sorry, compared to him, my ability is not as "visual."

C: 哎呀，星穹列车上不管是老人还是新人，那都是一家人！分什么彼此～
E: Oh, come on! It doesn't matter if she's talking about the old or new generation, we're all still a part of the Astral Express family!

C: 为什么她卧室里会有穿山甲？
E: Why does she have a pangolin in her bedroom?

C: 滴嘟滴嘟——回答正确！不愧是小灰毛，脑袋瓜还算机灵～
E: Bing bing — Correct answer! You're good, Gray Hair. Your mind is pretty sharp!

C: 欢迎来到「晖长石号」，尊敬的{M#先生}{F#女士}！我是一颗危险的炸弹，也是一位蔑视公序良俗的法外狂徒。祝您在这里度过美好的一天。
E: Welcome to the Radiant Feldspar, good {F#lady}{M#sir}! I am a dangerous bomb, and an outlaw who despises law and order. May you have a splendid day!

C: 「芙莫」娃娃还是在盯着你。
E: The "Furmur" doll continues to stare right at you.

C: ——敬盛会的邀请函、所有的谎言，和唯一的真相……
E: ...To the festival's invitation, to all lies, and the singular truth...

C: 「开拓」能为人们指明方向，但一个世界的命运，终究要还给属于它的人。
E: The Trailblaze can illuminate the way, but ultimately, the future of a world belongs to those who live in it.

C: 而「结局」…也会因此展现截然不同的意义。
E: And because of this, the "end" will thus reveal a completely different meaning.

C: …技术性调整。
E: ...A technical correction.

C: 别紧张，这次列车收到的是一场普通邀约，来自匹诺康尼的学府「折纸大学」。
E: Don't worry — the Express received a normal invitation this time. It's from Penacony's "Paperfold University".

C: 当然。各位的「梦境护照」已经激活，希望匹诺康尼能再次为大家带来一段愉快的时光！
E: Of course. Your Dreamscape Passes have been activated. I hope that you have another enjoyable stay in Penacony.

C: 盛什么选？抱歉，哥们我闲时都只顾沉淀，从来不看娱乐综艺！
E: The what Auditions? Sorry, I usually just relax in my free time and never watch variety shows!

C: 你是个坚定的无名客，当然要拒绝这种情况的邀请。可当你张开口，说出的却是——
E: You are a resolute Nameless, of course you would refuse such an invitation. But when you open your mouth, what comes out is—

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: Ba na na na~

C: 抱歉。这是直击灵魂的缭乱•空手道，在下已尽力控制力道，但为了唤醒阁下，疼痛依然在所难免。
E: My humble apologies, Dazzling Palm was designed to deliver a powerful impact to the soul. I've endeavored to control my strength, but some pain is inevitable if I am to ensure your regained consciousness.

C: 它也是「钟表匠」创作的动画人物？
E: Is it also a cartoon character created by the Watchmaker?

C: 快看，校长上台了。
E: Look, the dean is going on stage.

C: 接下来就轮到「测弦考试」了。
E: The Tuning Test is up next.

C: 盛会巨星，匹诺康尼的股东。
E: I am the Festive Superstar, a shareholder of Penacony.

C: 试镜结束。你现在是「财富学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
E: The audition is over. You are now a student of Fortune Academy. Here is your student card.

C: 原来恰丽卡同学是筑梦学院的学姐吗？我也是，今后可要多多指教啊！
E: You're a senior in Dreamweaver Academy? I'll be going there too! I'll be sure to ask if I have questions!

C: 我再说最后一遍，你到底有没有审美？
E: I'll ask you one last time. Do you have any taste at all?

C: 我对睡蕉小猴没什么意见，它确实讨年轻人喜欢。真要说麻烦，反倒是它的狂热拥趸。刚才那些人你也见到了，很快就迷上了小猴，还自发组织了……
E: I don't have an opinion on Slumbernana Monkey. The young people love it. The real problem is the level of fanaticism it creates. You saw the group from before. They grew obsessed with the monkey and formed their own society.

C: 睡蕉小猴的名言
E: Slumbernana Monkey's famous quotes.

C: 哦，那地方我也去过了，他们让你加入了？
E: Oh, I swung by that place too. They let you join up?

C: 能让您止步于此，流梦礁究竟发生了什么？
E: For you to stop here... something must be happening in Dreamflux Reef.

C: 我记得你，临时抱佛脚可没用啊。
E: Oh, I remember you. Last-minute cramming isn't going to help, you know.

C: 流梦礁仍有助蕉在暗中行动，四处寻找尚未变成猴子的居民，把他们推向深渊。如果二位肯搭把手，就能为我们争取更多时间。
E: In Dreamflux Reef, there are still Assistananas working in secret, searching all over the place for residents who haven't been turned into monkeys and pushing them into that abyss. If the both of you are willing to aid us, it'll buy us more time.

C: 他宝贝的，在说什么？
E: What in forkin' hell are you trying to say?

C: 是你太看不起这地儿了。
E: You think too little of the people here.

C: 流梦礁的歌，就该自由自在！
E: It's only right for Dreamflux Reef's song to be untamed and free!

C: ——等等，你根本没去过沙滩，这是哪来的记忆？
E: Hold on, you've never even been to the beach. Where did this memory come from?

C: 关、关我们什么事啊？
E: Wh—What's it got to do with us!?

C: 好了，这位同学…他已经被你砸坏了。
E: Alright, girl... You've already crushed him.

C: 别提绩点了，我怕。
E: Any mention of grades makes me weak in the knees.

C: 请问…
E: Um, excuse me...

C: 多么霸道的忍•真言！不愧是球棒•忍者。
E: Such a tyrannical rendition of the mantra of the ninja, Baseball Bat Ninja!

C: 即便在现实中，模因污染也能改变一个人的思想。而在这梦境的世界——便会催生出将人变作猿猴的噩梦。
E: Memetic corruption is known to influence one's thoughts even in the real world. And in the Dreamscape, they catalyze nightmares that corrupt humans into monkeys.

C: 而且你又明明白白地知道，他们不是生来如此。
E: But I know for a fact that they were not born this way.

C: 芮克先生，我没有在和你商量，我没必要和一位俘虏商量。
E: Mr. Reca, there is no room for negotiation here. I have no need to negotiate with a captive.

C: 答案就在在下的「过去」中，是么？
E: The key is in my "past," isn't it?

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云…「忍道长漫漫，苦难当滑板」……
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "The way of the ninja is long and windy, and trials and tribulations are mere amusements..."

C: 正如各位智者看见的那样，如今的宇宙就像一箱被遗弃的香蕉。
E: Wise attendees, as you can clearly see, our universe today is nothing but a crate of abandoned bananas.

C: 道德？你跟我讲道德？
E: Morality? Are you really talking to me about morality?

C: 这、这是缭乱•忍侠的秘宝，万万不能……
E: This... This is the dearest treasure of the Dazzling Ninja school. We cannot do that...

C: 怎么可能，这批战斗猿可是研究猿亲自培养的……
E: How could this happen? These Combat Apes were personally trained by the Research Apes...

C: 可是，苦茶大师……
E: But, Master Kucha...

C: 你中止了即将开始的拍摄——但为了不让你扮演的角色从忍者英雄变成猴子，得快点做好出镜的准备。
E: You halted the upcoming shoot — but to avoid turning your ninja hero role into a monkey, you need to get camera-ready fast.

C: 不，这可算不上忍道，忍道是忍者愿为之贯彻一生的事物。
E: No, that cannot be considered the way of the ninja. The way of the ninja is something a ninja lives by for the rest of their life.

C: 梦想是生命的航标。只要点亮了这个航标，我们随时都可以休息。但这并不意味着放弃，因为只要看到航标的光，我们就有勇气重新启程。
E: In our lives, dreams act as beacons that guide us forward. Once we have lit up the beacon, we may choose to rest at any time. This does not signify that we have given up, for as long as the light of the beacon can be seen, we will have the courage to restart our journey.

C: 休要继续逃窜，若阁下有战胜我等的信心，何不一决高下？！
E: Stop trying to escape. If you believe that you can defeat us, why not settle it once and for all right now!?

C: 岁月之泰坦…是你么？
E: Time Titan... is that you?

C: 上吧，我们也为她开路！
E: Let's go! Clear the path for her!

C: 人们早已做好准备，若要追逐烈火，便要习惯告别。可是……
E: We have long been prepared. If we are to chase the flames, then we must grow used to farewells. And yet...

C: 凡有「纷争」，必有杀戮…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的试炼是这惨状也不足为奇。
E: Where there's Strife, there's carnage... It shouldn't come as a surprise to see such a sight in {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} trial.

C: 既然悬锋人都急着送死——那我就给你个痛快！
E: You Kremnoans are all eager to die, huh? Then I shall grant you a swift death!

C: 「哈哈哈，既然你想重蹈覆辙，那就来吧：点燃你恐惧的烈焰，踏上沙场，鏖战至『纷争』的疆界，吞噬我；或迷失其中，让自己战死的遗体得到烤慰！」
E: "Hahaha, I see you wish to repeat your mistake. Come at me, then. Ignite the flames of your fears and step onto the battlefield. Take this fierce battle to the boundaries of Strife and consume me, or lose yourself in the fight and watch your defeated corpse burn to ash!"

C: 两位，息怒。如果大人们还想考虑考虑，我可以把它留到明天…不，留到两位考虑好，如何？
E: Please, there's no need to fret. If you need more time to make a decision, I can put this aside for you until tomorrow... or until you're ready.

C: 阁下，我有意买下此物…能否请你割爱？
E: Madam, would you mind selling this trinket to me?

C: 看不出来，你还真的喜欢。
E: ...Wow, you seriously took a liking to the gift.

C: 别害羞嘛，明明很可爱~
E: Aw, don't be shy. It's a cute nickname!

C: 嘿嘿，毕竟我是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的辅祭嘛，用阳光治愈大家就是我的责任。而且而且，我还听说，两位也是遥远天空的孩子，我们可能还挺有缘分的呢。
E: Hehe, as an acolyte of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, I'm here to bring healing light to the world. Plus, I've heard you're also children of the distant skies! Fate must have brought us together!

C: 有关失踪的泰坦{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…我恰好有些事想要请教<color=#dbc291ff>那刻夏老师</color>。
E: I happen to have a few questions for <color=#dbc291ff>Professor Anaxa</color> as well, regarding the missing Titan {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

C: 太失礼啦！怎么能对女孩子说这种话呢？
E: That's horrible! You can't say that to a girl!

C: 那就是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}裂分之枝，瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神躯。它所扎根之处，也就是我们脚下的平原盆地，花叶树木开始生长，并逐渐形成了一片规模可观的蓊郁森林。
E: It's the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#} — the divine body of Cerces. Flora began to grow where they planted their roots, and this flatland basin upon which we stand gradually became a large, verdant forest.

C: 不太可能…在我记忆里，树庭里的辩论声终日不绝于耳。
E: That's not very likely... As far as I can recall, the voices of people engaged in debate echoed throughout the Grove at all hours of the day.

C: 死去仙女木……
E: Dead White Dryad...

C: 哎呀，你不要和人家一起用力，分心啦…！
E: Hey! Don't say it together with me! You're distracting me!

C: 人家倒是觉得，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}没那么勉为其难。不然它也不可能认可{NICKNAME}，还让人家和大家一起旅行啦，对不对？
E: I don't think {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} was as reluctant to help us as you put it, or they wouldn't have deemed {NICKNAME} worthy and allowed me to journey alongside all of you!

C: 呜，人家尽力了…怎么一点点记忆都看不到呢？
E: Ugh, I really tried my hardest... Why couldn't I see even a sliver of a memory?
Memi...!?

C: 又来了！这次声音是在……
E: It's that voice again! This time, it's coming from...

C: …判断不出来，这图书馆也回声太大啦！
E: ...I have no clue where it's coming from. There's too much echo in this library!

C: 人家知道！再说了，又不是人家在唱歌……
E: I know! Also, I wasn't even the one singing...

C: 这…真的是传说中的「金枝誓言」么？
E: Is... this the legendary Golden Bough of Vows?

C: 这是…一片烧焦的布料么？
E: This is... a piece of burnt cloth?

C: 再坚持一会儿，心诚则灵。
E: Just hang on a little longer, a sincere heart will prevail.
Mmm...

C: 当然，吾等早已有约定……
E: Of course, our promise still stands...

C: 那个黑袍的家伙是…？
E: Who is this black-robed guy...?

C: 喔…缇安会很警惕！
E: Oh... Trianne will be on high alert!

C: 嘶，吹得人家毛冷飕飕的……
E: Brr... But the wind feels so chilly...
Four...

C: 你怎么把*我们*当小孩子啦，阿雅。
E: Agy, you're talking like we are little kids.

C: 讲吧，又是什么馊主意？
E: Go ahead. Let's see what terrible ideas you've come up with this time.

C: …是缇宁！缇宁遇上危险了…！
E: ...It's Trinnon! Trinnon is in danger...!

C: 看看你，说两句恭维话又不会掉层皮。
E: Offering a compliment or two wouldn't be the end of you, you know.

C: 就是那群狂信徒，他们如悬锋人一般视死如生，唯独少了对荣誉的敬畏。
E: Yes. Those zealots were as fearless as Kremnoans in the face of death, but they lacked respect for honor.

C: 「没有人能夺走你的命运！」
E: "No! None can take you away!"

C: 真是…沉重的试炼啊。
E: ...What a grave trial indeed.

C: …真是复杂啊，你的处境。
E: ...Your predicament is truly complicated.

C: 我是悬锋人。死亡、牺牲…我皆能坦然面对。
E: I come from Kremnos. Death... and sacrifice... are things I have learned to face with composure.

C: 树庭的可怕敌人，也是黑潮造物？
E: The dreadful enemies of the Grove are also creations of the black tide?

C: 好久不见。你的遭遇，我听白厄说了…真是辛苦了。
E: Long time no see. I've heard about what happened from Phainon... You've been through a lot.

C: 这是玩笑话。若有必要，我不会等到现在。
E: I'm just kidding. If I were serious, I wouldn't have waited until now.
You...!

C: 你帮奥赫玛渡过了又一道难关，没有言语能表达我的谢意。
E: You aided Okhema through yet another trying ordeal, and my gratitude knows no bounds.

C: 我先你一步走进自己的宿命了，遐蝶。
E: I'll be embracing my destiny before you do, Castorice.

C: 告诉哈托努斯那枚印戒存在的人，就是你吧？
E: Are you the one who told Chartonus about the signet ring?

C: 向翁法罗斯的守护者——致敬——！
E: We salute the Guardian of Amphoreus!

C: 阿格莱雅…天杀的僭主，我呸！
E: Aglaea... That vile usurper! I spit on her name!

C: 但他们不知道，那位泰坦的「慷慨」并非自愿。
E: What they don't know is that the Titan didn't do all of that of its own volition.

C: 不，应该是*我们*要请大家见谅。来吧，大家——
E: Please don't. We should be the ones apologizing. Come, everyone...

C: 就这样，一觉睡到大清早，睡到明天，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}下一次睁眼的时候。能做到吗，亲爱的？
E: Just sleep through the night, until morning comes, until the next time {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} opens their eyes. Can you do that for me, sweetie?

C: …{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，我就知道你还有一丝理性。果然…你也被囚禁了。
E: ...I knew there was some sanity left in you, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. Just as I thought... you too have been confined.

C: 去猎杀吧—— / 去哀悼吧——
E: Go kill — / Go mourn —

C: 但若你们中还有忠诚的卫士，就速速为圣女让出道路……
E: However, if there's still any loyalty within you, step aside for the Holy Maiden...

C: 从这里开始，你已走过漫长的归路。
E: Here, you have traveled far on your way home.

C: 在长夜里不断思考，在思考中等待破晓，然后在破晓时迈出脚步…停下的*我们*会留在身后的黑夜，但前进的*我们*不会感到恐惧。
E: Reflect through the long night, wait for the dawn as you think, then set off at daybreak. The hesitant part of us will be left behind in the dark, while the determined side of us will know no fear.

C: 不过，这正是一个观察与结交的好机会。「圣杯」能满足的不过是一个幸运儿，而「慈玉典押」…不，公司的「战略投资部」却能满足他们所有人的愿望。
E: And more than that, it's the perfect opportunity to watch and make connections. Only one lucky fool will walk away with the Grail. But the Bonajade Exchange. No, the IPC's Strategic Investment Department can grant everyone's wishes.

C: 斯科特，怎么又是你？
E: Skott!? You again?

C: 流梦礁消息也这么灵通？
E: You guys know all the gossip around here too?

C: 但实际情况却是，在这场「圣杯战争」中，除我之外至少还有一位来自异界的英灵。
E: But in reality, there is at least one other Heroic Spirit in this war who also comes from another world.

C: 内容姑且不论，波提欧先生甚至不怎么擅长打字，更遑论这种书信格式了……
E: Putting the content aside, Boothill isn't exactly good at typing, let alone this kind of formal letter format...

C: 真是不省心啊。要是我在这儿打爆你的脑袋，也就等于解救了我那位铁疙瘩御主，对吧？
E: What a pain. If I blow your head off right here, that'd save my metal clump of a Master too, no?

C: 于是，他们点点滴滴的愿望化作了燃料，为圣杯镀上一层虚造的奇迹——而你所主持的这场闹剧，践踏了他们的愿望！
E: And so, little by little, their wishes will turn into fuel, coating the Holy Grail in a fabricated miracle — and the farce you've orchestrated will end up stomping all over those wishes!

C: 少女像是被什么吸引住，眺望向道路的尽头。
E: The girl seemed drawn by something. Her gaze wandered to the end of the path.

C: 我依稀能记得的，自己在一座空间站中被人唤醒了。
E: The only thing I remember is being woken up by someone in a space station.

C: 我脸接过末日兽大招！
E: I facetanked the Doomsday Beast's Ultimate!

C: 可即便如此，人们仍称他为最伟大的国王。在你看来，是什么令他成为了英雄？
E: Even so, people still called him the greatest king. What do you think made him a hero?

C: 所以我要索回我被夺走的名字，抹消所有属于我的作品……让身为███时存在过的一切痕迹不复存在。
E: Instead, I will reclaim the name they took from me and erase every single work I've ever produced... I'll destroy every trace of my existence as ████.

C: 如果登上列车，等待你的，只会是可怕的未知和危险。你的功绩终会被遗忘，你的旅程也终会迎来终点。
E: If you board the Express, what waits for you may be nothing but danger and the terrifying unknown. Your deeds will be forgotten in time, and your journey will eventually come to an end.

C: 即使不知道前路如何，仍旧有人出发了，为了追逐某个愿望。这固然愚蠢，但正是这种愚蠢，催生了无名客、开拓者，催生了英雄。
E: Even if the road ahead is unclear, some still set off, driven by the desire to chase a wish. It may seem foolish, but that's what gave birth to the Nameless, to Trailblazers, and to humanity's heroes.

C: （似乎做了个奇怪的梦，但细节怎么也想不起来……）
E: (I feel like I had a strange dream, but the details keep slipping away...)

C: 而「能够实现愿望的圣杯」就是这只会下金蛋的鹅！一旦它举办成功，匹诺康尼将会拥有一项足以令其再兴盛十个琥珀纪的伟大庆典，连谐乐大典也无法与之媲美！
E: A Holy Grail that grants wishes is just the golden goose we need! If this ritual works, then Penacony will own a glorious show to keep the money rolling in for ten more Amber Eras, a carnival that even the Charmony Festival can't compete with!

C: 作为这部恐怖片的主演，当然要亲手，把你们一个一个撕碎！
E: As the star of this film, I'll be the one to personally tear you all apart, limb by limb!

C: 没错。生前是电影导演，显然成为英灵后也不会是什么擅长战斗的类型……
E: Right. He was a film director in life. That means he's not gonna suddenly become a powerhouse after turning into a Heroic Spirit.

C: 闭嘴！你这艺术涵养不如自动乐器的白痴！你的作品甚至不如一张报废的胶卷有艺术价值——
E: Shut up! You're a fool with less artistic taste than an automatic instrument! Your work doesn't even have the artistic value of a ruined roll of film!

C: 躲藏在画外音中的葛瑞迪也叹了口气，声音无限伤感——
E: Hiding somewhere off-screen, Grady sighs too, his voice full of melancholy...

C: 你是个天生的喜剧演员，只适合扮演丑角。让你混入恐怖电影，不仅是对你角色特质的浪费，更是对镜头的亵渎。
E: You're a natural comedian who's only good at playing comical characters. Dropping you into a horror flick? That's not just a miscast, but an insult to the lens.

C: 这可说不定啊。
E: We'll see about that.

C: 还是葛瑞迪太卑鄙。
E: It's Grady who plays dirty.

C: 啊，我死了。
E: O, in that case, I'm dead.

C: 那么，抱歉啦，各位——
E: Well then, sorry everyone —

C: 哼，哼哼呱呱呱呱，葛瑞迪！既然你不仁，也就别怪我不义了——砂～金～总～监！
E: Hmph, hm ahem— *cough* Grady! Since you've shown no mercy, don't blame me for returning the favor — Di~rec~tor~Aven~tu~rine~!

C: 看来你死了太久，连自己的老本行也忘了？在默片时代，电影也是会有配乐的。
E: Looks like you've been dead for too long. Forgot your own trade, huh? Even in the silent film era, movies had soundtracks.

C: 让你们见识见识，什么叫量变引发质变！
E: Let me show you the overwhelming strength in numbers!

C: 不必紧张。在今天的我们看来，阿基维利未曾涉足的世界是个罕见的概念。但对于当初的列车，这几乎就是日常，触碰世界的边际本就是「开拓」的含义。
E: There's no need to be nervous. I understand that it may be difficult for us today to wrap our heads around the idea that there's a world Akivili didn't venture into, but a journey like that was only routine to the Express Crew back then. After all, to trailblaze is to explore the universe's boundaries.

C: 我会告诉它的，但帕姆向来不会干涉旅程的目的地，我想最后还是会由我们来决定。
E: Sure, I'll take care of it. That said, Pom-Pom usually stays out of discussions about destinations. The final decision will likely still be on us to make.

C: 你后来步步高升，看来是干得不赖咯？
E: You rose through the ranks soon after. I take it that you must have done a pretty good job?

C: 然后，就用「调律」抚平梦境吧。
E: Then I'll use the power of tuning to heal the Dreamscape.

C: 算了，我都不知道从什么角度笑话你。有什么适合丢进去的东西吗？
E: Forget it, I don't even know how to joke about this. Well, what do you suggest we throw in?

C: 动身吧。我们分开些走，保持几米距离。
E: Come now, it's time we set off. Let's not stick too close to each other, just in case. A few feet or so between us will do.

C: 哎呀——别打岔了。总之我俩吃了糖乐得不行，在地上滚了好几圈才站起来，起来就发现停云小姐……
E: Oh, come on—stop interrupting. So, we had some candy and were so happy we rolled around on the ground for a bit before standing up... But once we did, we realized Miss Tingyun...

C: 杨叔，你背叛了吗？
E: Mr. Yang! Have you turned on us!?

C: 哦？呵呵呵……
E: Ooh? Heh heh heh...

C: 匹诺康尼最不容小觑的都在这了。
E: Remember, we're the most formidable people in all of Penacony.

C: 我无意挑战各位。保险起见，由我这位朋友代劳吧——就「同谐」而言，万维克的造诣比我更为精深。
E: It is not my intention to provoke you. Perhaps as assurance, we can have my friend here perform the task in my stead. Wonweek has a higher mastery of the Harmony than I do.

C: 清醒一点了吗？
E: Feeling more awake?

C: 该调整身份认知了。
E: It's time to rethink how you see yourself.

C: 驭空大人…不也当过战争的「幸存者」吗？
E: Madam Yukong, you were once a "survivor" in the war too, weren't you?

C: 这样的人在匹诺康尼有许多。对逐梦客而言，失败就像是夕阳，每天都会到来。
E: There are many such people on Penacony. Failure is like the setting sun to a Dreamchaser. It's something that happens every day.

C: 我也不想抱憾终身啊。
E: I don't want to live with regret for the rest of my life either.

C: 我还资历尚浅，只能看运气了。
E: I'm still inexperienced, so let's just hope we get lucky.

C: 这次重返舞台，你准备做些什么？
E: Now that you've returned to the stage, what are you planning to do?

C: 你不会让我失望的，对吗？
E: I trust you won't disappoint me?

C: 翁法罗斯不在星际和平通信的服务范围内，缺乏远程联络的手段。
E: Amphoreus is outside the Interastral Peace Communications' coverage zone, so there's no chance of remote communication when you're there.

C: 啊，#0988——我的得意之作！
E: Ah, #0988. The pride of my creations!

C: 从刚才开始，我们身后好像就一直跟着条小尾巴呢……
E: It seems we've had a little tagalong all this while...

C: 糟了，这下糟了……
E: Oh dear, oh dear. This is bad...

C: 真可惜，你只差一点就能完成任务，回去交差了……
E: What a shame. You're only a step away from completing the mission assigned to you...

C: …不对劲，肯定是有人闯进实验室了！
E: ...This isn't right. I'm sure we've got intruders in the lab!

C: 没有，我都和姬子说了，这事怪得很。机器头曾经向那么多世界投去过目光…它们全都刻在我的脑子里，怎么可能有漏网之鱼？
E: No, I've told Himeko everything I know. Nothing about the world sounds right. Droidhead has cast THEIR gaze upon numerous worlds in the past... and every one of them is etched in my mind. So how could I possibly not know about it?

C: 落地姿势挺帅，哥们。
E: That was one stylish landing, bro.

C: 家家有本难念的经啊。
E: Every place has their fair share of troubles.

C: 以{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的名义起誓？你是谁……
E: You swear in the name of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}? Who are you...

C: 这是什么把戏？！
E: Is this a trick!?

C: 小白！小敌跟大部队打了几十个来回，一路从天上打到了城里！你快去帮帮他呀！
E: Snowy, De has been trading blows with the main forces for what feels like forever, from the skies to the city! Hurry up and assist him!

C: 用余波震碎它们！
E: Shatter them with the aftershocks!

C: 是的。缇宝老师的动作很快。
E: Yes. Tribbie acted with haste.
Then...

C: 实话说，不怎么样，我还以为会更困难些。
E: Truth be told, I don't feel any different. I anticipated a greater challenge.

C: 塞纳托斯的指侍……
E: Servant of Thanatos...

C: 「——最后，三个坏蛋泰坦降临到世上，引发了恐怖的灾难！」
E: "But three baddie Titans soon snuck in, bringing a terrible horrible disaster with them!"

C: 当所有的火种被集齐，创世的奇迹便会显现，破碎的世界将重获新生。
E: It is only upon reclaiming all Coreflames that the miracle of genesis can reveal itself, granting a new lease on life to this broken world.

C: 来，把你们的<color=#dbc291ff>留影石机</color>交给我吧。
E: Alright, pass me your <color=#dbc291ff>photostone</color>.

C: 所幸没留下什么证据。不过…就算星空在翁法罗斯是一种禁忌，果然还是会有人对它报以憧憬。
E: Fortunately, there's no evidence. But... seems like even though the starry sky is taboo on Amphoreus, there are people who still yearn for it.

C: 用力地揉搓它的脖子。
E: Rub its neck with some strength.

C: 还没解决粉霞天女的问题…先避开黄金裔吧。
E: Since we haven't solved the Rosy Celestial Maiden problem yet... Let's avoid the Chrysos Heirs for now.

C: 不能闭，我手还在里面！
E: Don't shut it, my hand is still inside!
...Ahem.

C: 如果我有一双翅膀……
E: If only I had a pair of wings...

C: 请随意，我会静候二位。
E: As you wish. I will wait for you here.

C: 圣城的命运如细丝般脆弱。为剪除祸端，我必须审慎。
E: The holy city's fate is as fragile as thread. I must exercise prudence in order to eliminate sources of potential disaster.

C: …是，阿格莱雅女士。
E: ...Yes, Lady Aglaea.

C: 遐蝶小姐也是这么想的，对吧？
E: Isn't this what Miss Castorice believes as well?

C: 走吧，阿雅。都几百年啦，*我们*什么时候拒绝过你的邀请？
E: Let's go, Agy. When have we ever been able to say no in all these hundreds of years?

C: 还是尽量记下能回想起的内容吧。说不定这场怪梦也和这个世界的规则有关。
E: Keep a note of whatever you can remember. This strange dream might be connected to the rules of this world.

C: 这趟冒险的景象，也为三月记录下来吧。
E: Record the sights you see on your adventure for March.

C: 你是白厄与万敌的同伴，只要他们愿意向你托付生死，我的信任并不重要。
E: You are Phainon and Mydei's companion. So long as they're willing to entrust you with their lives, my trust in you doesn't matter.

C: 真是壮观……
E: It's magnificent...

C: 他们的相貌和他人无异，只是拥有一些…不同于我们的传统。
E: They look the same as anyone else. They just have traditions that are slightly... different from ours.

C: 如此轻易就让出了最后一剑的荣光，你也配得上战士之名么？
E: Giving away the glory of delivering the final blow that easily? I thought you were a real warrior.

C: 没理由前功尽弃。
E: We can't let our efforts go to waste.

C: 你和我——两个被死亡拒之门外的战士，世间还有比这更加公平的竞技吗？
E: You and I — two warriors rejected by death. Is there any contest more fair than this?

C: 就像罪犯的灵魂一样，脆弱不堪。
E: Just like the soul of a criminal: Fragile.

C: 我们和你提起过她吗？
E: Did we mention her to you before?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它不是一位生性险恶的泰坦，希望我们不必走到那一步。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... isn't an evil Titan at heart. Let us hope things won't reach that point.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: blahblahblah…
E: Blah blah blah...

C: 两边都无法通行，出口也被隐藏起来了。{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}真是不欢迎我们啊。
E: Neither of these are paths we can take, and the exit has been concealed from us. Looks like {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is bent on keeping us out.

C: 也就是说，我们需要找到字面意义上比「翁法罗斯的命运」更为沉重之物？听上去是一道无解的难题。
E: Which means that we have to find something that literally has more weight than the fate of Amphoreus? It sounds like an impossible task.

C: 阿刃？
E: Bladie?

C: 真是奇特的动物——应该是动物吧？我从没见过。
E: Such a unique animal. I think it's an animal? I have never seen anything like it before.

C: 像是一股寒流渗入了脑海，一双长着百指的手在搅动回忆。
E: It feels like a cold wave is seeping into the mind, and a hand with countless fingers is churning through my memories.

C: 往世，入口…打开！
E: Past, entrance... Open!

C: 不过…你说完这句话后，*我们*居然感觉…有些畅快。谢谢你，阿雅。
E: However, after you said that, we somehow feel a bit better. Thank you, Agy.

C: 接着走你自己的路吧，半神，用尽你的浑身解数来证明我们是错的…但一刻也别忘记，在翁法罗斯，即便是「神」也不能为所欲为。
E: Keep following your chosen path, demigod, use every bit of your power to show that we are mistaken... but don't forget for a second, in Amphoreus, even "gods" are not above the law.

C: 并无大碍。不必为我担心，吾师。
E: Worry not. I'm capable of handling it, Trinnon.

C: 这么做风险太大，阁下…何况，我可能会变成你的累赘。
E: That's too risky of a plan. And I might even become a burden to you.

C: 嗯？你们是……
E: Hm? Who are...

C: 报上你们的名字，勇士们。
E: Give me your names, warriors.

C: …我明白。你们并非为这愚蠢的竞赛而来。
E: ...Hm. You're not here for this foolish competition.

C: 他们在营造一场虚假的战争，企图用这种方式令泰坦镇静。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…它的确已经丧失了意志。
E: Hmph, fabricating a spurious war in an attempt to calm the Titan. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... has indeed lost their will.

C: 没啥头绪，该怎么办？<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
E: I have no clue, what can I do? <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>

C: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
E: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

C: 我将回归本源，成为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神性的一个片段。
E: I will return to where I came from and become a part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity once more.

C: 我会记住格奈乌斯的。
E: I will always remember Gnaeus.

C: 它说：「承载神权吧」。
E: Bear the divine authority, it declared.

C: 我不下地狱谁下地狱…
E: If I do not descend into hell, who will?

C: 我相信老师的为人，打算向阿格莱雅求情，为他争取更多时间。届时，只要两位清楚我在争取什么，就是最大的帮助。
E: As I believe in his character, I plan to plead with Aglaea and try to buy more time for him. Then, the greatest way in which you can help is for you to know what I am fighting for.

C: 没有那么快，要过几天呢。
E: It's not that soon. There are still a few more days until then.

C: …死了？！
E: ...dead!?

C: 试炼该怎么办？！
E: What about the trial!?

C: （同意）再试一次也无妨。
E: (Agree) There's no harm in trying again.

C: 这是分内之事。退一万步讲，我们也需要你支撑起「岁月」的神位。
E: It is my duty. We too require you to bear the divine position of Time.

C: 甚好。相信凯妮斯阁下一定会对如此强势的盟友青眼相待。
E: Very well. Surely Lady Caenis would appreciate such assertiveness in an ally.

C: 快去吧，恕不奉陪。
E: Off you go. I won't be joining you.

C: 不过乍看来，这位凯妮斯比起阿格莱雅要狠毒得多呢…汝怎会想得寻她做靠山？莫非是觉着死兆将至，索性将这副躯壳拱手相让了？
E: But it seems as though this Caenis is much more ruthless than Aglaea... If so, why do you want to work with her? Could it be that perhaps you've decided to readily surrender this hollow shell of yours just because you feel like death is fast approaching?

C: 呵呵，那就却之不恭了……
E: Heheh, then don't mind if I do...

C: 别急，马上你就知道了。
E: Easy there, you'll learn the answer soon enough.

C: 行了，距离{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}只有几步之遥，别浪费时间……
E: Alright, we're just a short hike away from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. No time to waste here...

C: 您也知道，「死亡」的火种始终是「再创世」最大的未知数。无论是凯妮斯，还是您，都希望在接下来的公民大会中，赢得决定这颗火种命运的权利。
E: You know that the Coreflame of "Death" has always been the greatest unknown regarding the Era Nova, which is why both you and Caenis desire to gain the power to control that Coreflame in the approaching citizens' assembly.

C: 阿蝶，原来你也在呀。
E: Cas? What a surprise.

C: 好啊，出发吧。
E: Sure. Let's go.

C: 拿着你那枚带有{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}符文的陶片，在心中选择元老院并默默祷言，直到陶片记录下你的选择，再将陶片丢进陶罐里。
E: Take your ceramic shard engraved with the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} rune, select the Council of Elders in your heart, and pray silently until the shard registers your choice. Then toss it into the dolium.

C: 作为「督战圣女」，你的人生才刚刚开始。
E: This is just the beginning of your life as the Maiden of War.

C: 很高兴你能对我坦诚相见。
E: Thank you for telling me your thoughts.

C: 是不是有点不吉利…
E: That sounds kind of ominous...

C: 不会是很贵重的东西吧…
E: I hope the gift wasn't expensive...
Oh...

C: 圣…圣女……
E: H—Holy Maiden...

C: 也许数完十根手指，妈妈就回来了。
E: Perhaps Mommy will be back once you finish counting the days on all ten fingers.

C: 可是，附近也没有「鱼」呀……
E: But there aren't any "fish" nearby...

C: 是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}拒绝了他们？还是他们根本没有真正死去？
E: Did {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} reject them? Or perhaps they didn't really die at all?

C: 「出征」？请问，你们要去征伐谁？
E: A campaign? Who are you campaigning against?

C: 从未见过「死亡」的世界…看来，这些人们活在灾厄泰坦降临以前的黄金世。
E: A world that has never seen "Death"... Looks like these people lived in the Era Chrysea, before the Calamity Titans descended upon the land.

C: 谢谢……
E: Thank you...

C: 这真是那个霸道的万敌吗？
E: Is this really the proud Mydei?

C: ——*我们*，终于把它完成啦！
E: ...We finally finished it!

C: …何事？
E: ...What is it?

C: 这片花海生长在死地，你我用离别为它播种，又以孤独的泪水浇灌而成…是啊，「死亡」所能缔造的，莫过于血泪中绽放的鲜花而已。
E: This sea of flowers blooms on dead land because we sowed it with the seeds of our separation and watered it with our tears of loneliness... Yes, the only thing "Death" is allowed to create are flowers that bloom from blood and tears.

C: 在他们中，我始终期待着看到你的身影，却又害怕和你相认。我不知道要如何面对你……
E: I always hoped I would see you among them, but I was also afraid of seeing you. I didn't know how I could possibly face you again...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将凋零，令逝者自残余中发芽，一同死去的火新生」……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall wither, and through that, the dead will sprout again from the remains, and be reborn with the dead flame"...</color>

C: 最后的最后，能请你…为我实现一个心愿么？
E: Just one last thing. Can you... grant me one wish?

C: 迷迷…你真的要我说出来吗？
E: Mem... Do you really want me to answer that?

C: 正是！奥赫玛美好的公民生活没有停歇的迹象。仔细想想吧，各位，这场公民大会能够和平召开，难道是因为危机消失了吗？
E: Exactly! The city of Okhema shows no signs of pandemonium or chaos. And why is that? I beg you, spare a moment to think about this. Are we able to stand here and hold this assembly in peace today because the danger has passed?

C: 你小子…骂谁呢！
E: Hey! Mind your tongue!

C: 什么…就算到了来世，我们都要对你们顶礼膜拜…？！
E: What!? Are you saying that we must bow down to you and worship you even in our next lives!?

C: 身为「死亡」的主人，我理应悉心照料，令它们在这片恬美的天地发芽绽放。
E: And it is my duty as the master of Death to tend to their well-being and foster their growth in this serene haven.

C: （这些身影和声音，究竟是…？）
E: (What in the world are these shadows and voices...?)

C: （我…回来了。）
E: (I'm... back.)

C: 她弄清了身世，也完成了试炼。
E: She finally understood her origins and completed her trial.

C: 哼，很好。
E: Hmph, good.

C: 所以，当一个人受命途影响，丧失了记忆的机能…他的实体也会受到牵连。这些冰晶，就是表征之一。
E: Therefore, when a person is affected by the Path and loses their ability to remember... their physical form will also be affected. These ice crystals are a manifestation of that.

C: 您要亲自前往翁法罗斯？
E: You're planning to head to Amphoreus yourself?

C: 啊？又让我待命？太无聊啦……
E: Ah? Standing by again? That's so boring...

C: （这小子…怎么感觉他每句话都在阴阳怪气？）
E: (This brat... Why does everything that comes out of his mouth sound so snarky?)

C: 遵、遵命！
E: Y—Yes, ma'am!

C: 既已至此，还是稍安勿躁罢。
E: Since we've come this far, let's just wait.

C: 我反对。
E: No.

C: ——泰坦，不过是人类尚未征服的力量罢了。
E: ...As I see it, Titans are simply a force that mankind has yet to find a way to tame.

C: 那不是吾在这姑娘面前随口杜撰的假名么，汝怎会知道？
E: That's the name I made up on a whim when speaking to this girl. How do you know of it?

C: 至于现在，端看凯妮斯将设下何种圈套，见招拆招便是。
E: What we should be doing now is to keep our eyes peeled for whichever trickery Caenis is up to and react accordingly to thwart her plans.

C: 然后，用它在预言许诺的新世界里，{RUBY_B#带去生命}播下第一枚花蕾{RUBY_E#}吧。
E: After that, use it to {RUBY_B#bring life}plant the first bud{RUBY_E#} in the prophesied new world.

C: 如果真有如此伟大的力量，我应该…会毫不犹豫地使用它吧。
E: If such a mighty power really existed, I think... I would use it without hesitation.

C: 呵…瞧瞧我们逮住了谁，一个陈旧迂腐的旧神信徒！
E: Ha... look who we've caught — an old-fashioned disciple of the ancient god!

C: 不，不不…不！！！
E: No, no... NO!!!

C: 你马上就会知晓了，风堇姑娘。
E: You'll know very soon, Miss Hyacine.

C: …而是为了企盼光芒的回归。
E: ...It's about waiting for the return of the light.

C: 温度，在上升——
E: The temperature is rising —

C: …我们一起，解放天空！
E: ...Together, we shall free the sky!

C: 怎么回事，你们的头儿…那个叫凯妮斯的女人，好像不在这儿呢？莫非她还有什么别的计划……
E: What's going on? Your leader Caenis isn't here? Could she be plotting something else?

C: 动静是从天边传来的，莫非……
E: The noise came from above, could it be...

C: 可惜。我和{NICKNAME}不能久留…我们还有挂念的同伴和归宿。
E: But we can't stay. {NICKNAME} and I... we have people waiting for us, a home calling us back.

C: …咦？居然和*我们*也有关嘛？
E: ...Wait, we're part of this?

C: …当然。
E: ...Of course.

C: 在西风尽头再会吧，遐蝶。
E: At the end of the west wind, we shall meet again, Castorice.

C: …不是，你的衣服没破洞啦！
E: Wha— No. Your clothes are perfectly fine!

C: 总之，我们先尽力和它周旋吧！一旦抓住破绽，就发动「岁月」的权柄，躲到往世中去！
E: Let's try our best to deal with them for now, and we'll slip into the past with Time's power as soon as we can!

C: 这家伙，精神错乱了。
E: The Flame Reaver's gone mad. The end.

C: 嘿…嘿嘿……
E: Hehehe... hehehehehe...

C: 你就这么全部抖出来了？
E: And... you're just telling us everything like that?

C: 给你看吧，我在读这个——《古玩鉴定：如何发家致富》。
E: Here, look, I'm reading this — Antiques Appraisal: How to Make a Fortune.

C: …咳，一不小心说多了。作为带路的人，最关键的是要德财…德才兼备。
E: ...Oops, talked too much. As a leader, you need both integrity and weal — I mean integrity and skill.

C: 他们的职责便是将流着金血的人从世上抹去。暗杀、投毒、政治迫害…为了这个目标，他们无所不用其极。
E: Their task was to erase anyone with golden blood from existence. Assassination, poisoning, political persecution... They would do anything to achieve their objective.

C: …我、*我们*只是太久没备课了，稍微有点生疏了而已！给*我们*点时间，一定能想起来！
E: ...We... We just haven't prepared lessons in a while now, so we're a bit rusty! Just give us some time, and we'll remember!

C: 市集又发生了恶性治安事件，有店铺遭到了砸抢。已经是这周内的第三次了。
E: There's been another violent incident at the market. A shop was smashed and looted. It's the third time this week.

C: 黄金裔只以一票胜出，缇宝大人。根据我征战多年的经验，惨胜和动荡往往形影不离。
E: The Chrysos Heirs won by only one vote, Lady Tribbie. From my years of experience, a narrow victory often walks hand-in-hand with unrest.

C: 说、说的也是，是我想当然了…我就是有点好奇，你当时有没有从那些祭司身上打听到什么，桀桀桀……
E: Right, right... I didn't think about that. I was just curious if you ever overheard anything interesting from those priests, hehe...

C: 呵，也对，问了又怎么样？我那么擅长撒谎，连你的金线都能骗过——既然确认不了真假，又何必多嘴一问呢？
E: Heh, right, what's the use? I'm so good at lying, even your golden thread can be fooled. If you can't verify the truth, why bother asking at all?

C: 你们如愿施行了毒计，趁早四散奔逃吧，兴许你们还能争取到一条活命……
E: You've played your hand. Run while you still can. It might be your only chance to survive.

C: 你能否和他们一般幸运…想试试吗？
E: If you feel as lucky as they are, try me.

C: 恐怕也是孤注一掷…我猜，元老院的反对派还在做绝望的挣扎，想阻挠逐火。
E: Probably a desperate gamble... I guess, the opposition within the Council of Elders is still desperately fighting to obstruct the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 城中一片寂静，不安的情绪分秒都在累积。
E: The city is silent, and tension is building with every passing second.

C: 想要了解，你的情况。
E: How you're holding up, I wanted to see.

C: 嗯…理想倒算不上。我唯一想做的，就是保护好身边所有关心的……
E: Well... it's not exactly an aspiration, but the only thing I want to do is to protect the people I care about...

C: 不必重回天空，而是在大地上和人们一同行走。这是我的愿望，我也相信只有这样，在创世的诗篇被写下的同时……
E: I wish not to return to the sky, but to walk among the masses on earth. I believe it's the only way for the saga of creation...

C: 好不容易回来奥赫玛一趟，你本可以好好休息一阵的，我们一起叙叙旧……
E: It's been ages since you were last in Okhema. You could've taken some time to rest, and we could've caught up...

C: 风堇，接下来就交给你了。
E: Hyacine, it's all yours now.

C: 艾格勒在上，去死吧！
E: By Aquila above, meet your demise!

C: …可这台装置似乎失去动力了。要改变画壁上的天象，得找到别处的浑象仪。
E: ...That being said, there's no power in this device anymore. We have to find another celestial globe if we want to change the weather on the mural.

C: 小、小心呀！那一只不是记忆的幻影…它好像，还有生命的气息！
E: C—Careful! It's not a memory phantom... It looks like it's alive!

C: 风堇…真是个好孩子呀。放心吧，有人家在呢！
E: Hyacine... You're such a good child. Don't worry. I'm here!

C: 谢谢你，迷宝。各位，拜托了…和我一起见证历史吧。
E: Thank you, Memmie. Everyone, please... witness history with me.

C: 要劳烦的是你们。我已在此处徘徊千年之久，这一时片刻根本算不得「等待」。
E: It's you all who have to do the work. I've wandered around here for a thousand years, so this brief moment hardly qualifies as "waiting."

C: …真是温柔的回答啊。
E: ...What a kind answer.

C: 但前提是…我们得活下去，突破重围！
E: But before that... we must survive and break through this siege!

C: 一路奔跑…绝对不要回头！
E: Keep running... and never turn back!

C: 你这把年纪已经不适合上前线了，大工匠…公民们呢？云石市集的情况如何？
E: You shouldn't be on the frontline at your age, Grand Craftsman... Where are the citizens? What's the situation at Marmoreal Market?

C: 我没打算和谁永别，{NICKNAME}——放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
E: It's not goodbye forever, {NICKNAME}. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.

C: 桀桀桀…看来你的机灵程度也有限呀，小鬼。别忘了，本大爷可是翁法罗斯的十二泰坦之一……
E: Heeheehee... Guess you're not as smart as I thought, brat. Don't forget. I am one of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus...

C: 哎，少拿那些编纂出来的故事诋毁本大爷！我的追求，可比区区一条小命远大得多……
E: Hey, stop slandering me with those fabricated tales! My pursuits are far greater than one measly life...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>吕枯耳戈斯是万千「智识」行者的一员：它代博识尊将目光投向此地，以免翁法罗斯落入衰败的命运。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I, Lycurgus, am one of the Erudition's many pathstriders. Through me, Nous keeps watch over this realm, working to save Amphoreus from decay.</color>

C: 时而畅想木棍支着的稻草人，是传说中一根血管贯穿脊背到脚跟的巨人……
E: ...pretending the straw dummy propped up by a wooden pole was a giant with a single blood vessel running from spine to heel...

C: 那梦里，一直有个模糊的声音，似乎在呼唤什么。
E: There was this mysterious voice in my dream, calling out for something...

C: 呀！什么动静？小心一点啦……
E: Hey, what are you doing? Please be careful!

C: 哇…真是好久不见了迷！
E: Woah... look who's finally back memi!

C: 小白，你怎么变得好高、好大、好帅气？远远看着，完全没认出来呢。
E: Snowy, you've grown so tall and dashing! I couldn't even tell it was you at first!

C: 这是…
E: This is...

C: 翻开「门匠」。
E: Reveal the "Gatekeeper."

C: 我到底会经历什么啊？
E: Just what kind of life am I going to lead...

C: 啊…那条丝巾……
E: No... that ribbon...

C: 求求你求求你求求你求求你█ 你█ █你█ ███ ██ █ ██ ███ ████
E: Saaaaave uuuus Saaaaave █ us█ █us█ ███ ██ █ ██ ███ ████

C: …无论如何，试试看吧。
E: ...Let's try that.

C: 「听啊，人子：吾将宣告判决，高下已分。」
E: "Hear thee, children of humanity: I shall pronounce judgment, for the difference is now clear."

C: …呵，果然你的目标从一开始就是我和他。人们都说「金织」大小姐不知天高地厚，可妄想用神谕劝服悬锋战士的，你还是头一个。
E: I should have known from the start. They all say Lady Goldweaver is quite brazen, but you're the first to even imagine that prophecies could persuade a Kremnos warrior.

C: 命运从来颠扑不破。金线告诉我，黑潮正在向创世涡心涌来，很快便将吞没此地。我必须将最后的人性结成丝网，抵御洪流……
E: Fate is ever unassailable. The golden threads tell me the black tide rushes toward the Vortex, ready to swallow this place. I must weave the last of my humanity into a net to hold back the deluge...

C: 还不是时候。
E: Not yet.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这便是翁法罗斯计算的终点，一道完美的「毁灭」方程式。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>This is the endpoint of Amphoreus's calculations: a perfect equation of Destruction.</color>

C: 但，不要去找他——因为「再创世」是一场彻头彻尾的骗局。
E: But do not seek him out — because "Era Nova" is a complete and utter lie.

C: 在原本的历史中，那是一场惨烈的战争。最终，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属「荒笛」弑杀发狂的泰坦，接过支撑大地的火种。
E: In the original history, it was a brutal war. At the end, the Titankin of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, Terravox, killed the rampaging Titan and took the Coreflame that supported the earth.

C: 那之后，每一个轮回，我行至此地时，燃烧的天空总会为它的行迹投下影子。它会在{RUBY_B#深夜}幕匿时{RUBY_E#}的第四个时刻抵达顶点附近，下一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}的第一个十五秒摔落起点。
E: After that, every time I reached this point in the cycle, the burning sky would cast a shadow over its path. It would nearly reach the peak at the fourth quint of {RUBY_B#Midnight}Curtain-Fall Hour{RUBY_E#}, then fall to the starting point in the first fifteen seconds of the next {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我的耐心已经快用尽了，所以更不想浪费口舌。听好，贼灵：交出火种，就当我们从未交锋过。这样，你们和这个世界都能得到拯救。
E: I'm running out of patience, so I'm not going to waste words. Listen up, Spirithief: Hand over the Coreflame, and let's pretend we never clashed. This way, you and this world can still be saved.

C: 可总有一天…你会被焚烧殆尽。
E: But someday... you will burn to the ground.

C: 当你毫无怨言地…背负起世界的时候……
E: The moment you took the world upon your shoulders without hesitation...

C: 重来一次吧。在天秤前犹疑之时，<color=#dbc291ff>你从自己内心得到的答案——</color>
E: Then let's try again. When you stood before the scales in hesitation, <color=#dbc291ff>the answer you found in your own heart...</color>

C: 精彩，精彩…！
E: Wonderful, wonderful...!

C: 告诉我，你甘为烈阳……
E: Tell me, will you be the blazing sun...

C: 那是…一扇门？
E: Hold on... is that a gate?

C: 如果这不是梦，为什么偏偏要挑这个时候找上我呢？
E: If this is real, why reach out to me at this exact moment?

C: 忆庭……
E: The Garden... of Recollection...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这扇门的背后是「翁法罗斯」，它绝对不是一个温柔的世界。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That door leads to Amphoreus. Trust me, it's anything but welcoming.</color>

C: 所以，我不能对你视而不见。
E: So I had to try and stop you.

C: 你认识我…？
E: You know me...?

C: 三月七在哪里？
E: Where's March 7th?

C: 就像你看见的，翁法罗斯所有被冠以英雄之名的人物，也都是身负缺陷的凡人。他们只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在了那里。
E: You've seen how every person regarded as a hero in Amphoreus was nothing more than a flawed human. They were just at the right place at the right time when the world needed a hero.

C: 她的身份…非同凡响。若阁下选择接受我的诚意，我定会献上绵薄之力，将她也送回您的身边。

C: 我们到目的地啦。熟悉的地点，命运三相殿。如果不出意外，现在应该是塔兰顿陨落后不久……
E: We've arrived. A familiar place... the Temple of the Three Fates. If everything went according to plan, it should be shortly after Talanton's fall...

C: 我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是救世主{NICKNAME}。很高兴认识二位。
E: I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer, {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you both.

C: 什、什么？我从未得知此事……
E: I—I know nothing of this...

C: *诸代表议论纷纷*
E: *Representatives chattering*

C: 如果能让他们介入翁法罗斯的「律法」，就有机会改变未来的命运，扭转这个世界注定的结局。
E: If they can intervene in Amphoreus's "Laws," we may have a chance to alter this world's impending fate and reverse its destined end.

C: 而且，她显然有所隐瞒呢。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
E: And she's clearly hiding something. {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

C: 啊？救世主也是要洗澡的吗？
E: Huh? Even the Deliverer takes baths?

C: 海瑟音举杯饮下蜜露，故意展露出脖颈，好让你将液体流经咽喉的过程收入眼中。

C: 这不是你我该考虑的事。凯撒已经落子，我们只需为她冲锋陷阵，直至最后一刻。
E: That's not something you or I should consider. The Imperator has already placed the chess pieces. We just need to fight for her until our last breath.

C: {NICKNAME}，慢、慢慢来！
E: {NICKNAME}! S—Slow down!

C: 断锋爵、冬霖爵，来！将背盟者押入地牢！
E: Dux Fragoris! Dux Brumalis! Escort the traitors to the prison!

C: 或者，我在等待您给我一个答案：铁腕如您，何必多此一举……
E: Or perhaps, I am waiting for you to give me an answer. Why would someone as powerful as you...

C: 还有歌声呢！气氛真浪漫。
E: And I can even hear singing! It feels so romantic.

E: Actually, there are so many people... We wouldn't be able to find the Imperator even if she were here.

C: 前进吧。冰消雪释时，花会盛开，你会找到我。
E: Go. When the frost melts and the snows give way, the flowers will bloom again. You'll find me there.

C: 是刻律德菈…
E: It's Cerydra...

C: 孤独从未向我露出过它致命的一面。事实上，对洞穴的囚徒而言，它更像一位能帮助我专注思考的老朋友。
E: Loneliness never once showed me its fatal side. In fact, for a prisoner of the cave, it's more like an old friend. One that helps me think.

C: 住口吧，他们不是影子……

C: 这道暗门，通往涡心……
E: This hidden gate leads to the Vortex...

C: 此人的「律法」中只有神和造物，但未留给「人」一席之地。能接受一时失败，再度踏上旅程，证明他活得很清醒。
E: This individual's "Law" acknowledged only gods and constructs, leaving no space for humanity. And yet, the fact that he could accept defeat and resume his journey shows a rare self-awareness and clarity of mind.

C: 不会……
E: Do not... care...

C: 听到…翁法罗斯……
E: Hear... Amphoreus's...

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 宴会之后
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, after the feast

E: Oh. Perhaps there was more than just one oversight.

E: "More than just one"?

C: 你用<unbreak>97</unbreak>天走遍了世界的每一个角落，很遗憾……
E: You walked every inch of this world in <unbreak>97</unbreak> days, but unfortunately...

E: "But the Express hasn't detected any traces of him."

E: There's no one else here. Who's she speaking to?

C: 而昔涟，沐浴了那道瞥视。

C: 即便，只是她一厢情愿的幻想……

E: But fortunately, that girl's sacrifices won't be wasted. I will give her another possibility.

E: So, tell me, what role did "you" play in all of this?

C: 以藏在相机里的形式？
E: By hiding in the camera?

C: 这是真迷雾…还是你手抖导致的重影？
E: Is that actual mist... or just motion blur from your shaky hands?

C: 孤注一掷么…狠毒的凯撒，莫非她早就察觉到了「记忆」在暗中布局？
E: A daring wager indeed... That ruthless Imperator. Could she have already sensed that the Remembrance was plotting in the shadows?

C: {NICKNAME}、丹恒，还有三月七，都将与权杖合为一体，坠入「毁灭」。
E: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng, and March 7th will all merge with the Scepter and become a victim of the Destruction.

C: 她们…就在这片忆域中么？

C: （谁留下的便笺？）
E: (Who left this note?)

E: (Interastral Peace Broadcast music)

C: （到底什么情况…）
E: (Seriously, what is happening...?)

C: 一切。
E: Everything.

E: Ancient Sacred Tree, lend me your roots. With the Coreflame I carry, let me resonate with this land.

E: That's the water outlet. If we could block it... the water in this room would drain naturally.

C: 当时的情况呀，是这样的……
E: So, here's what happened...

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 此情此景…呵，何其相似。

E: Nothing seems out of the ordinary...

C: 我同情你，神礼观众。

E: <color=#dbc291ff>Life is like the ocean: Tides rise and fall, and everything eventually dissolves into the waves. So, sing your heart out in every moment of your existence.</color>

E: Doot... doot-doot!

E: I ask: Why do you Trailblaze?

C: 乐逍遥~

E: Is Pamela here?

E: I've been on overtime for the past two days — I haven't left my office...

C: 写得挺有意思。
E: They are pretty interesting.

C: 嗯，没错，是的，你说得对。
E: Yeah, you are right.

C: 捧出一颗敏感的心，却被最为在意的心上人拒之门外——无疑是一种毁灭性的打击。听说，他把写的那些诗全撕了，这就是证明。
E: He gave her his sensitive heart but got rejected by someone he cares a lot about. It's undoubtedly devastating to him. I heard he tore up all the poems. That's the proof.

C: 你的声音怎么在发抖？
E: Why is your voice shaking?

C: 啊，也就是「黑塔•星域界种科」，其中每一个人在跟银河生物打交道的过程中，都会磨练出这样的本领。

C: 一。

C: 一加八个零！
E: A hundred million!

C: 没错。机修间天天跟零件聊天的温天翁，地概科会给花草卷轴起昵称的伯纳德，法政科睁着眼睛说瞎话绝不脸红的古恩……
E: Yeah. There's Wen Tianweng, who talks to machine parts all day in the maintenance room. Bernard in the Department of Cosmic Geography who gives nicknames to the scrolls and plants. And there's Gunn, who can lie through his teeth without a blink of an eye.

C: 总觉得这趟回收之行有危险…
E: This trip feels dangerous...

C: 问题就在于，在我们的世界中，有利于星神之举，可以从命途中斩获力量，而强者才能制定规则，力量才能定义正义。

C: 感觉怎么样？
