E: Maybe... we'll meet again, beyond the western winds... in a world of light, free from pain.

C: 还愣着干什么，赶紧点上啊。
E: What are you waiting for? Next!

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 您已经为我们做得太多，{NICKNAME}阁下…而且，时间的确也不容许我们打开它们。
E: You've already done so much for us, {NICKNAME}... Besides, we don't have time to open them all.

C: 「新的切片。」阮•梅的形象翕动着，闪烁着柔和的光晕，「嘘，{NICKNAME}，别告诉黑塔我们在这里做了些什么。」
E: "A new world slice." Ruan Mei's figure flutters and shines with a gentle sheen. "Shhh, {NICKNAME}, don't tell Herta what we are up to here."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「居然是克里珀。」</color>黑塔的声音突然在你耳边响起，<color=#dbc291ff>「真让我意外，本来以为第一个会是阿哈呢。你的行为符合存护命途吗？我觉得你俩只有不说话这点比较像。」</color>她发出意义不明的吃吃笑声，<color=#dbc291ff>「好吧，至少你证明了自己确实能吸引星神。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"So it's Qlipoth."</color> You suddenly hear Herta's voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"What a surprise. I thought the first one would be Aha. Do your actions align with the Path of Preservation? I thought the only thing you two have in common is not talking a lot."</color> You can't tell why she is giggling. <color=#dbc291ff>"Well, at least you proved that you really can attract Aeons."</color>

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 为什么要设计战斗？
E: Why is combat a part of the design?

C: 「你以为升级是什么，电子游戏的版本更新吗？每一个半月给你点无足轻重的小玩意儿？」黑塔啧了一声，「这可是一整个微型宇宙！如果所有变化你都能一眼看见，我们还费劲培育宇宙干什么，给你家列车盖个花园不就行了？」
E: "What do you think an upgrade is? The next version of a video game? Some tiny rewards handed out every one-and-half-months?" Herta snorts. "This is a whole micro-universe! If you could see all the changes at a glance, why would we spend all the time training a universe? I can just build a garden for your Express instead!"

C: 黑塔的人偶出现在模拟宇宙里，她之前只用声音和你交流，因此这次现身着实令人意外。她看了看你，面无表情。
E: Herta's puppet appears in the Simulated Universe. Having only communicated with you via voice before, it's a little surprising to see her manifesting like this. She looks at you expressionlessly.

C: 「只是个说法，不用在意。」
E: "It's just an expression, don't worry about it."

C: 你们打算怎么处理阿哈？
E: Have you decided on what to do with Aha?

C: 你常挂在嘴边的斯蒂芬是谁？
E: Who's this Stephen you keep going on about?

C: 「根据你的脑前额叶活动，多巴胺会在三秒后大量涌入——你熟悉的家伙要来了。」阮•梅只陈述事实，「但不完全一样。」
E: "Based on your prefrontal cortex's activity, dopamine will be flooding into your brain in three seconds. That familiar experience will come soon, but it will be slightly different this time," Ruan Mei states matter-of-factly.

C: 一点灵感乍现！在雾气里你似乎看到——那从庇佑的土地中汲取万千尘料汇聚而成的庞大身躯！哈，你轻松地明白了：大概是那位模拟的祂要来了！…你似乎都能够听见祂的锤子在地上拖出难以忍受的刮磨声。喔，你嗅了嗅鼻子，却嗅到了异常的气味……
E: A spark of inspiration hits you! Amid the steam, you seem to catch a glimpse of the massive body that takes form through the congregation of countless particles and dust from the earth under THEIR protection! Realization dawns on you — the simulated Aeon is coming! You seem to hear the ear-splitting scraping sound of THEM dragging THEIR hammer on the ground. You sniff the air and catch an unusual scent...

C: …你无法靠近祂们，只能静默地跪拜。终于，你意识到，这就是那一刻…你只能捕捉到符号的些微颤动，洒落到实在界，如同幽灵；而凡人实在无法辨认，听不懂神的语言，连神的锤声与呜咽声也无法分清。
E: ...You can't get close to THEM, so you can only kneel in silence. Finally, you realize this is the moment... You can only capture the slightest fluttering of the symbols when THEY are spilled into the realm of reality like specters. Mortals simply cannot discern or comprehend the language of gods. THEY can't even distinguish the sound of a god's hammer and whimpering.

C: 你在原地等待——直至笑声突然出现，你一点也笑不出来。一些火花般的快乐又跳了出来，你甚至怀疑这些快乐长出了手脚，在你身边舞动…你对祂的到来多少有些畏惧，却又感到熟悉——没有谁像祂一样毫不防备、毫无虚伪！
E: You wait in place - until a sudden laughter comes. However, you can't laugh along. Some sparks of joy pop up, and you suspect that they are dancing around you with newly grown limbs... You more or less dread the Aeon's arrival, but it feels familiar to you at the same time. No one else can be as unguarded and unpretentious as THEM!

C: 「问我干嘛？」
E: "Why do you ask me?"

C: 但你刚摸到这把刀，无数抚摸过这把刀具的灵魂就出现，又湮灭，故事涌入你的脑海。出于同一种恐惧，一位独臂的父亲曾用这把小刀保护自己的女儿；而最后在丢失村落的兵戈中，成年的女儿于虫潮中用这把刀进行了自我了断……
E: However, as you touch the knife, countless souls who once caressed this blade appear and dissipate, and stories flood into your mind. For, out of the same fear, a one-armed father once wielded this very knife to protect his daughter. And yet, amidst the warfare that destroyed their village, the grown daughter ended her own life amidst the Swarm...

C: 反正没人能跳出来成为你的朋友…你打了个哈欠。
E: Anyone, no one will jump out and become your friend... You make a yawn.

C: 真的消失了。
E: They have literally vanished.

C: 你只能感受现象的发生——祂的决定不容置喙，祂轻轻引导着回归的角度。
E: You can only feel the phenomenon unfold before you — THEIR decisions are never arbitrary, for THEY gently guide the angle of return.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 你问这事结束了没？我不好说，谁知道这些碎片有没有受「神秘」影响呢？星神哪有那么容易理解——总之，一步一步来吧。
E: You're asking if this is over? I'm not sure, who knows if these Fragments were affected by Enigmata? The Aeons are not so easy to understand. Slow and steady does it.

C: （这次…又会觐见哪位星神？）
E: (Which Aeon... will I have an audience with this time?)

C: 「对，就得这样，安抚斯蒂芬。」黑塔开始憋笑了，「习惯就好，我们几个都得顺着他。他就喜欢这个中年人的形象。」
E: "Yes, that's right. Reassure Stephen." Herta stifles a smile. "Get used to it, as we all have to coddle him. He loves that middle-aged look."

C: ……万机之王，「博识尊」！！！！
E: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous!!!

C: 与此同时，公司内部的无形战火也拉开帷幕。在边星混乱不堪时，「技术部」德•维恩率先想到占领、殖民和征用无机世界。德•维恩不知看见了什么，开始招募雇佣兵建立武装团体——你即是其中之一。
E: At the same time, an internal conflict is taking place at IPC on the down-low. While the planets on the fringe of the universe are at war, De Wayne of the Technology Division sees it as a chance to occupy, colonize, and expropriate the inorganic worlds. After seeing what might be significant, De Wayne starts recruiting mercenaries to establish an armed organization — and you are part of it.

C: 而大名鼎鼎的#4波尔卡•卡卡目——她背后的政治势力在反有机战争结束后才昭然若揭。<color=#dbc291ff>东方启行</color>将一切掌控于「<color=#dbc291ff>预兆</color>」之下：一切周转，皆逃不过他的手掌。
E: The political power behind the famous #4 Polka Kakamond was only revealed at the end of the Anti-Organic War. <color=#dbc291ff>Dongfang Qixing</color> kept everything in control through <color=#dbc291ff>omens</color>. None that happened can escape his grasp.

C: 当离去时，他已破解了反有机方程——亦或者，是反有机方程选择了他。他的双手没有触碰任何东西，方程的答案他只字未提。但当那道方程启动时，「死亡」必将来临。
E: By the time he left, he had solved the Anti-Organic Equation, or the equation had chosen him. His hands touched nothing, and he mentioned nothing about the answer. However, death was an inevitability when the equation was activated.

C: 花儿是幸福的，它们不会恐惧，更不会执着存在的价值。而智慧生命拥有睁开双眼的权力，因此他们也不得不直面愈发靠近的终结。
E: The flowers are lucky — they can never fear, let alone grow attached to the value of existence. Intelligent life has the power to open its own eyes, and so it must face down that ever-approaching finality.

C: 撞进它们的封锁墙！
E: Smash into their blockade wall!

C: 能唱歌的石头，来自塔拉克的王子。年少的他被君王带到异星的许愿屋中，用身上最珍贵的宝物换取一个药方。如何平息百姓的悲怨？少年问道。
E: The singing stone comes from the prince of Taraka. Whisked away by the king to a wishing hut on a foreign planet, the prince exchanged his most precious possession for a prescription. He asked: How can I ease the suffering of my people?

C: 你信步走到那位君王的面前，他瘫倒在地上，早已无法认出你的模样。可震耳欲聋的尖叫仍叫你不由得亢奋起来。
E: You stroll up to the king who collapsed onto the ground, unable to recognize you. However, the piercing scream still aroused excitement within you.

C: 「好运气。」他生硬地鼓着掌，眼神飘忽迷离。
E: He claps stiffly and his eyes glaze past you as he says, "Such fine luck."

C: 再也不会被忘记。
E: Never to be forgotten.

C: 这，就是你最后的墓志铭。
E: This... is your final epitaph.

C: 当思考不存在差异，那共性也将死去。
E: When there is no longer any discrepancy in thought, commonality also dies.

C: 你继续向前探索。不多时一片林中空地出现，其上仅有一株果树，一名老者在树下小憩，他的怀中抱着一枚色泽格外鲜亮的果实。
E: You continue your search onwards. After a moment, you come across a clear area among the forest of trees, where only one single fruit tree stands. Under the tree, there rests an old man, clutching a remarkably brightly-colored fruit in his arms.

C: 「如果对星神的笃信只是蠢，那对联觉信标的依赖就是单纯的坏了。」委员长叹气。
E: "If sincere belief in Aeons is foolishness, then reliance on the Synesthesia Beacon is but pure evil," the committee leader lets out a sigh of contempt.

C: 沸腾的人群里，一缕影子留下香甜而危险的气息，引开你的注意。学士服下的糖果色纱裙，陌生的女人正同旁人交谈。你看不清她的面孔，透过喧嚣与叫骂，只能隐约听到些许词句。
E: Among the bustling crowd, a shadow leaves behind a scent that is both sweet and dangerous, diverting your attention. The strange woman wears a pastel-colored gown underneath her scholar's robe, conversing with the people around her. You cannot make out her features, and through the clamor and commotion, you are only able to catch a few words.

C: 在星际和平公司的协助下，学会成功自「权杖」中解码出一道讯息——有一颗负责提问的<color=#dbc291ff>核心</color>，发号指令的中枢，它曾连接所有的个体。
E: With the aid of the IPC, the Guild has successfully deciphered a message within the Scepters — There is a <color=#dbc291ff>core</color> responsible for asking questions, the centerpiece that issues commands. It was once connected to all entities.

C: 从狰狞的表情上看，显然克劳奇对你的回答并不满意，他的嘴唇张合，没发出任何声音。你忽地意识到，他正在不停向你问话，可你的耳畔充斥着白噪音的嗡鸣。
E: From Crouch's fierce expression, it's obvious he's unsatisfied with your answer. His lips are moving, but there's no sound. Suddenly, you realize he's rapidly firing questions at you, but all you hear is the buzzing white noise in your ears.

C: 自力更生的学者们展开空前绝后的学术交流。第一台万用应急打印机就是其学术成果。
E: The self-sufficient scholars embark on unprecedented academic discourse. The first all-purpose emergency printer is one of the fruits of their academic achievements.

C: 请问您需要帮助吗？
E: Can I help you at all?

C: 她希冀将眼前海洋般广阔的知识放入大脑，但她的智慧仅是海中的一颗水分子，难以容纳如此庞大的信息。
E: She wishes to absorb the vast ocean of knowledge before her into her mind, but her intelligence is only the scope of a single water particle in the ocean. There is no way it can contain such a vast wealth of information.

C: 这是闹哪出？老人有些困惑，可当她看到公式的第二行时，窥视星神时那莫大的震撼又重新笼罩住她的心灵——那是已证明完成的孤波算法难题。
E: What is going on here? The old woman is perplexed. But when she sees the second line of the formula, the overwhelming shock that enveloped her soul when she glimpsed the Aeon once again washed over her... The solitary waves theory has been solved.

C: 寂静领主沉默不语。她不屑回应你们的指控。
E: The Lord of Silence does not speak. She does not deign to respond to your accusations.

C: 「逻辑：孤波算法，模拟宇宙的演算基础，当系统内的不稳定程度超出界限，任何运动都会变得无法预测。」你听到他的齿轮转动，「我改写了系统的倾向性，告知他们世界的真相，我为波尔卡女士的模型，带来了一只混沌的蝴蝶。」
E: "Logic: The solitary waves theory is the extrapolation fundamental to the Simulated Universe. Once the system's extent of instability hits its limit, all motions become unpredictable." You hear his gears churning. "I've rewritten the system's tendencies, revealing the truth of the world to them. I've introduced a chaotic butterfly into Madam Polka's model."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>阿哈宣告，宇宙如疯人的玩笑，混沌痴愚，不可洞知。</color>「全知域」自此更名「不可知域」。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Aha declares, the universe is like a madman's jest — chaotic, irrational, and beyond comprehension. </color>The Knowable Domain will henceforth be known as the Unknowable Domain.

C: 睡眠，有机体如此称呼这一过程。连贯性意识的中断，对你而言，也可以将其视为死亡。是的，你是已经死去的巨人，筑城者留下的无数机器中的一台。
E: Sleep. That is what organic organisms call it. A break in the continuity of consciousness, it could also be seen as a form of death. That's right, you are a deceased giant, just another of the countless machines left behind by the Architects.

C: 强烈的刺痛将你层层包裹，仿佛要撕开你的脉搏，将你晒干成入药的粉末。骇人的生命力沿着血浆和药剂流进他们的躯体。首先是实验体，它被划开的身体逐渐愈合，移植的肿瘤被健康的细胞吞噬。
E: A powerful, stinging pain envelops your body. It feels as if your very veins were being torn open, and you were being reduced to medicinal powder. The terrifying vitality flows into their bodies with your blood plasma and medicinal elixirs. First is the test subject, whose slashed open body begins to gradually heal, their transplanted tumor devoured by healthy cells.

C: 等待揭开的谜团太多了，我跃跃欲试呢。谁还关心打赌？
E: There are so many mysteries waiting to be solved. I can't wait... Who cares about the bet anymore?

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 「你怎么又来了？」虚构史学家呵斥道。「这次又有什么历史想让我帮你改改？」
E: "Why are you here again?" The History Fictionologist scolds you. "What kind of history do you want me to change this time?"

C: 你们都很爱玩小把戏。
E: Both of you like to pull off little tricks.

C: 「我叫里奥，是天使。我的哥哥则是莱顿宁恶魔，你要和谁当邻居？」
E: "I'm Leo, an angel. My brother is a devil. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"

C: 「果实中的魔王一旦落地，文明将遭受毁灭性打击。根据推算，我们离最后的时限还有四…四个周期！」另一位星际外来者的声音颤抖。
E: "Once the Demon Lord emerges from the fruit and lands on the ground, it will deal a devastating blow to our civilization. Calculations show that we are just f—f—four cycles away from its arrival!" Another outsider remarks in a trembling voice.

C: 骑士向你放出一名伙伴。
E: The knight gives you a companion.

C: 你正气愤不已时，她却突然发出尖锐的哀嚎！她突然可怖地蜷缩起来…你后退了几步。
E: While you are still experiencing outrage at her action, she suddenly lets out a shrill cry, and her body curls up in a horrifying manner... You stagger a few steps backward.

C: 她在你面前，将你的祝福塞到手下的四个杯子里…接着她快速变幻那些杯子！一切瞬间就结束了。伶人将双手放至胸前，礼貌地询问你选择哪一个……
E: She stuffs your Blessings into four cups in front of you... Then, she quickly moves the cups around, and the show ends in an instant. The Actor then places her hand on her chest and politely asks you to choose a cup ...

C: 「拿奖励吧。」
E: "Here's your reward."

C: 你打量着眼前这位伙伴：这条太空美虫「着涎香」，伤口周围分泌出次生代谢物，散发特别的花、果、蜜香气味…你知道将它抚养长大后，它终将出没于奇异果香、银河茶园之间，它的每次旅行或许都会为你带来*爱*的气息。
E: You observe your companion: This beautiful space worm is named Sweet Saliva. It secretes secondary metabolites around its wound that give off a unique flowery, fruity, and sweet scent... You know that when it matures, it will linger around the exotic fruit orchards and cosmic tea plantations. Each of its trips may bring the scent of *love* to you.

C: 「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
E: "I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.

C: 你获得了丰厚的*投资*回报！
E: You get a great return on your *investment*!

C: 你坐在满是油污的蒸汽甲板上，眼前宛如图层错乱的桅杆让你一时有些眩晕，瑞勒号的船长站在你的身边，声音是这块乱码唯一接近人类的地方。
E: You are sitting on the oil-stained steam deck, and the deranged layers of all the masts stacked before you leave you feeling slightly dizzy. The captain of the Riviera is standing beside you, and his voice is the only thing approximating something human out of all this hot mess.

C: 「我尽量。」她轻柔地抬起右手，掩住嘴角的笑意。
E: "I'll try my best." She lifts her right arm gracefully to cover her grin.

C: 事实证明，拳头是宇宙的通用货币。
E: This just goes to show that fists are the universal currency.

C: 此外，时间代理银行提醒您，请务必保管好个人时间。
E: At this moment, Time Agency Bank would like to remind you to take care of your personal time.

C: 水晶用自己的身体哺育现实，而你又将献上什么祭品，填补超验世界的饥渴？
E: The crystal uses its own body to nurture reality. What tribute do you intend to offer to sate the thirst of the transcendental world?

C: 杜威特博士的年轻靓照，杜威特博士的发明目录，杜威特博士在求学期间的研究笔记。不管这个杜威特博士是谁，他一定非常自恋。
E: Doctor DeWitt's photos in his heyday. Doctor DeWitt's invention catalog. Doctor DeWitt's research journal during his student days... Whoever this Doctor DeWitt is, he sure is narcissistic.

C: 垃圾扭蛋机，垃圾杜威特博士。
E: This garbage capsule machine, and this garbage Doctor DeWitt.

C: 废弃的零件组装成七扭八歪的玩具，你感觉到，微笑无法抑制地出现在嘴角。
E: The discarded parts are combined into misshapen toys, yet you feel a smile controllably creeping up on the ends of your lips.

C: 在阿卡索斯的城外，身披重甲的战士在众人的簇拥中放声大笑。他挥舞着手中的武器，以吉奥里亚的眷属自居。
E: Outside the city of Icatus, a warrior clad in heavy armor laughs heartily amidst a crowd. He brandishes the weapon in his hand, proclaiming himself kin of Georios.

C: 「我将赋予每一位市民平等的权利，只要付出金钱，每人都能参与这场不受审判的游戏。七颗骰子，七个数字，猜中的数字越多，就能获得更高的收益。」
E: "I shall grant every citizen equal rights! As long as the fee is paid, everyone can participate in this game, which is beyond judgment. Seven dice, seven numbers. The more numbers you accurately guess, the better your rewards."

C: 你听见身边的阵阵嘘声，他们蔑视你的临阵脱逃，却又羡慕扎格列斯给予你的机运。
E: You hear waves of booing around you. Their contempt for your retreat is palpable, yet envy the opportunity that Zagreus has bequeathed you.

C: 它守望着世人热烈地度过一生，直到辉煌落幕，才小心翼翼划动长船，叩响你我的门扉。
E: They watch as people live their lives to the fullest. When the curtain falls, they carefully stir the ferry, softly knocking at the door of our souls.

C: 仆人并无胆量涉身冥河。
E: The servant dared not approach the River of Souls.

C: 承认今生的终结。
E: Accept the end of this life.

C: 而扎格列斯诡计繁多。
E: And Zagreus has plenty of tricks up their sleeve.

C: 「去纺织大地上的浪漫吧，到那时，无泪的神也将谱写你的诗歌。」欧洛尼斯交予它黄金的纺锤。
E: "Go weave romance on the earth. When the time comes, even the tearless god will compose your poetry," Oronyx hands them a golden spindle.

C: 「墨涅塔在上，我本不如您的万分之一，可嫉妒偏偏夺走了您的美丽。」
E: "Great Mnestia, I am not even a fraction as beautiful as you, yet jealousy has robbed you of your beauty."

C: 少女面带笑意。
E: The girl smiled.

C: 规则与公正被铭刻。
E: Rules and justice are engraved.

C: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的喜报「恭喜您通过学术成果筛选，我们诚邀您前往神悟树庭进行面试。」
E: A week later, the unthinkable happens — an acceptance letter from the Grove of Epiphany. "Congratulations! Your research has successfully passed the selection process. We are pleased to invite you for an interview at the Grove of Epiphany."

C: 人需要泰坦。
E: Humans need Titans.

C: 这有点草率吧。
E: This seems a bit sloppy.

C: 虽然是神话，但还挺浪漫。
E: It might be a myth, but that's pretty romantic.

C: 因为天空傲慢，大海欢愉，唯有大地那宽厚的性格，才能包容人类的弱小和愚蠢。
E: It is because the sky is arrogant, the ocean is frolicsome, but only the earth is generous in nature, willing to accommodate the weakness and stupidity of man.

C: 可能直到现在，它们还在害怕被法吉娜变成烂泥。
E: Perhaps, even till the very present, they remain fearful of being turned to mud and mire by Phagousa.

C: 吉奥里亚向瑟希斯求情，它与瑟希斯达成约定，只要人类能克服自己的贪婪，春天就会重新回到大地。
E: Georios pleaded with Cerces and struck a covenant: Spring would return to the land if humans overcame their avarice.

C: 有付出才有回报。
E: You give and you get.

C: 于是，漫长的酷刑开始了。年轻的祭祀是渔民之子，他吃光了父亲打捞而来的鱼虾。
E: And so the long torture began. The young devotee, a fisherman's son, devoured all the fish and shrimp his father had caught.

C: 还是别拍了。
E: Don't tap it.

C: 而「通体外露王霸之气的光锥」狂妄至极，配不上你一身的好本领。
E: And this Domineering King's Aura Light Cone is tacky and pretentious, and naturally unworthy of someone with your great talent.

C: 错误！出道怎能即巅峰？简直毫无上进心，上进心！
E: Wrong! How can a debut be a peak achievement? There is no ambition, no ambition!

C: 我虽没有手脚，但还有颗感恩之心。刚喝下去的水还没彻底吸收，没法给你报酬。<color=#dbc291ff>明天</color>再来吧，肯定给你好果子吃！
E: I may not have any limbs, but I still have a grateful heart that beats its thanks. I can't give you the fruits of your kindness just yet, but come back <color=#dbc291ff>tomorrow</color> and I'll have something fresh for you!

C: 这发音哪里像了？
E: How is that related?

C: 你依稀记得，在主控舱段时常见到密卷科科员们的身影，或许该去那里打听打听。
E: You vaguely remember seeing the members of the Department of Insight flitting around the master control zone. Maybe you can go there and ask around.

C: 触碰气泡。
E: Touch the bubble.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 面前的这颗星星足足有你身体三倍大——这令你不禁感到好奇：自己的消化循环腔果真能够装下它吗？究竟要吃几天才能全部吃完？……
E: Yet the planet before you is easily three times the size of your body. This makes you wonder whether your digestive cavity could fit it. How many days would it take to consume the whole planet?

C: 「我听说啊，只是听说，」你感觉阿德快要把毛绒绒的毛发薅光了，「皇帝应该是知道了毛球的事…那别动队八成就是专门来消灭它们的。」
E: "So, I've heard something. Keep in mind I don't know for sure," Ader starts to say. You think he is well on his way to pulling out all of the Fluffie's fur. "The emperor probably knows about the Fluffies... It's quite likely the special force is here to exterminate them."

C: 我长得有那么好看吗？
E: Am I that attractive then?

C: 深渊啊…
E: O Abyss...

C: 你这语气…好像不是在开玩笑？
E: The way you say that... you're being serious?

C: 大矿区那片巨大的地髓矿脉，你还有印象吧？我建议你先去那儿试试手。哦对了，要是挖到什么有意思的东西，别忘了拿来给我估估价。
E: You still remember that massive Geomarrow in the Great Mine? I suggest you head out that way first and try your luck. Oh, right. If you dig up anything interesting, don't forget to bring it to me for an appraisal.

C: 他的实力绝对够争冠军。
E: He was so good. Definitely could have become the champion.

C: 我给你们看个宝贝。
E: I'll give you a look at my treasure here.

C: 哇哦，听听！这世上还有更巧的事吗？这位挑战者居然都把「蟹」字写进名字里了！
E: Wow. Did you hear that? Has there ever been a greater coincidence? The challenger made the word "crab" part of their name!

C: 喂，你瞧呐！那家伙八成是要吐了。
E: Hey, look! {F#She}{M#He} is gonna throw up.

C: 不…你没理解。
E: No... You don't understand.

C: 好啦，今天的捉迷藏游戏到此结束！各回各家睡大觉咯！
E: Alright. Today's game of hide-and-seek is officially over! Everyone, go home and get some sleep!

C: <size=36><color=#eb4d3dff>永远……</color></size>
E: <size=36><color=#eb4d3dff>Forever...</color></size>

C: 好闷啊…
E: So boring...

C: 真是一次…神奇的相遇。
E: This really was... an unusual encounter.

C: 那个…你是在演岩居蟹吗？
E: Umm... Are you pretending to be a Rock Crab?

C: 不错，急流勇进。那么，你伛着身子，试图钻到桌子底下……
E: That's good. Rise to the challenge! You crouch down and try to get underneath the table...

C: 不错，思路清奇。于是，你挺起腰板，站到了桌子后……
E: Nice. That's some fresh thinking. So, you stand up and get behind the table...

C: <size=36>太大个了！</size>
E: <size=36>Too big!</size>

C: <size=36>……</size>
E: <size=36>...</size>

C: <size=36>无语了！</size>
E: <size=36>Too shocked to talk!</size>

C: 嗯？你挖到什么好东西了吗？给我瞅瞅。
E: Eh? Dug up anything good? Let me see.

C: 不存在之数以任意彰显…这样应该就算是九了？
E: A number that doesn't exist, manifesting in any form... This should count as nine?

C: 这很反常。脱离了阿格莱雅的金丝，失去赐福的若虫难以长久活动…除非受到了某种感召。
E: This is unusual. Without Lady Aglaea's golden threads, the unblessed nymphs cannot remain active for long... unless they have been summoned by something.

C: 你注意到平台上留下了一行印记：｢我们在西风尽头等你。｣
E: You notice a mark left on the platform: "We await you at the end of the west wind."

C: 桀桀桀…没想到你居然能解开这又臭又长的古老谜题，真是不可小觑。
E: Hehehe... I didn't expect you to solve such a long and tedious ancient riddle. You're truly not to be underestimated.

C: …嘛咪嘛咪哄！好了，我已经帮你拨开了帷幕，快去见识见识吧。
E: ...Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! Alright, I've pulled back the curtain for you. Go and take a look.

C: 吃我的鳞粉吧~
E: Eat my scale dust~

C: …我回过头来想了想，你能从机巧鸟周边里准确地找到我，那是因为你发现我会动，对吧？或者说，你真的以为我就是个周边？
E: ...Giving it a second thought, you only found me among the cycrane merchandise because you noticed me moving, right? Or did you really think I was a piece of merchandise?

C: 对呀。
E: I thought so.

C: 你看准了恶龙翕动的间隙，将手伸向了浮动着红光的财宝。你明白，恶龙一旦愤怒地醒来，它将高高地盘旋起来，黑暗就将笼罩一切，你无处可逃。
E: You identify the gap in the dragon's movements, and stretch your hand out into the treasure glimmering with ruby light. You know that once it wakes up, it will be enraged, encircling high as it flies and leaving you with no place left to hide.

C: 没错，要不是有我们的大哥，我们俩现在都还在家里写作业呢。
E: Exactly. Without bossman, we would still be back at home doing homework right now.

C: 我现在就走，求求你们放过我。
E: I'll make myself scarce now. Please let me off the hook.

C: 是吗？梓桥需要我回去…这里已经没有属于我的位置了，我该离开了。
E: Really? Ziqiao needs me... There is no place for me here anymore. I should leave.

C: 那么要抵押多少信用点呢？
E: So how much credit do I have to put down?

C: 你想从我这里得到什么？
E: What do you want from me?

C: 不就是为了捣乱吗？
E: Maybe the designer just wanted to troll us?

C: 不许挑战神机！
E: Don't challenge the divine machine!

C: 你放心，只要连心同调，两位会觉得自己好像是同一个人。
E: Don't worry, as long as you both resonate well, you will feel like you're the same person.

C: 你凝神屏息，放开了弓弦，然后箭矢击中了教习…你拼命在校场上奔跑，追着天空中掠过的星槎之影…你无力地跌倒在行军床上，对未来一片茫然……
E: You focused your mind and held your breath, loosed the bowstring, and the arrow hit the instructor... You ran desperately on the drill ground, chasing the shadow of the starskiff passing over the sky... You fell powerless on the bedroll, feeling lost about the future...

C: 你经常锻炼身体。
E: You train your body a lot.

C: 最近咱们工造司的货运流量太大，搞什么星槎单双号限行了，我估计他还在排队等星槎吧。
E: Recently, the cargo flow in our Artisanship Commission has been too high, and they have implemented a system of odd-even number restrictions for starskiffs. I think he's probably still waiting in line for a starskiff.

C: 呃，又是你？怎么说，你有那家伙的下落了？
E: It's you again? How was it, did you find out the other guy's location?

C: 冒牌货果然没胆子……
E: Impostors are all cowards...

C: 你回想起和那个女孩共度的时光。你们曾创造过许多值得珍视的记忆，但最让你难以忘怀的，是她揭露真身时的那缕复杂情感。
E: You think back to the times you spent with her. All those cherished memories... but the one you'll never forget was the complex whirl of emotions when she first revealed her true identity to you.

C: 影视乐园里，就连电视都总是成双成对……
E: In this theme park, even the TV sets all come in pairs...

C: 店长听到一些小小的声音，希望他能把节目换成《钟表小子》和《折纸小鸟历险记》。
E: The shopkeeper overheard some faint voices asking him to change the channel so that they could watch Clockie and Origami Bird Adventures.

C: 「滴答，救命，我被关进电视了。」
E: "Tick-tock, help me! I've been locked inside a television!"

C: 仅仅是多看了一眼，你就已经为它想好了五种名字和二十一种必杀。
E: With just one more glance, you've already come up with five potential names and twenty-one finishing moves for this great weapon.

C: 不是说好了？电梯门一开，你去吸引注意，我去敲闷棍？
E: I thought we agreed on this? When the elevator door opens, you go and distract them and I'll knock them out?

C: 该死，东西被截了。
E: Darn it, the goods got robbed.

C: 「钟表匠」也走了，我们…
E: The Watchmaker is gone, we should...

C: 真正的梦境永不消逝！
E: True dreams never die!

C: 这就是有机生命的自由…
E: So this is the freedom of organic beings...

C: 你得学会尊重神圣的水域。
E: You have to learn to respect the sacred waters.

C: 那你怎么不顶个球？
E: Why didn't you block that ball then?

C: 嘘…这话可不兴说。
E: Hush... Don't take their name in vain.

C: 愿你凯旋归来，我的…
E: May you return triumphantly, my...

C: 黄金裔的大人们…
E: The Chrysos Heirs...

C: 我是不是泡太久了？
E: Have I been soaking for too long?

C: 这本应只是星槎海上司空见惯的景观，直到一道银白色的闪光飞过你的肩头，落在那艘星槎的尾翼上，发出一声脆响。
E: It was just another day at the Starskiff Haven, until a silvery flash shoots over your shoulder, landing on the tail of the starskiff bus with a crisp clang.

C: 刚才路过的执事不明真相，把您也带进了公廨，真是不好意思。请收下这些吧，权当是见义勇为的谢礼了。
E: That officer just then didn't understand the situation and shouldn't have brought you here. I'm sorry about that. Hold onto this, and consider it thanks for doing what's right.

C: 我们这不是尊敬您老人家帕。
E: Isn't this actually done out of respect for your seniority?

C: …一定是你看错了帕，列车长才不会哭鼻子呢。
E: ...You must be mistaken. Pom-Pom would never cry.

C: 不是说你！
E: Pom-Pom didn't mean you!

C: 这东西能给一切物体打分，就连帕姆也不例外！三月七乘客对着帕姆用了定分枪，但帕姆一直不知道自己是多少分。
E: This thing rates everything, even me! March 7th used the pistol on Pom-Pom, but I never found out what rating I got.

C: （还是算了吧）
E: (Forget it)

C: 还不错，要是没车窗就更好了…
E: Not bad, but it'd be even better if there weren't any windows...

C: 正好{NICKNAME}乘客来了，那就配合一下，帮列车长提升列车的服务体验吧！
E: Now that {NICKNAME} is here, why don't you help Pom-Pom to improve the service of the Express!

C: 可惜列车上没有人知道如何治疗落枕，要是能咨询一下懂医疗的人就好了。比如…艾丝妲的空间站应该有专人负责吧？
E: It's a shame that no one on the Express knows how to treat a stiff neck. It would be great if we could consult someone with medical knowledge. Perhaps there are some medical staff at Asta's space station?

C: 在你来之前，我清洁完的地板都是光可鉴人的…但现在……
E: Before you came, the floor was all shiny as a mirror after I cleaned it... But now...

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你有没有感觉…最近我有什么变化？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you notice anything different about me lately?

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你就陪陪帕姆好吗？放心放心，不会累到你的！
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, can you stay here with me? Don't worry. I won't tire you out!

C: 就当是在锻炼身体了。
E: Just think of it as exercising.

C: 想不到{NICKNAME}乘客还挺会苦中作乐的。
E: You sure do know how to make the best out of a bad situation.

C: 等等…「资源补给协议」…艾丝妲站长好像说过这事，那没事了。
E: Wait... The resource supply agreement... Lead Researcher Asta seems to have mentioned this.

C: 别在这儿干等着了，户外勘测的装备，我一把老骨头还能给你现在就拿过来不成？待会儿我会叫个小年轻给你直接送到月台！
E: Don't just wait here. Are you expecting me, an old man, to bring the equipment for an outdoor survey to you? Later, I will get a youngster to send them directly to the railway platform for you!

C: 好了，年轻人，审批流程中涉及我这边权限的，都已经通过了。之后会有专门负责人完成资源交接的。
E: Alright, everything that involves my authority in the approval process has been passed. There will be a person to take care of the handover of resources later.

C: 要负责列车乘客的日常生活，事项繁琐又枯燥，那就得有勇气，随时准备好承担一切职责。
E: You will be responsible for the daily life of the passengers, which is tedious and boring, so you have to have courage and be ready to take on all responsibilities at any time.

C: 关于三月七：果汁爱好者
E: About March 7th: Juice connoisseur

C: 因为三月乘客对口味也不挑剔，好像只要是果汁她就特别喜欢喝……
E: March doesn't seem to be particular about taste. As long as it's juice, she'll like it.

C: 荒凉，比我想象中还要荒凉。我只记得十几年前，贝洛伯格的北方还没有破败到这种程度。
E: It's way more desolate than I imagined. A decade or so ago, the northern region of Belobog was in a better state than this.

C: （扑满应该是逃进行医市集里了，还得继续向前才能找到它……）
E: (It must have escaped into the Healer's Market. I've got to keep moving to find it...)

C: 现场所有的次元扑满已经被地衡司管理。「牧场行动」大获成功，这都是你的功劳。
E: Thanks to you, all the Warp Trotters are now under the supervision of the Realm-Keeping Commission. The "Herding Operation" has been a huge success.

C: 它现在是我的了！
E: It's mine now!

C: 身为「四大天王」之一的玛丽竟然遗憾落败…这就是「黑暗拳斗大赛」新秀的实力吗！
E: Mary, one of the Formidable Four, has lost... Do we have a rising star in the Dark Fist Tournament?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，虽然你赢了，但其实我是「四大天王」里最弱的那个！你可不要得意忘形哦！
E: You may have won, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, but I'm the weakest of the Formidable Four, so enjoy the victory while you can!

C: 这个沉默不语的孩子对你们一大一小两人说的话没有丝毫反应。你无法确认他是否真的已经准备好接受你的挑战。
E: The silent kid doesn't react to anything that is said at all. You're not sure if he is indeed ready for you.

C: 出布！
E: Paper!

C: 什么？！你居然出剪刀……
E: What, you're choosing scissors?

C: 你对这个有印象吗？
E: Does this ring any bells?

C: …咳，我第一次碰见道歉态度这么诚恳的家伙…看来你还算明辨是非。那这次…这次就…呃…放过你吧。
E: ...Ahem, you're the first one to apologize so sincerely. I guess I, uh... can let you go this time.

C: 所以，{M#哥们儿}{F#姐们儿}——你能把脚挪开了吗？你要是不走开，我这基地里的警报就停不了，懂吗？
E: So, {M#bruh}{F#girl}, can you please move your feet away from our door? As long as you're stepping on our door, the alarm in our base won't stop ringing, get it?

C: 哈！成吧，反正我也拿你没办法。你最好是能在这儿一直赖着，直到我彻底失去耐心为止。
E: Hah! Fine, it's not like I can force you to do anything. But you'd better be prepared to stay put for a long time until I thoroughly run out of patience.

C: 有关通缉令的一切到这里就全部结束了。不过，如果你的好奇心足够旺盛，也不妨去找你的铁卫朋友——
E: That's all there is regarding these Wanted posters. But if you're still curious, you might be able to hit up some of your Silvermane Guard friends —

C: 柜子里肯定有东西——或者说，必须得有。不然你费尽心思翻箱倒柜是为了什么？总不可能真是为了制造破坏吧？
E: There's definitely something in the closet — or rather, there must be. Otherwise, why are you spending so much energy rummaging through these closets? It can't be to cause actual damage, right?

C: 硬着头皮数。
E: Force yourself to count them.

C: 学习中……
E: Learning...

C: 你好，我是菲多拉的「情感互动」机器人，请多关照！
E: Hello, I'm Fidora's emotional interactive robot. Nice to meet you!

C: 不…这完全不明智。别碰它。
E: No... this is a bad idea. Not going to touch it.

C: 不用了，不就是钱么？
E: Nothing, really — it's just money.

C: 哎，这种乌烟瘴气的东西真的是…咳咳，你别盯着我看了，我得赶紧走了，回聊！
E: *sigh* This kind of indecency is really... Ahem, don't stare at me. I have to get back. Chat later!

C: 我再考虑一下…
E: Let me reconsider...

C: 无数个坚硬的锐物温柔地攀上了你的手指。这并不疼，因为它尽可能不伤害到你。它越抱越紧，很快，你的指关节感受到了微凉的吐息。
E: Countless hard and sharp objects gently crawl up your fingers. It doesn't hurt because it's being very careful not to hurt you. It grips tighter and tighter, until your knuckles soon feel a slight, cool breath.

C: 此处没有发生过任何事，此处最好没有发生过任何事，此处不该发生过任何事。
E: Nothing happened here. Nothing had better happened here. Nothing should have happened here.

C: 所以，你会掀起门帘看看吗？你很有可能在里面找到宝贝哦。很有可能。
E: So, will you roll up the curtain and take a peek? You're very likely to find some treasure inside. Very likely.

C: 「惋惜。故在信中妄陈鄙人……」
E: "...regret. Therefore, I venture to offer..."

C: 那当然了，要是无聊的工作，我才不会劳烦您出手呢。
E: Of course. If it's something mundane and boring, I wouldn't have asked you.

C: 没关系，我知道您会修理一些机巧，仙舟上这些机巧的原理都大差不差。
E: No worries. I know you can fix some ingenium items. The ingenia used on the Xianzhou are all pretty much the same.

C: 流云渡货道
E: Cloudford: Cargo Lane

C: 您把我当成什么人啦，哈哈哈哈。
E: Did I leave such a bad impression on you last time? Hahahaha

C: 总有一天会有用…但是你知道它现在毫无用处。
E: Someday... But right now, it's useless.

C: 也许，这一罐「鲛人泪」也许还能与人换到什么好宝贝，或者直接回「赎珠阁」，找瀚典掌柜换个好价钱？
E: Perhaps you can swap this jar for something special, or try your luck at the Jeweler's Pagoda — I'm sure Pawnbroker Handian will fetch you a good price?

C: 这可是个大版本更新啊，干脆就叫「枘凿六合<unbreak>2.0</unbreak>」吧。
E: This is a major update, so we may as well call this the Hexanexus <unbreak>2.0</unbreak>.

C: 你这…变化挺大。
E: It's a... big change.

C: 家族在处理这类问题时一向十分周到，可偏偏这次就…怪不得，怪不得那家伙会躲到白日梦酒店里去！他是害怕被猎犬家系的人给揪出来吧？
E: The Family is always very considerate when handling this kind of thing, but unfortunately this time... No wonder that guy went and hid in The Reverie! He's afraid of getting busted by the Bloodhound Family!

C: 好的，愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
E: Alright. I hope you have an enjoyable time in Penacony.

C: 你看看他们最近新上的片子，都是个什么玩意——
E: Just look at their latest crop of movies. What are they all about...

C: 我先走了，卡尔先生还在等我呢。哦对了，刚刚谢谢你哦，有机会请你大餐！
E: I'll be off then. Mr. Carl is still waiting for me. Oh yes, thanks very much for that just then. I'll have to treat you to a good meal next time!

C: 观众？哈，与其说他们有审美，不如说有种神经坏死的美。
E: The audience? Ha, it's not so much that they have aesthetic taste, insofar as it's a kind of nervous necrotic beauty.

C: 那还不转行？
E: Why don't you switch careers?

C: 她这种人啊，永远都不会知道「美梦」究竟是什么滋味…活该！
E: People like her will never know the feeling of "sweet dreams"... and it's all her fault!

C: 哎呀，那孩子给您添了什么麻烦吗？
E: *sigh* Did that kid cause any trouble for you?

C: 你拿到公司奖金了吗？
E: Did IPC pay out a bonus?

C: 这幅奇景勾起了我的兴趣——哪个无名客能拒绝探险的邀请呢？
E: The sight piqued my interest — which of the Nameless could ever refuse such an invitation to explore?

C: 哼，一看就是心里有鬼！她要真清白无辜，为什么不让我们进去？
E: Hmph, she's obviously guilty! If she really is innocent, then why wouldn't she let us in?

C: 总算消停了…我要的东西还在吗？
E: Finally, it's stopped... Is that thing I want still there?

C: 那时我们的食物足够饱腹，这些人只是想尝尝异星生物的味道罢了…屠刀落下前，我看见大毛湿润的眼眶流出了泪……
E: At the time, we already had enough food to feed ourselves — but these people just wanted to try a new exotic species... Before the butcher's knife fell, I could see tears welling up in Hairy's eyes...

C: 他因一己私欲害死了所有人。
E: He got everyone killed because of his selfishness.

C: 搭理班尼。
E: Respond to Benny.

C: 我听说那个叫班尼的负责人夸下海口，说是要打造一个闻所未闻的梦境都市。但是在我看来，他和他的团队鼓捣的还是老的那套东西，换汤不换药罢了。
E: I heard that Benny guy, the head of the project, boasted about creating a dreamscape metropolis that had never been seen before. But what he and his team are churning out seems nothing new to me. It's just old wine in a new bottle.

C: 一定要说的话…我给7分吧。如果是已经习惯了班尼那套虚拟现实设计思路的游客，说不定会挺乐在其中的？
E: If I must give his work a score... it's probably a seven-out-of-ten. Visitors who are used to Benny's usual virtual reality design might lap it up, right?

C: 家族的人请我们来建设城市，然后又要在背后对我们的工作评头论足……
E: The Family members hired us to build the city, but now they're nitpicking our work behind our back...

C: 这、这一定是费曼搞的鬼！怪不得他最近总和家族的人往来，他们一定是串通好的！
E: Th—This must be Feinman's doing! No wonder he's been contacting The Family a lot these days. They must be in cahoots!

C: 但是，朋友，别怕——特立独行在这地方可是不可多得的品质。在物欲横飞的世界里，坚持做自己可没那么容易！
E: That being said, don't be afraid, my friend! Being a maverick is a rare quality in this part of the world. I know, it's not easy to stay true to yourself!

C: 你最好记住我的名字，{F#姑娘}{M#小子}…我叫艾默里奇，是个发明家。
E: Well, you'd better remember my name, {F#lass}{M#lad}... I'm Emmrich, an inventor.

C: 你都发明了什么？
E: What have you invented?

C: 皮皮西人的四肢跃动起来。你从他的肢体动作中读出了热情、欢畅，还有些…狂妄。
E: The Pepeshi's limbs leap up. You read enthusiasm, jubilation, and some... hubris in his body movements.

C: ——撕、撕不下来？！这到底是什么邪术？
E: Wh—What? I can't rip it up!? What kind of sorcery is this?

C: 广告牌不再聒噪，你的内心也感觉空落落的——为了那个自私自利的大发明家，你居然下了如此狠手。
E: The billboard is not making sounds anymore, and it's making you feel bad. You can't believe you went to such lengths for that selfish inventor.

C: 「为了公正和进步」哪去了？
E: But I thought it was all about "justice and progress"?

C: 艾默里奇摆出了那副标志性的得意神态——令人生厌，但却和他本人的形象非常适配。
E: Emmrich puts on his signature annoying smirk, which suits him well.

C: …你、原来你和他们都一样！
E: You... You're just like everyone else!

C: …啊，我不是那个意思，科蒂！我向你保证，我们未来的二十分之一人生也注定与美好相随……
E: ...Oh, wait, Coty! That's not what I meant! I assure you, the next one-twentieth of our lives will be filled with wonderful things too...

C: 现在的艺人真是娇气…
E: Artists these days are so delicate...

C: 你对经纪人这行感兴趣吗？这可是个苦差事，天天给娇生惯养的少爷小姐们规划前程、拉拢资源，让他们在台前受尽吹捧，这些白眼狼还不一定能领你的情。
E: Ever thought about becoming a manager? It's a tough business. You've got to plan the future for those spoiled young people, hustle for resources, and shower them with compliments on stage. And sometimes, those ungrateful brats don't even appreciate it!

C: 但她不明白，有些事对我来说比前途更重要。
E: But she doesn't understand that some things matter more to me than my career.

C: 犯下了这种罪过，我已经没脸自称什么明星经纪人了。或许，我确实该放弃这份工作了……
E: I've messed up too badly to continue calling myself a celebrity agent. Perhaps I really should give up on this career...

C: 可恶！要不是现在的市场审美如此狭隘，我和艺者们何必如此痛苦！
E: My talents and I wouldn't suffer so much if the current market didn't have such a narrow taste when it comes to art!

C: 想想就反胃…
E: That's a nauseating thought...

C: 真是太荒唐了，最俗套的曲调配上几种冷门乐器，套上一个故事作为包装，居然就成了他们口中的艺术瑰宝。
E: It's absurd how the most banal melodies, coupled with some obscure instruments and a contrived narrative, can be hailed as artistic masterpieces.

C: 但我已经决定了要走这样的路，如果您讨厌我，还请做好心理准备——因为我将会更加努力地出现在公众视野中，成为一名尽人皆知的歌手。
E: But I have made my decision. So, if you despise me, be prepared. I will work even harder to gain public attention and become a singer known by everyone.

C: 是啊，艺术的追求、家乡的遗产、纯美的信仰…这都是我用来哄骗自己的空话，从一开始，我歌唱的理由便是为了听众们的追捧。
E: Yes, the pursuit of art, the legacy of my homeland, and the faith for the Beauty... They were all mere empty words I used to deceive myself. In truth, I sang solely for the admiration of the audience right from the start.

C: 没错…我一定会成为家喻户晓的巨星，让众人跪拜在我的裙下！
E: Indeed... I will become a household name, a superstar, with crowds bowing at my feet!

C: 不过，在梦里跳楼就像试图用气球砸死自己一样——全无可能。
E: Nonetheless, ending your life by jumping off a building in a dream is like trying to kill yourself with a balloon — Absolutely impossible.

C: 好，我们可以聊聊过去的时光和死去的朋友们。
E: Sure, we can talk about our past and friends who have passed away.

C: 不，我不是那个意思……
E: Please allow me to explain...

C: 我的取材对象是有着「白日梦酒店最强」之称的猎犬薇丝普——一个平日里不苟言笑、深不可测的强者。
E: Her name is Whisper, a member of the Bloodhound Family known as "The Reverie Titan." She's a formidable figure who rarely smiles and is difficult to fathom.

C: 人们在现实认识垃圾、记住垃圾，也会在梦里产生垃圾的意象。正如人们无需在梦中进食，却依然可以开办餐馆、发明食物……
E: When people see trash in the real world and remember it, images of the trash will be generated in their dreams. Although people don't have to eat in dreams, they can still run restaurants and create new recipes there...

C: 智械播放了一段系统录音……
E: The Intellitron plays a system recording...

C: 好啊，辛苦你了。
E: Sure, thank you very much.

C: 我还记得那一天…那时我还只是一个小小的酒店管家，还从未踏入过这间公馆。那一天，家主毫无征兆地来到了我的面前。
E: I can still remember the day... Back then, I was just a lowly hotel butler who'd never set foot in this pavilion. That day, the family head came and approached me with no notice or warning.

C: …对，因为我没有选择。下达那个命令的甚至并非橡木的家主…而是在他之上的梦主本人。
E: ...Yes, because I had no other choice. That order didn't even come from the Oak Family head... but rather from their overlord, the Dreammaster.

C: 现实中的他们还在沉睡，一直都没有醒来。或许等到哪一天，等到梦主认为他们已经赎清了罪过…我们还能再次相遇，相拥……
E: In reality, they're still asleep in a never-ending slumber. Perhaps one day, when the Dreammaster considers their sins as being redeemed... perhaps we'll be able to meet again and hold one another...

C: 我把手伸向天空，一只绿色的小鸟落在我的指尖。那缕温暖的阳光宛若松脂，它凝结了时光，也定格了我们三人的笑容……
E: I reached my hand out toward the sky and a small, green bird landed on my fingertip. That warm sunshine was like golden resin, preserving us at that moment and fixing the smiles on our faces...

C: 有什么好事吗？
E: Good news, I take it?

C: 虽然不至于，但也不会亏待你的。
E: It's not quite that, but I'll be sure to make it worth your while.

C: 侮辱我个人可以，但如果有谁对大家的劳动成果指手画脚，我绝不允许。
E: It's fine if you want to insult me. But I will never stand for people criticizing everyone else's hard work.

C: 什么？那个战争贩子是怎么找回情绪的？这可是紧急事故，快带我们过去。
E: What? How did that warmonger find her emotions again? This is an emergency. Take us to her now.

C: 你！你才脑子有问题，我清醒得很！
E: You! You've got a screw loose! I'm fully sober!

C: 在梦境里，那东西比粘在鞋底的牛皮糖还要难缠。若不是家族和诸位贵客及时出手，后果将不堪设想。
E: In the Dreamscape, that thing is even more difficult to get rid of than gum on the bottom of your shoe. I can't imagine what would have happened if it were not for you and The Family.

C: 希望这能让他好受一些吧……
E: I hope that these words of mine will make him feel slightly better...

C: …以上，希望能解开那只小鸟的心结。老鸟就先回大树了，还有其他小鸟也需要照顾咕。
E: ...That's all. I hope this will help the fledgling with his troubles. I'll return to the Great Tree now. There are other fledglings in need of my care too, hoot.

C: 唉，腰又开始疼了。你说我一天到晚生这气图什么……
E: *sigh* My back is starting to hurt again. Tell me, of what use is this anger I feel every day...

C: 他说只要假以时日，自己肯定能成为这个细分领域的头部主播，不负自己「折纸大学派对王」的头衔。
E: He says that given time, he'll definitely become the top streamer in this niche industry. That way, he'll truly live up to his title of "Paperfold University's Party King."

C: 工地上最常见的容器，有时被工人们用来藏匿贵重物品。
E: The most common container on construction sites. These barrels are occasionally used by workers to conceal their valuables.

C: 哈哈，说得对。贝洛伯格的人民从不惧怕纷争。
E: Haha, quite right! The people of Belobog do not fear battle!

C: 没想到这趟班站了这么久，早知道就该吃了饭再来。
E: I didn't realize I'd be standing so long on this shift. I'd have eaten before I came if I knew!

C: 空艇上虽然风景美丽，但安全总是第一位的啾！
E: While the view from the airship is stunning, safety always takes priority, tweet!

C: 别站那么高，很危险的，快下来！
E: Don't go so high up, it's dangerous! Come down here!

C: 它将你带到了它心心念念的「王座」面前。
E: It brings you to the throne it adores.

C: 你去过那么多地方，肯定见多识广。你的意见，我们听。
E: You've been to so many places, I'm sure you must be experienced and knowledgeable. We will listen to your insights.

C: 没有。
E: No!

C: 好极了，我们开始吧。
E: Great, let's begin.

C: 这种机枪既是武器又是工具，一轮扫射下去，整片森林都会变成木材——重建工作肯定需要木材。
E: A machine gun like this is both a weapon and a tool. With one spray of this gun, an entire forest becomes timber... Reconstruction naturally needs timber.

C: 这是一种螺旋状的金属钻头，可以开采地表下的地髓或其他矿石，也可以用于挖掘隧道、打通山峰。
E: This is a spiral-shaped metal drill bit, it can be used to collect underground Geomarrow and other ores, as well as dig tunnels to allow for passage through the mountains.

C: 这次是「公司」，下次又会是什么？哪怕没法反击，我们也要有自保的能力才行。
E: For now, it's the IPC, but what will it be next time? Even if we cannot fight back, we must be able to protect ourselves.

C: 对于造物引擎这样庞大的机器来说，强劲的动力是最重要的。液化提纯后的地髓蕴含着极大的能量，足以在短时间内满足造物引擎的高功率消耗。
E: For a giant machine like the Engine of Creation, power is absolutely crucial. Geomarrow that has been purified and liquidized contains a great amount of energy that can meet the high power consumption of the Engine of Creation over a short time.

C: 我也快晕了。
E: I'm going to faint.

C: 因为钟表小子就是有长鼻子的啾，其他地方的海报都画的不够长啾。
E: Because Clockie has a long nose, tweet. Posters everywhere else don't draw its nose long enough, tweet.

C: 啾……吓死鸟了，还以为要被压成平纸了啾。
E: Tweet... You scared me half to death. I thought I was gonna be crushed flat.

C: 看来这个位置还是不够隐蔽啾…
E: Looks like this spot isn't concealed enough, tweet...

C: 不用站岗了啾。
E: No need to stand guard anymore, tweet.

C: 你看，要是没有我的话，恐龙先生的头不就…不就和石头老板一样光溜溜的了吗？多可怜啊啾！
E: You see, if not for me, Mr. Dinosaur's head would... would likely become like Boss Stone's head — shiny and smooth! How pitiful, tweet!

E: (Found all the origami birds. Time to head back to the Great Tree to report to Dr. Blues...)

C: 去吧，把那些不争气的小家伙们叫回大树——也请顺便看看，有没有其他混进小屋的坏蛋「球棒侠」吧！
E: Go forth and call those disappointing little ones back to the Great Tree! Also, take a look around this place to see if other baddies like that Baseballer snuck in!

C: 小镇里很安全，但小镇外有很多坏人，虎视眈眈想霸占美梦小镇！靠近边缘的筑巢区很危险，在下平常都不让其他小鸟们过来的啾。
E: The town itself is safe, but the area outside of town is filled with baddies. They are all eyeing Dreamville, looking to occupy it! The border near the nesting zone is very dangerous. I usually don't allow any birds to come close, tweet.

C: 唔呣…那些孩子捉迷藏时都有固定的躲藏地点，但在下怎么也想不起来了啾…
E: Hmm... When these children play hide-and-seek, they always have specific hiding spots, but I can't seem to remember them, tweet...

C: 广场上的宝石也被偷走不少，本公子的助手也被石头老板吓跑了啾…
E: Many of the gems in the plaza have also been stolen, and my assistants have been scared off by Boss Stone, tweet...

C: 呼哇，助手们居然都回来了~您就是修复金叶广场的最大功臣啾！
E: Wow, all the helpers have returned! You're the biggest contributor to the Goldleaf Plaza's renovation, tweet!

C: 嗯哼，本公子快要想起来了啾……
E: Mhmm, I'm fast remembering it now, tweet...

C: 哼哼…没错，有个迷迷糊糊的助手在去过小镇宾馆后，总在幻想<color=#dbc291ff>自己是一条飞在天上的鱼</color>……或许是有什么和鱼相关的东西吸引了它呢？啾？
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a muddle-headed helper who, after going to the Town Hotel, fantasizes that <color=#dbc291ff>it's a fish that can fly</color>... Maybe something about fish has gotten its attention? Tweet?

C: 哼哼哼…来得正是时候！
E: Hmm... You're just in time!

C: ——呀！我的雕像怎么又变秃了啾！！
E: ...Ah! Why is my statue completely bare, tweet!!

E: I will give my all, for the honor of the origami birds!

C: 美梦小镇最受欢迎的地方——
E: The most popular place in Dreamville...

C: 这有什么关联吗…
E: Is there a connection there...?

C: 钟表公园？
E: Clock Garden?

C: 哼哼~尽请期待本公子的华丽新作吧~
E: Hmm~ I hope you will look forward to my outstanding new masterpiece~

C: 朋友，我这颗明星，有没有让你悸动不已啾？
E: My friend, did this superstar make your heart skip a beat, tweet?

E: Tweet, my friend, are you here for the showdown too? Who do you think is gonna win, tweet?

C: 能和钟表小子同台演出，我也是明星小鸟了啾。
E: I was able to perform with Clockie on the same stage, I'm a superstar birdie too, tweet.

E: How are you anything like Brother Hanu? I may be a bird, but I am not birdbrained, tweet.

E: The show has been canceled.

C: 万一黑洞也会飞呢？
E: What if the black hole can fly too?

C: 猩猩碾压恐龙！
E: The gorilla overwhelmed the dinosaur!

C: 我就是甜猿泰山，嗷呜！
E: I'm the Sweet Gorilla, rawr!

C: 你说的对……
E: You're right...

C: 哇，我也想喝苏乐达！
E: Wow, I also want a SoulGlad!

C: 猫头鹰老师会发现的啾！
E: Professor Owl will find out!

C: 他看不到的啾啾。
E: He can't see it, tweet tweet!

C: ...又来这套？
E: ...This old trick again?

C: 是啊，我都在这里等多久了？快点把游戏奖励发给我。
E: Yes! I've been waiting here ages! Give me my game rewards.

C: {NICKNAME}大人，我其实是你最最忠实的粉丝啊！
E: Great {NICKNAME}! I am actually your most loyal fan!

C: （为它指引回家的路）
E: (Point out the way home for it)

C: 机巧鸟在说话间整只鸟身为之一振，像是受到了极大的鼓舞。这句话才刚说完，它的鸟头便「啪」地一声倒地，任你如何触摸也不再有回应。
E: The cycrane speaks with great strain, as if it knows its borrowed time is running out. Just as it finishes its words, the cycrane's head greets the ground with a resounding crash, and now it no longer responds to your touch.

C: 都说了让你先别说话，鑫鑫，我只是正在思考现状罢了。
E: Hold on, Xinxin. I'm still trying to figure out the current situation.

C: 小鱼按照信上说的，随身携带这个石板，果然能听见「无言之声」引导我前行，可厉害了！
E: So I followed the instructions and carried the tablet with me, and I actually heard the Sound of Silence guiding me! This is amazing!

C: 小鱼将那块随身携带的旧石板递给了你。
E: Xiaoyu hands you the stone tablet she's been carrying with her.

C: 你看清周围仿佛是雪夜，这里不是仙舟罗浮，一辆失控的汽车跌跌撞撞，在湿滑的地面上难以自我控制，它不出意料地撞向了你，你飞向了半空中……
E: As you take in your surroundings, you find yourself in a snowy night and realize that you are no longer on the Xianzhou Luofu. Suddenly, a car loses control on the slippery road, careening towards you with terrifying speed and sending you hurling through the air...

C: 吉吉吉吉…
E: Weal, weal, weal...

C: 这「高筋面粉」你认识是某种食材，或许是某种食补方子，又或者是面粉在拳法中有什么特殊含义。拳法，面粉，刹那间你脑海中闪过了一个熟悉的身影——
E: This "high gluten flour" sounds like a food. Perhaps it's a nutritional supplement, or perhaps it's got a special meaning in boxing. Boxing... flour... Suddenly, a familiar figure pops into your mind:

C: 我可以再听一会……
E: Sure, I can keep listening...

C: 别叫了，没人能听见的。
E: Stop shouting. Nobody can hear you.

C: 不麻烦的，咱们就学你刚听的这首《合巹记》。
E: It's not difficult. Let's just learn that one song you just heard then: Wedding Wine.

C: 请你把我带过去，可以吗？
E: Ferry me across, please?

C: 你的产能够做<unbreak>900</unbreak>个谜题吗？
E: Do you even have the capacity to do <unbreak>900</unbreak> puzzles?

C: 你又找到我了！我都快习惯了。
E: You found me again! I've come to expect this now...

C: 你是说智械撞车那件事？我的评价是铁头讹豪车——想钱想疯了。
E: You mean the Intellitron that hit that car? I think the tin was scamming that Raptor. Must've been insane with wanting money!

C: 这样啊……
E: I see...

C: 但她最后还是离开了，不是吗？就算有了我，就算有了一个完整的家……
E: But she still left in the end, didn't she? Even with me, even with a complete family...

C: 我想她一定有自己的理由。至于为什么她没有告诉我，我不清楚。但我不愿相信她会如此绝情，她不是那样的人，绝对不是。她一定还爱着你，小佩。
E: I believe she must have had her own reasons. As for why she could not tell me, I am uncertain. But I do not believe that she did it out of heartlessness. She is not that kind of person. There is no way. I know that she loves you, Pennie.

C: 我一直笨手笨脚的…
E: I'm so clumsy...

C: 离开前，能否请您带我去梦境各处逛逛，呆得久了，临走时竟还有些舍不得。
E: Before we leave, can I ask you to take me to walk around the dreamscape? I have been here so long now, I am almost a little reluctant to leave.

C: 还记得我吗？
E: Do you remember me?

C: 还请您相信我的判断，因为我看过太多类似的故事了。那些故事的结局往往都是相同的一幕：被摔得粉碎的玻璃渣，还有洒了一地、只能引来虫豸啜饮的廉价液体。
E: Trust me, as I've seen too many stories like this. They all tend to end with the same scene — shards of broken glass are scattered everywhere, and cheap liquid that only attracts insects is spilled all over the floor.

C: …呃，怎么了，你不开心？但是你不是很喜欢那些场合吗？
E: ...Um, are you upset? Don't you love attending those occasions?

C: 能找到此等绝品，我果真没看错你。
E: You were able to find such a masterpiece, I knew I was right to trust you.

C: 我敢打包票，哪怕是猫头鹰老师来了，多半也撑不过三杯。
E: I would wager that not even Professor Owl themselves would be able to handle more than three glasses!

C: 原味兄所言极是，但有一点需要补充。
E: You are correct, Brother Original-Flavor, but there is one thing I might add.

C: 希望真相确实如你所想的那样，因为它生前是一位正直的侦探——它值得真相，也值得这个轰轰烈烈的结局。
E: Let's hope that the truth is indeed what you think because they lived as an honest and upright detective... They deserve the truth and a spectacular ending.

C: 我来了，{NICKNAME}。这是要我…合影么？
E: I'm here, {NICKNAME}. You want... to take a picture together?

C: 用镜头记录眼前的一瞬…真是新奇的体验。
E: Using a lens to record a moment before your very eyes... What a novel experience!

C: 到了我们的地盘，是走是留，你说的可就不算了——过路费，<unbreak>2000</unbreak>苜蓿币。
E: You're on our turf. To stay or go ain't your call no more... You gotta pay the toll. Hand over <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits.

C: 现在谈这些已经来不及了，没气的苏乐达就只是瓶发腻的糖浆，但我有个古典主义的方法。
E: There's no time for such things now. A bottle of SoulGlad that has lost its fizz is nothing more than a bottle of gross syrup. But, I have a more traditional solution.

C: {F#姐}{M#哥}，我已经做好觉悟了，让咱们速战速决。
E: {F#Madam}{M#Sir}, I am prepared. Let us make this a swift battle!

C: 「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
E: "What would that vibrant world look like?"

C: 「时间的芬芳啊，你闻到了吗？」
E: "Can you smell the fragrance of time?"

C: 等等，忘记跟您说了…目前可供放映的剩余次数仅有一次。因为压缩梦泡的制作不易，成品是限量供应的。目前我们这儿只剩下一盘，其他的还在等待发货。
E: Ah, I almost forgot to mention this, but we can only do one projection currently. Manufacturing compressed dream bubbles is a highly demanding process, so there's only a limited supply available. We only have one bubble left now. The rest will take time to ship.

C: 不过…现在回看…有点奇怪，为什么{NICKNAME}的记忆会是这种旁观的角度？
E: Although looking back now... That's weird. How come we're looking at {NICKNAME}'s memory in the third person's perspective?

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 没等你们开始打起来，高冷的逃犯双腿一软再也站不起来了。
E: Just as you're about to engage, the aloof fugitive's knees go so weak she sinks to the ground.

C: 你看见这三人被再次押往幽狱深处，一场小小风波就此结束了。
E: You watch on as the three are once again banished to the depths of The Shackling Prison, marking an end to this minor kerfuffle.

C: 结果根本就没有爬上建木吗？
E: So, you didn't get to climb the Ambrosial Arbor in the end?

C: 要是你的肚子里也有原子炉就没有这些烦恼了。
E: If only you have an atomic furnace in your stomach too. Then, we wouldn't have any problems.

C: 你还是停一停吧，不然咱们得去丹鼎司了。
E: I think you'd better take a break. Otherwise, we'll be visiting the Alchemy Commission next.

C: 没法解释，就要怪鬼魂了吗？
E: Are ghosts really to be blamed just because some things cannot be explained?

C: 我是唯物主义智械！
E: I'm a materialistic Intellitron!

C: 走吧，小心别死在里边。
E: Let's get cracking. Take care of yourself in there.

C: （看看这附近有没有适合插入玉兆的地方好了……）
E: (I just need to look around for a place where the jade abacus can fit...)

C: 眼下有个危险的犯人劫持了一名七百多岁的…老者。奇怪，仙舟上向来也不会强调七百岁能有多老来着……
E: There is a dangerous criminal that has taken a seven-hundred-year old... old man hostage. Strange, would anyone on the Xianzhou really stress that a seven-hundred-year old was an old man...?

C: 还未等你同意或拒绝，那位云骑便从你的视线中消失了。现在整个世界只留下你一个人去应对这扇门。
E: The Cloud Knight disappeared in front of your very eyes before you even had time to say no. Now, you are the only person left to face this mysterious door.

C: 不必，我一人足矣。
E: There is no need. I can handle this alone.

C: 任何招数都躲不开我的法眼，你不要小看我！
E: No technique can escape my discerning eyes. Do not underestimate me!

C: 住口，你劫持我家爷爷，早就失去交涉的权利了！
E: Silence. You kidnapped our grandfather, and you lost the right to negotiate a long time ago!

C: *仙舟粗口*，完犊子了…啊！
E: *Xianzhou profanity*, this is bad... Agh!

C: *仙舟粗口*，完犊子了…啊！
E: *Xianzhou profanity*, this is bad... Agh!

C: 当然没问题！
E: Not a problem!

C: 还是算了吧…
E: I think we should forget it...

C: 这是正义的惩罚！
E: These are your just deserts!

C: 都是老演员了，我相信它们。
E: They're all veterans, and I trust them.

C: 我们的故事到这里就要结束了吗，观众们能接受如此平铺直叙的剧情吗？票房撑得住吗？
E: Will our story call it a day here? Will the audience accept such an obvious plot? Will ticket sales be able to hang in there?

C: 我抓住了那颗星星，却摔得粉碎……
E: I caught that star, but it fell to pieces...

C: 好吧，名人是非多，你也该学着去习惯这种生活了。
E: All right. Fame comes with its fair share of drama. It's about time you get used to this life.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 你正准备转身一探究竟，口袋里却有陌生的响动，沉甸甸的质感与货币碰撞的声音令你背后一寒。
E: Just as you're about to turn around and investigate the situation, you feel a strange noise ringing in your pocket. The heaviness, texture, and unmistakable sound of jingling coins cause a chill to run down your spine.

C: 说明您喜欢红色。
E: It means you like red.

C: 桌上的宣传单吸引了你的注意，你依稀记得，它邀请你进行一场「心理测试」。
E: The flyer on the table catches your attention. You can vaguely remember that it invited you for a psychological assessment.

C: 看起来你确实累坏了。请尽情休息吧，没有人会打扰你的。
E: You look exhausted. Please have a good rest. No one will disturb you.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: …原来我在{NICKNAME}眼中是有幽默感的人吗？
E: ...So, {NICKNAME}, you think I'm funny?

C: 哲学思考。
E: Philosophical thinking.

C: 吼吼，很沉痛的回答，见者伤心，闻者落泪呐！可惜可惜，这样的道具只能放在自己的背包里，不能送给别人，这不是正确答案。
E: Ho-ho, a poignant answer. Those who see it are saddened, and those who hear it are tearing up! Alas, such an artifact should only be left in your own bag, never to be gifted to someone else. This is not the right answer.

C: 是什么呢？是寄丢的东西吗？
E: What could it be? A lost package?

C: 吼吼，信使弄丢的东西，根本还没来得及送到收信人手里吧？怎么能算作「在他人手中」？可惜可惜，这不是正确答案。
E: Ho-ho, a parcel lost by a messenger never made it into the receiver's hands in the first place! How can that be considered "in their hands"? Alas, this is a wrong answer.

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?

C: 猫头鹰老师。
E: Professor Owl.

C: 猜不透，还是问问别人？
E: I'm stumped. Ask someone?

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 试着自己想想。
E: Try thinking about it yourself.

C: 遐蝶，现在有空吗？
E: Castorice, are you free now?

C: 也许<color=#dbc291ff>明天</color>会收到大家对此的回复吧。
E: Maybe if you check <color=#dbc291ff>tomorrow</color>, people will have written replies to this.

C: 讲讲你的故事？
E: Tell me your story.

C: 我能有什么好处吗？
E: What do I get from this?

C: 看来，眼前的这个桶既不聪明也不勤劳，在垃圾桶中也堪称极品了。
E: Looks like this trashcan is neither smart nor diligent — a rare quality among trashcans.

C: 啧，没品味的东西……
E: Tsk, talk about bad taste...

C: 谁会喜欢那个啊？我真是看走眼了才会觉得你懂梦境！
E: Who would find that appealing? I was so wrong to think that you would understand the true meaning of the Dreamscape!

C: 不用怕，迷途的羔羊，你不是第一个误闯禁地的{M#少年}{F#少女}。
E: Worry not, lost lamb. You're not the first {M#boy}{F#girl} to accidentally stumble onto this forbidden ground.

C: 重振帮派荣光！
E: May the glory of the clan be revived!

C: 小友，此去一别，便不知何时才能相见…听说有个新的垃圾站，现在还没被其他垃圾桶占据，老夫就先走一步了。
E: Little friend, who knows when we'll meet again with this farewell... I hear there's a new trash depot that hasn't been occupied by other trashcans. I'll take my leave first.

C: 感谢师傅怜悯，放我入门拜师学艺。师傅你这身手当真了得，跟你切磋过之后，我感觉…我突然有很多感悟…浑身都在发烫，怎么回事？
E: Thank you for your great compassion in accepting me as your disciple, Master. After a bout with you, I have finally realized how incredible your skills are. In this instant, I am suddenly overcome by emotion... Wait, my entire body is heating up. What's going on?

C: 我承认我在目前这个阶段，身体是垃圾桶的造型，但谁知道我下一秒会是什么呢？你给我下定义…这也太武断了！
E: Well, I admit that as of this moment, my body does look like a trashcan. However, who knows what it might change to in just a while? How can you make such a subjective judgment of me right now!

C: 桶盖？这可是分院的盖！入学流程岂是儿戏，要对学校的传统心怀敬意！
E: Trashcan cover? It's a sorting lid! The admission process isn't some child's play, respect the school's tradition, every step of the way!

C: 回忆第一封回信。
E: Recall the first reply sent.

C: {NICKNAME}也对小海豹感兴趣吗？
E: Do you also happen to be interested in baby seal, {NICKNAME}?

C: 还是算了。
E: Forget it.

C: 阳光带来丝丝缕缕的暖意，隔着衣裳浸染肌肤……
E: The sunlight seeps through your clothes, wrapping your skin in a gentle warmth...

C: 听说在某些小角落打盹的话，会被小精灵施加沉睡的魔咒，就此长眠不醒呢。
E: They say if you doze off in certain hidden corners, fairies might cast a sleeping spell on you, and you'd never wake up again.

C: 抱抱。
E: Hug time.

C: 有时它会衔来好看的落叶，有时它会跃入水中，和小海豹碰一碰。
E: Sometimes it'll bring back pretty fallen leaves, and sometimes it'll leap into the water to nuzzle the baby seals.

C: 回过神来，木架已经快摆满了。相信有朝一日，整座哀丽秘榭都会变成花海！
E: By the time you snap out of it, the wooden shelves are nearly full. One day, maybe the whole of Aedes Elysiae will bloom into a sea of flowers!

C: 想要影响我的认知还不被我察觉…哪怕是同谐的令使也未必做得到。
E: Manipulating my cognition without my awareness... that might be beyond even an Emanator of Harmony.

C: 鲁珀特二世所拥的诸多权杖中，以反生命程式驱动、专司于模拟万千文明毁灭路径的巨型系统……
E: A colossal system among Emperor Rubert II's collection of scepters, operated by antilife equations and created to simulate destruction scenarios for innumerable civilizations...

C: 螺丝，你在哪儿见过这等不祥之物？
E: Screwy, where did you come across such a sinister artifact?

C: 逻辑：若来古士为翁法罗斯打造的防火墙与帝皇权杖的自卫机制相似，那么识刻锚也应当对其起效。
E: Logic: If the firewall Lygus created for Amphoreus is similar to the Emperor's Scepter's self-defense mechanism, then the Chronocognitive Anchor should be effective against it as well.

C: 果然被发现啦。你知道吗？捉迷藏是检验两个人心有灵犀的最佳方式哦。
E: Knew you'd find me. Hide-and-Seek's the best way to see if two people are truly connected.

C: 对，恪守职责当然是好习惯，但仔细想想，探索未知的区域怎么就不能算是一种「开拓」呢？
E: That's right. It is only proper to maintain one's professional responsibilities. However, if you think about it, isn't exploring the unknown a form of "Trailblazing" in itself?

C: 咯噔——你感受到了明显的震动，有人正在搬动你藏身其中的这匹木马。不知道他们此行的目的地是哪，这个时候你最好……
E: Clunk! You sense an obvious tremor. Someone has come to transport the wooden horse that you are now hiding inside. You have no idea where they could be taking you, so right now it would be best to...

C: 快走吧，雅努斯不欢迎停驻不前的人！
E: Be gone then — Janus does not like those who stay stagnant!

C: 给我讲讲那些神驹吧。
E: Tell me of the other divine foals.

C: 不要小瞧「开拓」的力量啊！
E: Never underestimate the power of "Trailblaze"!

C: 是的，尚有余裕的昔日，你用微不足道的代价换回的一丝柴薪，如今将把微渺的火光接续。
E: Yes, in the days when time was still abundant, the small bundle of firewood you once obtained at a trivial cost will now carry on the faint glimmer of the flame.

C: 这个名词闯进你的脑海，有些突兀。你摸了摸背包，好像没有。
E: The term suddenly bursts into your mind, feeling somewhat out of place. You check your backpack, but it doesn't seem to be there.

C: 也让那些英勇的、光荣的颂歌得以写就。
E: And for allowing those brave and glorious hymns to be written.

C: 佩佩看上去兴致不错，是个和它拉近关系的好机会——
E: Peppy looks in good spirits. This is a good opportunity to build a closer relationship with it—

C: 你平日里也会给大家做心理疏导么？
E: Do you usually do psychological counseling for everyone?

C: 你说的那位大人是谁？
E: Who is the lord you were talking about?

C: 日后，明德也还要多多仰仗小友。
E: In the future, there is much I must rely on you for.

C: 造成这场袭击的原因是多方面的：防护不力，内外勾结……
E: There are many reasons behind this attack: Collusion, lack of defensive power...

C: 根据指南显示，这些地方都曾发现军团余孽……
E: According to the guide, remnants of the Legion have been spotted in these areas...

C: 我的兄弟，我的同胞。请允许我做一下自我介绍。
E: My brethern, my compatriot, please allow me to introduce myself.

C: 问得很好！只有理清了行动的本真理念，才会达成真正的互相理解。
E: Good question! Only by understanding the motives behind the actions can mutual understanding be truly achieved.

C: 如果有什么关于密卷科文档的事情想要咨询，我应该还能帮上点忙。
E: If you have any questions about files of the Department of Insight, I should be able to help you.

C: 人偶没有回应，看来黑塔本人并不在线。
E: No reaction from the puppet, looks like Herta hasn't come online yet.

C: 我想找你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 好吧…回去的时候路上小心些，这附近的区域还没清理干净，外面也很危险。
E: Alright... Please be careful on your way back, as the nearby areas have yet to be thoroughly cleaned, and it's quite dangerous outside.

C: 你是在寻找阮•梅吗？
E: Are you looking for Ruan Mei?

C: 啊！当然！我可是阿德勒！你不要把我和界种科某些办不成事的大人相提并论。
E: You bet! I'm Adler, you know? Don't put me in the same category as the incompetent nincompoops at the Department of Ecology.

C: 兄弟！你胡编乱造的本事，就连扎格列斯的信徒也要自叹不如啊！
E: Hey! Even Zagreus' disciples will blush at your ability to lie through your teeth!

C: 很奇怪，得仔细检查。
E: How strange. This requires thorough inspection.

C: 算了吧，感觉有点危险…
E: Forget it. Something doesn't feel right about this...

C: 很好，你的回答极其详尽。那么我又要发问了：你所述说的阿卡索斯城，与我所知的那座城邦是否为同一物？请别急着反驳，仔细思考我的提问。
E: Very good. Such detailed answers. Then allow me to ask you one more thing: This city of Icatus that you speak of... Is it the same as the city that I know of? Do not rush to refute me. Think carefully about what it is that I am asking.

C: 欧洛尼斯执掌记忆权柄，完全有能力虚构你的过往。帕门弥德，别太认真了。
E: Oronyx holds power over our memories and is completely capable of fabricating our past. Parmenides, you must not place too much weight on such things.

C: 还有谁会去探究真理，改变世界？怀疑看似绝对正确，却无法带来任何收益。为了向前走，为了更好的生活，我们需要信念。
E: Who would still go in search of truth and transform the world? Though suspicion can seem absolutely certain, it cannot bring us any benefits at all. We require faith to keep moving forward and create a better life.

C: 哈、哈哈哈——活该！真是活该！塔兰顿在上…这是他应得的！
E: Ha... Hahaha... Serves him right! It really does! By Talanton's grace... that's what he deserves!

C: 塔兰顿不会放过任何罪人…他是活该！
E: Talanton will spare no sinner... He deserves it!

C: 容我再思考一番…
E: Let me think about it...

C: 你们的恋情，她的父母已经知道了！
E: Her parents already know about your affair!

C: 太好了，您来了我可就有指望了。
E: Great, now that you're here, maybe there's hope for me.

C: 这…果然……
E: This... just as I feared...

C: 所以，你打算怎么办？
E: So, what are you going to do?

C: …嗯？你是…哦，是你啊。你怎么在这？这地方不太安全，最好别停留太久。
E: Eh? Who's... oh, it's you. What brings you to this place? It's not safe here — best not linger.

C: 那你能帮个忙吗？帮我找找这附近有没有那个老头子留下的东西——算我欠你个人情，价钱什么的也都好说……
E: If so, could you help me out? Check if the old man left anything behind — I'll owe you one, and we can discuss payment...

C: 包在我身上！
E: You can count on it!

C: …呸！什么叫无处可去…就真老糊涂了是吧？瞎话都不会编了……
E: Nowhere to go? What nonsense! Has he truly lost his mind? Can't even make up a decent excuse...

C: 哈…当初就不该妥协，直接把人绑回圣城得了…花大价钱买到的房子，就在市集和浴场中间，去哪都方便，还特意给他在院子里整了个小图书馆……
E: Gods, I should've just dragged him back home with me... I got him this perfect house, right between the marketplace and the baths. Premium location, didn't spare any expense. Even built him a private library in the courtyard...

C: 别说这种话！
E: Don't say that!

C: 等我大展宏图！
E: Just you wait for my masterpiece!

C: 啊？他也太那个了吧？
E: Hmm? Is he too... y'know?

C: 大概就这些。
E: That's about all I've got.

C: 呵，我们…这些被留下来的悬锋人，也何尝不是如此呢？
E: Heh. And we, the Kremnoans left behind — aren't we the same?

C: 我们…哎，让你看笑话了。
E: We... made a fool of ourselves in front of you.

C: 去找我们的王，去需要我们的地方。这里不欢迎，我们离开便是。
E: Let's find our king, and go to where we're needed. If we're unwelcome here, then we'll leave.

C: *唐突地清嗓*发言快结束了，你要仔细分辨。
E: *Suddenly clear throat* The address is almost over, be sure to make good judgment.

C: 那个，可以拜托你去和守卫大叔沟通一下吗，他看上去有些凶，我不敢过去……
E: Um, would you mind talking to the guard? He looks kinda scary, and I'm too scared to approach...

C: 不如这样，贵宾：明天的门扉时，你再带这个小女孩过来。那会儿人少，只要你快去快回就不会出问题…但愿吧。
E: Let's do this, honored guest: Come back tomorrow at the Entry Hour with the girl. Fewer people will be around then. As long as you're quick, there shouldn't be any trouble... hopefully.

C: 在这里说话…刻法勒一定能听见了吧。
E: If we speak here... surely Kephale can hear us now, right?

C: 它说：我是刻法勒，全世之座、众生之父，永昼的背负者。孩子啊，不要害怕……
E: They said: I am Kephale, the Throne of Worlds, Father of All Beings, Bearer of Eternal Day. Child, fear not...

C: 他原本就是为此而来的，不是吗？
E: He came for this exact reason, didn't he?

C: 我记得这边有一些盾牌，把它们扛上！
E: I remember there are shields over here, grab them!

C: 嗯！陨石和黎明机器都不会砸中我。
E: Yeah! Neither meteors nor the Dawn Device will fall on me.

C: 奥赫玛的大家，也都会好好地迎来再创世。
E: Everyone in Okhema will definitely reach the Era Nova safely.

C: 不错，聆听过天父回应的孩子，是被选中的人，回去和你们的家人待在一起，安心躲过末日吧！
E: Good. Now you're all the chosen children who heard from the sky father. You should be with your families and stay safe and at ease during the apocalypse.

C: 记得别说漏嘴咯！
E: Don't spill the beans!

C: 你打算向他表白？
E: Are you planning to confess to him?

C: 你这天空蛮夷笑什么？她精心给你挑选的头巾，你居然绑在杖上当战旗！
E: What are you laughing at, you sky barbarian? She carefully picked out that headscarf for you, and you went and tied it to your staff like a battle flag!

C: 可你消失了，他们该怎么办……
E: But what about them if you disappear...

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 不久之前，我还在思考何时才能再次见到贝洛伯格的天空，如今却登上了驶向宇宙的列车……
E: Not so long ago, I was still wondering whether I'd ever see Belobog's sky again. Now, I'm on a train coasting through the universe...

C: 帕姆欺负你了？
E: Is Pom-Pom bullying you, Hook?

C: 列车的感觉不太一样……
E: The Express feels quite different...

C: 把怪物们通通撞飞！！！
E: You could drive it straight into the monsters and send them flying!!!

C: 等回去之后我就给佩佩试试，希望它不要挑食。
E: I'll start Peppy on the new diet when I get back... Hope he isn't too picky.

C: 这群人至少有半数把名字留在了宇宙史上：利尔他、「帝皇」鲁珀特、以利亚萨拉斯、原始博士、螺丝咕姆……
E: At least half the members of the Society have etched their names on the universe's wall of history — there's Aiden, Emperor Rubert, Elias Salas, Dr. Primitive, Screwllum...

C: 我应该没什么想问的了。
E: I don't think I have anything to ask.

C: 我没有别的事情想和你说了。
E: I don't have anything else to say to you.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 不过与其苛责自己做得还不够好，不如先坦率认可自己已经做出了改变吧？我最终选择了这样的方式与自己妥协，也算是与过去彻底告别了。
E: But instead of blaming myself for not having done enough, it's better to just admit that I've changed. I chose to face myself in this way and closed that chapter of my past.

C: 宇宙之中，是不是还有很多等着我去挑战的对手呢……
E: I bet there are so many opponents out there in the universe just waiting for me to find them...

C: 他善于炼字。
E: He's good at keeping things brief.

C: 当然是统计卡波特罪行的报告书呀！作为他之前的头号粉丝，世玲可是知道许多秘密的…那些事儿，旁人想都不敢想！
E: A report that summarizes Capote's sins! I know a lot of secrets as his former top fan... Other people can't even imagine it!

C: …咳咳。不好意思，失态了。我刚才什么都没说。
E: ...Ahem, sorry. Excuse me. Just pretend I didn't say anything.

C: …咳咳，不好意思。可能是我的职业病犯了。
E: ...Ahem, sorry, I was in work mode.

C: 到时候可一定不要拒绝我哦，说好了。
E: Don't turn me down when the time comes, okay?

C: 有机会的话，得把我的意见转告给列车长……
E: When I get the chance, I gotta give the conductor my feedback...

C: 这样一想，这段传说或许只是古人将自己星系中恒星的起源，附会到游云天君身上了吧。
E: Perhaps this legend was simply how ancient peoples accounted for the star in their planetary system — by attributing it to the Cloudstrider.

C: 欸，{NICKNAME}，我问你，星穹列车上是不是种了「镰叶紫菀草」？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, are there any Asters on the Astral Express?

C: 不过是杯咖啡而已…布洛妮娅，你一定能做到的……
E: It's just a cup of coffee... I got this...

C: 人是无法对抗神明的。
E: Such feats are impossible for humans.

C: 大家的房间……
E: The Crew members' rooms...

C: 若时间允许，我想和列车长聊一聊，听它讲讲列车管理中的种种趣事。
E: If we have time, I would like to speak with the conductor and listen to their experiences of managing the Express.

C: 我也很期待你将来能写下你们的旅程游记，到时候，记得让我看看。
E: I hope you too will be able to make a travelogue of your own and include your experiences. I would love to read it.

C: …今天的列车之旅就到此为止了。唔……
E: ...I think that's enough Express for today.

C: 就来列车上玩吧！
E: Why not invite them to the Express?

C: 我身上这些小物件，都是闲暇时自己绣的。{NICKNAME}，香囊或是流苏挂坠…你喜欢吗？
E: These little fancies I wear are what I embroider in my free time. {NICKNAME}, would you fancy a spice sachet or a tassel pendant?

C: 怎么，很难理解么？你是不是从来不看书？
E: What, can't grasp the concept? I'd wager you haven't opened a real book in your life.

C: 很多时候我都相信自己的亲眼所见，但现在我有点怀疑。
E: Most of the time, I believe what I see, but right now, I'm doubting myself.

C: 集结、对抗、燃烧的火和坚定的决心。它们唤醒了沉睡的意志，冲破束缚，迎来新生……
E: A fire that builds up, clashes, and burns, and an unwavering determination. They have roused the slumbering will, snapping its fetters to welcome new life...

C: 优秀的音乐作品就像一面镜子，对比映照，才能及时发现不足。
E: An outstanding piece of musical work is just like a mirror. Only through comparison and reflection can shortcomings be found in time.

C: 好多层盒子啊…
E: This box has so many layers...

C: 嗯…忆者们也该思考一下有没有更好的现身方式了。
E: Hmm... Memokeepers should probably think of a better way to show up.

C: 当然，你写过留言。
E: Of course. You did write in it.

C: 姬子亲作，你值得拥有。
E: Himeko made it herself, because you're worth it.

C: 故障已知悉，正在抢修中……
E: Fault identified, undergoing emergency repairs...

C: 别这么说，它可是去过空间站里的很多地方，见识可广啦。而且…阮•梅女士也喜欢它呢。
E: Don't say that. It's been to so many places on the space station and has broad knowledge. Plus... Ms. Ruan Mei favors it.

C: 我也想像婷婷姐那样…有个自己的名字，感觉好帅气诶。
E: I want a name just like Wendy... It sounds so cool.

C: 当前区域空间利用率未达到<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，请考虑提升空间使用率。
E: Space utilization rate for this domain is not yet <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. Please consider increasing space utilization rate.

C: 帮你交朋友…
E: About helping you make friends...

C: 有个叫艾格尼斯的记者，成天在行政区晃悠，感觉挺有意思。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: There's a journalist named Agnes who wanders around the Administrative District every day. She seems to be an interesting person. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?

C: 好吧。
E: Alright.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What's up?

C: 这…也行吧。但我没那个意思，并没想认识他，抱歉。
E: That was... Fine. But that's all it was — I'm not interested in getting to know him. Sorry.

C: 没什么，在列车上待久了，总有一天你会明白的。
E: It's nothing. Stay on the train long enough and one day you'll understand.

C: 俺是老行政区人了。
E: I was also born and raised in the Administrative District.

C: 算不上，就是喜欢折腾而已！
E: Not exactly. I just like to own them.

C: 嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗，还是说有事找我？
E: Hmm? Is there anything worth my attention, or something you need to talk to me about?

C: 但你这身衣服并不是这里常见的款式，上面的纹理装饰也很罕见。而且你裸露在外的手指和脸颊，并没有涂抹矿脂的痕迹……
E: But the way you dress isn't the norm around here. Those patterns are rarely seen. And there's no trace of petroleum jelly on those clean fingers and face of yours...

C: 胡思乱想？
E: In the clouds?

C: 不过…我最近遇到一个大金主——只要能满足他的要求，他就愿意资助我探险，而且还帮我搞定了出城的批文。
E: But recently, I met a benefactor who is willing to finance my expedition as long as his requirements are met. He's even willing to take care of the expedition permits and formalities as well.

C: 发生什么事了吗？
E: Did something happen?

C: 所以啊，一想到我的研究有机会取得重大突破，我就兴奋得整夜都睡不着……
E: So, whenever I think about how my research has a chance of achieving a major breakthrough, I get so excited that I can't sleep a wink...

C: 当然没问题！不过，刚刚我说的还不够严谨：每天上午9点到中午<unbreak>12</unbreak>点，下午2点到5点，我在这段时间内负责行政区街道和社区事务。
E: Of course! But you will need to reserve a slot. My work hours are from 9:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM to <unbreak>12</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM, and 2:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM to 5:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM. I handle administrative and civil affairs during these times.

C: 「喧宾夺主的浓油赤酱，就像大军入侵一般，将鲑鱼本来的清爽味道完全淹没，那一丝气息微薄的鱼本味，只能高举降旗败下阵来……」
E: "The rich sauces are like an invading army, completely overwhelming the crisp and fresh taste of the salmon. The gentle aroma of fish has no choice but to surrender in defeat..."

C: 商业机密，无可奉告，我只能告诉你，这套楼盘最近热得烫手，要买就抓紧了！再迟一点说不定你就负担不起，只能租房了。
E: Trade secret. No comment. All I can tell you is that real estate has been hot. Better buy while you've got the chance! If you're too late, you might not be able to afford the prices and will be stuck renting a place.

C: 当然，您慢慢来！
E: Of course! Take your time.

C: 别出声！…喔，你没出声，很好。不要打扰我的科研！
E: Shh! Oh, you didn't say anything. Good, do not interrupt my research!

C: 那当然，如假包换！只有贝洛伯格科学界的那些老顽固不愿承认这点——他们嫉妒我的才能，生怕我的研究成果颠覆他们的地位。
E: Of course I am! What kind of question is that! Those jealous old nerds and hags in Belobog's academic circle refuse to recognize me only because my revolutionary findings will make them look useless.

C: 不要比较，写自己的风格！
E: Stop comparing yourself to others. Go with your instincts!

C: 都是无忧无虑的少年人，现在为了未知的世界探索奔走…几经风雨，他们却始终没有抛下过彼此……
E: They are both carefree. In exploring the unknown world... they suffer many ups and downs, yet they are still by each other's side.

C: 什么「平行世界」、「星神」、「同位异形」之类的…骗子就喜欢用这些宇宙、星空之类的概念骗人！
E: Terms like parallel universe, Aeons, and parity anomaly... Swindlers love to use these words related to the universe and Aeons to scam people!

C: 那当然是因为只有布洛妮娅大人能解决我们的问题了。
E: Because Lady Bronya clearly is the only person who can solve our issue.

C: 我的工作就是统筹人力，安排工期。亲自下场不仅帮不上忙，还会碍了矿工们的事。何必给大家找不自在呢？
E: My job is to coordinate personnel and arrange work schedules. My presence down in the mines will only hinder the miners' work. Why make everyone uncomfortable?

C: 我想想啊…有家专做地髓设备的私人工厂，好像还有个生产机器人的民营军工厂。
E: Let me think... There's a private manufacturer that makes Geomarrow gear, and another military one that produces robots.

C: 你怎么看待造物引擎？
E: What are your thoughts on the Engine of Creation?

C: 你老了以后怎么办？
E: What will you do when you're old?

C: 你看那些卖力气工作的矿工，一天到晚汗流浃背——图个啥？年轻的时候享受不到生活，老了又落下一身病痛……
E: Look at those hard-working miners. They are soaked in sweat all day long, and what do they get? They miss out on life when they're young and when they're old, they are sick and in pain...

C: …总之，毫无疑问，我们是个造福社会的公益组织。听了我方才的描述，想必你已经完全理解「会社」的职责了吧。
E: ...Anyways, we are undoubtedly an organization established for the good of the Society. After listening to my explanation, you should have a full understanding of the Society's mission now.

C: 大家都反映这道菜非常好吃，所以很快就上架供应啦。你要是馋了的话，我现在就可以做！
E: People love this dish. It should be available very soon. I can cook some for you if you are hungry.

C: 你的鉴定流程是怎么样的？
E: What is your appraisal process?

C: 讲讲搏击俱乐部吧。
E: Tell me about the Fight Club.

C: 还在为「地火」工作吗？
E: Are you still working for Wildfire?

C: 要不是最近都快忙不过来了，我真想抽空跟你切磋切磋，交流一下作战技巧——以后总有机会的，你觉得呢？
E: I would really wanna take some time to learn from you and trade combat skills if I weren't so busy — but we'll get our chance some day. Right?

C: 行，之后还想聊天的话我也随时有空。
E: Cool, I'll be free to chat later whenever you want.

C: 等大机器人修好之后，这颗星球也会重获新生吧？不过我可不打算待到那天。
E: When the giant robot is all fixed, this planet will be reborn, right? But I don't plan on sticking around here until then.

C: 和他打过交道。
E: I've had dealings with him.

C: …算了，想不起来，我放弃了。忘了那人吧，不重要。
E: ...Eh, never mind. I just can't remember. Don't worry about that person, it's not important.

C: 虽说我只是个后勤官，不知道你们之前强闯禁区到底是为了什么…但从结果来看，裂界活动的减弱八成跟你们有关吧？
E: I'm just an insignificant logistics officer. I don't claim to know why you broke into the restricted zone last time... But whatever happened, I'm guessing the cut in Fragmentum activity has an <unbreak>80%</unbreak> chance of being directly caused by you, right?

C: 为什么这么说？
E: Why do you say that?

C: …我能够得着。谢谢你关心，下次别关心了。
E: ...I can reach them. Thanks for your concern, but please don't do that again.

C: 哼，我就知道你在身后。别想再吓我一跳，你不会得逞的。
E: Hmph, I know you're standing behind me. I won't let you scare me this time.

C: 唔…根据史瓦罗先生的说法，这个小家伙的毛病似乎只有找到合适的外壳才能解决……
E: Oh... According to Mr. Svarog, this little fella's malfunction can only be fixed with a suitable casing...

C: 嘿，荣誉队员，怎么说话呢！那个叔叔对虎克可好了！
E: Hey, watch your words, honorary member! That man treats me well!

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 沉默，沮丧，看不透眼前这残破景象
E: Silence, dismay, how to make sense of this vision of gray?

C: 上一页记录着浪漫星光，下一秒涂画出悲痛断肠
E: Noting down the starlight, oh it's so romantic, then painting a scene that's heartbreaking and tragic

C: 歌颂英勇的人，书写下恢弘的段落
E: Big ups to my homies, we honor you with beats

C: 听说你也是乐队成员…
E: You're a member of the band, right?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 「矿脉探测器」怎么样了？
E: Any updates about the "vein detector"?

C: 虎克最近怎么样？
E: How's Hook doing?
Wait, you? This... I mean... You know...

C: 自从决定归还次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神之后，这只扑满的脾性变得更加自由了。即便名义上归属于空间站，它仍会时不时偷溜进列车，仿佛特意寻找你的踪迹。
E: Ever since you decided to return Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, this Trotter's temperament has become even more unrestricted. Even though it technically belongs on the space station, it still occasionally sneaks onto the express, as if specifically it's searching for traces of you.

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Oink, oink oink~

C: 小熊发出了心满意足的叫声。如果存在所谓的好感度系统，这一下数值应该能提升不少。
E: The cub cries out with happiness. If there were such a thing as a friendship level, that would have scored you some great points.

C: 「风雪，故乡！」
E: "Wind and Snow, that is my hometown!"

C: 「贝洛伯格，我的家…」
E: "Belobog, my home..."

C: 请问……
E: Can I ask you something...

C: 别急，我们再等等吧。
E: Don't worry, just wait a little bit longer.

C: 城里不都一个天气？
E: Isn't the weather the same across the city?

C: 啥玩意这么玄乎？
E: Why so mysterious?

C: 还、还没考驾照……
E: I s—still don't have my license, sir...

C: …多谢岳父大人！
E: ...Thank you so much, sir!

C: 对…对不起……
E: S—sorry...

C: 他怎么还不来道歉……
E: Why hasn't he come and apologized...?

C: 我也想上去玩……
E: I wanna go up there too...

C: 你什么时候下来……
E: When are you gonna come down...

C: 这和机械宠物有区别吗？
E: What's the difference between this and a mech-pet?

C: 这个呀，就是一条长得像灯笼的鱼形机巧……
E: Well, it's a fish-shaped ingenium that looks like a lantern...

C: 我们博物馆立志于给每一位来访观众提供最温馨便捷的观展体验。在您参观文物之余，也不妨在休息区小憩一番，或是参加我们不定期举行的主题活动节目！
E: Our museum is dedicated to providing a welcoming and accessible experience for all visitors. While exploring the exhibits, be sure to take a break in our rest area. And don't miss out on our occasional themed events!

C: 请慢走，也祝您享受本次博物馆之旅！
E: Please take care, and hope you enjoy the tour!

C: 我原本设想这样的囚犯在单独的囚室之中应该不会有事，后来不知道他从哪里弄了一柄铁勺，持续不断敲击着囚室墙壁，最终让隔壁囚室囚犯精神崩溃了。
E: I had assumed he wouldn't cause any trouble if he was locked away in a solitary cell. Yet he somehow managed to get his hands on an iron spoon that he endlessly tapped the wall of his cell with, eventually driving the prisoner in his neighboring cell into a mental breakdown.

C: 我并非是研究历史学者，所以我对幽囚狱的历史并非全然熟悉。这里是罗浮上幽囚狱系统中其中一处，历史悠久，建立的具体年份已不可查。
E: I am no research historian, so I may not be familiar with the complete history of The Shackling Prison. It has been established eons ago that the exact date of its construction is long-lost to time. The facility we are at is just one of the many units of The Shackling Prison system on the Luofu.

C: 我看你也没有带着什么旧物来，怎么，难不成是跟我聊天来了？
