E: You don't seem to have anything old there that needs fixing. Don't tell me you've come for a chat?

C: …我并不是在贬低伊须磨洲的文明历程，伊须磨洲的海底遗迹，真得特别美，特别壮丽…它比我年轻，却比我的整个人生都要厚重。
E: ...I don't mean to talk down on the Insumousu civilization. Their underwater ruins are exquisite and truly magnificent... It's something that is both younger than me, yet has far more gravity than my life.

C: …哎，算了，我也不跟你嘴硬了。说实话，我倒现在都没理解诗这东西到底哪里有意思，也没什么分辨好坏的本事。
E: ...Ah, forget about it. I'm not arguing with you. To be honest, I don't even really get what's so good about poetry, and can't really tell what's good poetry.

C: 可能是差一些文化品味…
E: It's missing the sense of culture and taste...

C: 对于工造司的工正来说，失败只是成功的必经之路。我准备之后再试试别的办法。
E: As for artisans at the Artisanship Commission, failure is a required step on the road to success. I'll try some other things out once I'm prepared.

C: 可是…艺术是不能单纯用商业衡量的啊！如果你根本就不尊重艺术，又为什么要在这个行业里以此谋生呢？
E: But... Art cannot be measured by commercial impact alone! Why would you try to make a living in this industry if you have no respect for art at all?

C: 我只是担心也许会有一天，人们不会觉得「托蝶幻境」是仙舟狐人的文化遗产，而是公司的一项新发明…一想到这样的未来，我就觉得浑身战栗。
E: I'm just worried that perhaps there'll come a day when people won't remember that Butterfly Immersia is actually a cultural relic of Xianzhou foxians, but instead just think it's this product invented by the IPC... I can't help but shudder when I contemplate such a future...

C: 这种向上公关的麻烦事，不就是制片人的工作吗？
E: Isn't this public relations hassle exactly the kind of thing a producer does?

C: 我们集团在幽囚狱经营多年，生产了多款畅销全狱的爆款产品，比如这瓶「铁窗牌沐浴露」，不仅有除垢杀菌的功效，还能保持全身的凉爽舒适......
E: Our group has been operating in The Shackling Prison for many years. We've produced many bestsellers that are popular throughout the prison, such as this Arma Correctional Body Wash. Not only does it remove grime and kill germs, but it also leaves the body feeling cool and refreshed...

C: 我以前还在云骑军的时候，她就在做我的下属，后来我调任地衡司了，她就跟着过来了。我把能教给她的都教给她了，她还是没有离开……
E: She used to be my subordinate back when I was still in the Cloud Knights, and she came over with me when I was transferred to the Realm-Keeping Commission. I taught her everything I knew, but for some reason she chose to stick around...

C: 那你攒够多少次了？
E: So how many have you accumulated so far?

C: 拳馆衷心希望您能来，没人会盼着您白花钱的。
E: We sincerely hope that you can come and join us. Nobody wants to see you waste your money.

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我才说了几句你就急了？我也有难处啊，你就不能体谅一下我吗？
E: You're offended because of an offhand comment? I have my own worries, can't you put yourself in my shoes?

C: …你是不是很喜欢找别人话里的漏洞？
E: ...Do you enjoy calling people out?

C: 是又如何？长生种才了解长生。「体验官」使用了产品之后都表示「好像又能多活两百岁」，这些感受都是真实可信的，不信你可以去问！
E: What if they are? Only long-life species can really understand longevity. After using the product, our Testing Officers have all claimed to feel like they "could live two hundred extra years." That's real qualitative data, and if you don't believe it — just go ask them!

C: 这建木说不长就不长了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor stops growing without any reason...

C: 下辈子加把劲吧。
E: In your next life, go all out.

C: 扯远了，我花了几百年才走到如今的地位，能在身边辅佐他，也算是圆了这一世心愿。
E: I'm getting off topic here, but it takes me hundreds of years to get where I am now, and advising his leadership like this is like a life-long dream coming true for me.

C: 另外，那位天才剑客彦卿是为了学会说相声才留在景元旁边的。
E: And now, the sword prodigy, Yanqing, only stayed by Jing Yuan's side to learn the art of crosstalk.

C: 我们所有地衡司执事都受过严格的训练，无论多好笑，我们都不会笑，除非忍不住。
E: We've all undergone strict training at the Realm-Keeping Commission. No matter how funny something is, we will never laugh, unless we can't.

C: 我这么说吧，就算是那位「全能执事」净砚大人，也常常因为不够圆滑，与前来办事的老百姓发生冲突，而这个时候只要让我登场，事情就会好办许多。
E: Let me put it this way. Even Almighty Officer Jingyan has clashed with people who came for official business because she's not tactful enough. And that's where I come in, and things will go more smoothly.

C: 等待天舶司遣返的犯罪分子在这儿很奇怪吗？我叫白图泰…以前的本职是克里姆特立宪国的法官，副业是旅行作家……
E: Is it really strange for criminals waiting for repatriation by the Sky-Faring Commission to be waiting here? I'm Battuta. I used to be a judge in the Klimt Republic. My side hustle was a travel writer...

C: 我该走了…
E: I should go...

C: 他们现在手里都积压着不少赛伯邑超导合金，想要卖到罗浮…虽然这超导合金颇为珍贵，但只在工造司生产的一些精密仪器中应用，需求量很小。
E: They've been stockpiling lots of Cybercity superconducting alloys and plan on selling them off to the Luofu... It might be valuable, but it's only used in a few hyper-precision instruments over at the Artisanship Commission, so there's little demand for it.

C: 再说了，我每次想发起「决斗」时，那个大尾巴的商会专员就会说「不能打架！不能打架！商会批文机会少，谁有耐心就给他」。
E: Besides, every time I want to "duel," that guild rep with a big tail will always say, "No fighting! No fighting! Guild approval is a rare privilege reserved for the patient!"

C: 那边那位叫辛克莱的行商就不一定了。无论你跟他是不是同行，我建议你少跟他打交道，会折寿的，咱们都是短生种还得珍惜寿命。
E: But not necessarily for that traveling merchant over there called Sinclair. I suggest you keep away from him whether you're our rival or not for longevity's sake. We're all short-life species here, so life is to be cherished.

C: 带着棺木的行商？我没有见过…我也不认识所有的行商，要是我知道那位辛克莱也卖超导合金，我一开始就不会做这门生意，太晦气了。
E: A traveling merchant with a coffin? Not that I've seen... But then again, I don't know all the traveling merchants here. If I knew that Sinclair was already selling superconducting alloys, I wouldn't even have gotten into this trade. What rotten luck.

C: 接着，我猜那里面是挚友或者亲人，是一种「不幸的象征」，他必须怀着愧疚心拖着棺木负重前进，但是无人提及棺中是否有腐蚀气味。
E: Then I guessed that it was a close friend or family member. A "symbol of misfortune" that forced him to drag the coffin out of guilt. But nobody mentioned any rotting stench emanating from within.

C: 我自己记得都没你清楚！
E: You remember what I did better than I do!

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 另外还有些散碎的工作，比如判决文书、官方通告、内宣材料…反正在这幽囚狱里，只要是需要「写作」的地方，就是我的职责范围。
E: Additionally, there are miscellaneous tasks like issue verdicts, official announcements, internal marketing... So long as it has to do with "writing" in the Shackling Prison, it falls under my jurisdiction of work.

C: 云骑军在此执勤，请勿随意走动。
E: The Cloud Knights are on duty here. Please refrain from wandering around.

C: 我一直反对他和我一同入行伍，甚至为此闹得关系很糟。
E: I was always against him enlisting with me, and it took its toll on our relationship.

C: 将军在此处派驻了云骑，一定是为了观望敌人的余势。
E: The general must have stationed us Cloud Knights here to keep an eye on the enemy's remnant forces.

C: 鳞渊境是什么地方？
E: What kind of place is Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 「建木」重生那天，我听到了消息，拿起潮信叉——喔，那是咱们护珠人的武器，回到了鳞渊境，想提供些力所能及的帮助。
E: The day I heard the news about the Arbor's resurrection, I picked up my tidal trident — the weapon that we Pearlkeepers use — and ran back to Scalegorge Waterscape to try and give as much support as I could.

C: 海滩守护者可真不好做啊…
E: Life as a guardian of the shoreline is tough...

C: 就比如说我那个徒弟…司里给她外派到法特森星际医院的时候，她才四十多岁。我带了她五十多年，后来她先回了罗浮，还一直和我有书信往来。
E: Take my apprentice as an example. She was only in her forties when she was sent to the Fedson Interstellar Hospital where I trained her for about fifty years. She returned to the Luofu before me and kept in touch with me through letters.

C: 当时领导可是允诺的，在学术交流团里混够了资历，回来高低能评上个医士长。所以我就跟着去了。
E: At that time, the leader promised that whoever gained enough experience in the academic exchange program would very likely be promoted to chief healer. So, I joined the program.

C: 哎，在回来的路上我就听说啦，没想到你也知道啊？
E: Oh, I heard about that on my way back. I'm surprised you know about it too.

C: 你对谁都是这个态度吗？
E: Are you like this to everyone?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 那还是不打扰你了。
E: Well, I'd better leave you alone then.

C: 占卜只是在描述「未来的事实」，再次卜算也改变不了，您只是在怀疑罢了。
E: Divination only describes upcoming facts, which can't be changed by another divination. They just refuse to believe the result.

C: 若月有关建木之灾的卜测报告让三位卜官脸上挂不住，说不定「离职」是太卜大人的一种保护方法…当然，这只有太卜大人自己才知道了。
E: The Managing Diviners were left ashamed because of Ruoyue's divination about the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. Perhaps, letting her go is the master diviner's way to protect her... Of course, no one can be sure about this except the master diviner herself.

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 若月有关建木之灾的卜测报告让三位卜官脸上挂不住，说不定「离职」是太卜大人的一种保护方法…当然，这只有太卜大人自己才知道了。
E: The Managing Diviners were left ashamed because of Ruoyue's divination about the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. Perhaps, letting her go is the master diviner's way to protect her... Of course, no one can be sure about this except the master diviner herself.

C: 他们建木受灾还得靠太卜司协助做清算，这说明我们之间关系还是挺好的。
E: We helped them to calculate the damage after the Ambrosial Arbor disaster. This shows that our relationship is fine.

C: 仙舟人生活缓慢，你一个化外民也这么悠闲，有意思，想聊什么？
E: The Xianzhou fossils live leisurely lives, but I don't usually see Outworlders having as much free time on their hands as you. Interesting. What do you wanna talk about?

C: 金人巷的烈焰浓茶受欢迎吗？
E: Is Flaming Potent Tea popular in Aurum Alley?

C: 好啊！我最喜欢和人聊天了～找我聊啥都行！
E: Okay okay~ my favorite pastime, chatting with people. You can talk with me about anything.

C: 不是跟你吹，只要我见过的有机生物，都可以变出来。可以是一头黄石牛，也可以是一个苹果。但体积不能差距特别大。
E: I'm not boasting. I can turn into any organic life form I've seen. It can be a bull, it can also be an apple, but the size difference can't be too large.

C: 要帮你安装脖子以下的部分吗？
E: Do you need me to restore your body below your neck?

C: 我现在没有手、也没有脚，只剩一张会说话的嘴了…聊吧，你想聊什么来着？
E: A casual chat, of course. Now that I've lost all my limbs, all I can do is chat... So, what would you want to talk about?

C: 你这儿都有什么菜？
E: What specialties do you have?

C: 请恕我拒绝。
E: Then please allow me to refuse.

C: 我内心依旧焦躁不安。
E: No, I'm still feeling anxious.

C: 自从建木之灾发生之后，我就想着自己应该做些什么…可是我既不会维护秩序，我也不会看病施诊，我只会拨弄乐器。
E: I've been thinking about what I should do since the disaster at the Ambrosial Arbor... but I don't know how to maintain order or treat the wounded... All I can do is play my instruments.

C: 你有所不知，学会收紧了在仙舟的课题预算，外派的名额也大幅度减少，来一趟可不容易。
E: Maybe you haven't heard about it. The Guild has cut its budget for field research and greatly reduced the number of scholars sent to other worlds. It's not easy to come here anymore.

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 此象得主生有一颗玲珑心，四海之内皆朋友。对于你所问之事——你所拥有的人脉超乎常人想象，凡事皆有他人助力，虽有奔波感但诸事可成。切勿报以悲观态度处事，切记说话三思不可恶语伤人。
E: The bearer of this sign is born with a gentle soul and can easily make friends throughout the world. As for the question in your mind — your connections are far stronger than anyone can imagine, and your friends will help you out despite the twists and turns. Stay positive and be careful with what your words in case they may hurt others.

C: 你看见一白发男子正在卧榻上酣睡，几只小鸟正在窗棂并排而立，窗外春明景和，正是一片好风景。
E: You are seeing a white-haired man napping on a day bed. Several birds are standing side by side on the window pane through which lovely spring sun is streaming in.

C: 我想和你聊聊天…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 蛮好的～小桂子的人气越来越高，偶尔还会被报社请去做「破解灵异现象」的特邀专家呢！可厉害了！
E: Things are going great! Little Gui's popularity is on the rise, and sometimes she's even getting invited by newspapers as a special expert on "supernatural phenomena." Now that's something to write home about!

C: 青镞说你有时会问一些尤其刁钻的问题，果真如此。
E: Qingzu told me to expect the occasional tricky question from you, and her advice was sound.

C: 可憎的有机体，记住：「我们」的战斗至死方休。
E: Never forget this, loathsome life form: Our fight is to the death.

C: 你来仙舟多久了？
E: How long have you been on the Xianzhou for?

C: 想找你聊聊天。
E: I wanted to chat with you.

C: 哎，您误会啦！我刚刚说的那些衣服啊，都是普通货色，实在是配不上你这张{F#俏脸}{M#俊脸}，不看也罢！
E: Oh no, you're mistaken! Those clothes that I just mentioned, they're all run-of-the-mill fashion lines. How could they be a match for someone who looks as {F#gorgeous}{M#dashing} as you! Away with them, I say!

C: 在「广云袖」，我们会安排设计师来量体裁衣招待贵宾，从来不敢怠慢。我们给您准备了小礼物，请您笑纳，咱们和气生财嘛。
E: At Cloudbreadth Sleeves, we arrange for tailors to serve our esteemed guests without fail. We've prepared a small gift for you. Please accept it, and let us put all this behind us.

C: 您对十王司的事务实在好奇心旺盛，不逊于桂乃芬小姐。若以一句「事涉仙舟内务，无可奉告」来打发，显得太不近人情了。一味保持神秘，徒然惹人窥伺。
E: You seem interested in the Ten-Lords Commission's affairs, no less than Miss Guinaifen. It may seem too heartless for me to shut you up by saying "these are Xianzhou's affairs, and I have nothing to share." After all, upholding mystery will only beget prying eyes.

C: 在仙舟，这些玉石可不止是漂亮的石头而已。
E: Here aboard Xianzhou, these jade items are not just beautiful stones.

C: 我现在就立刻离开。
E: I'm leaving.

C: 典当不是暴利行业吗？
E: Is a pawnbroker highly lucrative?

C: 哪里哪里，我也是才学着做生意，说话笨，有什么不合适的地方还望客人多多包容，这茶楼里每一位客人都是我的老师，您也不例外呀。
E: You're too kind. I just started studying commerce and am not good at talking shop. Please forgive me if I ever behaved inappropriately. Every customer here is my teacher, and you are no exception.

C: 你是？
E: And you are?

C: 我们的车上装不下那么多人…
E: We can't fit that many people in our ride...

C: 我无法忍受，我绝对无法忍受。
E: I can't, and I never will.

C: 像话吗！那石狮子那么重那么沉，能让你刮阵风就给吹到星槎海来了吗？
E: Nonsense! That stone lion's heavy as a boulder. How could the wind have possibly carried it to Starskiff Haven?

C: 谁曾想，嘿！反响还真不错！这些日子已经有好些人过来听我们说相声，完事儿以后说是在高阿姨那儿知道我们的了。
E: As it turns out, people love it! Many have come these days to enjoy our performance and told us they found out about us through Tall Auntie.

C: 真的吗？恕冬生愚钝，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}并没有那种仙人气质……
E: Really? Forgive my dullness, but {F#big sister}{M#big brother}, you don't exude that celestial air...

C: 冬生不懂修道是什么，本来以为自己这辈子都没有吃大鸡腿的福分了。结果这一晃眼，咱就来到仙宫里啦！
E: I don't know what cultivation is, so I thought I'd never get the chance to eat chicken drumsticks, but here I am at the Celestial Hall!

C: 跟我聊聊神仙姐姐吧。
E: Tell me about this celestial lady.

C: 怎么唉声叹气的？
E: What's with all the sighing?

C: 博识学会的规矩是用知识交换知识，你最好准备了些我感兴趣的东西。所以，今天有什么事要找我吗？
E: The Intelligentsia Guild always trades knowledge for knowledge, and that's our guiding principle. You'd better prepare something interesting for me. So what can I do for you today?

C: 嗯，那再见~路上小心，一定要注意交通安全！…哦对了，如果想做「交通志愿者」，记得来找我哦。
E: So long then~ Take care driving out there, and pay attention to the traffic! ...Oh yeah, if you do ever want to be a traffic volunteer, come find me.

C: 上当，上什么当？姐姐不知道。
E: Falling? I don't know what you're talking about.

C: 你多大年纪了？
E: How old are you?

C: 真不好意思，我有点激动了，不是冲着你…我只是真的太生气了。跟他们一时半会儿也说不通，不如我们聊点儿别的吧？
E: Excuse me for getting riled up, I'm just mad at how stubborn they are. How about we talk about something else instead?

C: 我已经到仙舟有一段时间了，每天都能见到很多狐人小姐姐，每天都过得很幸福。但是我最在意的是哪位，你知道吗？
E: I've been in Xianzhou for a while now and see many foxian ladies every day. But do you know which one I care about the most?

C: 仙舟人不骗仙舟人…哦，你不是仙舟人。
E: A Xianzhou citizen will never lie to another Xianzhou citizen... Oh wait, you're not from the Xianzhou.

C: 赚钱的手段正经吗？
E: Are your ways of making money legit?

C: 不要啊！我不要去通下水道…
E: No! I don't want to go clean the sewers...

C: 不怕不怕，都会好的…
E: Don't be scared. Everything will be fine...

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 鸣藕糕！
E: Songlotus cake!

C: 昭昭日月明，离离星辰行。
E: Brilliant Moonlight, Luxuriant Orbit.

C: 那岂不是意味着什么脏活累活都要干吗？！
E: Does that mean that we have to do all of the dirty work too!?

C: 你耳朵呢？
E: Where are your ears?

C: 得了怪病，耳朵掉了…
E: I caught a rare disease and they fell off...

C: 没错啊，你看这互补色多好看。
E: Yup, just look how beautiful these complimentary colors are.

C: 您好，请问有推荐的茶饮吗？
E: Hello, do you have any recommended teas today?

C: 来了您呐，这边儿请！
E: Welcome. This way, please!

C: 看样子你是一名自以为是的强者。我告诉你，我曾经战胜过无数如此自傲的人。
E: You look like quite the arrogant powerhouse. Just so you know, I've taken down plenty like you before.

C: 你是来竞锋舰上比武的吗？
E: Are you competing on the Skysplitter?

C: 这不可能，你还不了解我吗？
E: Impossible! You don't get me, do you?

C: 那是一座太空站吗？我看到了星空和站台。
E: Is that a space station? I can see stars and a station platform.

C: 这可不是什么好名声啊…
E: Doesn't sound like anything good...

C: 多吃一点，多吃一点！
E: Eat up. Eat up!

C: 这又是什么程序语言？
E: What programming language is this?

C: 要不辞职和它组团出道…
E: What if I quit my day job and form a band with it...?

C: 书里写的东西没想到是真的！
E: I never knew all that stuff from the books was true!

C: 两位消消气，你们这样的情况，我已经见过成千上万遍，你们也不特殊。
E: Calm down, you two. I've seen this thousands of times before, and you're not special.

C: 公开拍卖、定向变卖…
E: Open auction, targeted sales...

C: 那个江湖郎中是你爸爸？
E: Is that traveling healer your father?

C: 拳头那么大？这都吞得下去…实在是有点匪夷所思……
E: As big as a fist? It's unbelievable that the patient could swallow it...

C: 开心，请你现在就这样叫。
E: Yes. Please call me that from now on.

C: 我们只是刚知道，有一世的迈德漠斯…受了许多苦。
E: We just found out that a past Mydeimos... suffered a great deal.

C: 悬锋的存续…未必大于世界存亡。前世的我犯了太多错误，无论是用毒计杀死你，还是将迈德漠斯抛入冥海……
E: The survival of Kremnos... may not be worth more than the fate of the world. In my past life, I made too many mistakes, whether it was poisoning you, or casting Mydeimos into the Sea of Souls...

C: 至于我的答案…想必你也清楚了。
E: As for my answer... I'm sure you already know.

C: 嘿嘿……
E: Heh heh...

C: 原来你是这样的遐蝶！
E: So this is who you really are, Castorice!

C: 别忘了我们啊，灰子！
E: Don't forget about us, Gray Mystery!

C: 呵呵，好生热闹，是吾未曾同行过的小友们呐？对我的模样，你们很稀奇？
E: Hehe, what a lively bunch! Are you new companions I've never traveled with before? My appearance must have caught your eye?

C: 早就听说瑟希斯的门下出了一位喜好大地兽的学者，但我的故事，恐怕要让你们失望了。
E: I've heard of a scholar under Cerces who's really into dromases, but I'm afraid my story might disappoint you.

C: 你能不能教我识字呢？
E: Can you teach me how to read and write?

C: 当时卧底时，有幸和她见过。我看你倒是有些相似。
E: When I was undercover, I had the fortune of meeting her. I see that you bear some resemblance.

C: 这不乱套了么？
E: Isn't that just a hot mess?

C: 感觉不如「晖长石号」。
E: Feels worse than the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 左目洞观过去，罪业查察。右眼凝视现在，赏善罚恶。
E: The left eye uncovers the past and investigates sin. The right eye gazes into the present, rewarding good and punishing evil.

C: 为了改善调查体验，机巧鸟内置了不同的调查模式，调查内容也会产生对应的区别。常规调查模式正在维护中，暂时无法使用。
E: In order to enhance your investigation experience, the cycrane has various investigation modes installed. The details of your investigation will be affected depending on the mode you select. Normal investigation mode is under maintenance and currently unavailable.

C: 让所有的舞步都在内部以美好的形式共存
E: May all of our dancing steps be united in the form of inner beauty.

C: 真的是！简直荼毒正常人的心灵。
E: Seriously! Practically poison for the soul!

C: 一只饭盒，装着许多你想吃却吃不到的仙舟美食。
E: The lunchbox contains lots of Xianzhou delicacies that you crave but cannot have.

C: 捍卫银枝大人的美！
E: Defend the beauty of Lord Argenti!

C: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
E: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

C: 银枝大人真是太帅了！
E: Lord Argenti is just too handsome!

C: 说时迟那时快…
E: Time waits for no one...

C: 哎…真不知道他能不能行。
E: *sigh*...Not sure if he can make it.

C: 每一扇门都有属于它自己的秘密，人也不外如是。
E: Just like humans, every gate has its own secret.

C: 「『筑材物流部』，主管：塔拉梵•基恩，董事会理事。非『存护』信仰者？资料不明。对联盟潜在危害：极低。」
E: "Head of Building Material Logistics: Taravan Keane, a board member. Not a Preservation believer? No clear evidence is found. Potential threat level to the alliance: Very low."

C: 「『技术研发部』，主管：亚婆离。博识学会实际控制者，对联盟潜在危害：极低。」
E: "Head of Technology: Yabuli, the de facto controller of the Intelligentsia Guild. Potential threat level to the alliance: Very low."

C: 「塔拉萨，渊海世界；奥布瓦尔，幽魂星；绿丘，微型盆栽星球；日耀-XIII，带状星环殖民地……」
E: "Thalassa, the world of deep sea; Auberval, the phantom planet; Greenhill, a micro planted planet; and Sunburst-XIII, a star ring colony..."

C: 尽管你非常在意包裹里那可能存在的小生命的状况如何，但它已经是你发现的第三个「放生」包裹了——第三个！
E: Despite truly caring about the condition of that little life inside the parcel, this is already the third controlled release package that you've seen — the third!

C: 打开看看吧…
E: Open it up for a look...

C: 尽管你不擅云吟，不谙武事，但你仍然秉获这份荣誉。因为你总在游弋巡逻时为这些摇篮般的持明卵清理水垢和藤壶。队员们都认同你那母亲般的爱意。
E: Although you are not well-versed in cloudhymn and not physically trained in combat, you are still entrusted with this honorable task. It is because you always remove the limescale and barnacles on the Vidyadhara egg when you are on patrol. Your teammates recognize your motherly love toward the eggs.

C: 她迟早会离开持明卵，但不是现在，你明白仅仅是褪去痛苦的记忆，不能完全消弭深入骨髓的痛苦，就让她继续休憩吧。
E: Sooner or later, she will go, but not now. You understand that the mere loss of memory is not enough to eliminate the pain that has seeped deeply and completely into her bones. Just let her rest.

C: 挑剔的食客正在翻阅菜单，你看见菜品下写着一行字：素食、生酮友好、有机、不含麸质、不含谷物、不含蛋白、不含乳制品、不含无机物、不含金属元素、不使用化合调味料。
E: The discerning diner is perusing the menu, and you notice a line of text beneath each dish: Vegetarian, keto-friendly, organic, gluten-free, grain-free, egg-free, dairy-free, free of inorganic substances, free of metallic elements, and made without artificial seasonings.

C: 你被吓了一跳，难熬的心痒瞬间烟消云散。无论里面原本装着什么，它都再也动弹不得了——还是别再动打开它的念头比较好。
E: Horrified, your heightened curiosity dissipates all at once. No matter what's inside, it's best that you stay away from the package and stop thinking about opening it.

C: 换言之，杜氏茶庄的烈焰浓茶是*新*概念茶饮料。
E: In other words, the Flaming Potent Tea from Du's Teahouse is a completely cutting-edge type of tea.

C: 堆满快递箱的货架，上面摆放着因各种理由没能发货的快递箱。
E: Shelves stacked full of courier parcels that could not be delivered for diverse reasons.

C: 于是你留下那三个箱子，转身离去了。
E: So, you leave the three boxes behind, turn around, and walk away.

C: 「百步穿杨」就是一个文学概念，通常来说驭空大人的箭就算飞行<unbreak>1500</unbreak>米也具有十足的威力。
E: It's a figure of speech. Generally speaking, Madam Yukong's arrows are a threat from even <unbreak>5000</unbreak> feet.

C: 列位观众可能不认识，这位阿往，可是罗浮鼎鼎大名的相声表演艺术家啊。我这次来到咱们星槎海，就是专程为了听您的相声啊！我可算是您的忠实观众。
E: You guys may not recognize Forth, but he's a famous crosstalk comedy performer on the Luofu. I came all the way to Starskiff Haven just to watch your performance! I'm a big fan.

C: 再抬杠就滚蛋！
E: If you're only here to play devil's advocate, you can get lost.

C: 这袋子里不知装着多少人的精神垃圾。
E: Who knows how many people's mental trash is in this bag.

C: 平平无奇的面包房，却是能给所有人带来幸福和满足的心灵港湾。
E: An ordinary bakery. Yet, it is a haven that brings happiness and warmth to everyone's souls.

C: 形似贝壳的深眠装置，质感奢华。躺进其中之后，催眠气体便会包裹你的全身。
E: A shell-shaped deep-sleep device, luxuriously crafted. When you lie down inside, hypnotic gases will envelop your body.

C: 你注意到一道冷冷的视线——原来是一尊猎犬雕像。
E: A cold presence catches your attention. It is a statue of a Hound.

C: 我想，你大概也是他们中的一员。收下这些艾迪恩代币吧——奋力逐梦的同时，也别忘了偶尔犒劳一下自己。
E: I suppose you're one of them. Please take these Aideen Tokens. Don't forget to treat yourself while you're striving for your dream.

C: 我想，你大概也是他们中的一员。
E: I suppose you're one of them.

C: 你听过「心灵测绘法」吗？
E: Have you heard of psychological topography?

C: 家族接管了狂放的梦境，在混乱不堪的空间里造出了绝景，这本身不就是伟大创造力的显现吗？
E: The Family took charge of the untamed Dreamscape and created a masterpiece out of this anarchic space. Wasn't that a manifestation of great creativity?

C: …您先别急着走！我们给您推荐的产品呢，是不产生任何费用的，就算暂时不需要，也可以关注下，对您没坏处的。
E: ...Please don't go just yet! You don't have to pay any extra costs for this product. Even if you don't need it for the time being, there's no harm in learning more about it.

C: 瞧见对面那座富丽堂皇的大楼了吧？不瞒您说，那位投资者正是我们的顶级客户，他来找我们的时候，还只是个刚来匹诺康尼的逐梦客，口袋里除了梦想什么都没有。
E: See that grand building across the street? That investor is one of our top clients! When he first approached us, he was just a Dreamchaser new to Penacony with nothing but dreams in his pockets.

C: 大家都想要和橡木家系的成员套近乎，却没人想和笨罐先生做朋友。
E: Everyone just wants to cozy up to the Oak Family, but no one wants to be friends with Mr. Piggy Bank.

C: 好呀。不过请别忘了，这是个梦的世界：您的所见所闻可都做不得真。
E: Sure. But don't forget, this is a dream world: Nothing you see or hear is real.

C: …皮皮西人是全宇宙最勤奋的种族。
E: ... Pepeshi people are the most hard-working species in the universe.
Woo...

C: 去看看吧。
E: Go take a look.

C: 什么师生之情，培育之恩……
E: So what — a teacher and a student, this nurturing kindness...

C: 维塔利将玻璃瓶牵了过来。一见面，它直接空翻了三个跟头……
E: Vitali leads Mr. Glass Bottle to you. The moment your eyes meet, it flips three times in the air...

C: 呃，毕竟这段舞蹈的「道具特色」比较重，一般人的确不好配合。
E: Er, this dance may be too focused on the "item's characteristics" and it's hard for ordinary people to follow.

C: 绘画就是我的生命。能自由地挥动画笔，为这个世界留下属于我的印记，这是赐福，也是……
E: Painting is my life. The freedom to brandish my paintbrush and leave my personal mark in this world is a blessing and a...

C: 或许如此，但我仍好奇这背后的故事。真希望能与这位伟大的同僚亲自见上一面。
E: Perhaps, but I still want to know the story behind this. I really wish I could meet this great fellow craftsman of mine in person.

C: 是他邀请我们来到这场盛会。
E: It was he who invited us to this celebration.

C: 聊聊「钟表匠」
E: Let's talk about the Watchmaker.

C: …破窗效应？
E: ...The broken windows effect?

C: 作为来宾，希望你能遵守《入梦守则》，不要给他人造成负面的梦境体验。
E: As a guest, I hope you will abide by the Dreaming Regulations, and refrain from burdening others with a bad experience in the Dreamscape.

C: 啊！商店街那些不长眼的逐梦客，真是一想就来气！
E: Bah! I get irate just at the thought of those short-sighted dream-chasing fools on the shopping street!

C: 你来匹诺康尼做什么？
E: What are you doing in Penacony?

C: 有点夸大其词…
E: That's a bit of an exaggeration...

C: 唔…或许成为有机生命并不是理解伟大音乐的先决条件。
E: Hmm... Perhaps organic life isn't a prerequisite to understanding great music.

C: 说真的，您这个问题把我逗笑了。要是需要手动驾驶，我也不会向您保证绝对不会出事故了呀。
E: Haha, your question tickles me. Even with manual driving, I can't guarantee that there won't be accidents.

C: 如何评价「黄金的时刻」？
E: How do you rate Golden Hour?

C: 到头来，我只有在梦里、变成别人认不出的样子，才能稍稍展露本心……
E: In the end, it's only in the dream world where I can become someone that no one recognizes that I can truly show my authentic self.

C: 我一度觉得这是常盘国文艺创作开始步入正轨的结果，直到来到匹诺康尼，我才恍然惊觉…自己是不是已经扼杀了无数潜在的天才？
E: I once believed that this was a result of Tokiwa's literary creations being on the right track. That wasn't until I came to Penacony that I suddenly realized... I might have killed the creativity of countless potential geniuses.

C: 我做了很多年的教育科学省大臣，非常清楚匹诺康尼动漫产业所蕴含的市场潜力…只要他们有心去做更进一步的商业化运作，那常盘国的二次元帝国必将遭受一场浩劫……
E: I've served as the Minister of Education and Technology for many years, so I know very well the market potential contained within the Penacony anime industry... All it takes would be for them to increase their market operations, and the Tokiwa anime empire would fall into catastrophe...

C: 抱歉，我的用词有些过分。我绝对没有侮辱你或其他有机生命的故意…如果你受到了冒犯，我诚恳道歉。
E: My apologies. My use of words was a little harsh. I do not intend to mock you or other organic lifeforms... If I have offended you, please accept my sincere apologies.

C: 不过恐怕光凭我自己，是很难扭转这矫饰主义的风气了。
E: Though I fear that it will not be easy for me to reverse this trend of pretentious aesthetics alone.

C: 其实大家对我也有所误会…我并非先天就是个呆板的老学究，我曾经也是个充满激情的建筑师。我做过那样的建筑师，所以我才知道那样是不行的。
E: People actually misunderstand me... I have not always been a rigid old pedant. I used to be an extremely enthusiastic young architect. It is precisely because I have lived as this kind of architect that I know it does not work.

C: 于是你继续追寻那些音符。你们一路相伴，穿越沉黑的湖底、坠入深蓝的永夜、跌进冷白的孤月……
E: And so, you continue to chase after his musical notes. Together, you traverse the darkness at the bottom of the lake, the deep blue of the eternal night, and the cold white of the lonesome moon...

C: 那你一定听说过布洛妮娅了？
E: You must have heard of Bronya, right?

C: 您就是那位啊，我们之前见过的，记得吗？
E: Of course I know! You are... the individual we met before, right?

C: 每年都有近百位偷渡客被救出，其后续治疗费用并不在旅游保险范围内。
E: Each year, we rescue nearly a hundred stowaways, and the costs of their treatment are not covered by insurance.

C: 2、请保持面部朝上，避免在入梦池中溺水的风险。
E: 2. Please ensure that your face is positioned upwards to prevent any risk of drowning in the Dreampool.

C: 以及，请勿在梦中剽窃他人身份、窥探他人隐私。家族将对此类行为做出精准且严厉的打击。
E: Please do not impersonate others or invade their privacy in the Dreamscape. The Family takes strict actions against such violations.

C: 还想聊聊其他的…
E: I'd like to talk about something else...

C: 安全着陆？
E: Did you land safely?

C: （屏住呼吸）
E: (Holding your breath)

C: …看来银狼还在为之前大赛上的失利耿耿于怀。果然，不氪金就变强是只有梦里才会发生的事。
E: ...It appears that Silver Wolf is still frustrated by her loss in the previous tournament. Indeed, a game without any pay-to-win elements is something that only appears in dreams.

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
E: "What would that vibrant world look like?"

C: 抱歉，贵宾…只要给我一点时间就好……
E: I'm sorry, esteemed guest... I need a little more time...

C: 许多男人和女人都做过开着大机器人拯救城市的梦——倘若真把这玩具放大一千倍，它或许也能毁灭城市。
E: Many have dreamt of rescuing the city by piloting giant robots. If this toy could be magnified a thousand times, it might indeed be capable of destroying the city.

C: 嗯！时间能换成金钱，这位朋友。我必须向你收取足够高昂的费用，请相信，这也是为了维护世界的正义。
E: Of course! Time is money, my friend. I must charge you a substantial fee, but please believe me it is to uphold the justice in the world.

C: 你把我买回来，应该花了不少钱吧。这不行，疾风侠可不能有欠于人啊。
E: I must have cost you an arm and a leg, right? I can't allow myself to be indebted to anyone.

C: 我呢，虽然是贵了点，你也够不太上，但钱都花了，总得派上点用场。不妨就把我停在车位里，也算是给你撑门面了。
E: I actually cost more than you can afford, but since you've already paid for me, you might as well put me to some use. You can keep me in the parking spot to boost your image.

C: 还不等你提出要取钱，钞票就从机器内喷涌而出。
E: Before you even request a withdrawal, money bursts forth from the machine.

C: 呃…这么安排是为了让您在获奖的兴奋之余，还能充分享受探索带来的满足感！没错，设计如此！
E: Um... It's arranged that way so that you can feel the excitement of winning a prize as well as enjoy the process of discovering the uses of the card! Yes, that's the concept!

C: 不聊了。
E: That's it for today.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's it. Bye-bye.

C: 里奥的表情冷若冰霜。他没有说话，也没人敢去搭话。
E: Leo wears a frosty expression. He isn't uttering a word, and no one dares to talk to him.

C: 你好啊。如果需要找人倾诉的话，我愿意聆听。
E: Hello there. If you have anything to get off your chest, I'm all ears.

C: 自我介绍下，我是家族中最为幸运和强大的皮皮西——我拥有神主赐予的高科技战斗机甲！
E: Let me tell you something about myself — I'm the luckiest and strongest Pepeshi in The Family. I have a high-tech combat mech bestowed by the Great One!

C: 对哦，只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视它的光辉，像你这样的外宾什么也看不到…真可惜。
E: I almost forgot about this — only {RUBY_B#members of The Family}"kinsmen"{RUBY_E#} can see its glow. It's a shame that it isn't visible to an outsider like you.

C: 你是怎么得到战甲的？
E: How did you get the armor?

C: 我明白了，是我的热血在燃烧！一想到梦境里的种种乱象，我的炮口就开始蠢蠢欲动！
E: I've got it! The heat comes from my burning enthusiasm! I feel the urge to fire my cannon every time I think of the chaotic situation in the dream!

C: 真无聊啊…干什么都提不起劲儿来……
E: I'm so bored... Nothing I do seems to get me fired up anymore...

C: 那你要当无名客吗？
E: So, you want to be a Nameless?

C: 不过…倒是不能理解那些「逐梦客」是怎么想的，毕竟是匹诺康尼嘛…哈哈……
E: Although, I can understand how these Dreamchasers feel... This is Penacony after all... Haha

C: 哈…现在我也分不清楚了——我没法忍受的究竟是家庭的巨变，还是当时那个没用的自己？
E: Ah... Now, I can't quite tell... Was it the changes in my family that I could not stand, or the fact that I was so powerless?

C: 我打电话给我爸那个老顽固，说打算回匹诺康尼度个长假，结果…结果他居然通知了猎犬家系来酒店抓我！他就是贪图公司给的那笔悬赏金！
E: I called my stubborn old man and told him I'd be taking a long vacation back in Penacony. You know what happened...? He informed the Bloodhound Family and told them to come and capture me at the hotel! He wants the bounty that the IPC put out on me!

C: 聊聊你自己怎么样？
E: Why not tell me about yourself?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>调饮…就是对话的过程。</color>我现在算是越来越体会到这点了。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Mixing drinks... is like the art of conversation.</color> I feel like I'm coming to understand this more and more.

C: …不是吧，这么老套的梗都有人喜欢？莫非是我的表演技巧太好了？
E: No way, there's someone who likes even an cliché line like that one? Or could it be that my acting skills are just too amazing?

C: 哎！它就是个苏乐达的派送员，懂什么看门。不像我——嗓音洪亮，高大威猛，往这一站，特别有范！要是再穿个黑西装，就更有排场了！
E: Hah! They're just the SoulGlad deliveryman, what would they know about being a door attendant? They're not like me... They don't have a loud and clear voice. They aren't tall and mighty, capable of leaving a lasting impression! If I only had a tuxedo on, I'd be perfect!

C: 开心点呀，人家要和你表演的是甜甜的喜剧。
E: Cheer up! We're supposed to be performing a sweet comedic piece together!

C: 我现在这么出名了？
E: Am I that famous now?

C: 可是，我只看过电影，飞船以外的细节完全做不出来。所以入梦之后，我就只能在船舱里孤零零地飘着，一直飘到梦醒。
E: But I had only seen the movies, so I couldn't think of any details other than the ship. Once I entered the dream, all I could do was float around by myself inside the ship until I woke up.

C: 我想通了…什么用辛苦创造财富，其实、其实都是假的！骗人的！
E: I've figured it out... All this talk of working hard to create wealth is actually nothing more than a fantasy! It's a scam!

C: 是叫这个吗？感觉不太对劲…反正她还黑进了过庇尔波因特的公司总部，声称要炸掉那里来着。
E: Was that the name? Doesn't sound right to me... Anyway, she hacked into Pier Point's HQ before and claimed she was going to blow the whole place up.

C: …嘤嘤嘤？
E: ...*eep, eep*?

C: 你的经验对我而言，将会是非常宝贵的素材，所以你愿意再和我多聊聊吗？
E: Your experience would provide extremely valuable material for a person like me. So would you like to chat a little more with me?

C: 唉，愉快的时光总是这么短暂……
E: *sigh* Good times never seem to last long...

C: 怎么说呢，这人虽然自负得很，但确实有些实力或是倚仗…我自认好歹算个经验丰富的记者，但从他身上愣是套不出半点有用的消息。
E: But — how to put this? Despite being conceited, he does actually have some real strength and background... I thought I was this experienced journalist, but I couldn't manage to get any useful info out of him.

C: …啊…抱歉，我走神了，我只是稍微有点…迷茫？
E: ...Ah ...Sorry, I was a little distracted there. I just got a little... confused?

C: 说实话，我对你身上的秘密真的非常好奇……
E: Honestly, I'm really curious to hear about some of your secrets...

C: 算你识相。记住，我最讨厌别人打扰我工作！
E: If you know what's good for you. Remember, I hate people interfering with my job!

C: 你可以在「朝露公馆」生活。
E: You could live in the Dewlight Pavilion?

C: 是吧。这地方和城里是没法比，可足够有人情味。大家互相照顾，日子还算过得去。
E: Yep. Though it can't compare to the big city, there's something more human about this place. Everyone takes care of each other and life isn't bad.

C: 说起来嘛，就是我家里那档事。我的兄弟姐妹不少，个个都是各行各业的领军人物。我嘛，就是搞搞自己喜欢的事业……
E: Now I'm talking about it, I have problems with my family. I have many siblings who are leading figures in various industries. Me? I'm just doing something I enjoy...

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 钟表匠…你到底在哪儿呢？
E: Watchmaker... Just where have you gone?

C: 原本我以为流梦礁会是整段冒险的高潮，高低得在这里发生一段激烈的打斗，然后感悟出宇宙真谛什么的……
E: I thought that Dreamflux Reef was going to be the crux of the entire adventure. I thought that I would be cast into fierce battle and come to understand the truths of the universe...

C: 呼，难得有人愿意一口气听我说这么多——梦里的人都不喜欢种田，看来你是个可塑之才啊！
E: Phew, it's rare to find someone willing to listen to me sharing all of this... No one in the dream enjoys farming. But it seems that you could be someone I could work with!

C: 哟，是你啊。
E: Ah, it's you.

C: 流梦礁…就要消失了吗……
E: Is the Dreamflux Reef... going to disappear...?

C: 如果他们能够看到现在的流梦礁，那该多好。
E: If only they could witness the Dreamflux Reef as it stands today, that would be truly remarkable.

C: 但就在我要把它记下来时——一股莫名的悲伤惊醒了我，我的枕头也被泪水浸湿了……
E: But just as I was about to jot it down... An unknown wave of sadness woke me. My pillow was also soaked with tears...

C: 一不小心就跟您聊上了，瞧我这坏毛病。不耽误您的时间了，祝您玩得愉快！
E: Pardon me. Looks like I've held you up with my long conversation. I won't take up any more of your time. Have fun!

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 听说有人私自利用钟表小子的形象为自己牟利，简直太可恶了！
E: I heard that someone is privately exploiting the image of Clockie for their own gain. This is simply abhorrent!

C: 记录正在发生的历史，这正是我来匹诺康尼的目的。不过，记录员也不止我一个，但活到今天的，就只有我了。
E: Documenting the history as it is happening is my purpose of coming to Penacony. Of course, I'm not the only archiver, but I'm the only surviving one.

C: ——毕竟，本店的宗旨就是「用音乐为大家带来欢乐」。
E: ...I mean after all, our store motto here is "Bring joy to the world through music."

C: 苏打豆汁。
E: Mung Bean Soda.

C: 当我离开家族来到流梦礁之后，曾有一段迷茫无助的时间——我开了一家咖啡店，但大家视我为间谍和敌人，生意寥寥无几，快到了倒闭的边缘。
E: When I first left The Family and came to the Dreamflux Reef, I had this period of helpless confusion — I opened up a cafe but was viewed as a spy and the enemy. Business dwindled, and we were quickly on the brink of bankruptcy.

C: 有一天我鼓足勇气向他道谢，他微笑着向我点头，送了一幅钟表小子的画给我，并称赞了我的手艺。
E: One day, I worked up the courage to approach him, but he just laughed and nodded at me. He gave me a picture of Clockie, and praised me for my baking skills.

C: 总之，只要你找回足够数量的小鸟，我就会给你对应的奖励。
E: Anyway, I'll give you your just rewards as long as you get enough birds back.

C: 只要注意别让它们跑到梦境之外就好——哦，但我不算，我属于特例。
E: Just make sure they don't get outside the Dreamscape — oh, except for me I mean. I'm the exception.

C: 嗯？看来你已经找到剩下的小鸟了。
E: Hmm? Looks like you've found the remaining birds.

C: 关于猫头鹰老师…
E: About Professor Owl...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个擅长拍摄的小家伙，特别喜欢热血的场面，最近一直沉迷在<color=#dbc291ff>动作派的现场</color>拍戏啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a fella that's great at photography, and loves places that get your blood pumping. It's recently been obsessed with productions at the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Action site</color>, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子是钟表小子的粉丝，只要看到钟表就往人家怀里钻，<color=#dbc291ff>路上的时钟先生们</color>都很为难啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a child that's a fan of Clockie. It just runs into their arms every time it sees a clock. <color=#dbc291ff>The clocks along the road</color> must be at a loss, tweet!

C: 群星投下异彩，如恋人含情眉眼\n魂灵升腾迷狂，似枯苗饱饮清泉
E: The stars cast myriad colors, like the eyes of a lover.\nThe soul ascends in ecstasy, like a withered sapling gulping springwater.

C: 说的不对吗？
E: Are they wrong?

C: 我的肉身恐怕早已磨灭。现在呈现在你面前的这个形象，大概和很久以前刚刚步入梦境的那个米凯无异。
E: I'm afraid my flesh is already long gone. The image I portray before you now is probably no different from the Micah who first entered the Dreamscape.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 他们曾是她的伙伴、她的病人，而那时他们依旧如生前般簇拥着她。
E: These puppets were her erstwhile companions and patients once. They all surrounded her, just as they did while she was still alive.

C: …这样啊…好的，我知道了，我会尽早处理的……
E: Hm... I see... Alright, I'll deal with it as soon as possible...

C: 您听过赖斯家族吗？没听过也无妨，不过是个经营地产生意的小家族罢了。
E: Have you heard of the Rice Family before? It's fine if you haven't. After all, we are but a small family that manages a real estate business, that's all.

C: 不知为何，你总觉得「米粒」是一个非常重要的伏笔。
E: For some reason, you think that the mention of "rice" foreshadows something extremely important.

C: 把钱放在哪里不动，你可能在不受任何损失的情况下越来越穷——这种话他们是听不进去的。
E: If you try to tell them their money will naturally devalue over time, it won't stick in their minds.

C: 当然，她是现在那个最火的真人秀的特邀嘉宾。我还给她出过碟呢…嘿嘿，我可是给她花重金开了个娱乐公司的，旗下就只签了她一个。
E: That's right. She's the special guest in that reality show that's been making its rounds everywhere. I even released an album for her... Heh, I really went all in for her, going as far as to start an entertainment company, with her as the only talent.

C: 有时候，你明知道当事人并不清白，但你还是得给对方当狗。我刚参加工作的时候就常常在想…世界上真的有所谓的正义吗？
E: There are times when your client is obviously guilty, but you're still required to go all out to represent and defend them. When I first started my job, I couldn't stop asking myself if justice truly exists in this world.

C: 那些家伙脑子里是不是进了水…？！
E: Are those guys soft in the head!?

C: 是的啾！叶子店长特别喜欢这艘游艇，为了建造它，可是花费了好多闪亮亮的石头啾！
E: Yes, tweet! Shopkeeper Leaf really loves this airship. In order to construct it, he had to spend many glittering stones, tweet!

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Forget it.

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，都送给你啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. It's all yours, tweet!

C: 我才不是复读机！船长，真的是您啊？！您想说森么就唆什么——啊，抱歉，沃还在雪洗您的法——咳咳咳咳……
E: I'm not a repeater! Captain, it's really you!? Just say hwat's on your mine — ahhh, I'm sorry, eye'm steel trying to lurn your pronun— *cough cough*

C: 现在在搞活动，已经是最低价了，不能再低了，汪！
E: We're having a promotion now, so it's already at the lowest possible price. I can't lower it any further, woof!

C: 好的，您忙您的去吧，不用管我！
E: Got it, feel free to go back to what you were busy with! Don't mind me!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 即使是繁忙的工作时间，达夫的脸上也总是挂着笑容。
E: Dahf always wears a smile on his face, no matter how busy his work gets.

C: 住客们有什么反馈吗？
E: Any feedback from the guests?

C: 船长，您找我是有什么事吗？
E: How can I help you, captain?

C: 呜…我搞砸了和哈鲁小姐的初次见面…我从入学起就暗恋她了……
E: *sob* I messed up my first meeting with Haru. I've had a crush on her since day one.

C: …行，算我求你，可千万别抖出去。
E: ...Fine, I'll tell you. But you have to keep it a secret.

C: 我还想和你聊聊
E: Can we talk a little more?

C: 哎，真是搞不懂，就事论事有那么难嘛？有机会的话，你还是来现场看看吧，观感绝对和梦泡见到的不一样。
E: Ah, I just don't get it. Is it really that hard to just appreciate our performances for what they are? If they get the opportunity, they should just come and watch us perform live. The experience is always going to be different from watching us in a dream bubble.

C: 我反正懒得看他们那点事，喜剧是要带给人快乐的，这种笑不出来的事情，我反正不想搭理。
E: I don't have the energy to get involved with these trivial matters, though. Comedy is supposed to make people happy! I don't want to pay any mind to things like this that won't make anyone laugh.

C: 哎，有时候我在想，我是不是该放弃自己的理想…比起一夜成名这种梦，果然还是老实打灰，考到筑梦师资格证更现实吧。
E: Ah... Sometimes I wonder if I should just give up on my ideals... Maybe making an honest living in engineering and getting my dreamweaver qualification is more realistic than some dream of overnight fame.

C: 但…绩点无法规定学员的未来，作为学院代表，我必须顾虑更多。
E: But... grades can't dictate a student's future. As the academy representative, I must consider this carefully.

C: 都说艺术是永恒的，可作为创作者，我的身体和精神又能撑多久？
E: It's said that art is eternal. But as a creator, how much longer can my body and spirit endure?

C: 大佬就是大佬，思想高度果然不一样，多亏你提醒我！
E: No wonder you're the boss. Your thinking is just on another level. Thanks for the reminder.

C: 只要我脚踏实地，我和老爹迟早能过上好日子的！
E: As long as I stay grounded, my old man and I can live a good life sooner or later!

C: 能给我签名吗？
E: Can I have your autograph?

C: 我一直不怎么懂同龄人的潮流，也看不懂网上层出不穷的怪话…这些东西就像限定甜品一样，大家在上架时着急去品尝，但下架后就会很快遗忘它的口味……
E: I've never been familiar with the trends of people my age, and I don't understand all that weird lingo on the internet... It's like limited-edition desserts — everyone's rushing to get a bite when they first come out, but the taste is quickly forgotten once they go off shelves...

C: 因此，调制饮品、制作点心，收集诸位无名客的饮食数据和用餐偏好，生成合适菜单，除了这些本职工作，我还时常更新自己的核心算法，下载一些补充包。
E: Therefore, mixing drinks, making snacks, collecting the Nameless' food data and dining preferences and generating suitable menus — apart from these jobs, I also regularly update my own core algorithms and download update packs.

C: 那位慈玉女士的阴影仍投射在我身上。
E: The shadow of Lady Bonajade still looms over me.

C: 哦，该不会是要我补票吧？
E: Oh? Don't tell me I'm supposed to pay for the ride...

C: 不过，我建议在做好准备前，还是不要贸然打听这群人的消息。因为这部分「记忆」…会让你在他们的视线中暴露无遗。
E: But until you're ready, I highly recommend not inquiring about them. Having this "memory" could reveal your presence before you.

C: 贵宾票请前往一号口，普通票请前往二号口，家族成员请前往三号口——都什么时候了，还惦记这几号口有意义吗？
E: Guests with VIP tickets, please proceed to Gate No. 1. Those with regular tickets, please go to Gate No. 2. Family members are to go to Gate No. 3. What's the point of remembering these gate numbers at a time like this?

C: 「想加入我们吗？快来参加汽水海选吧！让世界因你的气泡而颤抖！」
E: "Wanna join us? Come sign up for the soda elections! Let the world tremble before your carbonation!"

C: 在摆弄片刻后，瞭望镜的镜头对准物体自动缩放——
E: After fiddling with it for a moment, the telescope's lens is aimed at an object and auto-zooms...

C: 瞭望镜视野里的景色是如此开阔，以至于令你生出某种错觉——在云端漂浮太久，就会成为物理意义上的「高高在上的人」，这或许并不是好事。
E: The scenery through the telescope is vast, so vast that it evokes some delusions in you — floating among the clouds for too long would physically make one "in the clouds," which isn't necessarily a good thing.

C: 无法打开的抽屉，这可能是某种测试，你抛下球棒摩拳擦掌决定一试——在你用尽力气打开后，才发现它们只是锈住了。
E: The unopenable drawers could be a test. You drop your baseball bat and rub your palms together to give it an honest go — it is only after you expend your entire strength opening them that you notice they are just rusted.

C: 在冒险旅途中手太痒的人多半没什么好下场，你在某些故事里听说过类似的故事。
E: While adventuring, curiosity often kills the cat. You've heard many such stories before.

C: 我也是没办法…您看，泳池边小孩子挺多的，我们监管起来也有难处…感谢您的配合！
E: But I have no choice as well... As you can see, there are so many children at the pool, so it's difficult for us to supervise as well... We really thank you for your cooperation!

C: 房卡…我把房卡放哪了？
E: The hotel keycard... Where did I put the hotel keycard?

C: 就只是看电影喔？
E: So, we're just watching a movie, that's it?

C: 你是说，阿基维利的梦？
E: You mean, Akivili's dream?

C: 我好喜欢钟表小子。
E: I really love Clockie.

C: 哈哈，正中下怀！
E: Haha. Exactly what I want to see!

C: 让梦境再次伟大！
E: Let's make dreams great again!

C: 既要惊险，又要浪漫…
E: They want it to be exciting yet romantic...

C: 我是那样地爱你…
E: I love you so much...

C: 大概率是高度问题…
E: Probably a height issue, I guess...

C: 还是年轻人靠得住。
E: Young folks can be trusted.

C: 真是优美的曲子~
E: What a beautiful song...

C: 快给我来一口！
E: Give me some, quickly!

C: 可恶，被那个蓝毛给骗了！
E: Darnnit! That blue-haired weasel!

C: 嗯…通过词性变换造就承续与转折，从而实现「幽默」效果……
E: Hmmm... using word changes to create continuations and twists... and thus effects of "humor"...

C: 不，我是让你去说单口相声。
E: No, I'm asking you to do a comedy skit.

C: 来访的人好多。
E: It's so crowded here.

C: 你这是什么反应？别忘了这可是梦里，一堆礼物盒都能说话，美梦排排乐为什么就不能爱上立牌？
E: What is that reaction? This is a dream you know! If a pile of presents can talk, then why can't a Dreamy Slots machine fall in love with a character stand?

C: 我认为与其担心被狗仔队偷拍，你不如多关注下宇宙毁灭的可能性——至少后者比前者概率高得多。
E: I think, rather than worrying about being snapped by the paparazzi, you should spend your time thinking about the destruction of the universe... At least that is actually likely!

C: 这次比赛你押注了吗？
E: Did you place a bid on this competition?

C: 我需要重新考虑我们的合作关系。
E: I need to reconsider our partnership.

C: 就当花钱买个教训。
E: Treat it as paying for a hard lesson learned.

C: 星期日怎么可能是叛徒？绝对是哪里弄错了。
E: How could Sunday be a traitor? This must be some mistake.

C: 你真不知道发生了什么？明明那位家主在剧院弄出这么大动静？
E: Do you really not know what's happening? Even after that family head obviously made such a ruckus at the theater?

C: 被誉为黄金风暴的兄妹。
E: Known as the Siblings of the Golden Storm.

C: 可以一个一个问吗…
E: Can you ask one question at a time...

C: 你的梦想是什么来着？
E: What was your dream again?

C: 呼呼——
E: *snore* *snore*...

C: 别再给我倒苏乐达了！
E: Don't pour anymore SoulGlad for me!

C: 你们有潜水服务吗？
E: Do you have diving services?

C: 哈哈，我看见他们偷拍的照片了，别说，拍得还挺好。
E: Haha, I saw the photos they secretly took. Honestly, they were quite well taken.

C: 谐乐学院禁止用储物柜存放乐器，以免造成损伤，但自动乐团似乎不在管控范围内。因此在寂静无人的时候，经常能听到缥缈的乐声从走廊深处传来。
E: Charmony Academy prohibits the storage of instruments in lockers to avoid damage, but such rules apparently don't apply to the automated orchestra. This is why one can regularly hear music drift through the corridors in times silent and deserted.

C: 「恒星能灯泡」「风能风扇」「往人脸上拍的一次性蛋糕」——好像也就最后一个有点用。
E: Stellar energy lightbulbs, wind-powered fans, one-time cakes used to shove in people's faces — it appears only the last one is somewhat useful.

C: 「人生并非只有快乐的事！前往折纸大学的顶点！」你再三确认，这是吹奏部招新的宣传广告，这令你想起某部校园题材的热血青春剧的剧情。
E: "Life isn't just only about happy things! Head to the summit of Paperfold University!" You re-confirm that this is a promotional recruitment ad for the Band Club — This reminds you of the plot of a certain school-themed, passionate youth drama.

C: 我本来是男高音部的成员，按理说应该站后排。可我个子矮，在后面就看不见指挥了，所以我就混进了低音部，就跟着周围人唱错了……
E: As a tenor, I am supposed to stand in the back row of the choir. However, I'm so short that I wouldn't be able to see the conductor if I stood at the back. While I tried to blend in with the baritones after that, I got distracted and sang the wrong notes...

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 跟它玩一会儿吧。
E: Why not play with it a little?

C: 它对「床」的兴趣不大。还是在地上打滚比较自由。
E: It doesn't seem very interested in the bed. Rolling around on the floor feels freer.

C: 我深知我的不知足，但…墨涅塔在上，描绘翁法罗斯的岁月才是我提笔的初衷——从已绝迹的飞狮走兽，到泰坦开天辟地的神话史诗，再到早已消亡的泰坦秘仪……
E: I know my limits, but... praise Mnestia, chronicling the years of Amphoreus is my original inspiration. I aim to portray everything related to it, from extinct manticores to the Titans' epics, and their long-lost rituals...

C: 不过那个城邦早就已经消失啦，如今市面上能见到的紫纱都是人工合成的，染剂也都换成了蓝菘石和赤叶草。
E: But Pyria has long been a thing of the past. Today's purple silk is synthetic, and the dye was changed to blue brassica stones and redleaf grass.

C: 很久以前，人们在前往奥赫玛的途中，面临的最大困难并非食物短缺、黑潮泛滥，而是洁净水源的匮乏。这也是「粗制葡萄秘酿」的由来。
E: In the past, the biggest challenge for travelers heading to Okhema was finding clean water, even worse than lacking food or the threat of the black tide. That's how the Crude Grape Brew came to be.

C: 我不是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒，你也别添乱了。
E: I'm not a believer of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Don't make things more complicated.

C: 所以机会难得，你有什么想问自己的吗？
E: So, this is a rare opportunity — anything you want to ask yourself?

C: 退化到故事的开始。
E: Regress to the beginning of the story.

C: 哎，你等等！
E: Hey, hold on a sec!

C: 哈哈，初来乍到时大家多少都会有些不适应。不过要是待得久了，你就会发现奥赫玛还是挺宜居的——无论气候、环境还是生活节奏。
E: Aha, it can take some time for everyone to get used to things at first, but once you do, you'll see that Okhema is quite cozy — that goes for the weather, the surroundings, and the lifestyle.

C: 我懂，山之民当卫兵，更符合，人们的期待。而且，悄悄做饭，我也还行。
E: I know, being a guard sounds more like what a Mountain Dweller should do. Plus, I can cook in secret. I can live with that.

C: 我倒也没有那么闲。
E: I'm not really that idle.

C: 你有自己的作品吗？
E: Do you write your own poems, too?

C: 就像艺术家们说，欧洛尼斯所代表的永夜是最适合激发创作灵感的事物。而对于我而言，能够激发思考的是它——云石天宫的瀑布。
E: Just as the artists say, the eternal night that Oronyx symbolizes is a thing most suited to spark the inspiration of creation. And to me, the thing that stimulates my thoughts is this — Marmoreal Palace's waterfall.

C: 譬如阁下所着，若仅论其用料与织工，我自然能挑出无数瑕疵。
E: When it comes to your clothing, I can naturally point out countless flaws in simply the material and craftsmanship.

C: 但沿着金丝，我能感受到这套衣裳上的「浪漫」——庞鸿而不紊乱，如同交汇而不拥堵的道路。我并无信心做出比它更能承载阁下光辉的服饰。
E: But by following the golden thread, I can sense the "romance" in it... Convoluted but not chaotic, like a bustling crossroad that is never stalled with traffic. I am confident that it would be impossible for me to create anything that would be more suited to your glory.

C: 为了尽可能不损伤它们，我还特地去找阿格莱雅大人学了些针线手艺。若阁下不嫌弃，我之后也可以送你些做的东西。
E: I learned sewing techniques from lady Aglaea to ensure that I do not damage them in the process. I could gift you some in the future if you'd like to have some.

C: 我并无来到哀地里亚之前的记忆；据他们说，我被哀地里亚收留以前一直在荒原上彷徨游荡。
E: I have no memories of the time before I came to Aidonia. From what I'm told, I was merely a drifter who wandered the wastelands until Aidonia took me in.

C: 人生或许真的是一个故事，但大部分人可能都不是故事的主角。
E: Life may really all be one big story, but most people aren't the protagonists of their own story.

C: 还有人说，大地兽能预知灾厄呢。你别笑，真的！在我很小的时候有次我看到一群大地兽突然躁动不安，没过多久，旁边的巨树倒下了，吓得我那会儿腿都软了。
E: Some people also believe that dromases can predict disasters. Don't laugh, it's true! Once, when I was very young, I saw a herd of dromases suddenly grow restless. Not long after, a giant tree nearby fell. I remember being weak at the knees with fright.

C: 哎哟，吓我一跳！你从哪里冒出来的…而且…在这件事上无论怎么看都是浴场那边在为难我吧？
E: Yikes, you freaked me out! Where did you come from... And... no matter which way you look at this, it's the baths who are putting me out here, right?

C: 我推测，这种泉水或许能够逐渐激发黄金裔体内的潜能，在长期浸润下，因而得到了微量的泰坦之力。
E: I am guessing that this water may gradually trigger latent powers within the Chrysos Heirs, and with long-term submersion, they have gained slight amounts of Titan power.

C: 你有什么有趣的发现吗？
E: Any interesting discoveries?

C: 没事，逛逛。
E: Nothing. Just browsing.

C: 那以前呢？
E: And before that?

C: 好的，请慢慢享受，客人。有需要再叫我。
E: Alright, please enjoy yourself, dear customer. If you need anything, please come and ask.

C: 好在如今还有另一个选择——来自黑潮的怪物。据说它们有千眼百手，浑身尖刺，足以让最勇敢的战士不寒而栗……
E: Good thing there's another option now — monsters from the black tide. They're said to have hundreds of eyes and arms, their bodies lined with spines, leaving even the bravest of warriors quaking in their boots...

C: 哗啦啦…哗啦啦……浪潮的声音再次于你耳边响起……
E: *splssh* ... *splssh* ...The sounds of waves reach your ears once again...

C: 跟我说说这个地方吧。
E: Tell me about this place.

C: 缇宝？
E: Tribbie?

C: 我所售的秘酿瓶口紧封，瓶身别无二致。饮用方式也有规矩，必须揭开木塞后一饮而尽，等待「满溢之杯」的平静或激荡。如此放弃理性的抉择正是它乐于见到的……
E: The ambrosia I sell is tightly sealed, its bottle unremarkable. There are also rules to drinking it. After uncorking the bottle, you must down it in one go, then await the calming or stirring of the Chalice of Plenty. Such a decision in abandoning your inhibitions is what the Titan delights in...

C: …等等！口中的回味…怎么变得…像…像…洗澡水？？？
E: ...Hang on! This aftertaste in my mouth... Why does it taste like... like... bathwater???

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 一段略感熟悉的跫音…今日竟有幸再度相逢，你好，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: Sounds of footfalls somewhat familiar... We meet again, how fortunate. Hello, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 这个姐姐我好像见过。
E: I think I've seen this lady before.

C: 还会做奇怪的梦么？
E: Do you still have strange dreams?

C: 虽然阿格莱雅大人禁止我继续探索「天外之界」，但我对世界的好奇心不会停止。要是有兴趣的话，可以随时来找我聊天。
E: Though Lady Aglaea has forbidden me from further exploring the world beyond the sky, my curiosity remains unabated. If you're interested, feel free to chat with me anytime.

C: 分享令人激动的发现是改变的第一步——祝我成功吧，「异乡人」阁下！
E: Sharing exciting discoveries is the first step toward change — wish me luck, esteemed outlander!

C: 但，谢谢。
E: But, thank you.

C: 卫兵将头转回，不再理会你。随即，周遭传来了窃窃私语的声音。
E: The guard turns away, ignoring you completely. Shortly thereafter, whispers begin to echo around you.

C: 哎，辩论才是获取真理的方式。不经由讨论便得到的知识，与盲信有什么区别？
E: Ah, but debate is the only method to obtain the truth. Is there any difference between knowledge that has not undergone discussion and blind faith?

C: 将其转换为更直接的论题，便是——<color=#dbc291ff>纯粹的「阿卡索斯」是否真实存在？</color>
E: If we were to convert it into a more direct topic, it would be: <color=#dbc291ff>Does a pure "Icatus" truly exist?</color>

C: 这是什么绕口令吗？
E: Is this some kind of tongue twister?

C: 你只是把眼前那块精心烹调过的，优雅的，发黑的——土，送进嘴里轻舔了一口。
E: You simply put the elegantly prepared, charred piece of... soil in your mouth and took a small lick.

C: 刚见面的时候，我不是在唱一首歌谣吗？那就是简化版的喂养指南了。
E: Remember when we first met, and I was singing a little song? That's a simplified feeding guide.

C: 我无理取闹？明明是你心虚了吧，这么就想岔开话题？想得美！
E: Am I being unreasonable? Clearly, it's you who's guilty and trying to change the subject! Nice try!

C: 若我能与白厄前辈一样，沐浴在金血中而不被其侵蚀，城邦的大家才会承认我。
E: If I could, like senior Phainon, bathe in the golden blood without being corroded by it, then the people of the city would finally acknowledge me.

C: 当然，什么时候结束，由我说了算。
E: Of course, when it ends is up to me.

C: 你参加的是什么讨论会？
E: What discussion are you attending?

C: 水漫琴，以水流作为基础动力的乐器。身形庞大，也必须摆放在靠近水源的地点。
E: A water lyre, an instrument powered by flowing water. It's huge in size and must be placed in a location near a water source.

C: 逃难路上，我见过了太多别离。艺术有无限的空间，可演奏者只能在这狭窄的天地间求活。或许是因为这样的心境，我的琴声也不可避免地染上了哀愁吧。
E: As I was fleeing, I witnessed too many farewells. The horizons of art are boundless, but its musicians can only eke a living in this narrow space between heaven and earth. Perhaps it is because of this mindset that my playing is inevitably tinged with sorrow.

C: 但我们的根本目的不还是学知识吗…就您这个训练强度，怕不是要把我们都培养成竞技场英雄……
E: But we came here to learn... With such intense training, I'm afraid we would become arena champions instead...

C: 自我介绍一下，我叫维普萨尼娅，是神悟树庭的财务官。不过现在嘛...就当我是个树庭知识的推销员吧…嗯，按我妹妹的话来说我就是「到处推销」。
E: Allow me to introduce myself: I am Vipsania, Grove of Epiphany Financial Officer. But now... just think of me as a Grove Knowledge salesperson... Mm, my sister would say I'm "peddling wares."

C: 你都卖些什么「种子」？
E: What kinda "seeds" you're selling?

C: 切换为阅读模式。
E: Switching to "Reading" mode.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 听听雅努斯之门的传说。
E: Tell me about the legend of the Gates of Janus

C: 什——什么人？！竟敢在此口出狂言——啊，怎么是你？
E: Wh—Who's there!? How dare you make such outrageous accusations — ah, you again?

C: …我就不瞒着阁下了，命运三泰坦对贡品并非照单全收，妥善处理多余的贡品也是祭司的职责。
E: ...I shall not deceive you, My Lord. The Three Titans of Fate do not personally accept all offerings. It is the duty of a priest to make sure that all excess offerings are handled properly.

C: 须知，并非每位祭司都像我这般痛快真诚，城府深者大有人在。要是让那些家伙垄断了求取神谕的权力…对雅努萨波利斯断不是好事。
E: You must know that not all priests are as forthright and sincere as I am. There are many that are far more shrewd and subtle. If these priests were able to monopolize the power to obtain prophecies from the Titans... That would spell trouble for Janusopolis.

C: 神谕的原文晦涩难懂，我便替您翻译作较为通俗易懂的语句吧——
E: The prophecies are often vague and hard to understand. I will translate it and make it easier for you to understand —

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: I don't have much else to say.

C: 她想爬到神像脚下偷点供品，但是被看管的祭司发现了，妈妈说她吓得浑身发抖，以为自己肯定死定了。结果祭司将她带到审讯室的时候，圣女正巧也在。
E: She intended to steal some offerings at the statue's feet but was caught by a priest. My mom told me she trembled with fear, convinced her fate was sealed. However, when the priest took her to the interrogation room, by chance, the Holy Maiden was also present.

C: 噢，有机会再聊。要是在这儿遇到了麻烦，需要帮助什么的，记得来找我哦～
E: Oh, let's catch up in the future. If you run into trouble and need help, remember to look me up.

C: 哪来这么些东西？
E: Where did all these items come from?

C: 我会详细给你解释，就别在那种人身上浪费时间了，用利衡币就能收买的人，跟他们对上眼我都觉得晦气！
E: I'll explain the whole thing to you, but don't waste your time on such people. Associating with those who can be bought with Balance Coins is bad luck for me!

C: 唉，实话说，我真心对不起圣女大人。上次进货的时候，误拿了她的手工制品，导致她一直把我当个小偷。但圣女大人的小玩意…不得不说，都是划时代的产物。
E: Ah, to tell the truth, I do owe the Holy Maiden an apology. The last time I was stocking up, I accidentally took one of her handmade creations, and she's seen me as a thief ever since. But her trinkets... I've got to admit, they're revolutionary creations!

C: 想想，雅努斯密径的微型版、远距离传信的杯子，甚至还有会动的奇兽模型…我太想让它们展露在世人面前了，所以后来按捺不住心情，又拿了几次。
E: Just imagine — a miniaturized version of Janus's Hidden Passage, a cup that enables long-distance communication, and even animated models of wondrous beasts... I couldn't help myself. I was so eager to show these wonders to the world that I ended up taking a few more.

C: 曾听闻圣女大人和蔼亲切，而能进入圣殿的，多半都是贡献良多的虔诚信徒，我想所谓的「叨扰」，指的可能就是我这样不自知的家伙吧。
E: I've heard the Holy Maiden is approachable and kind, and those allowed into the temple are often faithful disciples. Perhaps the "disturbance" refers to unaware individuals like myself.

C: …不知在送别缇安后，阁下对吾师的印象是否有所转变。
E: ...After you bid farewell to Trianne, has your impression of my teacher changed?

C: 我想…听听你们旅行的故事。
E: I want to... hear stories of your travels.

C: 别夹了。
E: Hey. Stop the fake cute sounds.

C: 不过，这样也不坏。因为等大家真的看到了庭院，就会有种美梦成真的惊喜感了！
E: But that's not a bad thing. Because when they finally see the courtyard for themselves, they're in for a wonderful surprise — it's like their dream has come true!

C: 好呀，欢迎灰宝再来找我聊天！
E: Sure! I'd be happy to chat with you again, Grayie!

C: 你专程来找我，是有什么要紧事吗？我随时可以帮忙！
E: Did you come looking for me because there's something urgent you need help with? I'm ready anytime!

C: 迷途的人啊，如果还差一句话你就要离开人世，你会说什么？
E: Lost human, if you can say one last thing before leaving this world, what would it be?

C: 此处安眠着狄米特尔，一个可怜但诚实的人，他极其擅长出海钓鱼，这条大马林鱼竟然长达十八尺。
E: Here lies Dmitrios, a poor but honest man. He is exceptionally good at sea fishing. This marlin measures an incredible <unbreak>18</unbreak> feet long.

C: 阿巴阿巴…贵客似乎已经拿到石板了？正好我一看谜语就头疼。
E: Blah blah... It seems you've already obtained the stone slate? Good, because riddles give me a headache.

C: 黑潮吞没卡弥特斯时，乐师们仍泰然自若地弹奏水漫琴，借着涌入街巷的波涛演奏激昂的乐曲。
E: When the black tide consumed Carmitis, the musicians remained calm, playing their water-soaked harps and performing passionate melodies with the waves surging through the streets.

C: 看来，你相信再创世？
E: So you believe in Era Nova?

C: 我想起了「黄金替罪羊」……
E: Which reminds me of the "Golden Scapegoat"...

C: 哦，再见！也许下次见面的时候，我们就认不出彼此了呢。
E: Oh, farewell! Maybe when we next meet, we'll be strangers to each other.

C: 文明的痕迹该如何跨越时空，留给千百年后的人类？
E: How can the traces of civilization transcend time and space, so that people a thousand years from now may find them?

C: 好家伙，您怎么比我还疯啊。
E: Good heavens, you're crazier than I am.

C: 嗯…有位织者个性叛逆，喜欢逆风飞翔。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>热水池上空赌气</color>。或许你能说服它？
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who behaves rebelliously and enjoys flying against the wind. The golden thread brings tidings: They are sulking above <color=#dbc291ff>the hot spring pool</color>. Perhaps you can persuade them?

C: 我会继续留在这里倾听若虫的声音，安抚那些不知该去向何处的生灵。
E: I will remain here, listening to the voices of the nymph, soothing those creatures who do not know where to go.

C: 但根据眼下的测算，计划所需的若虫远远多于我们所能找到的。究竟该从哪里取得剩下的若虫，我也没有头绪。
E: But according to the current calculations, the number of nymphs required for the plan is far greater than what we can find. I have no idea where to obtain the remaining nymphs.

C: 感谢你，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 现在，只有寂静将我包裹……
E: Now, only silence wraps around me...

C: 有、有人过来了迷？
E: S—Someone's coming, memi?

C: 加油，祝你好运。
E: You can do it. Good luck.

C: 男孩子嘛，就这样，哪个不是满脑子英雄故事，天天想着拯救世界。别看他现在一本正经的，小时候可喜欢拎着树枝在麦田里打滚……
E: Boys are all the same — heads full of hero stories, always dreaming of saving the world. Don't let his serious face fool you. He used to roll around the wheat fields with a branch...

C: 哀丽秘榭要是没了这片麦田…都不知道要怎么数季节呢。
E: If Aedes Elysiae ever loses this wheat field... I don't even know how we'd keep track of the seasons.

C: 小班教算术、几何和品德，中班教地理和祭祷仪式，大班的话，就是让孩子们钻研自己喜欢的东西了，老师只会作为引导。
E: The little ones learn arithmetic, geometry, and morals. The middle group studies geography and our prayer ceremonies. As for the oldest, they're free to explore what interests them. Teachers just guide them along the way.

C: 你有没有觉得，「啦」这个音圆滚滚的？
E: Don't you think the note "la" sounds round and bouncy?

C: 迷路迷境已经许久未有人踏足了，你的到来，可让这森林热闹了不少哪！
E: The paths to Membrance Maze have long been forgotten. Your arrival has brought the forest back to life!

C: 是谁在做菜前不洗手迷！
E: Who started cooking without washing their hands, memi?

C: 这位顾客您好，请问您要来点什么？
E: Welcome, dear guest! What would you like to order today?

C: 无论如何，感谢你一直以来的协助。若发现若虫，仍请拨冗相助。
E: Regardless, thank you for your continued assistance. If you find any nymphs, please lend a hand.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者专注于保持平衡的艺术。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>石堆旁的花丛中</color>，欣赏着自己的作品呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is trying to perfect the art of balancing. The golden thread brings tidings: They are in <color=#dbc291ff>a flowerbed next to a pile of stones</color>, admiring its own creation.

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 谢谢，我会好好收下的。
E: Thank you. I'll take good care of it.

C: 好呀。人家会一直在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 好些时候没回庭院，我寻思着还是给家里的母亲写写信，毕竟我冬霖爵可是昏光庭院的支柱嘛。
E: It's been a while since my return to the Courtyard. I thought about writing to my mother. After all, I, the Dux Brumalis, am a pillar of the Twilight Courtyard.

C: 入梦…池？没听说过呢。阁下莫非是有睡眠障碍？不必担心，凯撒麾下自然不缺有名的医师！
E: Dream... pool? I never heard of this. Do you have insomnia, dear guest? Don't worry, the Imperator does not lack for great doctors!

C: 法吉娜不过是已、已死的旧日幻影，是我主…储火的容器、晋升的阶梯！
E: Phagousa is but a phantom.... a dead echo! Merely a vessel for my lady's flame, a stepping stone for ascension!

C: …如果你看了我给你的记录，应该明白，是我亲手为凯撒杀死了她。
E: ...If you read the records I gave you, you would know that I personally slew her for the Imperator.

C: 不行，下定决心…大壮，你不能再喝蜜酿了！说到做到！
E: No, I've made up my mind... Bossman, stop drinking those honey brew at once! You gotta talk the talk and walk the walk!

C: 你才是石柱子。
E: Who did you say is a stone pillar?

C: 这场宴席上也能看见若虫。如果你在欢庆之余仍有兴致，可以将它们带到我这里。
E: I spotted some nymphs at this feast too. If you still feel up for it between celebrations, you could bring them here to me.

C: 到时候，我也会天天来看你们的迷！
E: And when that day comes, I'll drop by to see you every single day, mem!

C: 红酸果在齿间绽开时溢出的酸涩，融合绿球菜的清甜。仿佛清晨的第一滴露水在你的舌尖跃动，生机勃勃的绿意，由此开始在你的心里蔓延……
E: As the redsour fruit bursts between your teeth and melds with the greenie cabbage's sweet freshness, it feels like the first drop of morning dew dancing on your tongue. That vibrant green vitality begins to spread through your heart...

C: 那反过头来想，咱们的工作能够切实帮到战士们，这不是个很好的意义吗？至少我就为此而活，两位客人，你们说是吧？
E: Let's think about it on the flip side then: Our work can actually arm the troops and save them. Isn't that a great meaning to life? Well, to my life, at least. What say you, customers?

C: 唉呀，真是心疼啊…多好的东西，这就扔了。
E: Oh my, it pains my heart... So many wonderful things are just thrown away. Such a waste.

C: 所以，冒险者们会在此之前备好雨具。
E: So, adventurers will prepare rain gear in advance?

C: 你冷静，冷静点…
E: Calm down, just calm down a little...

C: 主要是版型问题。
E: It's mainly a style issue.

C: 别拦我，我一定行的！
E: Don't try and stop me. I can do this!

C: 是的，你很聪慧…
E: Yes, indeed, you're really clever...

C: 很遗憾，没有。
E: I'm afraid not.

C: 稍不留意，就有可能被它们偷袭伏击。
E: You might get ambushed if you are not careful.

C: 它们经常会栖息于一些人类想不到的地方——比如一张桌子，或者一个杯子。
E: They often inhabit places that humans can't imagine — such as a table or a cup.

C: 整个空间站，或许就是我最不愿意提起她了！你可真是哪壶不开提哪壶！
E: She's the last person I want to talk about on the entire space station! You are really asking the wrong person!

C: 又见面了。这次你也是来放松放松的？正好我旁边有个空位，一起休息一下吧。
E: We meet again. Are you here for a vacation this time? Feel free to take the seat next to me and have a break.

C: 我虽然很容易犯困，但工作的时候不会马虎的！你这家伙，该不会把我当成那种会把止血棉落在患者身体里的那种人了吧？！
E: Although I easily feel sleepy at work, I take my job very seriously! Don't think of me as some stupid doctor who would leave hemostatic cotton inside their patient!

C: 如果说莱斯莉是百年一遇的天才，那洛奇这小子就是随处可见的科员。
E: Lesley is a once-in-a-century genius while Rocky is only an ordinary researcher.

C: 我人老了，最看不得那种悲欢离别。真要是想长久在一起，洛奇这小子，打铁还需自身硬！
E: I'm old. I can't bear to see people break up. If they want to be together in the long run, Rocky will have to toughen up himself!

C: 你为什么要回到神悟树庭？
E: Why did you go back to the Grove of Epiphany?

C: 我明白，没人知道我应该去向哪里…除了我自己，尽管我现在也不太明白。
E: I get it. No one knows where I should go... except for myself, though I'm not too sure about that right now either.

C: 嗯…大地兽的武器、人类的角和奇美拉的鳞片！
E: Hmm... dromas' weapons, human horns, and chimera scales!

C: 塞纳托斯…是谁被灰黯的手掌托住？
E: Thanatos... who is being held by those dark, gray hands?

C: 你在星穹列车的窗外看到过相似的「8」，当忆者拨开迷雾，翁法罗斯以一道首尾循环的光带呈现在所有人视线里。故事以此为起点，终点又将通往何方呢？
E: You've seen a similar "8" outside the window of the Astral Express. When the Memokeeper parted the mist, Amphoreus revealed itself to everyone's eyes as a band of light that loops back on itself. As the story begins here, where will its end lead us?

C: 这块地是你家的？不给！
E: You're charging me for standing here? Nice try!

C: 听了可别吓到！我啊，终于！偷溜进黄金裔浴场了！
E: Don't freak out! It's just that... I, I finally snuck into the Chrysos Heir's baths!

C: 咪发迷！你竟然自己一只妖精，偷偷溜到村子外的野地里，你知道我们多担心吗！
E: Mifamem! How dare you sneak out to the wilderness outside the village all by yourself! Do you have any idea how worried we were about you!?

C: 身为舞者，我的答案当然是——希望你能记住我们的舞姿迷！
E: As a dancer, my answer is obvious. I hope you'll remember our mesmerizing moves, mem!

C: 呵，真是一尾耳目众多的金鳟啊……
E: Heh, quite a well-connected golden trout we have here...

C: 既然入了伙，现在你也是「裁缝女」。
E: Now that you're part of the crew, you're also a "seamstress."

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 哟！
E: Yo!

C: 下回也带我去拜访拜访悬锋的先王和王后，让他们品尝一下哀丽秘榭的特产吧。
E: Next time, why not take me to visit the former King and Queen of Kremnos and let them have a taste of Aedes Elysiae's specialties?

C: 口号我都想好啦，就叫：「开门！缇宝快递！」
E: I've got one! How about... "Knock knock! Tribbie Delivery!"

C: 从今以后，不会再有离别。
E: From now on, no more goodbyes.

C: 毕竟，有人会在过去等你，那么一定也有人…会在未来等你吧。哎呀，听上去就好浪漫呀！
E: After all, if someone's waiting for you in the past, then surely someone... must be waiting for you in the future too. Ah, just hearing that sounds so romantic!

C: 声音消失了，赛飞儿阁下…还真是精力充沛呀。
E: The voice faded away... Cipher sure is full of energy.

C: 黄金大饭店要开业了！
E: The Grand Restaurant is about to open!

C: 祂是如此与众不同……祂的陨落也突如其来，传说某位星神杀死了祂，可是我不相信。
E: THEY were different from most... But THEIR passing came so suddenly that it was thought THEY were killed by another Aeon. I don't believe that to be the case.

C: 关于「探索」…
E: About Exploration...

C: 丹恒是个孤独的孩子。他看着冷冰冰的，但内心不坏，可能是长期的逃亡生活把他塑造成现在这个模样，有时他会让我想起自己年轻的时候……
E: Dan Heng is a lonely child. He may appear distant and cold, but his heart is kind. Perhaps, he's the way he is today because he spent so much time on the run. Sometimes, he reminds me of myself when I was young...

C: 瓦尔特的敌人…
E: About Welt's enemies...

C: 据说宇宙自诞生至星神出现前，还有一段巨大的空白；在那段空白里游弋着名为「古兽」的奇妙存在。
E: It is said that there was a huge gap in the records between the birth of the universe and when Aeons appeared. During that time, strange existences known as Leviathans roamed.

C: 瓦尔特先生来自什么样的世界？
E: What kind of world did Mr. Yang come from?

C: （三把兵器便是一座岛屿，这里的铳枪零零散散，并不是这里…）
E: (Three weapons make an island. The guns here are scattered around. Not here...)

C: 你可以收集齐之后给我看看呀。
E: You go find those pages so that you can let me read them.

C: …想看是想看的。
E: ...I do.

C: （「宝藏放在四座岛屿的交汇之处」…交汇之处又在哪里呢？）
E: ("The treasure is at the intersection of the four islands"... Where is the intersection?)

C: 我听说你有事儿找我。
E: I heard you are looking for me.

C: 回头再收拾我这懒徒弟，今天先多谢你帮忙了。
E: I'll deal with my lazy apprentice later. Thank you for the help today.

C: 没什么。
E: There's no need.

C: 这该怎么倒车啊……
E: How do you reverse this...

C: 滴、答…好多小小的宾客在我身上爬、钟表小子变成了蝴蝶到处飞……这就是梦、这就是梦啊！
E: Tick, tock... so many little guests are crawling on me, and Clockie's turned into a butterfly and is fluttering everywhere... This is a dream, a dream I tell you!

C: 滴答！我的小齿轮啊，刚刚我都说了什么！
E: Tick-tock! Oh my gears, what have I just said!

C: 滴、答，被蒙蔽的宾客，快来听听真相吧！我会向你揭示真正的匹诺康尼究竟有多么黑暗肮脏！
E: Tick, tock... they have fooled you, dear guest, come and hear the truth! I shall show you how truly filthy the dark underbelly of Penacony is!

C: 你知道吗？我发现了一种新的治疗方法，就是把没预约的病人都赶出去。哈哈，只要医生见不到病人，那就没有病患！是不是很有道理？
E: Do you know that I found a new treatment method? I just have to chase the patients with no bookings away. Haha, as long as the doctor doesn't see their patient, there would be no illness to diagnose! Isn't that logical?

C: …黑塔小姐？不行不行，我一个小科员怎么敢提这种要求……
E: ...Miss Herta? No no no, how could a small fry like me go to her with something like this...

C: 好的，如果有需要，随时来找我。
E: Okay. Come find me anytime you need something.

C: 「哦，如果你指的是星核猎手…那抱歉，问错人啦。我只是奉命行事，你应该去问卡芙卡——你的事，她向来比我更关心。」
E: "Oh, if you mean the Stellaron Hunters... Then sorry, I'm the wrong person to ask. I'm just following orders. You should ask Kafka — She's always been more interested in your stuff than me."

C: 所以你只是为骗一口吃的吗？！
E: So you're just in it for the money!?

C: 嗯，嗯…没问题！我还以为你爱贪便宜，没想到出手倒是够大方……
E: Mmmm, hmmm... Fine! I took you for a miser and never thought you'd actually be so generous...

C: 《根本看不出来画了什么》。
E: Can't Tell What This Is.

C: （数据似乎已经记录下来了……）
E: (The data seems to have been recorded...)

C: 该怎么办呢…啊，{NICKNAME}，你来的正是时候。
E: What am I going to do... Oh, {NICKNAME}. Well, there's a sight for sore eyes.

C: （照片很清晰…应该够用了吧。）
E: (This is one crisp photo... Should be enough.)

C: 这样的话……
E: In that case...

C: 让我们把话题扳回来吧——你觉得，在介绍中该如何描述母亲大人执政后的经历比较好呢？
E: Let's get back on topic. How do you think we should describe mother's experiences during her rule in the introduction?

C: 这样的话……
E: In that case...

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了机械屋「永动」的样子。
E: A work of photography that captures the "neverwinter" warmth of the workshop.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了歌德宾馆金碧辉煌的大堂。
E: A work of photography that captures the grandiose hall of Goethe Hotel.

C: 就你的经验，这个型号的机兵似乎并不安全。希望它不会在这里爆炸。
E: In your experience, this automaton model is not safe. Hopefully, it doesn't explode in the establishment.

C: 难道这座博物馆真没有其他更合适的展品了吗？
E: Does this museum not have any other more suitable exhibits?

C: 「她是觉悟者，求真者，真正的尊贵之人，更是唯二将自己的名号刻在冬城城墙上的守护者：行政区的心脏——亚历珊德拉广场——便以她的名字命名。」
E: "She is an enlightened, a truthseeker, a true exalted, and one of the only two Supreme Guardians to have her name carved onto the ever-standing walls of the Everwinter City. The heart of the Administrative District — the Alexandra Plaza — was named after her."

C: 它很聪明，在被冻住之前摆出了一个帅气的姿势。虽然保不住性命，但保住了面子。
E: This is a clever one, as it struck a cool pose before it was frozen solid. It didn't preserve its life, but it did preserve its honor.

C: 随着一声脆响，有关「灾难与星核」的内容登时出现在博物馆的墙面上，随后是一道沉稳的女声辅以解说。
E: With a crisp click, the content regarding "Calamity and Stellaron" appears on the wall of the museum. A velvety female narration accompanies the presentation.

C: …自贝洛伯格建城至今，一任又一任的大守护者承「琥珀王」克里珀恩赐，为众人带去祂的庇护，引领众人向前。
E: ...Since Belobog's foundation, each Supreme Guardian received the blessing of the Amber Lord, leading the citizens to move ahead under THEIR protection.

C: （再靠近些看看吧。）
E: (Let's get closer and take a look.)

C: 这也是别人告诉我的，我问过她，她不承认。
E: I heard that from others. I asked her, but she denied it.

C: 这不是理亏不理亏的问题，你们千万别提我啊！
E: It doesn't matter what she did. Please don't mention me to her!

C: 我在这里等各位消息。
E: I'll be waiting here for your good news.

C: 「就肯定能涨粉了！」
E: (My fans will definitely increase!)

C: 这些年里，我无数次来到狐眠冢，怀念和采翼无话不说的日子，怀念与她心有灵犀的飞行，怀念和她并肩战斗的热血…我甚至将那场大战的飞舰残片收殓在这儿。
E: I have come to Foxsomn Tomb countless times over the years to reminisce my days with Caiyi. Back then, we told each other everything, we understood each other without needing words as we flew, and we fought passionately side by side... I even entombed the airship fragments from that great war here.

C: 你许久没有回到狐眠冢了，但你的悲伤却如此强烈。我…只好来找你。
E: You haven't been to Foxsomn Tomb for a long time, but your sadness only grows ever greater. I... had to come and find you.

C: 真抱歉啊，我不能完成对你的承诺了…晴霓会如她自己所选，成为一名飞行士。和你一样了不起的飞行士！
E: I'm sorry that I couldn't fulfill my promise to you... Qingni will become a pilot, as she chose for herself. She will become a pilot as marvelous as you were!

C: 确实破坏气氛，我来发吧。
E: Yes, that spoils the mood, but let me post it.

C: 我会把照片交给地火的。
E: I'll pass the photos on to Wildfire.

C: 演出结束，周围的人群散去了…
E: The performance finishes and the surrounding crowd disperses...

C: …推荐推荐？你应该说「我请你吃点好吃的」。
E: ...Recommend? I think you mean: "I'd like to treat you to some Xianzhou delicacies."

C: 有什么好吃的吗？
E: Is there anything good?

C: （继续看戏）
E: (Keep watching the drama)

C: 「开源节流」就能增加码头的营收。如今「开源」困难重重，很多金人巷商铺拒绝与货运码头合作……
E: If we cut costs and tap into new revenue streams, we can turn things around. A lot of vendors in Aurum Alley don't want anything to do with the dock though, so it may be hard to find new sources of revenue...

C: 那「节流」呢，什么是节流？
E: What about cutting costs?

C: 喂喂喂，你们商会可别想着要裁人啊！
E: Hey, hey, hey, don't get any funny ideas about laying people off!

C: 洞天里的建筑也变得面目全非了。我小时候看见的优美飞檐变得越来越少，琉璃瓦和息壤砖也消失了。一座座表面平滑，像纪念碑一样的公司大楼开始拔地而起。
E: The architecture across the whole delve began to change. The graceful flying eaves I saw as a child became fewer and fewer, and the glazed tiles and Fallow Earth bricks gradually disappeared. Sleek, monolithic IPC buildings started sprouting up everywhere.

C: 这不是还没有碎吗？
E: "Almost" being the operative word...

C: 但现在该道歉的人是你！
E: Consider yourself lucky it's just the once!

C: 金人巷能恢复如初吗？
E: How's the revival of Aurum Alley coming along?

C: 所以我接受公司的方案，金人巷可以消失，在罗浮之上还会有其他集市取代它的。
E: Therefore, I stand behind the IPC's plan. Aurum Alley will inevitably be replaced.

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 我能理解孩子们对金人巷的热情，这一点我也一样，我们都想让这里更加繁荣。
E: I can tell that the opposing side is eager to see Aurum Alley thrive. Your passion resonates with me.

C: 我们也会重新规划整个商区的布局，保证港口足够开阔，吞吐量绝不输给流云渡。
E: The IPC will redesign the layout of the whole area to make sure ships can move in and out smoothly. We expect at least the same trading volume as Cloudford.

C: 不对，<color=#dbc291ff>难道不应该问问金人巷商铺们的意见吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Shouldn't you gather people's opinions first?</color>

C: 两位对金人巷的帮助居功至伟，这是应当的。
E: You two have done a lot to help us. You deserve every bit of praise.

C: 我想拜托两位，在我离开期间帮忙照顾打理金人巷。会长会代替我协助你们的。
E: I plan to entrust the Alley to you two. If you ever need any help, just ask the president.

C: 我大概知道是个什么事了。
E: I think I know what's going on here.

C: 那我们简化一下。
E: Then, let's simplify things.

C: 符玄大人会来感谢我的。
E: Fu Xuan the diviner will thank me.

C: 我的芯里写满了责任！应该是某人干的……
E: Responsibility is written into my code! I guess my coder did it...

C: 定位…定位中…定位失败……
E: Positioning... Positioning... Positioning failed...

C: …等等，你搞错方向了，我方才明明说的是「先往前走，然后左拐」。
E: ...Hang on, you're going the wrong way. I just said, "Go straight ahead, then turn left."

C: 还能用作其他研究？
E: They can be used for other research?

C: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「交易」</color>有关的「物体」…我不好说，你就当是我的小小建议吧！
E: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with <color=#dbc291ff>transactions</color>... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

C: （雷金所说的异常情况，应该就是指这个了…吧？）
E: (This should be the anomaly that Regin was talking about... right?)

C: 我的宝贝<unbreak>223</unbreak>号感应仪，可是不会有问题的！
E: My precious Sensor No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> will never malfunction!

C: （尝试打开柜子）
E: (Try to open the wardrobe.)

C: （是因为变成了电影机，所以自身的形象也发生了改变吗？）
E: (Is it because it turned into a projector that its form changed?)

C: 比如今天的活动餐品：「交叠的美梦」！
E: Such as today's featured dish: Interwoven Dreams!

C: 可惜，那些美景都是真实存在的——她因为酸梦糖吃的太多，不小心从定制的梦泡中酸醒了！哈哈！
E: Unfortunately, those beautiful scenes were all real — she had eaten too many Sour Dream soft candies and accidentally woke up from the customized dream bubble! Ha-ha!

C: 不过事到如今，苏乐达早已不只是一款饮料，它所代表的糖浆主义已经渗入了匹诺康尼的方方面面，每个脱口秀演员都离不开它——要我说，谁还在乎那创始人是谁呢！
E: But at this point, SoulGlad is more than just a drink. It embodies the syrupism that has seeped into every corner of Penacony. Every stand-up comedian relies on it. Who cares about the founder anymore!

C: 「向你致敬，我的朋友！」
E: "Cheers, my friend!"

C: 哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
E: Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.

C: 继续前进吧。为了自由，为了苏乐达！
E: Let's move forward. For freedom! For SoulGlad!

C: 逃亡行动成功后，哈努兄弟决定向其他囚犯伸出援手，以此拉拢他们加入反抗监狱的队伍。
E: After a successful prison break, Brother Hanu decided to reach out to the other prisoners as a means of recruiting them into the resistance against the prison.

C: 总之，我要先去为哈努兄弟助力了，你也赶快跟上吧。
E: Anyway, I'll go ahead and help Brother Hanu. You should hurry along.

C: 总之就是要我亲自操作对吧？
E: Fine, I'll Do It Myself.

C: 滴答！宾客！宾客你好，我是钟表小子，欢迎来到美梦小镇！
E: Tick-tock! Guest! Hello! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville!

C: 当然，等您做好准备再来找我吧。
E: Of course, come seek me out when you're all ready.

C: 我千锤百炼了。
E: Nothing I haven't trained for.

C: 是要我上节目吗？
E: Do I have to appear on the show?

C: 主厨兼主持人将视线转向你，酝酿着喉间的火焰——
E: The chef-cum-host turns his eyes to you and readies the flames in his throat...

C: 我有异议！
E: I disagree!

C: …辛苦了。我先向你表示感谢。
E: ...I really appreciate your hard work.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 汪！有更大的坏蛋靠近了哇！
E: Woof! A badder baddy is coming!

C: 唉，开这种玩笑有意思吗……
E: *sigh* What's the point of making such jokes...?

C: …那我呢？
E: ...What about me?

C: 这不是来找你了嘛。
E: See? I'm coming for you.

C: （现在要先去和小星星聊聊。）
E: (Now, I need to have a chat with Starlet.)

C: 汪！这就是钟表小子哇！这里好宽敞，特别适合玩飞盘！
E: Woof! So that's Clockie! This place is so spacious, perfect for a game of floatdisc!

C: 呜…我们…我们先回去吧汪……
E: Woof... Let's... let's head back... woof...
