E: And if you're truly interested, I can ask our family head to speak with you guys, and I'm pretty sure... her words will be more convincing. Don't you think?

C: 很有趣的想法。果然，就像加拉赫说的那样，和你的每次接触都能带给我惊喜。
E: An interesting thought. Looks like Gallagher was right — it's always a surprise with you around.

C: 这是银河里其他的无名客寄来的礼物，列车之前也有收到帕！大家都行于「开拓」的命途上，即使没有见过面，也是开拓的好伙伴。
E: This is a gift from another Nameless in the cosmos. The Express had received one before. There're many who walk on the Path of Trailblaze. Even if you've never met them, they're good companions of Trailblaze.

C: 帕姆你是不是有事瞒着我？
E: Pom-Pom, is there something you've been hiding?

C: 我去过雅利洛-Ⅵ。
E: I've visited Jarilo-VI.

C: 果然，以迷宫的改造程度看，叛徒里还藏着几位非常老练的筑梦师。
E: As expected — with how extensively they've modified the maze, those traitors must have some seriously seasoned Dreamweavers on their team.

C: 好的，我去了！
E: Fine, I'll go!

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 早就坏掉的电梯怎么突然动了起来，枪炮的声音又是从哪里来的……
E: Why did the lift that's been broken since forever start on its own... and where did the sound of gunshots come from...

C: 怎么办…美梦小镇又遇到危机了！
E: Oh no... Dreamville is in danger yet again!

C: 审核批注：影片内容与形象设计侵犯了克劳克影业相关权益，在「钟表小子」形象版权逾期前禁止公映。
E: Review: The story and character design of the movie violated the rights and interests of Clock Studios. The movie is banned until the expiry of Clockie's copyright.

C: 米莫萨的放松了皱紧的眉头，露出了无奈的微笑。
E: Mimosa relaxes her furrowed brows and smiles in resignation.

C: 但钟表小子就应该是一部单纯的动画才对，不宣讲任何道理，不承载任何意义。
E: However, Clockie should just be an animation, not a carrier of propaganda or underlying messages.

C: 这…您可真厉害，三言两语就能让她亲自来还胶卷！
E: Well... You're incredible. Just with a few words from you, and she's personally delivered the film reel to us!

C: ——黑天鹅静望着屏幕，给出了一句稍显晦涩的影评。
E: ...Black Swan stares quietly at the screen and gives you a perplexing critique of the movie.

C: 这就是我与哈努兄弟友谊的开端。滴答，真是一段令人怀念的过往呀…
E: This was the beginning of my friendship with Brother Hanu. Tick-tock, such a truly nostalgic past...

C: 没问题，交给我吧。
E: No problem, leave it to me.

C: 加油，导演，拍摄广告的重任还在等着您去完成！既然您能拍好电影，也一定能拍出伟大的广告！
E: Good luck, director. The grave responsibility of completing the commercial awaits! If you can make a fantastic film, then you definitely can make a grand commercial!

C: 啊，石头老板居然会选这么理智的办法吗？
E: Huh? Would Boss Stone really ever choose to follow that kind of logic!?

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 折纸动画师开始撰写折纸小鸟外传的故事……
E: The Origami Animator starts scribbling an extra story about the Origami Birds...

C: 咳咳，莫要打扰，老朽正在思考……
E: *cough* Please don't disturb me, I am thinking...

C: 呵呵，好呀，我很愿意跟年轻的动画人聊天。
E: Ha, sure. I love chewing the fat with young animators.

C: 先说来听听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 感觉没玩够…
E: I kinda want more...

C: 戏梦大舞台，有梦你就来！欢迎来到「演技派」舞台！
E: The Stage of Dreams, for those who dare to dream! Welcome to the School of Acting stage!

C: 多么精妙的表演，几乎激起了我的愤慨之情！
E: A most magnificent performance that seemed to invoke feelings of rage within me!

C: 其实，剧情要求你提供帮助。
E: Actually, the plot dictates that you directly provide aid to us.

C: 前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有谜钟都会为你们加油的！
E: Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!

C: 演员
E: Cast

C: 嘿嘿，{NICKNAME}你听你听，我是真的天才！
E: Did you hear that, {NICKNAME}? I'm truly a genius!

C: 三月小姐，你为何挥剑？
E: Miss March, why do you wield your sword?

C: 也许在开打前你的嘴比剑还硬，但等你领教了机甲的厉害，就会迫不及待地向公司掏钱了。
E: Say whatever you want, but once you've seen what our mechs can do, you'll be practically begging us for them.

C: 公司那家伙会在<color=#dbc291ff>十五天</color>之后登门踢馆，本姑娘必须在这些日子里练成剑术大师！
E: That IPC guy will show up in <color=#dbc291ff>fifteen days</color>. I've got to become a swordmaster by then!

C: 啊…我可没有嫌师父唠叨啊。
E: Ah... but I'm actually not bored at all.

C: 你休息的时候，机甲却在锻炼。
E: When you're taking a break, the mechs are still training.

C: 将军之前也同我说过，让我学剑的时候，不能挑剔老师。不止是云骑教习，还包括各种江湖艺人，异邦友人……
E: General Jing Yuan once told me that everyone has the potential to be my master, not just Cloud Knight instructors, but also artists and outsiders...

C: 哈——？！你是在讽刺我？
E: Huh...!? Are you being sarcastic or something?

C: 你是说那个三月七已经能用剑击倒工造司的金人了？啧啧啧，区区仙舟金人，哪里比得上公司的机甲！
E: Are you saying that March 7th can actually take down an aurumaton from the Artisanship Commission with a sword? Come on, an aurumaton is no match for our state-of-the-art mechs!

C: 三月，你在写什么呢？
E: What are you writing, March?

C: 在下听闻阁下已经为剑斗做足了准备，祝阁下宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
E: I hear that you have already made sufficient battle preparations. May thy blade split and sever, and may victory find you!

C: 老子也是第一次尝试，还不知道效果如何。
E: Well, this is my first time doing something like this, so I'm not sure how things will turn out.

C: 好久不见！你在这里做什么呢？
E: It's been a while! What're you doing here?

C: 我猜八成也是逃逸的岁阳搞的鬼。
E: I'm also guessing it's an escaped heliobus that's up to no good.

C: 多亏了藿藿，刚才那个好为人师的岁阳已经被吸收走了吗？
E: Thank goodness you were here, Huohuo. Has that overly enthusiastic heliobus been subdued?

C: 我没受什么伤，但是……
E: I'm not hurt, but...

C: 你小子真是油盐不进啊。
E: Oh, he's such a jerk.

C: 我真的太快乐了！我的快乐你根本想象不到！
E: Oh! I'm so happy! I'm ecstatic! You couldn't even begin to imagine how happy I am!

C: 我输了。我输了。三月七，你太卑鄙了。
E: I lost. I am defeated... You fight too dirty, March 7th. You are truly despicable.

C: 那你可要好好写写咱们这次辉煌的胜利！
E: You should also tell them about our glorious victory!

C: 等等！最近我不是经常和你一起玩吗，其实我有了不少心得体会。比如，最近我一直在思考，仅仅用剑击败斯科特是不够的——
E: Wait a minute! I've been playing with you a lot lately, right? I've actually picked up a few insights. For example, I've been thinking lately that just defeating Skott with my swords might not be enough...

C: 走吧，三月，我们去会会他！
E: Come on, March! Let's go find him!

C: 你不知为何，什么也没想，就这样盯着斯科特，这让他感觉到非常不适。
E: Without knowing why, you absentmindedly stare at Skott, leaving him deeply unsettled.

C: {NICKNAME}说话确实笨了一些，但是我们并不是想用辩论战胜你，那和用剑击败你有什么区别呢？
E: {NICKNAME} might not be the best at talking, but we're not here to defeat you in a debate. That'd be no different than beating you with a sword, right?

C: 所以…椒丘先生要我找的是——灵砂大人的…血？
E: So... what Mr. Jiaoqiu wanted me to find was... Lady Lingsha's... blood?

C: 别在意那么多细节，那你们呢，不会是来工造司闲逛的吧？
E: Don't sweat the details. What about you two? Taking a stroll in the Artisanship Commission?

C: 三月七小姐，你不想成为大人吗？
E: Miss March 7th, don't you want to be an adult?

C: 还在想剑斗的那件事吗，别担心，我就是你的答案，你来找我，我会帮你解决问题的。
E: Are you still worrying about the sword showdown? Fret not, I'm your answer. Come and find me, and I'll give you your answer.

C: 三月，那不是你的经历…
E: March, that never happened to you...

C: 它们在我们那儿声名败坏，于是又想着跑来现实宇宙，从人类这里捞些新朋友。据我所知，它们计划的第一步是学习人类的游戏——那些追逐，实际上是在学你们玩捉迷藏呢！
E: They have a terrible reputation in my world, so they decided to come to the real universe and grab some human friends. As far as I know, the first step of their plan was to learn some human games... These attacks have actually been them learning how to play your game of hide-and-seek!

C: {NICKNAME}，快快快，过来帮我看看！
E: {NICKNAME}, quick quick, come and help me check something out!

C: 卡美丽小姐也是不习惯味道吗？
E: Miss Carmella, you can't get used to the food, either?

C: （打了这么多场叩关赛，分数似乎已经够了。去竞锋舰的积分板上确认一下吧。）
E: (After fighting in so many knockout stages, I think our points should be enough. Time to head to the Skysplitter's leaderboard to confirm our ranking.)

C: 你撞到头了吗？
E: Did you hit your head?

C: 对啊，这姑娘是不是有点过分？
E: Yeah, isn't this girl a bit much?

E: Nat... I... How long do I have left?

C: 你的铁臂该怎么办？

C: 我…不明白……
E: I... don't understand...

E: The result of my calculations holds no importance to you. You need to step into the ring and experience the battle yourself — that's what matters more to you.

E: See you again, Jing Yuan... No... considering my age, I don't think we will be seeing each other again.

C: 我无法回答。
E: I cannot answer.

C: 你答应过我的！你说过你要遵守戒律。我不会为你解开武器禁令的！
E: You promised me! You said you would abide by the commandments. I will not let you undo your weapons lock!

C: 我希望给奢摩一次演武仪典重赛的机会，让所有人见证丹轮寺的步离人同样拥有所有人类拥有的美好品质。
E: I hope to give Samatha a chance to compete once again in the Wardance, to let all witness that Claretwheel Temple's borisin also possess similarly admirable qualities as the rest of humanity.

C: 只要有一线希望，我可以一直等待。

C: 不看报我还真不知道，原来这场比赛的影响这么大。

C: 原来如此——感谢你的回答！
E: I see... Thank you for your answer!

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 我没有什么要澄清的，这就是「卢卡式胜利」。我不过是做了些微不足道的工作罢了。
E: I have nothing to clarify. That was a victory in Luka's image. All I did was menial work.

C: 总而言之，我的教练去问了萨姆本人，人家不喜欢被你们冒充。不要这么做了。你们总不想被星核猎手找上门吧？
E: Anyways, my coach has spoken to SAM. They don't like being impersonated by you guys. Please stop doing this. You don't want the real Stellaron Hunters to come knocking on your door, right?

C: 都说「人不该跟扑满一般见识」，但今天不得不破例了。上场吧！

C: 我确实没什么对付「植物」的经验…只希望这场比赛能顺利吧！

C: 那祝卢卡选手能够成功「复活」。
E: I wish Luka a successful resurrection, then.

C: 前排左手边第四位。
E: Front row, fourth from the left.

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练的精彩答复，今天的采访环节到此结束，请各位来场的媒体朋友有序离场。
E: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your insightful answers. Today's Q&A ends here. Media personnel, please leave the area in an orderly and civil fashion.

C: 卢卡，振作一点！快出拳！
E: Luka, get it together! Throw a punch!

C: 卢卡，从那个角度出拳吧！

C: 哇哦～史瓦罗选手似乎准备全力一击了！

E: My fans are always this fanatical anyways.

E: Fine, the other guest also didn't say anything when I said that. The silence from both of you is quite hurtful...

C: 没事的。作为经理不需要登台，保证乐队演出能顺利进行就好。

C: 风险越大，惊喜越大！

E: So you're actually still attending school?

C: 可能是因为年鉴还在征集内容的阶段吧，你是盛会巨星，估计要等学校这边全都制作好了才会发到你手里，现在还早着呢。
E: Maybe because the yearbook's still in the content collection phase. You're the Festive Superstar, so you'll probably only get the final version after the school's curated it. It's still early days.

E: How about asking Arlan?

C: 我也曾望着话筒空余恨，下定决心要努力发愤。然而梦想不会轻易临门，还好我愿意痴痴地等。心好冷。

E: First, when I was checking on the stage equipment, I noticed there was an unfinished track inside. After that, I asked the band and others to help finish this song with all the Inspiration you gathered!

C: 你是谁？

E: We worked so hard to climb our way up the ranks from the qualifiers, but were mercilessly crushed by you in the first round. Yet we didn't give up, and emerged victorious from the loser's group. And then we got eliminated by you in the second stage...

E: The IPC's Emergency Department has already made full preparations for disaster relief efforts. The IPC advises spacecraft in areas affected by the disaster to return to port promptly. Residents in neighboring system spaces should temporarily suspend any space travel and outdoor activities, and purchase corresponding weather insurance to prevent any unnecessary losses.

E: Even the Titans cannot understand things they have never seen. The original purpose of enlightenment can only be reached through interpreting the unknown using the known, forging ahead steadfastly, and tailoring education according to an individual's nature.

C: 来点上强度的！

C: 不！我不要回去！咳咳…我好不容易爬出来的，你知道…昏光庭院离这多远吗？

C: 嗷呜？都没有，{NICKNAME}一直是我信赖的伙伴！
E: Awoo? None of that. {NICKNAME} has always been a partner I trust!

C: 我要玩，我现在就要玩。
E: Let's play then. Like, right now.

C: 当然，请不用担心隐私问题——我们有专门的保密协议。要知道，无论作为一名愚者还是私商，「讲信誉」都是我最基本的准则。
E: But don't worry about privacy concerns — we have strict confidentiality agreements. Whether as a Fool or a private businessperson, "keeping one's word" is my fundamental principle.

E: There's some time before the next race, so please take a break. We'll make a public announcement when the race starts...

E: Don't worry, you're a VIP. Your exclusive Spheroid racer is being arranged right now!

C: 你们这算是危险驾驶吧？
E: Isn't this reckless driving?

C: （我们等会儿就坐在观众席上给你助威汪！）
E: (We'll be cheering you on from the stands! Woof!)

C: 啊，时间也差不多，总决赛要开赛了，组委会那边在催了。

C: …这句「啾啾」的信息量也太大了。

C: 现在的学风，真是每况愈下了…第二课名为：常识。我教你群星运行、历史掌故、生活窍门与物理规律，如何？

C: 喂！

C: 必叫它有来无回！
E: It's not leaving this place alive!

C: 我唯一的使命，就是调饮！姬子，杨叔，要不要试试我的手艺？
E: My one true calling is mixology! Himeko, Mr. Yang, care for a taste?

C: 时尚潮流的更迭迅速而残酷，你不禁开始同情起匹诺康尼所有的调饮师来。
E: Fashion trends shift with brutal speed, and you can't help but feel a twinge of sympathy for every drinksmith in Penacony.

C: 一阵困意袭来。
E: Sleepiness creeps in.

C: 说起来有些狼狈，我们凑够身上所有的信用点，才在海边的小摊买到一打橘子汽水。
E: It was a bit of a mess, we scraped together all the credits we had just to buy a dozen orange sodas from a beach stall.

C: 唔，不知不觉，剧本段落之间换行的空白就快结束了。
E: Mmph. Before you know it, the blank space between the script's segments has almost come to an end.

C: 而我也会将您的调饮配方，带到脚步踏足的每一片土地。
E: And I'll bring your drink recipes with me, to every place I go.

C: 你还挺积极的，最近很空？没事干的话可以再测几次我的「模拟宇宙」。
E: Look at that eagerness. Been a slow week? If you're that desperate for something to do, you could always run a few more tests in my Simulated Universe.

C: 只不过在这次典押中，你才是那个提供资助的人。作为抵押物，我愿意以公司战略投资部的名义，向你承诺丰厚的回报。
E: Only this time, you're the one providing the funds. And as collateral, I'm willing to offer you generous returns, in the name of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department.

C: 当然啦，我个人也对你很感兴趣。你当时在匹诺康尼的表现，可是给我留下了深刻的印象。
E: Of course, I'm quite interested in you personally. Your performance in Penacony left quite an impression on me.

C: 我持保留意见。
E: I reserve judgment.

C: 要不是你拦着我，挖出宝贝的就是我！
E: I'd have dug those treasures out already if you hadn't stopped me!

C: 哈，来得倒挺快。我做了个小插件，用它来存档一些有用的数据，{NICKNAME}，你帮我测下存档功能就行，我会给你报酬的。为了考虑你，这个插件也做得很好玩，感激我吧。
E: You're quick. Well, I've made a small plugin to save important data. {NICKNAME}, assist me in testing its file-saving function, and I'll pay for your service. You should appreciate that I make the plugin fun for you.

C: 这真的安全吗？
E: Is that really safe?

C: 唉！怎么会呢？其实在下有一个小本子，专门记录各种奇怪冷僻的人名物名，需要时就可以拿出来用。
E: Hey, no way! Actually, I have a little notebook where I record all kinds of obscure things in. I can show you it if you want.

C: 「{NICKNAME}气运丹田，破除了幻境中的禁制……」
E: "{NICKNAME} concentrated all {F#her}{M#his} qi to {F#her}{M#his} Core Radix, thus breaking the containment mechanism in the fantasia..."

C: 那我不成欺世盗名了？
E: Wouldn't that make me a fraud!?

C: 这么容易放弃吗？无名客难道不应该是一群坚韧不拔的旅者吗？
E: Quitting so soon? I thought the Nameless were supposed to be tenacious and indomitable?

C: 你很有眼光！
E: Well said! You sure have good taste, I'll give you that!

C: 但见龙尊一声清叱，大战就此展开——
E: But the high elder gave a clear shout as the battle began—

C: 「期待已久的武打戏」去哪了？
E: Where did the "long-awaited martial arts scene" end up going?

C: 放入「冷却液」
E: Put in the coolant

C: 哎，贵人多忘事，我先前在小秘书那儿见过你几面，不过你可能没什么印象了……
E: Yeah, we've met a few times at Miss Secretary's office, but perhaps you don't remember me anymore...

C: 那么，我就先失陪了。我还要去其他设施视察运营状况，确保庆典的正常举办。如果还有什么疑问，服务大厅的工作人员都会一一为你解答。
E: Please excuse me, if you may. I have a few other facilities to inspect to ensure the festival runs smoothly. If you have any problems, the staff at the service hall will be more than happy to assist you.

C: 既然各位都在这里了——希露瓦小姐和佩拉小姐，不如就由两位冠军候补来向挑战者们介绍一下这里的规则吧？
E: Since you're all here, how about we let Miss Serval and Miss Pela, our championship contenders, explain the rules to everyone?

C: 哼哼，在本姑娘面前，小小的解谜机关根本不在话下～
E: With me here it was a walk in the park!

C: 你说得对，累了一天，我们还是好好休息，不想这些了。
E: You're right, we've had a long day. Let's just get some rest and forget about them.

C: 话说回来，原来不光是玩家，连庆典的赞助人也来了——今儿个是什么好日子啊？
E: So the event's sponsor is here too? Is today some sort of special occasion or something?

C: 喂喂喂！怎么还没开始对决就求饶呀！
E: Ha? We haven't even started fighting yet!

C: 希望公司这次有好好设计玩家的行动路线……
E: I hope the IPC made an effort to create some easy-to-follow routes for the players this time...

C: 您吃了吗？吃的什么？
E: Had your lunch? What did you have?

C: 这下他肯定是个坏东西了！
E: No question about it, he's definitely up to no good!

C: 哼哼！哼！哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 后来听说，那只以太灵现在似乎就在两位手里…所以我才想到找你们聊聊。
E: I've been told that the Aether Spirit is with you... so, I thought it'd be good to have a chat with you about them.

C: …虽然我也很好奇，但这好像不是重点。
E: ...Is that really the main takeaway from all this?

C: 也就是说…次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神本身像所有以太灵一样，都是现实生物的数据复制品；而它会有性格则是因为游戏项目组的失误……
E: Let me get this straight, you're saying Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is just like all other Aether Spirits — a replica of a real-life creature, and the reason for its unique personality is because of an oversight by the game's project team?

C: …看来这只以太灵真的很喜欢两位啊……
E: ...Looks like this Aether Spirit has grown quite fond of you both...

C: 看，维尔德在那里！
E: Look, Wilder's over there!

C: 这是我们可以留下它的意思吗？
E: Does that mean we can keep them?

C: 哼哼！哼！哼哼～
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 呜呜伯将<color=#dbc291ff>冠军候补凭证</color>交给你后垂头丧气地飘走了，仿佛在说：「给黑塔女士打工…好累……」
E: Wubbaboo gives you the <color=#dbc291ff>championship contender pass</color> and leaves with a sad expression, as if saying: "It's hard working for Madam Herta..."

C: 嘿，庆典冠军！怎么样，对我们公司的游戏还满意吗？
E: Hey, Festival Champion! What do you think, do you like our corporation's game?

C: 正合我意，来吧，决出真正的冠军吧！
E: I was hoping you'd say that! Bring it on, let's decide who the real Champion is!

C: 嘁…还真难缠。
E: Didn't see that coming...

C: 看来次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神已经很有干劲了——我们也四处转转，好好做一下准备吧。
E: Looks like Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is really fired up! Let's take a look around while we get ready.

C: 嘿嘿，可那地方真有座位嘛……
E: Well, technically there aren't any seats... But anyways!

C: 我想回家——！
E: I wanna go home!

C: 按照十王司对岁阳习性的理解，它们多半会往人居稠密的地带寻找宿主。所到之处一定会有许多不能解释的「灵异事件」。
E: According to the Ten-Lords Commission's understanding of heliobi behavior, they tend to roam densely populated areas in search of hosts... and wherever they go, there are bound to be reports of "supernatural phenomena."

C: 毕竟冥差大张旗鼓挨家挨户的搜索，不但效率低下，还会引起人们惊慌，激化岁阳对宿主的控制。
E: That means we can operate more efficiently, and with a low profile... If people started to see a spiritfarer making door-to-door visits, they might begin to panic... and that would give the heliobi even more power over their hosts.

C: 这么做确实高效。
E: Does sound kinda effective...

C: 浮烟…因为一个小小的疏忽落败了，你…很不甘心吧？
E: Cirrus... you must be unhappy with how things turned out, right?

C: 一副刚刚睡醒的样子，看起来弱爆了好嘛。腾骁呢？他怎么选了这么个家伙来接任？不过，让仙舟人比武招选，重新决出个将军来也不现实。
E: Look at that expression — he's barely half-awake! Where is General Teng Xiao? Why did he choose such a lightweight to take over for him? I suppose it's already too late for the Xianzhou to rid themselves of this clown...

C: …你的军队？
E: ...Your army?

C: 呃…怎么连云骑都给惊动了？年轻，是你打了报告嘛？
E: Uh... Even the Cloud Knights are getting involved? Did you file a report or something?

C: 呃…问得好。是这样的，咱们是隶属于十……
E: Uh... Hah, good question! So, actually, we're affiliated with the Ten—

C: 好的好的，那就麻烦你们了。
E: Fantastic. Well, we'll leave you to it.

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们几个里就你最厉害，就由你来负责开门吧……
E: {NICKNAME}, you're the powerhouse of this team, we'll leave the door to you.

C: 我三脚猫的功夫罢了。
E: I'm a jack of many trades, but master of none...

C: 请白露小姐也早些回去，别让那两位医助等太久，他们也挺不容易的。
E: You should go back soon, Lady Bailu. Those two medics have had a rough day.

C: 哦～咱这个账号粉丝数量猛涨啊！
E: Ooooh⁓! Our follower count has skyrocketed!

C: 可是它消失以后，我的尾巴…我是指自己真正的尾巴也不见了。镜子里的自己怎么看都变得不习惯了，连干活都没什么力气……
E: ...but when Tail disappeared, my tail — my real tail... it disappeared too. Now my reflection looks weird to me, and I hate work even more than before...

C: 就没人随身带个陷阱吗？
E: Anyone bring a hunting trap?

C: 快醒醒，别被它激发了愧疚的情绪。
E: Careful! Don't let them manipulate you.

C: 呜，她真的是个逃家的孩子吗？怎么说起话来夹枪带棒的，好早熟啊。
E: Geez, and there I was pouring my heart out... Now I feel like this kid's lived longer than I have...

C: 招工启事上从来没有说过这一点吧？不对，咱们哪儿有招工启事啊。
E: I don't think that was included in the job posting. Actually, I don't think there ever was a job posting.

C: 肃静！太卜司内，不得聒噪！
E: Silence! Idle chatter is not permitted in the Divination Commission!

C: 换一个复杂些的沙盘推演如何？
E: I have a proposal — why don't we try a more advanced sandbox?

C: 打算开始了吗？
E: Ready to begin?

C: 今天接报，说丹鼎司这儿有孽物出没，队长派我来清剿。不过，之后的事情…简直、简直就像是做了个梦，太奇怪了。
E: I received a report today about an infestation of abominations here at the Alchemy Commission — the captain sent me to clear it out. What happened after that was like a dream... I can't explain it.

C: 彦卿没事吧？
E: Was Yanqing alright?

C: 我猜你们两都安然无恙…
E: Seems like you both came out unscathed...

C: 当时需要让咱们都撤退吗？
E: ...Was it crucial for ALL of us to retreat?

C: 祈龙坛上…为什么会有这么多剑？
E: What are all these swords doing in Dragonprayer Terrace...?

C: 虽说我估摸着自己也许撑不了几招。你们快去把将军找来！在他赶到之前，我绝不会轻易倒下的！
E: Granted, I might not last more than a few moves. You guys go get the general — quickly! I'll try and hold him off until he gets here!

C: 神策府的骁卫…也不过如此…我本以为你一出剑我就得趴下了。
E: Lieutenant of the Seat of Divine Foresight... Is that the best you can do? And I was thinking I'd be done for the moment you drew your sword.

C: 一切平安无事，为免夜长梦多，咱们赶紧回去把这个岁阳装进束形却邪阵吧，以这家伙的危险程度，我、我有些怕它跑了！
E: All's well that ends well. We should hurry back and lock Apyra in the Evil Binding Matrix... They're a dangerous one — I'm afraid they might escape!

C: 如今情况已经截然不同，没有判官相助，会让各位深陷危险境地，这与成立小队的初衷不符。
E: The situation has changed completely. Without the assistance of a judge, continuing would place all of you in grave danger — defeating the purpose of the squad.

C: 尾巴，我可以相信你吗？
E: Can I trust you, Tail?

C: 还在这儿转悠吗？你对朋友还真不上心哪。
E: Still here, huh? Then I guess you're not too concerned about your friend.

C: 看老子把那些人全部带过来！
E: Just wait, I'm going to bring everyone here!

C: 怎么，老师要陪她玩一局吗？
E: Well, do you want to play a round with her?

C: 怎么还急眼了？
E: Aren't you a sore loser?

C: 彦卿还以为那三个人都是下棋输了呢…原来这个棋鬼只是输不起……
E: I thought those three lost to you... Turns out this Chess Ghost is just a sore loser...

C: 啊，不用麻烦了…那个…我就是「不爱睡觉」……
E: Ah, don't worry about it... Err... My name is "Insomnophile"...

C: （使用「同心火铃」）
E: (Use the Harmonic Chime)

C: …您说得对，是我太自私了……
E: ...You're right. I'm being selfish...

C: 免了吧…难道你帮我帮得还不够多吗？
E: Save it... haven't you already helped me enough?

C: 复盘过往的体验度量，各位对「成功生活」的提炼只是衣食无忧和栖身之所，缺乏思考和沉淀，这种平淡的体验能够反哺赋能他人吗？
E: Looking back on past experiences, people only measure a "successful life" in terms of having clothing, food, and minimal worries. Without deeper thought, can these bland experiences serve as feedback to empower others?

C: 青总？这家伙在幻觉里是这么看待自己的吗？
E: President Qing? Is that how she sees herself in her fantasy?

C: 您误会了，这里已经是琼玉牌馆了。青总远见卓识，早早地买下了司辰宫。
E: Ah, you misunderstand. This is the Jade Tile Parlor now. With her great foresight, President Qing bought the Palace of Astrum out long ago.

C: 如果你不能从中感到乐趣，我就打算把你留在这儿不停开箱子，直到你能深切体会它的乐趣为止！
E: If you don't enjoy this, I will have you stay here and open chests until you can fully appreciate the fun!

C: （没出货。）
E: (Nothing.)

C: …此时你想到的是？
E: ...Your first thought right now is...?

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: 藿藿，你觉得呢？
E: Huohuo, what do you think?

C: 我已经预定素裳跟我探查林中小屋了，这件事就交给你和藿藿了。
E: I've asked Sushang to investigate the forest cottage with me, so we'll leave this matter to you and Huohuo.

C: 没关系，我会等你准备好的。
E: It's fine. I'll wait for you to get ready.

C: 哎？是我眼花了吗…刚才这里应该是有岁阳的吧？
E: Eh? Am I seeing things... There should have been heliobi there, right?

C: 明明我还有那么多事情没做，那么多美丽的景色没看……
E: There's still so much I haven't done... so many sights I haven't seen...

C: 又有一只漏网岁阳！
E: Another escaped heliobus!

C: 我没有敢跟别人说，自己悄悄地删除之后，提心吊胆了很久。
E: I didn't dare to tell anyone, so I deleted it and was paranoid for a long time.

C: 好好好，让我们快进到下一个问题吧——
E: Fine then, let's fast forward on to the next question:

C: 非常简单。
E: Very easy.

C: 根据你所描述的情况，我初步猜测为它在吞下垃圾后，发生了「变异」。
E: Based on what you have just described, my initial hypothesis is that it has mutated after consuming the trash.

C: 你在哪儿看见的，我怎么没看到？
E: Where did you see it? 'Cuz I didn't.

C: {NICKNAME}，我想给你讲个故事。
E: {NICKNAME}, let me tell you a story.

C: 我见过你的宠物了。
E: I've met your pet already.

C: 不过啊，我跟你说，那个调饮师不行的，就是个我捡回来的孤儿，擦擦桌子还可以，指望她调出点有意思的东西，那不太可能。
E: However, let me enlighten you: That drinksmith is unsuitable. She is but an orphan I took in. She may tend to the tables, yet her ability to create anything of interest is doubtful.

C: （好像不太对，再想想吧。）
E: (No, that doesn't seem right. Think again.)

C: 对的。呃，我想问…「你最喜欢的对象是谁？」
E: Yeah. Um... now I'm asking... Who's your favorite one to be with?

C: 你在教我做事？我说要见，就得见着。带路的东西少插嘴！
E: Are you telling me what to do? Shut up! I want the administrator, now!

C: 小…是小。
E: Small... it's small.

C: 胡说什么呢。酒吧里没有那种规矩，自在点就好。对了，还得给你们俩取名字。
E: Stop your nonsense. Relax, there are no such rules in this lounge. Oh, I need to give you guys names.

C: 汪！舒翁…过来，过来这边哇！
E: Woof! Siobhan... here! Come here!

C: 你…是新来的？…会欺负我吗？舒翁不在，是被你排挤走了吗？
E: Are you... new here?... Are you going to bully me? Where is Siobhan? Have you ousted her?

C: 记录「淑女」的情况。
E: Record information about Lady.

C: （…它还是这么坚持要颜色分层啊。）
E: (...He's still so fixated on layering colors.)

C: （准备掏出球棒。）
E: (Get ready to pull out your baseball bat.)

C: 细说。
E: Do go on.

C: 唉，未经允许就向旁人揭露自己的伤疤是很失礼的事情。适当地表露悲伤，适当地感到喜悦，适当地接受离别，这对彼此都好。
E: *sigh* It's impolite to expose my wounds without permission. It's better to share sorrows, experience joys, and bid farewell appropriately.

C: 算你做的不错，舒翁找来替班的人确实还有点本事。
E: Not bad at all. Now I see Siobhan did find someone decent to take her place.

C: …装饰物？
E: ...Decorations?

C: 所以刚才你是想考验我？
E: So, were you just trying to test me?

C: …分层？
E: ...Layering?

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: …为什么这么说？
E: ...Why do you say that?

C: …你急了，对不对？你急了！你急了！
E: ...You're getting angry, aren't you? You're getting angry! Angry!

C: 汪！生气也没用。只要你还在给别人工作，就必须先忍着哇！
E: Woof! No point in being angry. As long as you're working for someone else, you better put a lid on it!

C: 咳咳，这个抱歉，想起童年往事，难免有点感叹。
E: Ahem, my bad. I couldn't help but get sentimental when I think about my childhood memories.

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 跟随音乐和红色折纸小鸟的节奏，在恰当的时候<color=#f29e38ff>按下空格</color>。
E: Follow the music and the red Origami Bird's beat and <color=#f29e38ff>press space</color> at the right time.

C: 重复佩佩的节奏，在恰当的时候<color=#f29e38ff>点击屏幕</color>。
E: Repeat Peppy's beat and <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} the screen</color> at the right time.

C: 扮演<color=#f29e38ff>右侧的垃圾桶</color>，一起来<color=#f29e38ff>说唱</color>吧！
E: Play as the <color=#f29e38ff>trashcan on the right</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>rap</color> together!

C: 先来复习一下节奏吧。
E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 好奇怪、奇怪、怪！
E: It's s—s—so strange!

C: 旅途中他不时会遇到一种调皮的小精灵。它们喜欢捉迷藏，被找到时还会发出某种奇怪的笑声，就像刚刚的小鸟一样……
E: During the journey, he occasionally encounters mischievous little sprites. They enjoy playing hide and seek, and when found, they emit a strange laughter, just like the little bird from earlier...

C: 卢卡 卢卡 卢卡 卢卡 卢卡 卢卡
E: Luka Luka Luka Luka Luka Luka

C: 你们还讲不讲道理了？
E: Are you guys even reasonable anymore?

C: 真是药到病除啊！
E: It's just like a magic cure!

C: 有人拒绝双赢，就会有人接受。所以我找到了你。接下来，我将以「新产品发布会」的名义组织一场比武，比赛双方分别是，你和卢卡。
E: When someone refuses a win-win, someone else accepts. That's why I found you. Next, I will organize a duel under the guise of a new product launch, where you and Luka will compete.

C: 看来我们谈妥了～
E: It seems we have reached an agreement.

C: 保留意见就是没意见——「学派战争」、我的起点、{RUBY_B#鲁珀特二世}第五位天才{RUBY_E#}这一切就像首尾相嵌的锁链，螺丝咕姆，你可别跟我说你对这次演算不好奇。
E: Reserving judgment is as good as having no opinion — the Scholars' Strife, my beginnings, and {RUBY_B# Rubert II}the fifth genius{RUBY_E#} — These are all chains tightly linked to one other. Screwllum, you'd better not tell me you're not curious about this extrapolation.

C: 现象与本质，火光和影子。如果巧合的出现率趋向饱和，在「巧合」的背后，一定存在「必然」的本质。
E: Phenomenon and essence, sparks and shadows... If the rate of coincidences appearing approaches saturation, there must be an essential "inevitability" beneath such "coincidence."

C: 谁能为天才设置陷阱？在天才的研究里。
E: Who can set a trap for a genius within a genius' research.

C: 终于到解谜时刻了。
E: It's finally time to solve the puzzle.

C: 还是看看，阮•梅能不能成功把余清涂拉进来吧。
E: We'd better see if Ruan Mei can successfully drag Yu Qingtu into this.

C: 手捧一杯十份浓缩的冷萃咖啡，你隔着玻璃注视着庇尔波因特的黎明。
E: Swirling a ten-shot cold brew espresso, you watch the sunrise upon Pier Point through the window.

C: 既然{NICKNAME}已经做出决定了，那就请各位围成一圈，准备开始新成员加入星穹列车的仪式帕！
E: Since {NICKNAME} has made {M#his}{F#her} decision, let's gather 'round and formally welcome the Astral Express Crew's newest member!

C: 不是吧？这你都要拖延？
E: Are you serious? You're putting off even something like this?

C: 让我再休息一下…
E: Let me rest a bit longer...

C: （下一步，就装修浴室吧……）
E: (Next up, let's start decorating the bathroom...)

C: 不打扰干涉，让它自由生长。
E: I don't interfere, just let it grow freely.

C: 要是现实世界也有一键排序就好了。
E: It would be great if the real world had a one-click sorting feature.

C: 放在货运车厢。
E: How about placing it in the cargo carriage?

C: …那你至少能得到荣耀。想象一下吧，「收复故土之人」，多么伟大的头衔。
E: ...But you'll at least receive glory. I mean, think about your potential title — "Reclaimer of Lost Lands"! Isn't that a noble title to be known by?

C: 呃…如果你打算靠这种方式伪装成大地兽，那我想应该没用。
E: Uh... If you believe that doing so would help you to disguise yourself as a dromas, I don't think that such a drastic step is really necessary.

C: 刻法勒在上啊…这还有完没完了！要想探完这里，怕是三辈子都不够用吧……
E: By Kephale above... Is there an end to this!? If we wish to explore all of them, it'll take us more than three lifetimes to do so...

C: 我在地宫里发现了文物…
E: I discovered some artifacts in the hypogeum...

C: 呜嗡！呜嗡！（别，别走…）
E: Grumph! Grumph grumph! (No, don't go...)

C: 呜嗡。（耶，我不做大地兽啦！）
E: Grumph. (Yay! No more being a dromas for me!)

C: 我得好好考虑一下…
E: I need to think about this...

C: 你对他有何评价？
E: What's your take on him?

C: 没事，我可以翻译。
E: No worries. I can do the translation.

C: 穿华服的大地兽！我们有救了。
E: Dromas draped in finery! We're saved!

C: 呜…嗡？（很温柔，但他为什么对着空气说话？难道他也有幻想朋友吗？）
E: Grumph... Grumph? (Very gentle... but why does he keep talking to the air? Could he have an imaginary friend too?)

C: 好离谱的翻译器。
E: What a ridiculous translator.

C: 「听我说。」
E: "Listen."

C: 不说这个，我来是想告诉二位，虽然主队出发了，但我们还是想邀请驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大加入。
E: Anyway, I came here to tell you both that even though the main team has left, we'd still like to invite Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas to join us.

C: 你说话像是小说里的反派。
E: You sound like a villain from a novel.

C: 呜嗡，呜——呜嗡——（所以，我想说的只有一件事——谢谢你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。这个，请你收下！）
E: Grumphhh, Grumph-Grumphhh— (So, there's only one thing I want to say: Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Here, please take this!)

C: 今天没有适合你上手的宝物啦，请明天再来吧。
E: There are no suitable treasures for you to handle today. Please come back tomorrow.

C: 我会好好珍藏的。
E: I'll make sure to take good care of it.

C: 我知道了，你想找我借钱。
E: I see, you want to borrow money.

C: 为了保障公平性，只有当糕点不够的时候才能去取哦，所以还是多想想办法吧。
E: But to ensure fairness, you can only get more when you have insufficient pastries. So, you might want to strategize a little.

C: 好有耐心呀，我好高兴。有{NICKNAME}这样的听众在，故事才会焕发生命。
E: How wonderful! You're so patient, {NICKNAME}. Stories only shine when they have a listener like you.

C: 终于，终于…我得去向孩子们宣布，妖精们的餐馆，终于回来了哪！
E: At last... at long last! ! I have to tell the little ones that the fairies' restaurant is coming back at last!

C: 说到就到！*我们*找到好多愿意当服务员的妖精啦，缇安正在给它们做入职培训。
E: Right on cue! We found lots of fairies willing to be waitstaff, and Trianne's onboarding them as we speak!

C: 如何？若是决定了，我就记入档案里。
E: Well? If that's your final choice, I'll make it official.

C: 其二，用餐区域的桌椅同样需要扩充，但目前，这个职能还没有对应的负责人。
E: Second, we need more tables and chairs for the dining area, but there's no one in charge of that role right now.

C: 想要支持缇宝老师的，请举手！
E: Now, those in favor of Lady Tribbie's proposal, raise your hand!

C: …我认输。没有人能在投票表决里胜过缇宝老师。
E: ...I yield. No one can win over Tribbie when it comes to voting.

C: 没有啦。缇宝也在很认真地做准备，只是…想给阿蝶留个惊喜！
E: That's not true! Tribbie was working super hard too... Tribbie just wanted to prepare a surprise for Cas.

C: 正好有三位评审员，*我们*每人准备一道菜就好。

E: The last person finally arrives...

C: 甜蜜蜜节的反响很好呢，客人们都很喜欢我们推出的菜品。
E: The Sweetie Festival was a big hit! Guests really loved the special dishes we rolled out.

C: 哎，这么针锋相对，干脆就让你们合伙去管厨房好了，说不定有竞争反而是好事呢。
E: Phew, what's with all that tension? Maybe we should just have you two co-run the kitchen. Some healthy competition might actually be good for business.

C: 可以。看在你有段时间没掌勺的份上，先手权就给你吧。
E: Sounds fair. It's been a while since you cooked, so I'll let you go first.

C: 迷迷迷迷。酸之天王拜见各位！这酸爽，难以抵挡迷！
E: Memememem! Sour Overlord, reporting in! This tangy zing is simply irresistible, mem!

C: 白厄主厨的支持者，请让我看到你们的热情迷！
E: Supporters of Chef Phainon, let me hear your passion, mem!

C: 距离终点只有一步之遥了。
E: We're just one step away from the finish line.

C: 我正好烦躁得很。风堇，去把我的那几个学生叫过来。我要给你们再上一课。

C: 灰子…不对，是店长。怎么样，就让我来当这个促销负责人吧？

E: I want to talk about the team.

E: Dux Celeripes sure has an eye for what customers really want. And... heh, by pocketing that coin, she showed she knows exactly what she values too.

C: 只是那矛头……\n指向<color=#9e5738>自己的故乡</color>。
E: Yet the tip of that spear...\nwas directed at <color=#9e5738>his own homeland</color>.

C: 缫丝的苍鬓老妇在门中匆忙，\n她灵慧的女孩在门外游荡。
E: The silk-weaving old woman busies herself within,\nAs her smart child wanders outside on a whim.

C: 为何留下泰坦一命，\n少女自问，仍弄不清。
E: Why did she spare the Titan's life?\nThe young girl knew not, even after asking herself.

C: 「第三则谎言名为……」
E: "The third lie is called..."

C: 你等到了<color=#9e5738>浮冰</color>掀开岁月的被褥，\n等到了<color=#9e5738>青龙</color>与大地的接壤，\n<color=#9e5738>救世的英雄</color>也再次到访。
E: You waited until the <color=#9e5738>ice floes</color> stirred the slumber of time,\nUntil the <color=#9e5738>azure dragon</color> coiled along the edges of the earth,\nAnd the <color=#9e5738>hero of deliverance</color> returned once more.

C: 直到一支魁梧的援军，\n将这场悲剧终结——
E: Until a mighty force of reinforcements\nBrings this tragedy to an end —

C: 「等待吧，照亮夜幕的星星，终会造访。」\n如柔和的月华。
E: "Just wait. The stars that illuminate the night will visit in the end."\nLike gentle moonlight.

C: 哦，神秘又美丽的天女啊，\n我好想化作一块石版，\n将你的故事永远铭记。
E: Oh, mysterious and beautiful celestial maiden,\nHow I wish to turn into a slate,\nForever etched with your tale.

C: 崇拜者们细数她的行径，\n有些甚至被写入了家训。
E: Her worshipers recite her deeds,\nEven writing some into family teachings.

C: 那天的果汁很好喝，还想再喝。
E: The juice that day was delicious. I want to drink it again.

C: 小冰熊，白白嫩嫩的小冰熊，\n不知它现在找到伙伴了没有？
E: Little ice bear, sweet little snow-white ice bear,\nI wonder if it's found any friends yet?

C: 虽放下豪言，\n实则王女从未摸过棋盘。\n失利令她认真拜起师来……
E: Despite the bravado,\nThe princess had never touched chess.\nThe defeat made her study in earnest, acknowledging the other as a teacher...

C: 谁将世界划作棋盘，\n以一道泾渭分明的河流，\n划定神与人的边界？
E: Who made this world a chessboard,\nAnd with one stroke, one river,\nCreated the boundary between god and man?

C: 「以翁法罗斯之名，\n我将赐予永生以长眠。」
E: "In the name of Amphoreus,\nI will grant eternal rest to the immortal."

C: 剑士搭上统帅的手，\n如同将利刃的握柄轻放。
E: The swordmaster clasped the commander's hand,\nAs though gently grasping the hilt of a keen blade.

C: 在母亲赠予她的酣醉中，\n在酣醉赠予她的幻梦中，\n在幻梦赐予她的盛会中…
E: In the drunkenness granted by her mother,\nIn the dream granted by that drunkenness,\nIn the feast granted by that dream...

C: 转眼，奥赫玛的人们又看见，\n少女四处收集零碎。\n她想重建那片净地。
E: Soon, the people of Okhema see once again,\nThe girl collecting more pieces and tokens,\nWanting to rebuild that pure haven.

C: 只是二人相见时，\n眼中的厌恶仍藏不住。
E: Yet when their gazes met once more,\nThe loathing within remained unswayed.

C: 每一轮收获月的初始，他都会为自己扫墓，\n长久地凝视晦暗的双手……\n
E: He would sweep his own grave at the beginning of every Month of Reaping,\nStaring long and hard at his stained hands...\n

C:
其实，他也曾造就「神迹」——
以泥土塑成魔像，那是他无言的侍从。

虽无灵识，却可各司其职，
几近神明眷属的精妙。
E:
In fact, he once crafted "miracles" —
Forging silent servants, using soil as vehicle.

Though no sentience, they do their job without obstacles,
Rivaling Titankin in spectacle.

C: 曾有仅一次的同心合意，\n一人一神，异口同辞——\n「别再同时向前迈步了。」
E: It happened but once—a perfect harmony,\nOne man, one god, speaking in one breath.\n"Stop stepping forward at the same time as me."

C: 那只是一句玩笑，\n但尚在树庭的学士，\n回答却极度严谨。
E: It was just a joke,\nBut the scholar still at the Grove,\nAnswered with extreme caution.

C:
身姿曼妙的衣匠曾有美丽的容颜，
有人扮作执剑的战士，
有人扮作冰冷的祭司。

在金丝的牵引下，上演一出出默剧。
E:
The elegant Garmentmakers once had beautiful faces,
Some as knights with swords,
Some as impassive priests,

And put on pantomime after pantomime in the golden thread's light.

C: 怀抱安眠的命运， 她呢喃自语： 「将来身着华服的人，要担起丝线的重量啊。」
E: She mutters As destiny slumbers in her arms: "The one that wears this elegant attire in the future must bear the weight of the silk threads."

C: 「德谬歌」
E: Demiurge

C: 「我已说了，孩子，选择权在你自己。」
E: "Look, kid, I've told you. The choice is in your hands."

C: 光历<unbreak>3920</unbreak>年前后，「阳雷龙骑」与凯撒在奥赫玛会晤。她在奥赫玛待了数日，随后作为编外军加入了逐火。
E: Around Light Calendar <unbreak>3920</unbreak>, the Daythunder Dromas Knight met with the Imperator in Okhema, where she stayed for several days before joining the Flame-Chase Journey as an auxiliary force.

C: 「…我一直想和你说，谢谢你。那时，你驱散了黑潮，保护了哀丽秘榭。披索，莉维娅，皮西厄斯…这些年，我们一直把你视作『救世主』。」
E: "...I've been wanting to tell you this: Thank you. Back then, you drove back the black tide and protected Aedes Elysiae. Piso, Livia, Pythias... all these years, we've always seen you as our 'Deliverer.'"

C: 「这一切…都要从一场科学实验说起。」
E: "It all began... with a scientific experiment."

C: 「嘟嘟嘟，嘟嘟！」
E: "Doot-doot-doot, doot-doot!"

C: 少女扑哧一声笑出来。随后，风堇、缇宝、哈托努斯…那些她熟悉的人们都留下了珍贵的影像，她从没想过还能以这种方式阅读信件。
E: The girl burst out laughing. Then Hyacine, Tribbie, Chartonus... all those familiar faces left their precious images. She had never imagined she could read a letter this way.

C: 「若细品此菜，你将尝到一股不应出现的甜味。这正源自一场『背叛』：某位我曾信赖的友人，往我专用的奶粉罐中添加糖砂……」
E: "If you taste carefully, you'll notice an unexpected sweetness. It comes from a 'betrayal': a trusted friend once added sugar to my personal milk powder jar..."

C: 路径：律法。原动力：支配。\n注释：针对单一目的进行连续运算，决策具备强外部性。\n该电信号具备高度稳定性，能够有效执行决策。其行为模式符合「秩序」建立、扩张、动摇、瓦解的规律，且适用于绝大多数智慧文明。
E: Track: Law. Primum Mobile: Dominance.\nNote: Performs continuous calculations for a single purpose. Its decisions are strongly guided by externalities.\nThis electrical signal possesses high stability and can execute decisions in an efficient manner. Its behavioral pattern aligns with the establishment, expansion, destabilization, and collapse of principles of Order, and applies to the vast majority of intelligent civilizations.

C: 路径：天空。原动力：奉献。\n注释：行为逻辑高度利他，不具备过载保护。\n该电信号易对生存环境产生认同，对集体危机积极响应的倾向类同「存护」。大部分死循环进程中，趋于严重损毁。
E: Track: Sky. Primum Mobile: Devotion.\nNote: Behavioral logic highly altruistic, lacks overload protection.\nThis electrical signal tends to identify with survival environments and actively responds to collective crises, similar to the Preservation. In most recursive loop processes, tends toward severe damage.

C:
「遐蝶」多次对LykoS发起正面攻击，并试图通过碰撞检测将LykoS静默，无果。

光历<unbreak>4253</unbreak>年，「遐蝶」成为半神，移动权限卸载，并嵌入「坐标：冥界」。

该死循环末期，「遐蝶」凭借对「毁灭」的共鸣，于休眠中察觉到深陷忆域的{NICKNAME}，并主动保护其记忆不受数据流侵蚀。
E:
"Castorice" launched multiple frontal attacks against LykoS. It attempted to use collision detection to make LykoS cease to respond, but to no avail.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>4253</unbreak>, "Castorice" ascended to demigod. Its mobility permissions were removed and became fused with "Coordinate: Nether Realm."

At the end of that recursive loop, "Castorice," through her resonance with Destruction, perceived {NICKNAME} deep within the Memory Zone during her slumber, and took the initiative to shield their memories from the erosion of the data stream.

C:
本次循环中，「赛法利娅」基于原始本能的运算逻辑发生变化，「拯救」在其决策中占据大部分权重。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年，「赛法利娅」插入无来源指令：「坐标：创世涡心」=「坐标：奥赫玛」
，将ID：LykoS引导至战场。指令生效后，「赛法利娅」被LykoS强制静默。
E: In this loop, "Cifera's" instinct-based calculation logic has changed. "Salvation" weighed heavily in its decision-making.\n\nIn Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Cifera" inserted a sourceless command: "Coordinate: Vortex of Genesis" = "Coordinate: Okhema," guiding ID: LykoS to the battlefield. After the command took effect, LykoS forced "Cifera" to cease responding.

C:
尼卡多利是司掌纷争与竞技的泰坦，按照黄金裔内部流传的神话，它向众神宣战，令世间陷入无休止的纷争。但最终战神也为战争付出了代价，其神体被黑潮侵蚀，陷入无穷无尽的疯狂。因为其怒火和壮志未曾熄灭，它的眷属军团至今仍徘徊在大地上，对想象中的敌人发动战争。

尼卡多利是一位身着洁白圣甲的高贵武者，相传它手握的天谴之矛一击便足以焚毁最强盛的城邦，那嗜血的性情也令它成为了鲜血与献祭之神。战士们聚拢在它的身下，渴望随同尼卡多利征战，得到荣耀的死亡。它的信徒建立起名为悬锋城的要塞，如他们的神明那般，为这世间带来动荡与恐惧。

曾经，这位战争之神也是守护的象征，以极致的暴力熄灭纷争，用战事维持着翁法罗斯的平衡。
E:
Nikador is the Titan of strife and competition. According to the mythology of the Chrysos Heirs, they declared war on the gods and cast the world into endless strife. However, battle also took its toll on the war god, as the divine corpus was corroded by the black tide, and they fell into endless madness. As their rage and ambition were never quelled, their Titankin legion still roams the land, waging war against imaginary enemies.

Nikador is a noble warrior that wears pure white sacred armor. Legend has it that the Lance of Fury that they wield can raze even the most powerful and prosperous city to the ground. Their bloodthirsty temperament has also made them a god of blood and sacrifice. Warriors gather under them and yearn to follow Nikador into war and achieve an honorable death. Their disciples built a fortress known as Castrum Kremnos that brings turmoil and fear to the world, much like their god.

There was once a time when this war god was also a symbol of protection: Using extreme violence to extinguish strife and using war to maintain the balance of Amphoreus.

C: 「异变机制」：【叠层引爆】\n攻击该敌人或对其造成<color=#f29e38ff>持续伤害</color>，都可叠加【炉灶过热】层数。\n将【炉灶过热】叠加一定层数时，可触发【叠层引爆】机制，对敌方全体造成伤害并为我方全体恢复能量。
E: Mutation Mechanic: Combo Blast\nAttacking this enemy or dealing <color=#f29e38ff>DoT</color> to it increases Stove Overheating stacks.\nWhen a certain number of stacks is reached, triggers Combo Blast, dealing DMG to all enemies and regenerating Energy for all allies.

C: 每消灭一只<color=#f29e38ff>扑满</color>，该扑满将为敌方全体附加<color=#f29e38ff>负面状态：易伤</color>。\n在「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间，利用消灭扑满后获取的负面增益，尽快击杀首领。

C: 回合结束时，系统将根据<color=#f29e38ff>战斗力差值</color>结算伤害。\n若对方<color=#f29e38ff>血量归零</color>，您将获得胜利。
E: At the end of the turn, the system will calculate damage based on the <color=#f29e38ff>Combat Power difference</color>.\nIf the opponent's <color=#f29e38ff>HP is reduced to 0</color>, you win.

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>虚无的预警</color>\n我方角色击中敌人时有概率使其陷入【挫败】。敌人陷入其他负面状态时也会陷入【挫败】状态。【挫败】达到一定层数时，【虚无的预警】对其施放【量子飞刃】并清空【挫败】层数。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Nihility's Warning</color>\nThere is a chance of inflicting Chagrined when an ally hits an enemy. Enemies will also succumb to Chagrined when they become afflicted by other debuffs. When Chagrined reaches a certain number of stacks, Nihility's Warning will unleash Quantum Dagger at the target and clear the Chagrined stacks.\nPrioritize upgrading the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

E: Eidolon Activation (Remembrance)

C: 我平时很喜欢仙舟幻戏嘛，心里一直有点剑侠情结。等我真正开始学剑之后，才发现比起幻戏里飞天遁地的大侠，还是教我一招一式的两位小师父更厉害！
E: I'm a huge fan of the Xianzhou's immersia — I've always felt like a hero at heart. When I really started learning the art of the sword, I realized that the heroes in the immersia are nothing compared to my two little masters who taught me every sword technique I know!

C: 碰上我算你们运气不好。
E: You have the worst luck running into me.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 让身体和头脑都冷静一下吧。
E: Calm your body and mind.

C: 目的地…你们决定就好。
E: The next destination...? Up to you.

C: 留意前方。
E: Look up ahead.

C: 即使是监控室，也会处于监控中呢。
E: Even the monitoring room is being monitored.

C: 列车组帮了我不少忙，这次也该轮到我投桃报李啦！
E: The Express has been a lifeline — time to return the favor!

C: 如果黑塔女士能多回空间站看看就好了，明明科员都是追随她来的。
E: If only Madam Herta could pay a visit to the space station more often — the researchers are clearly her followers.

C: 这里会有我感兴趣的东西么？我不信。
E: Is there anything interesting here? I doubt it.

C: 我名为阿尔托莉雅•潘德拉贡，曾是不列颠传说中的王…在后世的记录中，人们称呼我为「亚瑟王」。
E: My name is Altria Pendragon, once the legendary king of Britain... In the records of later generations, I'm known as "King Arthur."

C: 抱歉…御主，我有负所托……
E: I'm sorry... I've failed you, Master...

C: 它的手脚那么短，竟然还能将家务操持得井井有条？！真是不可貌相，不，应该说不愧是和外表一样完美的列车长啊。看来你们的旅途还真不错呀。
E: Who would've thought with such short limbs they could handle chores so efficiently? Appearances really are deceiving. Uhh, on second thought, I should say the conductor is just as perfect as they look. It's no wonder your journey's going so well.

C: 布洛妮娅是个好孩子，不愧是可可利亚教育出来的。最近不太见面了，我还挺想她的。
E: Bronya's a good kid — you can tell she learned a lot from Cocolia. *sigh* It's been a while since we saw each other. I miss her.

C: 只有轻松随性的工作，才能保证心情愉悦，给创作带来充分的灵感~
E: If you wanna make sure you don't burn yourself out or stifle your creativity, then don't push yourself too hard at work~

C: 最近总有小孩子问我，怎样才能当上戍卫官…老实说，除了坚持锻炼和平衡饮食以外，我也给不出什么有用的建议。
E: Lately, many children have come to ask me how to become a captain... *sigh* To be honest, the best advice I can give is to keep training and have a balanced diet.

C: 哪里都能碰见桑博叔叔，他也在到处冒险么？
E: I run into Mr. Sampo almost everywhere. Does he like expeditions too?

C: 去矿区冒险，去诊所冒险，去地上冒险，去，去…虎克也不知道的地方冒险！
E: Expeditions in the mines, expeditions in the clinic, expeditions on the surface... e—expeditions in the unknown!

C: 大人们总是用「长大以后就明白的道理」来糊弄虎克…虎克反倒觉得，大人们有很多「长大以后就忘记了的道理」！不信，就来比比谁的道理多！
E: Grown-ups always say things like "you'll understand when you're older," but Hook heard you forget things when you're older! Don't believe me? Let's see who knows more stuff!

C: 得快点止血。
E: I've gotta stop the bleeding.

C: 上层？没什么兴趣。当然，除非那里有值得我挑战的高手…或者需要被制裁的混球。
E: The Overworld? Not really interested. Unless, of course, there's a worthy opponent up there, or a bully that needs a good lesson.

C: 是个热心肠的好姑娘，还叫我再来仙舟时找她喝茶听书…听书还是算了罢，太耗时间。
E: She's kind and always willing to help. She invited me to "tea and storytelling" the next time I'm on the Xianzhou. I'm not so sure about the storytelling — sounds time-consuming.

C: 久闻仙舟天人驻颜有术，一见之下果然不假。只是他们为了紧守此秘，避居银河一隅，如同空坐宝山而无所取…可惜啊可惜。
E: I have long heard that the Xianzhou can preserve their beauty, and have found that to be true. However, they keep this secret by hiding in a corner of the galaxy, like sitting on a mountain of wealth without spending it... What a shame.

C: 兵家待时而动，可别一动不动啊。
E: Bide your time, but don't waste it.

C: 生命，已成惩戒。
E: Life itself is punishment.

C: 嗯哼，马上就让你知道我的厉害。
E: Hmph, wanna see what I can do?

C: 别看将军平时漫不经心，仙舟各项事务他心中自有斟酌。
E: The general may behave slovenly, but he has plans for all the affairs of the Xianzhou.

C: 胜负之事，无需介怀。
E: Do not concern yourself with the outcome.

C: 身外之物。
E: Mere worldly possessions.

C: 对不起，姐姐不能……
E: Forgive me, sister...

C: 将军实在经历了太多，很多事单拎出来，都足以击垮一个普通仙舟人的精神了…但他的状况似乎还好，大概是有自己的办法吧。
E: The general has experienced many hardships, any one of which would be enough to break the spirit of an ordinary Xianzhou citizen... but he seems to handle it all with grace. He must have his own way of coping.

C: 群邪避让。
E: Yield.

C: 为了将寒鸦大人和她姐姐区分开，我、我私底下叫她「话唠判官」…不会已经被她知道了吧？
E: In order to differentiate between the sisters, I call her the rambling judge... *gasp* She hasn't found out, has she?

C: 藿藿：投…投降……
E: Huohuo: I... surrender...

C: 我有四不吃：不吃清汤，因其乏味；不吃微辣，因其无趣；不吃鸳鸯，因其不纯；不吃香菜，因其败胃。但若是有人请客，我倒也可以破例。
E: There are four things I won't eat: I don't eat plain soup because it's boring; I don't eat anything lacking spice because it's uninteresting; I don't eat yuanyang hot pot because it's impure; and I don't eat coriander, because it's bad for the stomach. But of course, if someone else is treating me to a meal, I can make an exception.

C: 怎么尽是坏人拿好剑…坏人拿坏剑不行么！
E: Why are the bad guys always using good swords... Why can't the bad guys take bad swords?

C: 爷爷……
E: Grandfather...

C: 运转时来啦。
E: Our fortune is changing for the better.

C: 领带乱了自己又看不见。在匹诺康尼，没人会在乎别人穿了什么。他们甚至不在乎对方到底是不是「人」。
E: Tie's all messed up, not that you'd notice. Around Penacony, no one gives a hoot what you're wearing. They don't even care if the person they're talking to is actually real.

C: 我向一朵玫瑰起誓。
E: My oath is to a solitary rose.

C: 你若遇到不错的研究样本，可以同我说。那时我们再见吧。
E: If you come across a good research sample, please let me know. Until then.

C: 言语冗余，思维的交流拘泥于此，让我觉得嘈杂与悲伤……
E: The redundancy of words and the restrictions of verbal communication make for a lot of empty noise. It makes me sad...

C: 人生要是就这么一直赢下去，也挺无聊的吧？
E: Life would be quite dull if it were just an unending series of wins, wouldn't it?

C: 论及调度和激发生命的本能…你应该比我更懂吧？
E: Harnessing and tempering the instincts of life... you know more of such things than myself.

C: 他挺好玩的，办事也靠谱。但这位兄弟最大的问题是…他还有底线——束手束脚可是欢愉的大忌！
E: He's quite the entertaining one, and dependable when it comes to handling matters. The only thing with this guy is... he's got a line he won't cross... having limitations always kills the vibe!

C: 人行于命途之上…而后寻索，而后顿悟，而后存在。
E: Humans traverse the path of fate... seeking knowledge, craving revelation, striving to exist...

C: 此生如朝露，身名俱灭。
E: Existence is fleeting as the dawn's dew, destined for oblivion.

C: 黑天鹅小姐的谋略与手段，就如她的舞蹈一般周全曼妙。期待未来我们有共舞的那一刻。
E: Miss Black Swan's strategies and methods are as thorough and enchanting as her dancing. I look forward to the moment when we can dance together.

C: 别担心，我会一直陪在你身边。
E: Don't worry, I'll always be with you.

C: 知更鸟小姐的歌声，可以将人带到连美梦也抵达不了的远方。我…我会一直支持知更鸟小姐的！
E: The songs of Miss Robin have the power to carry people to faraway places, beyond even the most beautiful dreams. I... I'll always be a fan of Miss Robin!

C: 失约了……
E: My vow is broken...

C: 哎呀，成色不错。
E: Now this might be worth something!

C: 还算是有趣的消遣。
E: Not a bad way to kill time.

C: 寿司绝非米饭、俳句绝非歌词，在下手中兵器也绝非器械，乃是以忍法铸造、以忍魂灌注、以忍术驾驭、付诸以忍道的「忍•科学」。
E: Sushi is absolutely not rice. Haikus are absolutely not song lyrics. And these weapons are absolutely not equipment. They are "ninja tech" — forged with ninja methods, instilled with ninja spirit, controlled with ninjutsu, and put into use for the way of the ninja.

C: 就得打开思路~
E: You've just got to expand your thinking~

C: 我写证明只用三个词——「显然可得」「显然可见」「显然可知」——这不是很显然吗？
E: When writing up a proof, I only use three words: "obviously," "evidently," and "naturally." Isn't everything self-evident anyway?

C: 墨涅塔赐予世间千种浪漫，其中我独爱制衣，千丝万缕流过指尖，恰如众生的命运连缀成络。
E: Mnestia granted this world thousands of romances, and dressmaking is my favorite. Threads and fabric shimmer through my fingers, like how the fates of all living things become connected and woven into being.

C: 作茧…自缚……
E: Bound... by the threads of demise...

C: 偶然与意外，独具美感。
E: Happenstance and surprise, both laced with beauty.

C: 缇宝老师保证你，万事无忧~
E: Tribbie promises you that everything will be fine~

C: 飞儿总说自己讨厌拘束，不服管教。可我们知道，她一直是那个最懂事的孩子。她会为我们流泪，也会毫不犹豫地接济别人…她从不肯承认，但逐火之旅一直沉甸甸地压在她心上吧……
E: Ciphy always said that she hates rules and restraints, but we've always known that she's a good kid. She'd cry for us, and she would help people without a second thought... She may never admit it, but the weight of the Flame-Chase Journey never left her mind...

C: *我们*也有头发长长的时候，和妈妈一样。那时，*我们*还有好多好多人，有的编着长长的双股辫，有的扎着高高的单马尾…但现在头发越来越短，都快扎不起来了。
E: We once had long hair, just like our mother. Back then, there were many of us. Some had long braids, some had high ponytails... But now our hair is getting shorter, almost too short to tie up.

C: 小王子，你会如何拒绝死亡呢？
E: Little prince, how will you defy death this time?

C: 辨别老物件并非难事，真正考验的也非眼力，而是话术。能让人心悦诚服地接受自己手上的宝贝是件赝品，做什么都会成功的。
E: Spotting fakes isn't the hard part. The real trick is knowing how to talk people into accepting that their beloved treasure is a fake. If you can do that, you can succeed at anything.

C: 铭记这道痛楚！
E: Remember this agony!

C: 没关系。再难的事情，一步一步来总能解决。
E: No worries. Anything's possible if you take it step by step.

C: 海瑟音大人的琴声，现在也变得甜美浪漫了呢。我们约好啦，以后若是碰上失眠的患者，羊奶花茶配上她的歌声，一定能药到病除！
E: Lady Hysilens's violin now sounds sweet and romantic, too. We made a promise that if we got any patients with insomnia in the future, a cup of goat-milk floral tea combined with her songs would be guaranteed to work as a cure!

C: 每位天空的子民都拥有翼兽的赐福，别看小伊卡小小一团，还总是没睡醒的样子，它洒落的虹光也曾救活过一整座城邦的人，不过自那之后，它就不会说话了……
E: Every denizen of the sky has the winged beasts' blessings. Little Ica may seem small and sleepy, but their radiant rainbow-hued light once saved an entire city-state. Yet, ever since that fateful day, they haven't uttered a single word...

C: 请为我们照亮前路。
E: Please light our way forward.

C: 灰色的小鱼苗，想必有许多人愿意围绕在你身边吧？你游动时的尾流如此独特，仿佛让人回到港湾般温暖，又如登上岛屿般轻松。
E: Little gray fry... I imagine there must be many who wish to stay close to you. The current that follows in your wake is unlike any other. It's like the warmth of a safe harbor, and comforting as if stepping ashore upon an island.

C: 愿凯旋的乐音传遍大地。
E: Let the music of our victory thunder across the land.

C: 不堪入耳。
E: An insult to the ears.

C: 翁法罗斯的三月，是属于永夜之帷的时间…就请以「长夜月」这个称呼，将我放进你的回忆中吧。若能躲进岁月的罅隙，属于我们的时间还有很多，很多♭
E: The third month of Amphoreus is the month reserved for the Veil of Evernight... So, please place me into your memory using the name "Evernight." If we can hide in the cracks of time, then we'll still have countless moments that belong to us ♭.

C: 别纠结了…不是还有我吗？
E: Stop stressing... You have me, don't you?

C: 愿世界，如你我所愿。
E: May the world... be as we wish.

C: 是我…输了……
E: So this is... defeat...

C: 我…必须坚持…
E: I... have to keep going...

C: 我绝不后退。
E: I won't fall back.

C: 还是老样子……
E: Still the same old...

C: 与很多人之间，并非没有纷争与争执，但在偶然的命运相交之时，我也愿意暂时放下这些，望向我们共同的未来。
E: I have had my fair share of strife and conflict with others, but I am willing to put that aside for now and look toward our shared future, where fortuitous destinies intersect.

C: 时间还早，现在去哪？
E: It's still early. Where to now?

C: 我来守护。
E: I'm on guard.

C: 即便将被遗忘，不要放弃选择。
E: Do not give up on making a choice, even if you're about to be forgotten.

C: 退出
E: Exit

C: 中断限时任务
E: Cancel Timed Mission

C: ◆ 活动说明◆\n● 活动期间消耗开拓力可获得觅宝券，最多可获得<unbreak>100</unbreak>个觅宝券。\n● 使用觅宝券进行觅宝，可获得随机奖励，累计觅宝一定次数，还可获得星琼与自塑尘脂奖励。
E: ◆ Event Details ◆\n● During the event period, consuming Trailblaze Power grants Treasure Hunt Tickets, up to a maximum of <unbreak>100</unbreak> Treasure Hunt Tickets can be obtained.\n● Use Treasure Hunt Tickets to seek treasure and receive random rewards. Accumulating a certain number of treasure hunts will also grant Stellar Jade and Self-Modeling Resin rewards.

C: 黄金嗷呜大师赛
E: Chrysos Awoo Championship

C: 终末任务
E: Finality Mission

C: 【幼蛰虫】的攻击叠满了【示死祸源：深魇蝗灾】的本能，即将发动【荒潮到临，蝗灾示死】！
E: "Juvenile Sting" has fully stacked the Instinct of "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" and is about to unleash "Primordial Tide, Swarm of Death"!

C: 我方【致幻人鱼】受到致命伤害少于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次并通关
E: Clear the stage with ally "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" receiving fatal damage fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 在困难难度挑战中，战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat the Phase 1 of the enemy boss in the Hard difficulty for the challenge

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge

C: 完成困难难度挑战，且敌方首领触发复活次数少于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次
E: Complete the Hard difficulty challenge with the enemy boss triggering revive fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 也是一种反抗。
E: Is also a form of resistance.

C: 经过一定回合后，暖龙龙会提升巨额属性！
E: After a certain number of turns, Toasty Dragon will receive a massive stat boost!

C: 差点就得手了，再加把劲吧。
E: Almost had it. Let's give it another push.

C: 别灰心，搭档！
E: Keep your chin up, partner!

C: 不错，这场大胜足以鼓舞士气。
E: Excellent. A great victory like this is sure to boost morale.

C: 值得铭记于心的胜利。
E: A victory to be remembered.

C:
・砂金与翡翠通话博弈，暗示公司布局已成，而巡海游侠波提欧忽然现身，直指关键人物。
・翡翠与托帕作为公司代表，与匹诺康尼的老奥帝进行谈判。几经斡旋，匹诺康尼、公司、星穹列车三方达成了协议，列车也因此获得了匹诺康尼5%的股权。
・你在离开匹诺康尼前与众人告别。
・流萤独自前往翡翠的典当行，试图求取生机。翡翠揭示了流萤的身份后抛来合作的橄榄枝。
・此后，流萤来与你告别，花火现身透露晖长石号上有真正炸弹的消息，众人开始合力寻找，解决危机。
・流萤和你找到了最后的炸弹，她变身萨姆，以赴死的决心带着炸弹娃娃飞向高空。倒计时结束，却只在夜空中绽开盛大的焰火。花火将你自晖长石号上推下，流萤接住坠落中的你。
E:
・ Aventurine verbally sparred with Jade and hinted that the IPC's plans have been completed. However, Boothill, the Galaxy Ranger, suddenly appeared and headed straight toward the key individual.
・ Jade and Topaz, as IPC representatives, negotiated with Penacony's Old Oti. After several rounds of mediation, Penacony, the IPC, and the Astral Express reached an agreement, with the Express acquiring 5% of Penacony's shares.
・ You bid farewell to everyone before leaving Penacony.
・ Firefly visited Jade's pawnshop alone, seeking an opportunity for survival. Jade unveiled her true identity and extended an olive branch for cooperation.
・ Afterward, Firefly came to bid you farewell, and Sparkle made an appearance revealing news of a real bomb on the Radiant Feldspar, prompting everyone to join forces to find and resolve the crisis.
・ Firefly and you found the last bomb. She transformed into SAM and, ready to sacrifice herself, flew high into the sky with the bomb doll. As the countdown ended, only magnificent fireworks bloomed in the night sky. Sparkle pushed you off the Radiant Feldspar, and Firefly caught you as you fell.

C: 焚身
E: Immolation

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦
E: Dream of Gnawing Oak

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《忆梦浮廊》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Corridor of Memorial Dreams."

E: Something Unto Death attacked, piercing Firefly through the chest with its claws. You caught her as she fell, only to watch her dissipate into memoria in your arms.

C: 流萤发现遍地真蛰虫残骸，以及，一位她再熟悉不过的「格拉默铁骑」——<color=#f29e38ff>AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak></color>。
E: Firefly found the area covered in the wreckage of True Stings. Among the debris was a "Glamoth Iron Cavalry" she recognized instantly: <color=#f29e38ff>AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak></color>.

C: 「最后的律令」向星期日忏悔，称从未存在「死灭之蛹」，藏于橡木之梦的只有星核。若流萤误以为自己身处死地，在星核面前许下「想要活着」的愿望，星核便将促成寰宇蝗灾。星期日不认可「梦主」的律令，但他会行至「秩序」尽头，铸就由神主日唯一担负的乐园。
E: The Final Divine Law confessed to Sunday that there was never a Chrysalis of Extinction, and only a Stellaron lay hidden in the Oak Dream. If Firefly mistakenly believed she was facing death and made a wish to live before the Stellaron, it would trigger the Swarm Disaster. Sunday did not acknowledge the Dreammaster's law, but he would walk to the end of Order to forge a paradise that only The Great Septimus shall bear.

C: 在戮力双雄「困难」难度挑战中，战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat Phase 1 of the Boss Enemy in the Synergy Duo challenge in Hard mode

E: Stay at the Nethershore, and the reward will be more generous at your next encounter with this Occurrence.

C: 我方目标施放攻击后，有概率为随机攻击目标添加1个随机属性弱点，添加的弱点在敌方目标被击破后移除；为敌方目标添加弱点后，额外添加【<u>和音</u>】，并记录添加的弱点；当任意敌方目标被击破后，基于记录的弱点，对其及相邻目标造成对应的属性击破效果。
E: After an ally target uses an attack, there is a chance to add 1 random Type Weakness to a random attack target, which is removed after that enemy target is Weakness Broken. After adding a weakness to an enemy target, additionally adds "<u>Harmonize</u>" and records the added Weakness. When any enemy target is Broken, based on the recorded weaknesses, deals corresponding Type Break effect to the target and adjacent targets.

E: ● Initial Weighted Curio: #1

E: A strange visual glitch... Is the problem with Firefly, or the Dreamscape itself?\nEither way, the Primordial Memory Zone is treacherous. Let's focus on getting into the "Twelve Hours" first.

C: 匹诺康尼存在虫群的忆质投影…但愿那种灾难如今也只存在于记忆当中。\n无论如何，原始忆域危险重重，先进入「十二时刻」再说吧。
E: Penacony has memoria projections of the Swarm... Let's just hope a disaster like that remains only a memory.\nRegardless, the Primordial Memory Zone is treacherous. Let's focus on getting into the "Twelve Hours" first.

E: Salvage the memoria

C: 就因为这个，花姐才不得不回忆庭养伤，没能和我们一起去匹诺康尼。
E: That was why Big Sis Dahlia had to go back to the Garden to recover and couldn't join us in Penacony.

C: 在我看来，记忆也一样。一旦发觉哪里出现空白，它自己就会小心翼翼地进行填补，无论你是否需要。
E: Memories work the same way if you ask me. Once your brain discovers a void in your memories, it'll carefully fill in the gap on its own, whether you need it or not.

C: 从刚才起，我就很在意……
E: I've been wondering about something from just now...

E: And a "price" to pay.

C: 是那只忆域迷因，当心些。
E: It's that Memory Zone Meme. Be careful.

C: 自此，砂金展开了他的豪赌。
E: From that moment on, Aventurine embarked upon his great gamble.

C: 哦？你重操旧业了？
E: Oh? Back to your old tricks again?

C: 换句话说，这位无名客，是盛会之星真正的奠基人。
E: In other words, this Nameless is the true founder of the Planet of Festivities.

C: 我也还未见识过。据他所说，是倾其所有，悬河注火般的一击。
E: I haven't seen it myself either. According to him, it was an all-out attack, like a torrent of fire pouring down from above.

C: 一份留在「过去」的遗产，将会赋予他们勇气，继续走向「未来」。即使不能同行，我也为他们感到欣慰。
E: A legacy left in the past will give them the courage to continue walking towards the future. Even if I can't walk alongside them, I'm content in knowing this.

C: 这是谁的救兵？
E: Whose backup is this?

C: 「纯美」在上——「希世难得号」竟将我带来了此地。或许正是命运的指引，在这片被「繁育」污浊的梦境中，我将贯彻纯美之名，为诸位荡清前路！
E: In the name of Beauty, the One and Only has brought me to this place. Perhaps it is destiny's guidance that led me here. In this dreamscape tainted by the Propagation, I shall uphold the name of Beauty and clear the path for all of you!

C: 不可显露注定的死亡
E: Never reveal the inevitable death.

C: 想想看，你哥哥已经是天空外的神了。不把天空撕开个口子，可是连面都见不着。
E: Think about it. Your brother is already a god beyond the heavens. You're not gonna even see him unless you rip open the sky.

C: 你也要相信我们。
E: You need to believe in us too.

C: 是啊…「虚无」这道影子的背后，也一定存在着世间最猛烈的光源。
E: Indeed... Behind the shadow of the Nihility, there must exist the most blazing source of light in the world.

C: 愿人们彼此拥抱，无论与谁相逢，都愿意献上最真诚的赞美！
E: May people embrace each other, and offer their most sincere compliments to whoever they meet!

C: 真理医生
E: Dr. Ratio

C: 你同样认为…世上不应该存在「神」？
E: Do you also think... that there shouldn't be any "god" in this world?

C: 自那以后，你再不曾到访那片岩洞。
E: Since then, you've never returned to those caves.

C: 你们站上船头，折叠的长帆自动被风填满——这就是传说中的幽灵船。平静的水面顿时掀起巨浪，你迎着浪头航行，仿佛向巨龙发起冲锋的勇士。
E: As you stand at the bow, the folded sails automatically fill with wind. This is the legendary ghost ship. The calm waters suddenly erupt into massive waves, and you sail head-on into them, like a warrior charging towards a giant dragon.

C: 「来吧，来吧，和我们一同沉入汪洋！」冥河中沉沦的亡魂们纷纷伸手，试图将你们拖入水底，其中甚至混杂着法吉娜的造物。陆续有船员消失在水下，你拼命向前游着，不敢回头……
E: "Come, come, sink with us into the depths!" The fallen souls in the River of Souls reach out their hands, trying to drag you under the water, and among them are even Phagousa's creations. One by one, crew members vanish beneath the surface as you swim forward desperately, not daring to look back...

C: 奇美拉对战的具体规则，就在实战中做讲解好啦。我们现在就开始吧。
E: I'll explain the specific rules of chimera battles during the actual combat. Let's get started right now.
